authors_text: Xin Huang,Xiaoyu Tian,Junru Gu,Qiao Sun,Hang Zhao
title: VectorFlow: Combining Images and Vectors for Traffic Occupancy and Flow Prediction
title_zh: VectorFlow：结合图像和矢量进行交通占用和流量预测
comment: Technical report. 5 pages, 1 figure, and 2 tables
comments: Technical report. 5 pages, 1 figure, and 2 tables
abstract: Predicting future behaviors of road agents is a key task in autonomous driving. While existing models have demonstrated great success in predicting marginal agent future behaviors, it remains a challenge to efficiently predict consistent joint behaviors of multiple agents. Recently, the occupancy flow fields representation was proposed to represent joint future states of road agents through a combination of occupancy grid and flow, which supports efficient and consistent joint predictions. In this work, we propose a novel occupancy flow fields predictor to produce accurate occupancy and flow predictions, by combining the power of an image encoder that learns features from a rasterized traffic image and a vector encoder that captures information of continuous agent trajectories and map states. The two encoded features are fused by multiple attention modules before generating final predictions. Our simple but effective model ranks 3rd place on the Waymo Open Dataset Occupancy and Flow Prediction Challenge, and achieves the best performance in the occluded occupancy and flow prediction task.
summary: Predicting future behaviors of road agents is a key task in autonomous driving. While existing models have demonstrated great success in predicting marginal agent future behaviors, it remains a challenge to efficiently predict consistent joint behaviors of multiple agents. Recently, the occupancy flow fields representation was proposed to represent joint future states of road agents through a combination of occupancy grid and flow, which supports efficient and consistent joint predictions. In this work, we propose a novel occupancy flow fields predictor to produce accurate occupancy and flow predictions, by combining the power of an image encoder that learns features from a rasterized traffic image and a vector encoder that captures information of continuous agent trajectories and map states. The two encoded features are fused by multiple attention modules before generating final predictions. Our simple but effective model ranks 3rd place on the Waymo Open Dataset Occupancy and Flow Prediction Challenge, and achieves the best performance in the occluded occupancy and flow prediction task.
abstract_zh: 预测道路代理的未来行为是自动驾驶的一项关键任务。尽管现有模型在预测边缘智能体未来行为方面取得了巨大成功，但有效预测多个智能体的一致联合行为仍然是一个挑战。最近，提出了占用流场表示，通过占用网格和流的组合来表示道路代理的联合未来状态，这支持高效且一致的联合预测。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的占用流场预测器，通过结合从光栅化交通图像中学习特征的图像编码器和捕获连续代理轨迹和地图状态信息的矢量编码器的功能，来产生准确的占用和流量预测。在生成最终预测之前，两个编码特征由多个注意模块融合。我们简单但有效的模型在 Waymo 开放数据集占用和流量预测挑战赛中排名第三，并在遮挡占用和流量预测任务中取得了最佳性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VectorFlow模型，通过结合图像和向量信息预测交通场景中的占用状态和流量，以提升多智能体联合行为预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有模型难以高效预测多个道路代理的一致性联合行为，而占用流场表示虽能支持联合预测，但需进一步提升预测精度，尤其在遮挡场景下表现不足。
AI.method: 融合图像编码器（提取栅格化交通图像特征）与向量编码器（捕捉连续轨迹和地图状态信息），通过多注意力模块融合特征后生成最终预测结果。
AI.result: 模型在Waymo Open Dataset占用和流量预测挑战赛中排名第三，并在遮挡场景预测任务中取得最佳性能。
AI.conclusion: 结合图像与向量特征的VectorFlow模型通过注意力机制有效提升了多智能体联合行为预测的准确性，尤其在复杂遮挡场景中表现突出。

authors_text: Weiwei Cao,Yuzhu Cao
title: Using Large Context for Kidney Multi-Structure Segmentation from CTA Images
title_zh: 使用大上下文从 CTA 图像中进行肾脏多结构分割
comment: The paper lacks research value
comments: The paper lacks research value
abstract: Accurate and automated segmentation of multi-structure (i.e., kidneys, renal tu-mors, arteries, and veins) from 3D CTA is one of the most important tasks for surgery-based renal cancer treatment (e.g., laparoscopic partial nephrectomy). This paper briefly presents the main technique details of the multi-structure seg-mentation method in MICCAI 2022 KIPA challenge. The main contribution of this paper is that we design the 3D UNet with the large context information cap-turing capability. Our method ranked eighth on the MICCAI 2022 KIPA chal-lenge open testing dataset with a mean position of 8.2. Our code and trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/fengjiejiejiejie/kipa22_nnunet.
summary: Accurate and automated segmentation of multi-structure (i.e., kidneys, renal tu-mors, arteries, and veins) from 3D CTA is one of the most important tasks for surgery-based renal cancer treatment (e.g., laparoscopic partial nephrectomy). This paper briefly presents the main technique details of the multi-structure seg-mentation method in MICCAI 2022 KIPA challenge. The main contribution of this paper is that we design the 3D UNet with the large context information cap-turing capability. Our method ranked eighth on the MICCAI 2022 KIPA chal-lenge open testing dataset with a mean position of 8.2. Our code and trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/fengjiejiejiejie/kipa22_nnunet.
abstract_zh: 从 3D CTA 中准确自动分割多结构（即肾脏、肾肿瘤、动脉和静脉）是基于手术的肾癌治疗（例如腹腔镜肾部分切除术）的最重要任务之一。本文简要介绍了 MICCAI 2022 KIPA 挑战赛中多结构分割方法的主要技术细节。本文的主要贡献是我们设计了具有大上下文信息捕获能力的3D UNet。我们的方法在 MICCAI 2022 KIPA 挑战开放测试数据集上排名第八，平均排名为 8.2。我们的代码和经过训练的模型可在 https://github.com/fengjiejiejiejie/kipa22_nnunet 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于3D UNet的肾脏多结构分割方法，用于从CTA图像中分割肾脏、肾肿瘤、动脉和静脉等结构。
AI.motivation: 精准的自动化分割对于基于手术的肾癌治疗（如腹腔镜部分肾切除术）至关重要，但现有方法在多结构分割任务中仍存在挑战。
AI.method: 设计了一种具有大尺度上下文信息捕捉能力的3D UNet网络，通过整合多结构特征提升分割精度。
AI.result: 该方法在MICCAI 2022 KIPA挑战赛公开测试数据集上排名第八（平均排名8.2），代码和训练模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 基于大尺度上下文信息的3D UNet有效提升了肾脏多结构分割性能，为临床手术规划提供了可靠工具。

authors_text: Xinghui Zhou,Xin Jin,Jianwen Lv,Heng Huang,Ming Mao,Shuai Cui
title: Aesthetic Attributes Assessment of Images with AMANv2 and DPC-CaptionsV2
title_zh: 使用 AMANv2 和 DPC-CaptionsV2 评估图像的美学属性
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures, on going research. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1907.04983
comments: 10 pages, 4 figures, on going research. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1907.04983
abstract: Image aesthetic quality assessment is popular during the last decade. Besides numerical assessment, nature language assessment (aesthetic captioning) has been proposed to describe the generally aesthetic impression of an image. In this paper, we propose aesthetic attribute assessment, which is the aesthetic attributes captioning, i.e., to assess the aesthetic attributes such as composition, lighting usage and color arrangement. It is a non-trivial task to label the comments of aesthetic attributes, which limit the scale of the corresponding datasets. We construct a novel dataset, named DPC-CaptionsV2, by a semi-automatic way. The knowledge is transferred from a small-scale dataset with full annotations to large-scale professional comments from a photography website. Images of DPC-CaptionsV2 contain comments up to 4 aesthetic attributes: composition, lighting, color, and subject. Then, we propose a new version of Aesthetic Multi-Attributes Networks (AMANv2) based on the BUTD model and the VLPSA model. AMANv2 fuses features of a mixture of small-scale PCCD dataset with full annotations and large-scale DPCCaptionsV2 dataset with full annotations. The experimental results of DPCCaptionsV2 show that our method can predict the comments on 4 aesthetic attributes, which are closer to aesthetic topics than those produced by the previous AMAN model. Through the evaluation criteria of image captioning, the specially designed AMANv2 model is better to the CNN-LSTM model and the AMAN model.
summary: Image aesthetic quality assessment is popular during the last decade. Besides numerical assessment, nature language assessment (aesthetic captioning) has been proposed to describe the generally aesthetic impression of an image. In this paper, we propose aesthetic attribute assessment, which is the aesthetic attributes captioning, i.e., to assess the aesthetic attributes such as composition, lighting usage and color arrangement. It is a non-trivial task to label the comments of aesthetic attributes, which limit the scale of the corresponding datasets. We construct a novel dataset, named DPC-CaptionsV2, by a semi-automatic way. The knowledge is transferred from a small-scale dataset with full annotations to large-scale professional comments from a photography website. Images of DPC-CaptionsV2 contain comments up to 4 aesthetic attributes: composition, lighting, color, and subject. Then, we propose a new version of Aesthetic Multi-Attributes Networks (AMANv2) based on the BUTD model and the VLPSA model. AMANv2 fuses features of a mixture of small-scale PCCD dataset with full annotations and large-scale DPCCaptionsV2 dataset with full annotations. The experimental results of DPCCaptionsV2 show that our method can predict the comments on 4 aesthetic attributes, which are closer to aesthetic topics than those produced by the previous AMAN model. Through the evaluation criteria of image captioning, the specially designed AMANv2 model is better to the CNN-LSTM model and the AMAN model.
abstract_zh: 图像美学质量评估是近十年来流行的。除了数值评估之外，还提出了自然语言评估（审美字幕）来描述图像的总体美感印象。在本文中，我们提出审美属性评估，即审美属性字幕，即评估构图、灯光使用和色彩布置等审美属性。标记美学属性的评论是一项艰巨的任务，这限制了相应数据集的规模。我们通过半自动方式构建了一个新颖的数据集，名为 DPC-CaptionsV2。知识从带有完整注释的小规模数据集转移到摄影网站的大规模专业评论。 DPC-CaptionsV2 的图像包含最多 4 个美学属性的注释：构图、照明、颜色和主题。然后，我们提出了基于 BUTD 模型和 VLPSA 模型的新版本审美多属性网络（AMANv2）。 AMANv2 融合了具有完整注释的小型 PCCD 数据集和具有完整注释的大规模 DPCCaptionsV2 数据集的混合特征。 DPCCaptionsV2的实验结果表明，我们的方法可以预测4种审美属性的评论，这些评论比之前的AMAN模型产生的评论更接近审美主题。通过图像字幕的评价标准，专门设计的AMANv2模型优于CNN-LSTM模型和AMAN模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于AMANv2模型和DPC-CaptionsV2数据集的图像美学属性评估方法，用于生成描述构图、光线、色彩和主体等美学属性的自然语言评论。
AI.motivation: 传统图像美学评估多依赖数值评分或通用描述，但针对具体美学属性（如构图、色彩）的标注成本高且数据集规模受限，亟需更高效的方法和数据集。
AI.method: 构建半自动标注的DPC-CaptionsV2数据集，并基于BUTD和VLPSA模型改进AMANv2，融合小规模全标注PCCD数据集与大规模DPC-CaptionsV2数据集的特征进行训练。
AI.result: AMANv2在DPC-CaptionsV2数据集上生成的四类美学属性评论更贴近真实审美主题，且在图像描述任务指标上优于CNN-LSTM和原版AMAN模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过跨数据集特征融合与模型改进，本文方法有效提升了图像美学属性描述的准确性与自然性，为细粒度美学分析提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于AMANv2模型和DPC-CaptionsV2数据集的图像美学属性评估方法，用于生成描述构图、光线、色彩和主体等美学属性的自然语言评论。
ai_content.motivation: 传统图像美学评估多依赖数值评分或通用描述，但针对具体美学属性（如构图、色彩）的标注成本高且数据集规模受限，亟需更高效的方法和数据集。
ai_content.method: 构建半自动标注的DPC-CaptionsV2数据集，并基于BUTD和VLPSA模型改进AMANv2，融合小规模全标注PCCD数据集与大规模DPC-CaptionsV2数据集的特征进行训练。
ai_content.result: AMANv2在DPC-CaptionsV2数据集上生成的四类美学属性评论更贴近真实审美主题，且在图像描述任务指标上优于CNN-LSTM和原版AMAN模型。

search_text: Aesthetic Attributes Assessment of Images with AMANv2 and DPC-CaptionsV2 使用 AMANv2 和 DPC-CaptionsV2 评估图像的美学属性 Image aesthetic quality assessment is popular during the last decade. Besides numerical assessment, nature language assessment (aesthetic captioning) has been proposed to describe the generally aesthetic impression of an image. In this paper, we propose aesthetic attribute assessment, which is the aesthetic attributes captioning, i.e., to assess the aesthetic attributes such as composition, lighting usage and color arrangement. It is a non-trivial task to label the comments of aesthetic attributes, which limit the scale of the corresponding datasets. We construct a novel dataset, named DPC-CaptionsV2, by a semi-automatic way. The knowledge is transferred from a small-scale dataset with full annotations to large-scale professional comments from a photography website. Images of DPC-CaptionsV2 contain comments up to 4 aesthetic attributes: composition, lighting, color, and subject. Then, we propose a new version of Aesthetic Multi-Attributes Networks (AMANv2) based on the BUTD model and the VLPSA model. AMANv2 fuses features of a mixture of small-scale PCCD dataset with full annotations and large-scale DPCCaptionsV2 dataset with full annotations. The experimental results of DPCCaptionsV2 show that our method can predict the comments on 4 aesthetic attributes, which are closer to aesthetic topics than those produced by the previous AMAN model. Through the evaluation criteria of image captioning, the specially designed AMANv2 model is better to the CNN-LSTM model and the AMAN model. 图像美学质量评估是近十年来流行的。除了数值评估之外，还提出了自然语言评估（审美字幕）来描述图像的总体美感印象。在本文中，我们提出审美属性评估，即审美属性字幕，即评估构图、灯光使用和色彩布置等审美属性。标记美学属性的评论是一项艰巨的任务，这限制了相应数据集的规模。我们通过半自动方式构建了一个新颖的数据集，名为 DPC-CaptionsV2。知识从带有完整注释的小规模数据集转移到摄影网站的大规模专业评论。 DPC-CaptionsV2 的图像包含最多 4 个美学属性的注释：构图、照明、颜色和主题。然后，我们提出了基于 BUTD 模型和 VLPSA 模型的新版本审美多属性网络（AMANv2）。 AMANv2 融合了具有完整注释的小型 PCCD 数据集和具有完整注释的大规模 DPCCaptionsV2 数据集的混合特征。 DPCCaptionsV2的实验结果表明，我们的方法可以预测4种审美属性的评论，这些评论比之前的AMAN模型产生的评论更接近审美主题。通过图像字幕的评价标准，专门设计的AMANv2模型优于CNN-LSTM模型和AMAN模型。 本文提出了一种基于AMANv2模型和DPC-CaptionsV2数据集的图像美学属性评估方法，用于生成描述构图、光线、色彩和主体等美学属性的自然语言评论。 Xinghui Zhou,Xin Jin,Jianwen Lv,Heng Huang,Ming Mao,Shuai Cui cs.CV

authors_text: Zhilong Chen,Xiaochong Lan,Jinghua Piao,Yunke Zhang,Yong Li
title: A Mixed-Methods Analysis of the Algorithm-Mediated Labor of Online Food Deliverers in China
title_zh: 中国在线送餐员算法中介劳动的混合方法分析
comment: Accepted to CSCW 2022
comments: Accepted to CSCW 2022
abstract: In recent years, China has witnessed the proliferation and success of the online food delivery industry, an emerging type of the gig economy. Online food deliverers who deliver the food from restaurants to customers play a critical role in enabling this industry. Mediated by algorithms and coupled with interactions with multiple stakeholders, this emerging kind of labor has been taken by millions of people. In this paper, we present a mixed-methods analysis to investigate this labor of online food deliverers and uncover how the mediation of algorithms shapes it. Combining large-scale quantitative data-driven investigations of 100,000 deliverers' behavioral data with in-depth qualitative interviews with 15 online food deliverers, we demonstrate their working activities, identify how algorithms mediate their delivery procedures, and reveal how they perceive their relationships with different stakeholders as a result of their algorithm-mediated labor. Our findings provide important implications for enabling better experiences and more humanized labor of deliverers as well as workers in gig economies of similar kinds.
summary: In recent years, China has witnessed the proliferation and success of the online food delivery industry, an emerging type of the gig economy. Online food deliverers who deliver the food from restaurants to customers play a critical role in enabling this industry. In this paper, we present a mixed-methods analysis to investigate this labor of online food deliverers and uncover how the mediation of algorithms shapes it. Combining large-scale quantitative data-driven investigations of 100,000 deliverers' behavioral data with in-depth qualitative interviews with 15 online food deliverers, we demonstrate their working activities, identify how algorithms mediate their delivery procedures, and reveal how they perceive their relationships with different stakeholders as a result of their algorithm-mediated labor. Our findings provide important implications for enabling better experiences and more humanized labor of deliverers as well as workers in gig economies of similar kinds.
abstract_zh: 近年来，中国见证了在线食品配送行业的蓬勃发展和成功，这是一种新兴的零工经济形式。将食物从餐厅送到顾客手中的在线送餐员在推动该行业发展方面发挥着关键作用。通过算法以及与多个利益相关者的互动，这种新兴的劳动力已经被数百万人所接受。在本文中，我们提出了一种混合方法分析来调查在线食品配送员的这种劳动，并揭示算法的中介如何塑造它。通过对 100,000 名送餐员的行为数据进行大规模定量数据驱动的调查，以及对 15 名在线送​​餐员的深入定性访谈，我们展示了他们的工作活动，确定了算法如何调节他们的送餐程序，并揭示了他们如何看待由于算法介导的劳动而与不同利益相关者的关系。我们的研究结果对于为送货员以及类似零工经济中的工人提供更好的体验和更人性化的劳动提供了重要的启示。

AI.tldr: 本文通过混合方法分析中国在线食品配送员的算法中介劳动，探讨算法如何塑造其工作流程及与利益相关者的关系。
AI.motivation: 随着中国在线食品配送行业的兴起，配送员作为关键劳动力，其工作受算法中介影响显著，需研究其劳动体验及改进方向。
AI.method: 结合10万名配送员的行为大数据分析与15名配送员的深度访谈，采用定量与定性混合研究方法。
AI.result: 揭示算法如何调控配送流程，配送员对算法与利益相关者关系的感知，以及优化劳动体验的潜在方向。
AI.conclusion: 算法中介劳动需平衡效率与人性化，为类似零工经济提供改善劳动者体验的实践参考。

authors_text: Xin Jin,Shu Zhao,Le Zhang,Xin Zhao,Qiang Deng,Chaoen Xiao
title: Attribute Controllable Beautiful Caucasian Face Generation by Aesthetics Driven Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过美学驱动的强化学习生成可控的美丽白种人脸
comment: 13 pages, 5 figures. ACM Multimedia 2022 Technical Demos and Videos Program
comments: 13 pages, 5 figures. ACM Multimedia 2022 Technical Demos and Videos Program
abstract: In recent years, image generation has made great strides in improving the quality of images, producing high-fidelity ones. Also, quite recently, there are architecture designs, which enable GAN to unsupervisedly learn the semantic attributes represented in different layers. However, there is still a lack of research on generating face images more consistent with human aesthetics. Based on EigenGAN [He et al., ICCV 2021], we build the techniques of reinforcement learning into the generator of EigenGAN. The agent tries to figure out how to alter the semantic attributes of the generated human faces towards more preferable ones. To accomplish this, we trained an aesthetics scoring model that can conduct facial beauty prediction. We also can utilize this scoring model to analyze the correlation between face attributes and aesthetics scores. Empirically, using off-the-shelf techniques from reinforcement learning would not work well. So instead, we present a new variant incorporating the ingredients emerging in the reinforcement learning communities in recent years. Compared to the original generated images, the adjusted ones show clear distinctions concerning various attributes. Experimental results using the MindSpore, show the effectiveness of the proposed method. Altered facial images are commonly more attractive, with significantly improved aesthetic levels.
summary: In recent years, image generation has made great strides in improving the quality of images, producing high-fidelity ones. Also, quite recently, there are architecture designs, which enable GAN to unsupervisedly learn the semantic attributes represented in different layers. However, there is still a lack of research on generating face images more consistent with human aesthetics. Based on EigenGAN [He et al., ICCV 2021], we build the techniques of reinforcement learning into the generator of EigenGAN. The agent tries to figure out how to alter the semantic attributes of the generated human faces towards more preferable ones. To accomplish this, we trained an aesthetics scoring model that can conduct facial beauty prediction. We also can utilize this scoring model to analyze the correlation between face attributes and aesthetics scores. Empirically, using off-the-shelf techniques from reinforcement learning would not work well. So instead, we present a new variant incorporating the ingredients emerging in the reinforcement learning communities in recent years. Compared to the original generated images, the adjusted ones show clear distinctions concerning various attributes. Experimental results using the MindSpore, show the effectiveness of the proposed method. Altered facial images are commonly more attractive, with significantly improved aesthetic levels.
abstract_zh: 近年来，图像生成在提高图像质量、生成高保真图像方面取得了长足进步。此外，最近出现了一些架构设计，使 GAN 能够无监督地学习不同层中表示的语义属性。然而，目前还缺乏生成更符合人类审美的人脸图像的研究。基于 EigenGAN [He et al., ICCV 2021]，我们将强化学习技术构建到 EigenGAN 的生成器中。智能体试图找出如何将生成的人脸的语义属性改变为更合适的。为了实现这一目标，我们训练了一个可以进行面部美貌预测的美学评分模型。我们还可以利用这个评分模型来分析人脸属性和美观评分之间的相关性。根据经验，使用强化学习中的现成技术效果不佳。因此，我们提出了一种新的变体，融合了近年来强化学习社区中出现的成分。与原始生成的图像相比，调整后的图像在各种属性上显示出明显的区别。使用MindSpore的实验结果表明了所提方法的有效性。改变后的面部图像通常更有吸引力，审美水平显着提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于美学驱动的强化学习方法，用于生成具有可控属性的美丽白人面部图像。
AI.motivation: 尽管图像生成技术已取得进展，但现有研究缺乏生成更符合人类审美标准的面部图像的系统性方法。
AI.method: 基于EigenGAN框架，将强化学习整合至生成器中，训练美学评分模型预测面部美感，并通过调整语义属性优化生成结果。
AI.result: 实验表明调整后的面部图像美学评分显著提升，且在MindSpore平台上验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过强化学习有效提升了生成图像的美学水平，为可控属性的高质量人脸生成提供了新思路。

Compared to the original generated images, the adjusted ones show clear distinctions concerning various attributes. Experimental results using the MindSpore, show the effectiveness of the proposed method. Altered facial images are commonly more attractive, with significantly improved aesthetic levels. 近年来，图像生成在提高图像质量、生成高保真图像方面取得了长足进步。此外，最近出现了一些架构设计，使 GAN 能够无监督地学习不同层中表示的语义属性。然而，目前还缺乏生成更符合人类审美的人脸图像的研究。基于 EigenGAN [He et al., ICCV 2021]，我们将强化学习技术构建到 EigenGAN 的生成器中。智能体试图找出如何将生成的人脸的语义属性改变为更合适的。为了实现这一目标，我们训练了一个可以进行面部美貌预测的美学评分模型。我们还可以利用这个评分模型来分析人脸属性和美观评分之间的相关性。根据经验，使用强化学习中的现成技术效果不佳。因此，我们提出了一种新的变体，融合了近年来强化学习社区中出现的成分。与原始生成的图像相比，调整后的图像在各种属性上显示出明显的区别。使用MindSpore的实验结果表明了所提方法的有效性。改变后的面部图像通常更有吸引力，审美水平显着提高。 本文提出一种基于美学驱动的强化学习方法，用于生成具有可控属性的美丽白人面部图像。 Xin Jin,Shu Zhao,Le Zhang,Xin Zhao,Qiang Deng,Chaoen Xiao cs.CV

authors_text: Manoosh Samiei,Ruofeng Li
title: Object Detection with Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用深度强化学习进行物体检测
comment: 12 pages
comments: 12 pages
abstract: Object localization has been a crucial task in computer vision field. Methods of localizing objects in an image have been proposed based on the features of the attended pixels. Recently researchers have proposed methods to formulate object localization as a dynamic decision process, which can be solved by a reinforcement learning approach. In this project, we implement a novel active object localization algorithm based on deep reinforcement learning. We compare two different action settings for this MDP: a hierarchical method and a dynamic method. We further perform some ablation studies on the performance of the models by investigating different hyperparameters and various architecture changes.
summary: Object localization has been a crucial task in computer vision field. Methods of localizing objects in an image have been proposed based on the features of the attended pixels. Recently researchers have proposed methods to formulate object localization as a dynamic decision process, which can be solved by a reinforcement learning approach. In this project, we implement a novel active object localization algorithm based on deep reinforcement learning. We compare two different action settings for this MDP: a hierarchical method and a dynamic method. We further perform some ablation studies on the performance of the models by investigating different hyperparameters and various architecture changes.
abstract_zh: 目标定位一直是计算机视觉领域的一项关键任务。已经提出了基于关注像素的特征来定位图像中的对象的方法。最近，研究人员提出了将对象定位制定为动态决策过程的方法，可以通过强化学习方法来解决。在这个项目中，我们实现了一种基于深度强化学习的新型主动对象定位算法。我们比较此 MDP 的两种不同操作设置：分层方法和动态方法。我们通过研究不同的超参数和各种架构变化，进一步对模型的性能进行一些消融研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的主动目标定位算法，并比较了两种不同的动作设置方法。
AI.motivation: 目标定位是计算机视觉中的关键任务，传统方法依赖于特征提取，而强化学习能将定位建模为动态决策过程，从而提升性能。
AI.method: 实现基于深度强化学习的主动目标定位算法，比较分层方法与动态方法两种动作设置，并通过消融实验分析超参数和架构变化的影响。
AI.result: 实验结果表明两种方法的性能差异及关键超参数和架构对模型效果的影响。
AI.conclusion: 深度强化学习为目标定位提供了新思路，分层与动态方法各有优劣，消融实验为模型优化提供了依据。

authors_text: Yikai Bian,Le Hui,Jianjun Qian,Jin Xie
title: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Point Cloud Semantic Segmentation via Graph Matching
title_zh: 通过图匹配进行点云语义分割的无监督域适应
abstract: Unsupervised domain adaptation for point cloud semantic segmentation has attracted great attention due to its effectiveness in learning with unlabeled data. Most of existing methods use global-level feature alignment to transfer the knowledge from the source domain to the target domain, which may cause the semantic ambiguity of the feature space. In this paper, we propose a graph-based framework to explore the local-level feature alignment between the two domains, which can reserve semantic discrimination during adaptation. Specifically, in order to extract local-level features, we first dynamically construct local feature graphs on both domains and build a memory bank with the graphs from the source domain. In particular, we use optimal transport to generate the graph matching pairs. Then, based on the assignment matrix, we can align the feature distributions between the two domains with the graph-based local feature loss. Furthermore, we consider the correlation between the features of different categories and formulate a category-guided contrastive loss to guide the segmentation model to learn discriminative features on the target domain. Extensive experiments on different synthetic-to-real and real-to-real domain adaptation scenarios demonstrate that our method can achieve state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptation for point cloud semantic segmentation has attracted great attention due to its effectiveness in learning with unlabeled data. Most of existing methods use global-level feature alignment to transfer the knowledge from the source domain to the target domain, which may cause the semantic ambiguity of the feature space. In this paper, we propose a graph-based framework to explore the local-level feature alignment between the two domains, which can reserve semantic discrimination during adaptation. Specifically, in order to extract local-level features, we first dynamically construct local feature graphs on both domains and build a memory bank with the graphs from the source domain. In particular, we use optimal transport to generate the graph matching pairs. Then, based on the assignment matrix, we can align the feature distributions between the two domains with the graph-based local feature loss. Furthermore, we consider the correlation between the features of different categories and formulate a category-guided contrastive loss to guide the segmentation model to learn discriminative features on the target domain. Extensive experiments on different synthetic-to-real and real-to-real domain adaptation scenarios demonstrate that our method can achieve state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 点云语义分割的无监督域适应由于其在无标签数据学习中的有效性而引起了极大的关注。现有方法大多数使用全局级特征对齐将知识从源域转移到目标域，这可能会导致特征空间的语义模糊。在本文中，我们提出了一个基于图的框架来探索两个域之间的局部特征对齐，这可以在适应过程中保留语义区分。具体来说，为了提取局部特征，我们首先在两个域上动态构建局部特征图，并使用源域中的图构建一个内存库。特别是，我们使用最佳传输来生成图匹配对。然后，根据分配矩阵，我们可以将两个域之间的特征分布与基于图的局部特征损失对齐。此外，我们考虑不同类别特征之间的相关性，并制定类别引导对比损失来指导分割模型学习目标域上的判别特征。对不同的合成到真实和真实到真实领域适应场景的大量实验表明，我们的方法可以实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图匹配的无监督领域自适应方法，用于点云语义分割，通过局部特征对齐解决语义模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖全局特征对齐可能导致特征空间语义模糊，无法有效保留领域间语义区分性。
AI.method: 动态构建源域和目标域的局部特征图，利用最优传输生成图匹配对，并通过图基局部特征损失和类别引导对比损失实现领域对齐。
AI.result: 在多种合成到真实和真实到真实的领域自适应场景中，该方法达到最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 局部特征对齐与类别引导损失的结合有效提升了点云语义分割的领域自适应能力。

authors_text: Yichuan Deng,Hang Hu,Zhao Song,Omri Weinstein,Danyang Zhuo
title: Training Overparametrized Neural Networks in Sublinear Time
title_zh: 在亚线性时间内训练过参数化神经网络
abstract: The success of deep learning comes at a tremendous computational and energy cost, and the scalability of training massively overparametrized neural networks is becoming a real barrier to the progress of artificial intelligence (AI). Despite the popularity and low cost-per-iteration of traditional backpropagation via gradient decent, stochastic gradient descent (SGD) has prohibitive convergence rate in non-convex settings, both in theory and practice. To mitigate this cost, recent works have proposed to employ alternative (Newton-type) training methods with much faster convergence rate, albeit with higher cost-per-iteration. For a typical neural network with $m=\mathrm{poly}(n)$ parameters and input batch of $n$ datapoints in $\mathbb{R}^d$, the previous work of [Brand, Peng, Song, and Weinstein, ITCS'2021] requires $\sim mnd + n^3$ time per iteration. In this paper, we present a novel training method that requires only $m^{1-α} n d + n^3$ amortized time in the same overparametrized regime, where $α\in (0.01,1)$ is some fixed constant. This method relies on a new and alternative view of neural networks, as a set of binary search trees, where each iteration corresponds to modifying a small subset of the nodes in the tree. We believe this view would have further applications in the design and analysis of deep neural networks (DNNs).
summary: The success of deep learning comes at a tremendous computational and energy cost, and the scalability of training massively overparametrized neural networks is becoming a real barrier to the progress of artificial intelligence (AI). Despite the popularity and low cost-per-iteration of traditional backpropagation via gradient decent, stochastic gradient descent (SGD) has prohibitive convergence rate in non-convex settings, both in theory and practice. To mitigate this cost, recent works have proposed to employ alternative (Newton-type) training methods with much faster convergence rate, albeit with higher cost-per-iteration. For a typical neural network with $m=\mathrm{poly}(n)$ parameters and input batch of $n$ datapoints in $\mathbb{R}^d$, the previous work of [Brand, Peng, Song, and Weinstein, ITCS'2021] requires $\sim mnd + n^3$ time per iteration. In this paper, we present a novel training method that requires only $m^{1-α} n d + n^3$ amortized time in the same overparametrized regime, where $α\in (0.01,1)$ is some fixed constant. This method relies on a new and alternative view of neural networks, as a set of binary search trees, where each iteration corresponds to modifying a small subset of the nodes in the tree. We believe this view would have further applications in the design and analysis of deep neural networks (DNNs).
abstract_zh: 深度学习的成功需要巨大的计算和能源成本，而训练大规模超参数化神经网络的可扩展性正在成为人工智能 (AI) 进步的真正障碍。尽管通过梯度下降的传统反向传播很受欢迎且每次迭代成本较低，但随机梯度下降（SGD）在非凸设置中无论在理论还是实践上都具有令人望而却步的收敛速度。为了减轻这种成本，最近的工作提出采用替代（牛顿型）训练方法，其收敛速度更快，但每次迭代的成本更高。对于具有 $m=\mathrm{poly}(n)$ 参数并在 $\mathbb{R}^d$ 中输入一批 $n$ 个数据点的典型神经网络，[Brand, Peng, Song, and Weinstein, ITCS'2021] 之前的工作每次迭代需要 $\sim mnd + n^3$ 时间。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的训练方法，在相同的超参数化范围内仅需要 $m^{1-α} n d + n^3$ 摊销时间，其中 $α\in (0.01,1)$ 是某个固定常数。该方法依赖于神经网络的一种新的替代视图，即一组二叉搜索树，其中每次迭代对应于修改树中节点的一小部分子集。我们相信这种观点将在深度神经网络（DNN）的设计和分析中得到进一步的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在子线性时间内训练超参数化神经网络的新方法。
AI.motivation: 深度学习的成功伴随着巨大的计算和能耗成本，传统反向传播方法在非凸设置下收敛速度较慢，难以应对大规模超参数化网络的训练需求。
AI.method: 将神经网络视为二叉搜索树集合，通过每次迭代修改树中少量节点来降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在相同超参数化条件下，新方法将每次迭代的摊销时间复杂度从$\\sim mnd + n^3$降至$m^{1-α}nd + n^3$（$α\\in (0.01,1)$）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为深度神经网络的设计与分析提供了新的视角，可能推动更高效的训练算法发展。

search_text: Training Overparametrized Neural Networks in Sublinear Time 在亚线性时间内训练过参数化神经网络 The success of deep learning comes at a tremendous computational and energy cost, and the scalability of training massively overparametrized neural networks is becoming a real barrier to the progress of artificial intelligence (AI). Despite the popularity and low cost-per-iteration of traditional backpropagation via gradient decent, stochastic gradient descent (SGD) has prohibitive convergence rate in non-convex settings, both in theory and practice. To mitigate this cost, recent works have proposed to employ alternative (Newton-type) training methods with much faster convergence rate, albeit with higher cost-per-iteration. For a typical neural network with $m=\mathrm{poly}(n)$ parameters and input batch of $n$ datapoints in $\mathbb{R}^d$, the previous work of [Brand, Peng, Song, and Weinstein, ITCS'2021] requires $\sim mnd + n^3$ time per iteration. In this paper, we present a novel training method that requires only $m^{1-α} n d + n^3$ amortized time in the same overparametrized regime, where $α\in (0.01,1)$ is some fixed constant. This method relies on a new and alternative view of neural networks, as a set of binary search trees, where each iteration corresponds to modifying a small subset of the nodes in the tree. We believe this view would have further applications in the design and analysis of deep neural networks (DNNs). 深度学习的成功需要巨大的计算和能源成本，而训练大规模超参数化神经网络的可扩展性正在成为人工智能 (AI) 进步的真正障碍。尽管通过梯度下降的传统反向传播很受欢迎且每次迭代成本较低，但随机梯度下降（SGD）在非凸设置中无论在理论还是实践上都具有令人望而却步的收敛速度。为了减轻这种成本，最近的工作提出采用替代（牛顿型）训练方法，其收敛速度更快，但每次迭代的成本更高。对于具有 $m=\mathrm{poly}(n)$ 参数并在 $\mathbb{R}^d$ 中输入一批 $n$ 个数据点的典型神经网络，[Brand, Peng, Song, and Weinstein, ITCS'2021] 之前的工作每次迭代需要 $\sim mnd + n^3$ 时间。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的训练方法，在相同的超参数化范围内仅需要 $m^{1-α} n d + n^3$ 摊销时间，其中 $α\in (0.01,1)$ 是某个固定常数。该方法依赖于神经网络的一种新的替代视图，即一组二叉搜索树，其中每次迭代对应于修改树中节点的一小部分子集。我们相信这种观点将在深度神经网络（DNN）的设计和分析中得到进一步的应用。 本文提出一种在子线性时间内训练超参数化神经网络的新方法。 Yichuan Deng,Hang Hu,Zhao Song,Omri Weinstein,Danyang Zhuo cs.LG,cs.DS,stat.ML

authors_text: Minsu Kim,Hyunjun Kim,Yong Man Ro
title: Speaker-adaptive Lip Reading with User-dependent Padding
title_zh: 具有用户相关填充的说话者自适应唇读
comment: Accepted at ECCV2022
comments: Accepted at ECCV2022
abstract: Lip reading aims to predict speech based on lip movements alone. As it focuses on visual information to model the speech, its performance is inherently sensitive to personal lip appearances and movements. This makes the lip reading models show degraded performance when they are applied to unseen speakers due to the mismatch between training and testing conditions. Speaker adaptation technique aims to reduce this mismatch between train and test speakers, thus guiding a trained model to focus on modeling the speech content without being intervened by the speaker variations. In contrast to the efforts made in audio-based speech recognition for decades, the speaker adaptation methods have not well been studied in lip reading. In this paper, to remedy the performance degradation of lip reading model on unseen speakers, we propose a speaker-adaptive lip reading method, namely user-dependent padding. The user-dependent padding is a speaker-specific input that can participate in the visual feature extraction stage of a pre-trained lip reading model. Therefore, the lip appearances and movements information of different speakers can be considered during the visual feature encoding, adaptively for individual speakers. Moreover, the proposed method does not need 1) any additional layers, 2) to modify the learned weights of the pre-trained model, and 3) the speaker label of train data used during pre-train. It can directly adapt to unseen speakers by learning the user-dependent padding only, in a supervised or unsupervised manner. Finally, to alleviate the speaker information insufficiency in public lip reading databases, we label the speaker of a well-known audio-visual database, LRW, and design an unseen-speaker lip reading scenario named LRW-ID.

In contrast to the efforts made in audio-based speech recognition for decades, the speaker adaptation methods have not well been studied in lip reading. In this paper, to remedy the performance degradation of lip reading model on unseen speakers, we propose a speaker-adaptive lip reading method, namely user-dependent padding. The user-dependent padding is a speaker-specific input that can participate in the visual feature extraction stage of a pre-trained lip reading model. Therefore, the lip appearances and movements information of different speakers can be considered during the visual feature encoding, adaptively for individual speakers. Moreover, the proposed method does not need 1) any additional layers, 2) to modify the learned weights of the pre-trained model, and 3) the speaker label of train data used during pre-train. It can directly adapt to unseen speakers by learning the user-dependent padding only, in a supervised or unsupervised manner. Finally, to alleviate the speaker information insufficiency in public lip reading databases, we label the speaker of a well-known audio-visual database, LRW, and design an unseen-speaker lip reading scenario named LRW-ID.
abstract_zh: 唇读旨在仅根据嘴唇运动来预测言语。由于它专注于视觉信息来模拟语音，因此其性能本质上对个人嘴唇的外观和动作很敏感。由于训练和测试条件之间的不匹配，这使得唇读模型在应用于看不见的说话者时表现出性能下降。说话者适应技术旨在减少训练和测试说话者之间的这种不匹配，从而引导训练后的模型专注于对语音内容进行建模，而不受说话者变化的干扰。与几十年来基于音频的语音识别所做的努力相比，唇读中的说话人适应方法尚未得到很好的研究。在本文中，为了弥补唇读模型在看不见的说话人上的性能下降，我们提出了一种说话人自适应唇读方法，即用户相关的填充。取决于用户的填充是特定于说话者的输入，可以参与预训练唇读模型的视觉特征提取阶段。因此，在视觉特征编码过程中可以考虑不同说话人的嘴唇外观和动作信息，自适应地针对各个说话人。此外，所提出的方法不需要1）任何额外的层，2）修改预训练模型的学习权重，以及3）预训练期间使用的训练数据的说话人标签。它可以通过仅以监督或无监督的方式学习依赖于用户的填充来直接适应看不见的说话者。最后，为了缓解公共唇读数据库中说话人信息不足的问题，我们对著名视听数据库LRW的说话人进行了标记，并设计了一个看不见的说话人唇读场景LRW-ID。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于用户依赖填充的说话人自适应唇读方法，以解决未见过的说话人导致的性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 唇读模型在面对未见过的说话人时表现下降，因训练与测试条件不匹配，而现有研究对唇读中的说话人自适应方法探索不足。
AI.method: 提出用户依赖填充技术，通过在预训练模型的视觉特征提取阶段引入说话人特定输入，无需新增层、修改预训练权重或使用说话人标签，即可在有监督或无监督方式下适应新说话人。
AI.result: 方法在公开数据集LRW上通过新构建的LRW-ID场景验证，有效缓解了说话人信息不足的问题，提升了未见过说话人的唇读性能。
AI.conclusion: 用户依赖填充技术为唇读模型提供了高效的说话人自适应方案，同时强调了公开数据集中说话人信息标注的重要性。

authors_text: Dongwoo Lew,Kyungchul Lee,Jongsun Park
title: A Time-to-first-spike Coding and Conversion Aware Training for Energy-Efficient Deep Spiking Neural Network Processor Design
title_zh: 用于节能深度尖峰神经网络处理器设计的首次尖峰时间编码和转换感知训练
comment: Accepted to Design Automation Conference 2022
comments: Accepted to Design Automation Conference 2022
abstract: In this paper, we present an energy-efficient SNN architecture, which can seamlessly run deep spiking neural networks (SNNs) with improved accuracy. First, we propose a conversion aware training (CAT) to reduce ANN-to-SNN conversion loss without hardware implementation overhead. In the proposed CAT, the activation function developed for simulating SNN during ANN training, is efficiently exploited to reduce the data representation error after conversion. Based on the CAT technique, we also present a time-to-first-spike coding that allows lightweight logarithmic computation by utilizing spike time information. The SNN processor design that supports the proposed techniques has been implemented using 28nm CMOS process. The processor achieves the top-1 accuracies of 91.7%, 67.9% and 57.4% with inference energy of 486.7uJ, 503.6uJ, and 1426uJ to process CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and Tiny-ImageNet, respectively, when running VGG-16 with 5bit logarithmic weights.
summary: In this paper, we present an energy-efficient SNN architecture, which can seamlessly run deep spiking neural networks (SNNs) with improved accuracy. First, we propose a conversion aware training (CAT) to reduce ANN-to-SNN conversion loss without hardware implementation overhead. In the proposed CAT, the activation function developed for simulating SNN during ANN training, is efficiently exploited to reduce the data representation error after conversion. Based on the CAT technique, we also present a time-to-first-spike coding that allows lightweight logarithmic computation by utilizing spike time information. The SNN processor design that supports the proposed techniques has been implemented using 28nm CMOS process. The processor achieves the top-1 accuracies of 91.7%, 67.9% and 57.4% with inference energy of 486.7uJ, 503.6uJ, and 1426uJ to process CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and Tiny-ImageNet, respectively, when running VGG-16 with 5bit logarithmic weights.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种节能的 SNN 架构，它可以无缝运行深度尖峰神经网络 (SNN)，并提高准确性。首先，我们提出了一种转换感知训练（CAT），以减少 ANN 到 SNN 的转换损失，而无需硬件实现开销。在所提出的 CAT 中，有效地利用了为在 ANN 训练期间模拟 SNN 而开发的激活函数，以减少转换后的数据表示误差。基于 CAT 技术，我们还提出了一种首次尖峰时间编码，该编码允许利用尖峰时间信息进行轻量级对数计算。支持所提出技术的 SNN 处理器设计已使用 28nm CMOS 工艺实现。当以 5 位对数权重运行 VGG-16 时，该处理器处理 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 Tiny-ImageNet 的推理能量分别为 486.7uJ、503.6uJ 和 1426uJ，实现了 91.7%、67.9% 和 57.4% 的 top-1 准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的脉冲神经网络（SNN）架构，通过转换感知训练（CAT）和时间到首次脉冲编码技术，提升SNN的精度并降低能耗。
AI.motivation: 解决传统人工神经网络（ANN）到SNN转换时精度损失大、硬件实现能耗高的问题，同时提升SNN的计算效率。
AI.method: 提出转换感知训练（CAT）方法，在ANN训练阶段引入模拟SNN的激活函数以减少转换误差；结合时间到首次脉冲编码，利用脉冲时间信息实现轻量级对数计算；基于28nm CMOS工艺实现支持该技术的SNN处理器。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和Tiny-ImageNet数据集上，使用5位对数权重的VGG-16模型分别达到91.7%、67.9%和57.4%的top-1精度，对应能效分别为486.7μJ、503.6μJ和1426μJ。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的CAT训练方法和时间编码技术有效降低了SNN转换损失，结合硬件设计实现了高精度低能耗的SNN处理器，为能效优化的神经网络加速器提供了可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的脉冲神经网络（SNN）架构，通过转换感知训练（CAT）和时间到首次脉冲编码技术，提升SNN的精度并降低能耗。
ai_content.motivation: 解决传统人工神经网络（ANN）到SNN转换时精度损失大、硬件实现能耗高的问题，同时提升SNN的计算效率。

search_text: A Time-to-first-spike Coding and Conversion Aware Training for Energy-Efficient Deep Spiking Neural Network Processor Design 用于节能深度尖峰神经网络处理器设计的首次尖峰时间编码和转换感知训练 In this paper, we present an energy-efficient SNN architecture, which can seamlessly run deep spiking neural networks (SNNs) with improved accuracy. First, we propose a conversion aware training (CAT) to reduce ANN-to-SNN conversion loss without hardware implementation overhead. In the proposed CAT, the activation function developed for simulating SNN during ANN training, is efficiently exploited to reduce the data representation error after conversion. Based on the CAT technique, we also present a time-to-first-spike coding that allows lightweight logarithmic computation by utilizing spike time information. The SNN processor design that supports the proposed techniques has been implemented using 28nm CMOS process. The processor achieves the top-1 accuracies of 91.7%, 67.9% and 57.4% with inference energy of 486.7uJ, 503.6uJ, and 1426uJ to process CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and Tiny-ImageNet, respectively, when running VGG-16 with 5bit logarithmic weights. 在本文中，我们提出了一种节能的 SNN 架构，它可以无缝运行深度尖峰神经网络 (SNN)，并提高准确性。首先，我们提出了一种转换感知训练（CAT），以减少 ANN 到 SNN 的转换损失，而无需硬件实现开销。在所提出的 CAT 中，有效地利用了为在 ANN 训练期间模拟 SNN 而开发的激活函数，以减少转换后的数据表示误差。基于 CAT 技术，我们还提出了一种首次尖峰时间编码，该编码允许利用尖峰时间信息进行轻量级对数计算。支持所提出技术的 SNN 处理器设计已使用 28nm CMOS 工艺实现。当以 5 位对数权重运行 VGG-16 时，该处理器处理 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 Tiny-ImageNet 的推理能量分别为 486.7uJ、503.6uJ 和 1426uJ，实现了 91.7%、67.9% 和 57.4% 的 top-1 准确率。 本文提出一种高效的脉冲神经网络（SNN）架构，通过转换感知训练（CAT）和时间到首次脉冲编码技术，提升SNN的精度并降低能耗。 Dongwoo Lew,Kyungchul Lee,Jongsun Park cs.NE,cs.LG

authors_text: Andrew SaLoutos,Elijah Stanger-Jones,Sangbae Kim
title: Fast Reflexive Grasping with a Proprioceptive Teleoperation Platform
title_zh: 使用本体感受远程操作平台进行快速反射性抓取
comment: To be published in IROS 2022. 8 pages, 10 figures. Supplementary video at https://youtu.be/HsFT76add9g
comments: To be published in IROS 2022. 8 pages, 10 figures. Supplementary video at https://youtu.be/HsFT76add9g
abstract: We present a proprioceptive teleoperation system that uses a reflexive grasping algorithm to enhance the speed and robustness of pick-and-place tasks. The system consists of two manipulators that use quasi-direct-drive actuation to provide highly transparent force feedback. The end-effector has bimodal force sensors that measure 3-axis force information and 2-dimensional contact location. This information is used for anti-slip and re-grasping reflexes. When the user makes contact with the desired object, the re-grasping reflex aligns the gripper fingers with antipodal points on the object to maximize the grasp stability. The reflex takes only 150ms to correct for inaccurate grasps chosen by the user, so the user's motion is only minimally disturbed by the execution of the re-grasp. Once antipodal contact is established, the anti-slip reflex ensures that the gripper applies enough normal force to prevent the object from slipping out of the grasp. The combination of proprioceptive manipulators and reflexive grasping allows the user to complete teleoperated tasks with precision at high speed.
summary: We present a proprioceptive teleoperation system that uses a reflexive grasping algorithm to enhance the speed and robustness of pick-and-place tasks. The system consists of two manipulators that use quasi-direct-drive actuation to provide highly transparent force feedback. The end-effector has bimodal force sensors that measure 3-axis force information and 2-dimensional contact location. This information is used for anti-slip and re-grasping reflexes. When the user makes contact with the desired object, the re-grasping reflex aligns the gripper fingers with antipodal points on the object to maximize the grasp stability. The reflex takes only 150ms to correct for inaccurate grasps chosen by the user, so the user's motion is only minimally disturbed by the execution of the re-grasp. Once antipodal contact is established, the anti-slip reflex ensures that the gripper applies enough normal force to prevent the object from slipping out of the grasp. The combination of proprioceptive manipulators and reflexive grasping allows the user to complete teleoperated tasks with precision at high speed.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种本体感知远程操作系统，该系统使用反射性抓取算法来提高拾取和放置任务的速度和鲁棒性。该系统由两个机械手组成，使用准直接驱动驱动来提供高度透明的力反馈。末端执行器具有双模态力传感器，可测量 3 轴力信息和 2 维接触位置。该信息用于防滑和重新抓握反射。当用户接触所需物体时，重新抓取反射会将抓手手指与物体上的对映点对齐，以最大限度地提高抓取稳定性。该反射仅需要 150 毫秒即可纠正用户选择的不准确抓握，因此用户的运动仅受到执行重新抓握的最小干扰。一旦建立对足接触，防滑反射可确保夹具施加足够的法向力，以防止物体滑出抓握范围。本体感受操纵器和反射性抓取的结合使用户能够高速、精确地完成远程操作任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于本体感觉的遥操作平台，通过反射抓取算法提升抓取和放置任务的速度与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统遥操作在高速抓取任务中存在抓取不准确和物体滑落的问题，需通过实时反馈机制提升操作精度与效率。
AI.method: 系统采用双机械臂与准直接驱动执行器实现高透明力反馈，末端执行器配备三轴力传感器和二维接触定位传感器，通过反射机制实现快速再抓取与防滑控制。
AI.result: 再抓取反射可在150ms内修正用户操作误差，防滑反射确保抓取稳定性，使用户能以高速完成高精度遥操作任务。
AI.conclusion: 本体感觉机械臂与反射抓取算法的结合，为高速精密遥操作任务提供了可靠的技术方案。

search_text: Fast Reflexive Grasping with a Proprioceptive Teleoperation Platform 使用本体感受远程操作平台进行快速反射性抓取 We present a proprioceptive teleoperation system that uses a reflexive grasping algorithm to enhance the speed and robustness of pick-and-place tasks. The system consists of two manipulators that use quasi-direct-drive actuation to provide highly transparent force feedback. The end-effector has bimodal force sensors that measure 3-axis force information and 2-dimensional contact location. This information is used for anti-slip and re-grasping reflexes. When the user makes contact with the desired object, the re-grasping reflex aligns the gripper fingers with antipodal points on the object to maximize the grasp stability. The reflex takes only 150ms to correct for inaccurate grasps chosen by the user, so the user's motion is only minimally disturbed by the execution of the re-grasp. Once antipodal contact is established, the anti-slip reflex ensures that the gripper applies enough normal force to prevent the object from slipping out of the grasp. The combination of proprioceptive manipulators and reflexive grasping allows the user to complete teleoperated tasks with precision at high speed. 我们提出了一种本体感知远程操作系统，该系统使用反射性抓取算法来提高拾取和放置任务的速度和鲁棒性。该系统由两个机械手组成，使用准直接驱动驱动来提供高度透明的力反馈。末端执行器具有双模态力传感器，可测量 3 轴力信息和 2 维接触位置。该信息用于防滑和重新抓握反射。当用户接触所需物体时，重新抓取反射会将抓手手指与物体上的对映点对齐，以最大限度地提高抓取稳定性。该反射仅需要 150 毫秒即可纠正用户选择的不准确抓握，因此用户的运动仅受到执行重新抓握的最小干扰。一旦建立对足接触，防滑反射可确保夹具施加足够的法向力，以防止物体滑出抓握范围。本体感受操纵器和反射性抓取的结合使用户能够高速、精确地完成远程操作任务。 本文提出一种基于本体感觉的遥操作平台，通过反射抓取算法提升抓取和放置任务的速度与鲁棒性。 Andrew SaLoutos,Elijah Stanger-Jones,Sangbae Kim cs.RO

authors_text: Dorna Abdolazimi,Shayan Oveis Gharan
title: An Improved Trickle-Down Theorem for Partite Complexes
title_zh: 改进的分络合物滴流定理
abstract: We prove a strengthening of the trickle down theorem for partite complexes. Given a $(d+1)$-partite $d$-dimensional simplicial complex, we show that if "on average" the links of faces of co-dimension 2 are $\frac{1-δ}{d}$-(one-sided) spectral expanders, then the link of any face of co-dimension $k$ is an $O(\frac{1-δ}{kδ})$-(one-sided) spectral expander, for all $3\leq k\leq d+1$. For an application, using our theorem as a black-box, we show that links of faces of co-dimension $k$ in recent constructions of bounded degree high dimensional expanders have spectral expansion at most $O(1/k)$ fraction of the spectral expansion of the links of the worst faces of co-dimension $2$.
summary: We prove a strengthening of the trickle down theorem for partite complexes. Given a $(d+1)$-partite $d$-dimensional simplicial complex, we show that if "on average" the links of faces of co-dimension 2 are $\frac{1-δ}{d}$-(one-sided) spectral expanders, then the link of any face of co-dimension $k$ is an $O(\frac{1-δ}{kδ})$-(one-sided) spectral expander, for all $3\leq k\leq d+1$. For an application, using our theorem as a black-box, we show that links of faces of co-dimension $k$ in recent constructions of bounded degree high dimensional expanders have spectral expansion at most $O(1/k)$ fraction of the spectral expansion of the links of the worst faces of co-dimension $2$.
abstract_zh: 我们证明了分部复合体滴流定理的强化。给定 $(d+1)$ 分 $d$ 维单纯复形，我们证明，如果“平均”，同维 2 的面的链接是 $\frac{1-δ}{d}$-(单边) 谱扩展器，那么同维 $k$ 的任何面的链接都是 $O(\frac{1-δ}{kδ})$-(单边) 谱扩展器，对于所有 $3\leq k\leq d+1$。对于一个应用程序，使用我们的定理作为黑盒，我们表明在最近有界度高维扩展器的构造中，共维度 $k$ 的面的链接的谱扩展最多为共维度 $2$ 最差面的链接的谱扩展的 $O(1/k)$ 部分。

AI.tldr: 本文改进了部分复形的向下定理，通过分析不同维度的链式结构，加强了谱扩展性之间的关系。
AI.motivation: 原有向下定理对高维扩展器的谱扩展性分析存在局限，需更精确的数学工具来刻画复杂结构的扩展特性。
AI.method: 利用谱图理论与平均分析法，通过证明当共维2的链满足特定谱扩展条件时，推导出更高共维链的扩展性界。
AI.result: 证明若共维2链为$\ rac{1-δ}{d}$-单边谱扩展器，则任意共维$k$链为$O(\ rac{1-δ}{kδ})$-单边谱扩展器，并应用于高维扩展器构造分析。
AI.conclusion: 该定理为高维扩展器的谱性质提供了更精细的刻画，揭示了不同维度链扩展性之间的分层关系。

search_text: An Improved Trickle-Down Theorem for Partite Complexes 改进的分络合物滴流定理 We prove a strengthening of the trickle down theorem for partite complexes. Given a $(d+1)$-partite $d$-dimensional simplicial complex, we show that if "on average" the links of faces of co-dimension 2 are $\frac{1-δ}{d}$-(one-sided) spectral expanders, then the link of any face of co-dimension $k$ is an $O(\frac{1-δ}{kδ})$-(one-sided) spectral expander, for all $3\leq k\leq d+1$. For an application, using our theorem as a black-box, we show that links of faces of co-dimension $k$ in recent constructions of bounded degree high dimensional expanders have spectral expansion at most $O(1/k)$ fraction of the spectral expansion of the links of the worst faces of co-dimension $2$. 我们证明了分部复合体滴流定理的强化。给定 $(d+1)$ 分 $d$ 维单纯复形，我们证明，如果“平均”，同维 2 的面的链接是 $\frac{1-δ}{d}$-(单边) 谱扩展器，那么同维 $k$ 的任何面的链接都是 $O(\frac{1-δ}{kδ})$-(单边) 谱扩展器，对于所有 $3\leq k\leq d+1$。对于一个应用程序，使用我们的定理作为黑盒，我们表明在最近有界度高维扩展器的构造中，共维度 $k$ 的面的链接的谱扩展最多为共维度 $2$ 最差面的链接的谱扩展的 $O(1/k)$ 部分。 本文改进了部分复形的向下定理，通过分析不同维度的链式结构，加强了谱扩展性之间的关系。 Dorna Abdolazimi,Shayan Oveis Gharan cs.DM,cs.DS,math.CO

authors_text: Desen Meng,Feng Gao,Junyu Dong,Qian Du,Heng-Chao Li
title: Synthetic Aperture Radar Image Change Detection via Layer Attention-Based Noise-Tolerant Network
title_zh: 通过基于层注意的抗噪网络进行合成孔径雷达图像变化检测
comment: Accepted by IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Letters (GRSL) 2022, code is available at https://github.com/summitgao/LANTNet
comments: Accepted by IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Letters (GRSL) 2022, code is available at https://github.com/summitgao/LANTNet
abstract: Recently, change detection methods for synthetic aperture radar (SAR) images based on convolutional neural networks (CNN) have gained increasing research attention. However, existing CNN-based methods neglect the interactions among multilayer convolutions, and errors involved in the preclassification restrict the network optimization. To this end, we proposed a layer attention-based noise-tolerant network, termed LANTNet. In particular, we design a layer attention module that adaptively weights the feature of different convolution layers. In addition, we design a noise-tolerant loss function that effectively suppresses the impact of noisy labels. Therefore, the model is insensitive to noisy labels in the preclassification results. The experimental results on three SAR datasets show that the proposed LANTNet performs better compared to several state-of-the-art methods. The source codes are available at https://github.com/summitgao/LANTNet
summary: Recently, change detection methods for synthetic aperture radar (SAR) images based on convolutional neural networks (CNN) have gained increasing research attention. However, existing CNN-based methods neglect the interactions among multilayer convolutions, and errors involved in the preclassification restrict the network optimization. To this end, we proposed a layer attention-based noise-tolerant network, termed LANTNet. In particular, we design a layer attention module that adaptively weights the feature of different convolution layers. In addition, we design a noise-tolerant loss function that effectively suppresses the impact of noisy labels. Therefore, the model is insensitive to noisy labels in the preclassification results. The experimental results on three SAR datasets show that the proposed LANTNet performs better compared to several state-of-the-art methods. The source codes are available at https://github.com/summitgao/LANTNet
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像变化检测方法受到越来越多的研究关注。然而，现有的基于CNN的方法忽略了多层卷积之间的相互作用，预分类中涉及的错误限制了网络优化。为此，我们提出了一种基于层注意力的耐噪网络，称为LANTNet。特别是，我们设计了一个层注意模块，自适应地对不同卷积层的特征进行加权。此外，我们设计了一种耐噪声损失函数，可以有效抑制噪声标签的影响。因此，该模型对预分类结果中的噪声标签不敏感。三个 SAR 数据集上的实验结果表明，与几种最先进的方法相比，所提出的 LANTNet 表现更好。源代码可在 https://github.com/summitgao/LANTNet 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于层注意力机制的噪声鲁棒网络LANTNet，用于提升合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像变化检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的SAR图像变化检测方法忽略了多层卷积间的交互作用，且预分类中的噪声标签限制了网络优化。
AI.method: 设计了层注意力模块以自适应加权不同卷积层的特征，并引入噪声鲁棒损失函数以抑制噪声标签的影响。
AI.result: 在三个SAR数据集上的实验表明，LANTNet优于多种最先进方法，源代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: LANTNet通过层注意力机制和噪声鲁棒损失函数有效提升了SAR图像变化检测的准确性与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Brian Felipe Keith Norambuena,Tanushree Mitra,Chris North
title: Characterizing Social Movement Narratives in Online Communities: The 2021 Cuban Protests on Reddit
title_zh: 描述在线社区中社会运动叙事的特征：Reddit 上的 2021 年古巴抗议活动
comment: 2022 Computation + Journalism Conference (C+J 2022), 6 pages
comments: 2022 Computation + Journalism Conference (C+J 2022), 6 pages
abstract: Social movements are dominated by storytelling, as narratives play a key role in how communities involved in these movements shape their identities. Thus, recognizing the accepted narratives of different communities is central to understanding social movements. In this context, journalists face the challenge of making sense of these emerging narratives in social media when they seek to report social protests. Thus, they would benefit from support tools that allow them to identify and explore such narratives. In this work, we propose a narrative extraction algorithm from social media that incorporates the concept of community acceptance. Using our method, we study the 2021 Cuban protests and characterize five relevant communities. The extracted narratives differ in both structure and content across communities. Our work has implications in the study of social movements, intelligence analysis, computational journalism, and misinformation research.
summary: Social movements are dominated by storytelling, as narratives play a key role in how communities involved in these movements shape their identities. Thus, recognizing the accepted narratives of different communities is central to understanding social movements. In this context, journalists face the challenge of making sense of these emerging narratives in social media when they seek to report social protests. Thus, they would benefit from support tools that allow them to identify and explore such narratives. In this work, we propose a narrative extraction algorithm from social media that incorporates the concept of community acceptance. Using our method, we study the 2021 Cuban protests and characterize five relevant communities. The extracted narratives differ in both structure and content across communities. Our work has implications in the study of social movements, intelligence analysis, computational journalism, and misinformation research.
abstract_zh: 社会运动以讲故事为主，因为叙事在参与这些运动的社区如何塑造其身份方面发挥着关键作用。因此，认识到不同社区所接受的叙述对于理解社会运动至关重要。在这种背景下，记者在试图报道社会抗议活动时面临着理解社交媒体中这些新兴叙事的挑战。因此，他们将受益于支持工具，使他们能够识别和探索此类叙述。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种从社交媒体中提取叙事的算法，其中融入了社区接受的概念。使用我们的方法，我们研究了 2021 年古巴抗议活动并描述了五个相关社区的特征。不同社区提取的叙述在结构和内容上都不同。我们的工作对社会运动、情报分析、计算新闻和错误信息研究的研究具有影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合社区接受度的社交媒体叙事提取算法，并用于分析2021年古巴抗议在Reddit上的五个社区叙事特征。
AI.motivation: 社会运动中的叙事对社区身份构建至关重要，但记者缺乏有效工具识别社交媒体中的动态叙事，尤其忽视社区接受度这一关键因素。
AI.method: 开发基于社区接受度的叙事提取算法，通过分析Reddit数据识别不同社区的叙事结构与内容差异。
AI.result: 发现五个古巴抗议相关社区在叙事结构和内容上存在显著差异，验证了社区接受度对叙事特征的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为社会运动研究、情报分析及虚假信息检测提供了新工具，强调社区接受度在叙事分析中的核心作用。

authors_text: Bolin Lai,Miao Liu,Fiona Ryan,James M. Rehg
title: In the Eye of Transformer: Global-Local Correlation for Egocentric Gaze Estimation
title_zh: Transformer 眼中：自我中心注视估计的全局局部相关性
comment: 23 pages
comments: 23 pages
abstract: In this paper, we present the first transformer-based model to address the challenging problem of egocentric gaze estimation. We observe that the connection between the global scene context and local visual information is vital for localizing the gaze fixation from egocentric video frames. To this end, we design the transformer encoder to embed the global context as one additional visual token and further propose a novel Global-Local Correlation (GLC) module to explicitly model the correlation of the global token and each local token. We validate our model on two egocentric video datasets - EGTEA Gaze+ and Ego4D. Our detailed ablation studies demonstrate the benefits of our method. In addition, our approach exceeds previous state-of-the-arts by a large margin. We also provide additional visualizations to support our claim that global-local correlation serves a key representation for predicting gaze fixation from egocentric videos. More details can be found in our website (https://bolinlai.github.io/GLC-EgoGazeEst).
summary: In this paper, we present the first transformer-based model to address the challenging problem of egocentric gaze estimation. We observe that the connection between the global scene context and local visual information is vital for localizing the gaze fixation from egocentric video frames. To this end, we design the transformer encoder to embed the global context as one additional visual token and further propose a novel Global-Local Correlation (GLC) module to explicitly model the correlation of the global token and each local token. We validate our model on two egocentric video datasets - EGTEA Gaze+ and Ego4D. Our detailed ablation studies demonstrate the benefits of our method. In addition, our approach exceeds previous state-of-the-arts by a large margin. We also provide additional visualizations to support our claim that global-local correlation serves a key representation for predicting gaze fixation from egocentric videos. More details can be found in our website (https://bolinlai.github.io/GLC-EgoGazeEst).
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了第一个基于变压器的模型来解决自我中心注视估计的挑战性问题。我们观察到，全局场景上下文和局部视觉信息之间的联系对于定位以自我为中心的视频帧中的注视固定至关重要。为此，我们设计了变压器编码器，将全局上下文嵌入为一个额外的视觉标记，并进一步提出了一种新颖的全局局部相关性（GLC）模块来显式建模全局标记和每个局部标记的相关性。我们在两个以自我为中心的视频数据集 - EGTEA Gaze+ 和 Ego4D 上验证了我们的模型。我们详细的消融研究证明了我们方法的优点。此外，我们的方法大大超过了以前的最先进技术。我们还提供了额外的可视化来支持我们的主张，即全局-局部相关性是预测自我中心视频注视固定的关键表示。更多详细信息可以在我们的网站 (https://bolinlai.github.io/GLC-EgoGazeEst) 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个基于Transformer模型的第一人称视角注视估计方法，通过显式建模全局-局部视觉信息关联提升定位精度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能有效结合全局场景上下文与局部视觉特征，导致第一人称视频中注视点定位准确率不足。
AI.method: 设计包含全局上下文嵌入的Transformer编码器，并引入全局-局部相关性（GLC）模块显式建模全局标记与局部标记间的关联关系。
AI.result: 在EGTEA Gaze+和Ego4D数据集上显著超越现有最优方法，可视化结果验证了全局-局部关联对注视预测的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 全局-局部相关性建模有效提升了第一人称注视估计性能，为后续研究提供了新的技术思路和实验验证支持。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出首个基于Transformer模型的第一人称视角注视估计方法，通过显式建模全局-局部视觉信息关联提升定位精度。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法未能有效结合全局场景上下文与局部视觉特征，导致第一人称视频中注视点定位准确率不足。

ai_content.conclusion: 全局-局部相关性建模有效提升了第一人称注视估计性能，为后续研究提供了新的技术思路和实验验证支持。

search_text: In the Eye of Transformer: Global-Local Correlation for Egocentric Gaze Estimation Transformer 眼中：自我中心注视估计的全局局部相关性 In this paper, we present the first transformer-based model to address the challenging problem of egocentric gaze estimation. We observe that the connection between the global scene context and local visual information is vital for localizing the gaze fixation from egocentric video frames. To this end, we design the transformer encoder to embed the global context as one additional visual token and further propose a novel Global-Local Correlation (GLC) module to explicitly model the correlation of the global token and each local token. We validate our model on two egocentric video datasets - EGTEA Gaze+ and Ego4D. Our detailed ablation studies demonstrate the benefits of our method. In addition, our approach exceeds previous state-of-the-arts by a large margin. We also provide additional visualizations to support our claim that global-local correlation serves a key representation for predicting gaze fixation from egocentric videos. More details can be found in our website (https://bolinlai.github.io/GLC-EgoGazeEst). 在本文中，我们提出了第一个基于变压器的模型来解决自我中心注视估计的挑战性问题。我们观察到，全局场景上下文和局部视觉信息之间的联系对于定位以自我为中心的视频帧中的注视固定至关重要。为此，我们设计了变压器编码器，将全局上下文嵌入为一个额外的视觉标记，并进一步提出了一种新颖的全局局部相关性（GLC）模块来显式建模全局标记和每个局部标记的相关性。我们在两个以自我为中心的视频数据集 - EGTEA Gaze+ 和 Ego4D 上验证了我们的模型。我们详细的消融研究证明了我们方法的优点。此外，我们的方法大大超过了以前的最先进技术。我们还提供了额外的可视化来支持我们的主张，即全局-局部相关性是预测自我中心视频注视固定的关键表示。更多详细信息可以在我们的网站 (https://bolinlai.github.io/GLC-EgoGazeEst) 中找到。 本文提出首个基于Transformer模型的第一人称视角注视估计方法，通过显式建模全局-局部视觉信息关联提升定位精度。 Bolin Lai,Miao Liu,Fiona Ryan,James M. Rehg cs.CV

authors_text: Thanh Tran,Sebastian Bader,Jan Lundgren
title: Denoising Induction Motor Sounds Using an Autoencoder
title_zh: 使用自动编码器对感应电机声音进行降噪
comment: 9 pages, 10 figures, conference
comments: 9 pages, 10 figures, conference
abstract: Denoising is the process of removing noise from sound signals while improving the quality and adequacy of the sound signals. Denoising sound has many applications in speech processing, sound events classification, and machine failure detection systems. This paper describes a method for creating an autoencoder to map noisy machine sounds to clean sounds for denoising purposes. There are several types of noise in sounds, for example, environmental noise and generated frequency-dependent noise from signal processing methods. Noise generated by environmental activities is environmental noise. In the factory, environmental noise can be created by vehicles, drilling, people working or talking in the survey area, wind, and flowing water. Those noises appear as spikes in the sound record. In the scope of this paper, we demonstrate the removal of generated noise with Gaussian distribution and the environmental noise with a specific example of the water sink faucet noise from the induction motor sounds. The proposed method was trained and verified on 49 normal function sounds and 197 horizontal misalignment fault sounds from the Machinery Fault Database (MAFAULDA). The mean square error (MSE) was used as the assessment criteria to evaluate the similarity between denoised sounds using the proposed autoencoder and the original sounds in the test set. The MSE is below or equal to 0.14 when denoise both types of noises on 15 testing sounds of the normal function category. The MSE is below or equal to 0.15 when denoising 60 testing sounds on the horizontal misalignment fault category. The low MSE shows that both the generated Gaussian noise and the environmental noise were almost removed from the original sounds with the proposed trained autoencoder.

The low MSE shows that both the generated Gaussian noise and the environmental noise were almost removed from the original sounds with the proposed trained autoencoder.
abstract_zh: 去噪是从声音信号中去除噪声，同时提高声音信号的质量和充分性的过程。声音去噪在语音处理、声音事件分类和机器故障检测系统中有许多应用。本文描述了一种创建自动编码器的方法，将嘈杂的机器声音映射到干净的声音以达到降噪目的。声音中有多种类型的噪声，例如环境噪声和信号处理方法生成的频率相关噪声。环境活动产生的噪声称为环境噪声。在工厂内，车辆、钻孔、在调查区域工作或说话的人、风和流水都会产生环境噪声。这些噪音在录音中表现为尖峰。在本文中，我们通过感应电机声音中水槽水龙头噪声的具体示例演示了如何消除高斯分布产生的噪声和环境噪声。所提出的方法在机械故障数据库 (MAFAULDA) 的 49 个正常功能声音和 197 个水平不对中故障声音上进行了训练和验证。使用均方误差（MSE）作为评估标准来评估使用所提出的自动编码器的去噪声音与测试集中的原始声音之间的相似性。对正常功能类别的15个测试声音进行两种噪声去噪时，MSE小于或等于0.14。对水平不对中故障类别的60个测试声音进行去噪时，MSE小于或等于0.15。低 MSE 表明，使用所提出的经过训练的自动编码器，生成的高斯噪声和环境噪声几乎都从原始声音中消除了。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种使用自编码器对感应电机声音进行去噪的方法，旨在去除高斯噪声和环境噪声，提高声音信号的质量。
AI.motivation: 工业环境中感应电机声音常受高斯噪声和环境噪声（如水槽声）干扰，影响故障检测准确性，需有效去噪方法提升信号质量。
AI.method: 采用自编码器架构，通过训练模型将含噪的感应电机声音映射到干净声音。使用MAFAULDA数据库中的49个正常功能声音和197个水平不对中故障声音进行训练与验证，以均方误差（MSE）作为评估指标。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，在去除高斯噪声和水槽环境噪声后，正常功能类别的MSE均≤0.14，水平不对中故障类别的MSE均≤0.15，表明去噪效果显著。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果验证了自编码器在去除感应电机声音中的高斯噪声和环境噪声方面的有效性，为工业设备故障检测中的声音信号处理提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Moataz Abdelaal,Nathan D. Schiele,Katrin Angerbauer,Kuno Kurzhals,Michael Sedlmair,Daniel Weiskopf
title: Comparative Evaluation of Bipartite, Node-Link, and Matrix-Based Network Representations
title_zh: 二分、节点链接和基于矩阵的网络表示的比较评估
comment: 11 pages, 7 figures, IEEE VIS 2022 Conference, Preprint
comments: 11 pages, 7 figures, IEEE VIS 2022 Conference, Preprint
abstract: This work investigates and compares the performance of node-link diagrams, adjacency matrices, and bipartite layouts for visualizing networks. In a crowd-sourced user study (n = 150), we measure the task accuracy and completion time of the three representations for different network classes and properties. In contrast to the literature, which covers mostly topology-based tasks (e.g., path finding) in small datasets, we mainly focus on overview tasks for large and directed networks. We consider three overview tasks on networks with 500 nodes: (T1) network class identification, (T2) cluster detection, and (T3) network density estimation, and two detailed tasks: (T4) node in-degree vs. out-degree and (T5) representation mapping, on networks with 50 and 20 nodes, respectively. Our results show that bipartite layouts are beneficial for revealing the overall network structure, while adjacency matrices are most reliable across the different tasks.
summary: This work investigates and compares the performance of node-link diagrams, adjacency matrices, and bipartite layouts for visualizing networks. In a crowd-sourced user study (n = 150), we measure the task accuracy and completion time of the three representations for different network classes and properties. In contrast to the literature, which covers mostly topology-based tasks (e.g., path finding) in small datasets, we mainly focus on overview tasks for large and directed networks. We consider three overview tasks on networks with 500 nodes: (T1) network class identification, (T2) cluster detection, and (T3) network density estimation, and two detailed tasks: (T4) node in-degree vs. out-degree and (T5) representation mapping, on networks with 50 and 20 nodes, respectively. Our results show that bipartite layouts are beneficial for revealing the overall network structure, while adjacency matrices are most reliable across the different tasks.
abstract_zh: 这项工作研究并比较了用于可视化网络的节点链接图、邻接矩阵和二分布局的性能。在众包用户研究（n = 150）中，我们测量了不同网络类别和属性的三种表示的任务准确性和完成时间。与主要涵盖小数据集中基于拓扑的任务（例如路径查找）的文献相比，我们主要关注大型有向网络的概述任务。我们考虑具有 500 个节点的网络上的三个概述任务：(T1) 网络类识别、(T2) 集群检测和 (T3) 网络密度估计，以及两个详细任务：分别在具有 50 个和 20 个节点的网络上的 (T4) 节点入度与出度和 (T5) 表示映射。我们的结果表明，二分布局有利于揭示整体网络结构，而邻接矩阵在不同任务中最可靠。

AI.tldr: 比较二分图、节点链接和邻接矩阵在可视化网络中的表现
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注小型网络的拓扑任务，而大型有向网络的概览任务缺乏评估
AI.method: 通过众包用户研究（n=150），测试三种网络表示方法在不同任务和网络规模下的表现
AI.result: 二分图布局在揭示整体结构上表现最佳，邻接矩阵在各项任务中可靠性最高
AI.conclusion: 不同网络表示方法在不同任务中各有优劣，应根据具体需求选择合适的表示方式

motivation: 现有研究多关注小型网络的拓扑任务，而大型有向网络的概览任务缺乏评估
method: 通过众包用户研究（n=150），测试三种网络表示方法在不同任务和网络规模下的表现
result: 二分图布局在揭示整体结构上表现最佳，邻接矩阵在各项任务中可靠性最高
conclusion: 不同网络表示方法在不同任务中各有优劣，应根据具体需求选择合适的表示方式
search_text: Comparative Evaluation of Bipartite, Node-Link, and Matrix-Based Network Representations 二分、节点链接和基于矩阵的网络表示的比较评估 This work investigates and compares the performance of node-link diagrams, adjacency matrices, and bipartite layouts for visualizing networks. In a crowd-sourced user study (n = 150), we measure the task accuracy and completion time of the three representations for different network classes and properties. In contrast to the literature, which covers mostly topology-based tasks (e.g., path finding) in small datasets, we mainly focus on overview tasks for large and directed networks. We consider three overview tasks on networks with 500 nodes: (T1) network class identification, (T2) cluster detection, and (T3) network density estimation, and two detailed tasks: (T4) node in-degree vs. out-degree and (T5) representation mapping, on networks with 50 and 20 nodes, respectively. Our results show that bipartite layouts are beneficial for revealing the overall network structure, while adjacency matrices are most reliable across the different tasks. 这项工作研究并比较了用于可视化网络的节点链接图、邻接矩阵和二分布局的性能。在众包用户研究（n = 150）中，我们测量了不同网络类别和属性的三种表示的任务准确性和完成时间。与主要涵盖小数据集中基于拓扑的任务（例如路径查找）的文献相比，我们主要关注大型有向网络的概述任务。我们考虑具有 500 个节点的网络上的三个概述任务：(T1) 网络类识别、(T2) 集群检测和 (T3) 网络密度估计，以及两个详细任务：分别在具有 50 个和 20 个节点的网络上的 (T4) 节点入度与出度和 (T5) 表示映射。我们的结果表明，二分布局有利于揭示整体网络结构，而邻接矩阵在不同任务中最可靠。 比较二分图、节点链接和邻接矩阵在可视化网络中的表现 Moataz Abdelaal,Nathan D. Schiele,Katrin Angerbauer,Kuno Kurzhals,Michael Sedlmair,Daniel Weiskopf cs.HC

authors_text: Brian D. Hall,Lyn Bartram,Matthew Brehmer
title: Augmented Chironomia for Presenting Data to Remote Audiences
title_zh: 用于向远程观众呈现数据的增强Chironomia
comment: To appear at the 2022 ACM Symposium on User Interface Software and Technology (UIST, Bend, OR, Oct 29 - Nov 2, 2022). Supplemental video available at https://vimeo.com/737703966
comments: To appear at the 2022 ACM Symposium on User Interface Software and Technology (UIST, Bend, OR, Oct 29 - Nov 2, 2022). Supplemental video available at https://vimeo.com/737703966
abstract: To facilitate engaging and nuanced conversations around data, we contribute a touchless approach to interacting directly with visualization in remote presentations. We combine dynamic charts overlaid on a presenter's webcam feed with continuous bimanual hand tracking, demonstrating interactions that highlight and manipulate chart elements appearing in the foreground. These interactions are simultaneously functional and deictic, and some allow for the addition of "rhetorical flourish", or expressive movement used when speaking about quantities, categories, and time intervals. We evaluated our approach in two studies with professionals who routinely deliver and attend presentations about data. The first study considered the presenter perspective, where 12 participants delivered presentations to a remote audience using a presentation environment incorporating our approach. The second study considered the audience experience of 17 participants who attended presentations supported by our environment. Finally, we reflect on observations from these studies and discuss related implications for engaging remote audiences in conversations about data.
summary: To facilitate engaging and nuanced conversations around data, we contribute a touchless approach to interacting directly with visualization in remote presentations. We combine dynamic charts overlaid on a presenter's webcam feed with continuous bimanual hand tracking, demonstrating interactions that highlight and manipulate chart elements appearing in the foreground. These interactions are simultaneously functional and deictic, and some allow for the addition of "rhetorical flourish", or expressive movement used when speaking about quantities, categories, and time intervals. We evaluated our approach in two studies with professionals who routinely deliver and attend presentations about data. The first study considered the presenter perspective, where 12 participants delivered presentations to a remote audience using a presentation environment incorporating our approach. The second study considered the audience experience of 17 participants who attended presentations supported by our environment. Finally, we reflect on observations from these studies and discuss related implications for engaging remote audiences in conversations about data.
abstract_zh: 为了促进围绕数据进行引人入胜且细致入微的对话，我们提供了一种非接触式方法来直接与远程演示中的可视化进行交互。我们将覆盖在演示者网络摄像头上的动态图表与连续的双手跟踪相结合，演示突出显示和操作出现在前台的图表元素的交互。这些互动同时具有功能性和指示性，有些还允许添加“华丽修辞”，或者在谈论数量、类别和时间间隔时使用的表达动作。我们在两项研究中评估了我们的方法，其中专业人士经常发表和参加有关数据的演示。第一项研究考虑了演示者的视角，其中 12 名参与者使用包含我们方法的演示环境向远程观众进行了演示。第二项研究考虑了 17 名参加我们环境支持的演讲的参与者的观众体验。最后，我们反思这些研究的观察结果，并讨论让远程受众参与数据对话的相关影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无接触交互方法，通过增强的肢体语言（Chironomia）在远程数据展示中实现更生动的互动。
AI.motivation: 传统远程演示缺乏自然的肢体互动，难以有效传达数据细节和情感，需提升远程观众参与度与沟通效率。
AI.method: 结合动态图表与实时双手法跟踪技术，将可视化元素叠加在演讲者摄像头画面中，通过手势实现数据元素的强调、操控及修辞性动作表达。
AI.result: 两项研究显示，12名演讲者和17名观众认为该方法显著提升了远程演示的互动性与数据传达的清晰度。
AI.conclusion: 增强肢体语言交互可有效改善远程数据沟通体验，为未来远程协作工具设计提供新方向。

authors_text: Doyub Kim,Minjae Lee,Ken Museth
title: NeuralVDB: High-resolution Sparse Volume Representation using Hierarchical Neural Networks
title_zh: NeuralVDB：使用分层神经网络的高分辨率稀疏体积表示
abstract: We introduce NeuralVDB, which improves on an existing industry standard for efficient storage of sparse volumetric data, denoted VDB [Museth 2013], by leveraging recent advancements in machine learning. Our novel hybrid data structure can reduce the memory footprints of VDB volumes by orders of magnitude, while maintaining its flexibility and only incurring small (user-controlled) compression errors. Specifically, NeuralVDB replaces the lower nodes of a shallow and wide VDB tree structure with multiple hierarchical neural networks that separately encode topology and value information by means of neural classifiers and regressors respectively. This approach is proven to maximize the compression ratio while maintaining the spatial adaptivity offered by the higher-level VDB data structure. For sparse signed distance fields and density volumes, we have observed compression ratios on the order of 10x to more than 100x from already compressed VDB inputs, with little to no visual artifacts. Furthermore, NeuralVDB is shown to offer more effective compression performance compared to other neural representations such as Neural Geometric Level of Detail [Takikawa et al. 2021], Variable Bitrate Neural Fields [Takikawa et al. 2022a], and Instant Neural Graphics Primitives [Müller et al. 2022]. Finally, we demonstrate how warm-starting from previous frames can accelerate training, i.e., compression, of animated volumes as well as improve temporal coherency of model inference, i.e., decompression.
summary: We introduce NeuralVDB, which improves on an existing industry standard for efficient storage of sparse volumetric data, denoted VDB [Museth 2013], by leveraging recent advancements in machine learning. Our novel hybrid data structure can reduce the memory footprints of VDB volumes by orders of magnitude, while maintaining its flexibility and only incurring small (user-controlled) compression errors. Specifically, NeuralVDB replaces the lower nodes of a shallow and wide VDB tree structure with multiple hierarchical neural networks that separately encode topology and value information by means of neural classifiers and regressors respectively. This approach is proven to maximize the compression ratio while maintaining the spatial adaptivity offered by the higher-level VDB data structure. For sparse signed distance fields and density volumes, we have observed compression ratios on the order of 10x to more than 100x from already compressed VDB inputs, with little to no visual artifacts. Furthermore, NeuralVDB is shown to offer more effective compression performance compared to other neural representations such as Neural Geometric Level of Detail [Takikawa et al. 2021], Variable Bitrate Neural Fields [Takikawa et al. 2022a], and Instant Neural Graphics Primitives [Müller et al. 2022]. Finally, we demonstrate how warm-starting from previous frames can accelerate training, i.e., compression, of animated volumes as well as improve temporal coherency of model inference, i.e., decompression.
abstract_zh: 我们引入 NeuralVDB，它通过利用机器学习的最新进展，改进了有效存储稀疏体积数据的现有行业标准，表示为 VDB [Museth 2013]。我们新颖的混合数据结构可以将 VDB 卷的内存占用量减少几个数量级，同时保持其灵活性并且仅产生较小的（用户控制的）压缩错误。具体来说，NeuralVDB用多个分层神经网络代替了浅而宽的VDB树结构的较低节点，这些神经网络分别通过神经分类器和回归器分别对拓扑和值信息进行编码。事实证明，这种方法可以最大限度地提高压缩比，同时保持更高级别的 VDB 数据结构提供的空间适应性。对于稀疏符号距离场和密度体积，我们观察到已经压缩的 VDB 输入的压缩率约为 10 倍到 100 倍以上，几乎没有视觉伪影。此外，与其他神经表示（例如神经几何细节级别）相比，NeuralVDB 被证明可以提供更有效的压缩性能 [Takikawa 等人。 2021]，可变比特率神经场 [Takikawa 等人。 2022a] 和即时神经图形基元 [Müller 等人。 2022]。最后，我们演示了从先前帧开始的热启动如何加速动画体积的训练（即压缩）以及提高模型推理（即解压缩）的时间一致性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NeuralVDB，通过结合机器学习改进稀疏体积分层存储结构VDB，实现高分辨率数据的高效压缩。
AI.motivation: 现有VDB结构在存储稀疏体积数据时内存占用较高，需在压缩率与数据保真度间权衡，而神经网络可提供更优的表示方式。
AI.method: 用分层神经网络替代VDB树结构的底层节点，通过分类器编码拓扑信息、回归器编码数值信息，保留VDB的空间自适应性。
AI.result: 在已压缩VDB数据上实现10x至100x压缩比，视觉失真极小，且优于Neural LOD、Variable Bitrate Neural Fields等其他神经表示方法。
AI.conclusion: NeuralVDB为稀疏体积数据提供更高效的压缩方案，同时支持动画体积的快速训练与时间一致性优化。

authors_text: Duo Song,Nicholas P. Bauman,Guen Prawiroatmodjo,Bo Peng,Cassandra Granade,Kevin M. Rosso,Guang Hao Low,Martin Roetteler,Karol Kowalski,Eric J. Bylaska
title: Periodic Plane-Wave Electronic Structure Calculations on Quantum Computers
title_zh: 量子计算机上的周期性平面波电子结构计算
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2009.00080
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2009.00080
abstract: A procedure for defining virtual spaces, and the periodic one-electron and two-electron integrals, for plane-wave second quantized Hamiltonians has been developed and demonstrated using full configuration interaction (FCI) simulations and variational quantum eigensolver (VQE) circuits on Quantinuum's ion trap quantum computers accessed through Microsoft's Azure Quantum service. This work is an extension to periodic systems of a new class of algorithms in which the virtual spaces were generated by optimizing orbitals from small pairwise CI Hamiltonians, which we term as correlation optimized virtual orbitals with the abbreviation COVOs. In this extension, the integration of the first Brillouin zone is automatically incorporated into the two-electron integrals. With these procedures we have been able to derive virtual spaces, containing only a few orbitals, that were able to capture a significant amount of correlation. The focus in this manuscript is on comparing the simulations of small molecules calculated with plane-wave basis sets with large periodic unit cells at the $Γ$-point, including images, to results for plane-wave basis sets with aperiodic unit cells. The results for this approach were promising as we were able to obtain good agreement between periodic and aperiodic results for an LiH molecule. Simulations performed on the Quantinuum H1-1 quantum computer were able to produce surprisingly good energies, reproducing the FCI values for the 1 COVO Hamiltonian to within 11 milliHartree (6.9 kcal/mol), when corrected for noise.

This work is an extension to periodic systems of a new class of algorithms in which the virtual spaces were generated by optimizing orbitals from small pairwise CI Hamiltonians, which we term as correlation optimized virtual orbitals with the abbreviation COVOs. In this extension, the integration of the first Brillouin zone is automatically incorporated into the two-electron integrals. With these procedures we have been able to derive virtual spaces, containing only a few orbitals, that were able to capture a significant amount of correlation. The focus in this manuscript is on comparing the simulations of small molecules calculated with plane-wave basis sets with large periodic unit cells at the $Γ$-point, including images, to results for plane-wave basis sets with aperiodic unit cells. The results for this approach were promising as we were able to obtain good agreement between periodic and aperiodic results for an LiH molecule. Simulations performed on the Quantinuum H1-1 quantum computer were able to produce surprisingly good energies, reproducing the FCI values for the 1 COVO Hamiltonian to within 11 milliHartree (6.9 kcal/mol), when corrected for noise.
abstract_zh: 已经开发出一种用于定义平面波第二量子化哈密顿量的虚拟空间以及周期性单电子和双电子积分的程序，并在可通过 Microsoft Azure Quantum 服务访问的 Quantinuum 离子阱量子计算机上使用全配置交互 (FCI) 模拟和变分量子本征解算器 (VQE) 电路进行了开发和演示。这项工作是一类新算法周期系统的扩展，其中虚拟空间是通过优化小型成对 CI 哈密顿量的轨道生成的，我们将其称为相关优化虚拟轨道，缩写为 COVO。在此扩展中，第一布里渊区的积分自动合并到二电子积分中。通过这些程序，我们已经能够导出仅包含几个轨道的虚拟空间，这些轨道能够捕获大量的相关性。本手稿的重点是将使用$ Г $点处具有大周期晶胞的平面波基组计算的小分子模拟（包括图像）与具有非周期晶胞的平面波基组的结果进行比较。这种方法的结果很有希望，因为我们能够在 LiH 分子的周期性和非周期性结果之间获得良好的一致性。在 Quantinuum H1-1 量子计算机上进行的模拟能够产生令人惊讶的良好能量，在校正噪声后，将 1 COVO 哈密顿量的 FCI 值再现到 11 milliHartree (6.9 kcal/mol) 以内。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种在量子计算机上进行周期性平面波电子结构计算的方法，利用虚拟空间和优化的轨道来模拟分子体系。
AI.motivation: 传统电子结构计算在处理周期性系统时面临计算资源的限制，而量子计算机可能提供更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 开发了一种定义虚拟空间和周期性一电子和二电子积分的方法，结合了全组态相互作用（FCI）模拟和变分量子本征求解器（VQE）电路，通过优化轨道生成虚拟空间（COVOs）。
AI.result: 在Quantinuum H1-1量子计算机上成功模拟了LiH分子，计算结果与FCI值的误差小于11毫哈特，显示出良好的一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在周期性系统和非周期性系统之间实现了良好的结果一致性，为量子计算机在电子结构计算中的应用提供了新思路。
