authors_text: Yonghao Xu,Weikang Yu,Pedram Ghamisi,Michael Kopp,Sepp Hochreiter
title: Txt2Img-MHN: Remote Sensing Image Generation from Text Using Modern Hopfield Networks
title_zh: Txt2Img-MHN：使用现代 Hopfield 网络从文本生成遥感图像
comment: ef:IEEE Trans. Image Process., vol. 32, pp. 5737-5750, 2023
comments: ef:IEEE Trans. Image Process., vol. 32, pp. 5737-5750, 2023
abstract: The synthesis of high-resolution remote sensing images based on text descriptions has great potential in many practical application scenarios. Although deep neural networks have achieved great success in many important remote sensing tasks, generating realistic remote sensing images from text descriptions is still very difficult. To address this challenge, we propose a novel text-to-image modern Hopfield network (Txt2Img-MHN). The main idea of Txt2Img-MHN is to conduct hierarchical prototype learning on both text and image embeddings with modern Hopfield layers. Instead of directly learning concrete but highly diverse text-image joint feature representations for different semantics, Txt2Img-MHN aims to learn the most representative prototypes from text-image embeddings, achieving a coarse-to-fine learning strategy. These learned prototypes can then be utilized to represent more complex semantics in the text-to-image generation task. To better evaluate the realism and semantic consistency of the generated images, we further conduct zero-shot classification on real remote sensing data using the classification model trained on synthesized images. Despite its simplicity, we find that the overall accuracy in the zero-shot classification may serve as a good metric to evaluate the ability to generate an image from text. Extensive experiments on the benchmark remote sensing text-image dataset demonstrate that the proposed Txt2Img-MHN can generate more realistic remote sensing images than existing methods. Code and pre-trained models are available online (https://github.com/YonghaoXu/Txt2Img-MHN).
summary: The synthesis of high-resolution remote sensing images based on text descriptions has great potential in many practical application scenarios. Although deep neural networks have achieved great success in many important remote sensing tasks, generating realistic remote sensing images from text descriptions is still very difficult. To address this challenge, we propose a novel text-to-image modern Hopfield network (Txt2Img-MHN). The main idea of Txt2Img-MHN is to conduct hierarchical prototype learning on both text and image embeddings with modern Hopfield layers. Instead of directly learning concrete but highly diverse text-image joint feature representations for different semantics, Txt2Img-MHN aims to learn the most representative prototypes from text-image embeddings, achieving a coarse-to-fine learning strategy. These learned prototypes can then be utilized to represent more complex semantics in the text-to-image generation task. To better evaluate the realism and semantic consistency of the generated images, we further conduct zero-shot classification on real remote sensing data using the classification model trained on synthesized images. Despite its simplicity, we find that the overall accuracy in the zero-shot classification may serve as a good metric to evaluate the ability to generate an image from text. Extensive experiments on the benchmark remote sensing text-image dataset demonstrate that the proposed Txt2Img-MHN can generate more realistic remote sensing images than existing methods. Code and pre-trained models are available online (https://github.com/YonghaoXu/Txt2Img-MHN).
abstract_zh: 基于文本描述的高分辨率遥感图像合成在许多实际应用场景中具有巨大潜力。尽管深度神经网络在许多重要的遥感任务中取得了巨大成功，但从文本描述生成真实的遥感图像仍然非常困难。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的文本到图像现代 Hopfield 网络（Txt2Img-MHN）。 Txt2Img-MHN 的主要思想是利用现代 Hopfield 层对文本和图像嵌入进行分层原型学习。 Txt2Img-MHN 不是直接学习不同语义的具体但高度多样化的文本图像联合特征表示，而是旨在从文本图像嵌入中学习最具代表性的原型，实现从粗到精的学习策略。然后可以利用这些学习到的原型来表示文本到图像生成任务中更复杂的语义。为了更好地评估生成图像的真实性和语义一致性，我们进一步使用在合成图像上训练的分类模型对真实遥感数据进行零样本分类。尽管它很简单，但我们发现零样本分类的总体准确性可以作为评估从文本生成图像的能力的良好指标。对基准遥感文本图像数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的 Txt2Img-MHN 可以生成比现有方法更真实的遥感图像。代码和预训练模型可在线获取（https://github.com/YonghaoXu/Txt2Img-MHN）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Txt2Img-MHN 模型，利用现代霍普菲尔德网络从文本生成高分辨率遥感图像。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度神经网络在遥感任务中表现优异，但基于文本描述生成真实遥感图像仍具挑战性，现有方法难以满足需求。
AI.method: 通过现代霍普菲尔德网络分层学习文本与图像嵌入的代表性原型，采用粗到细策略，并利用合成图像训练的分类模型进行零样本分类评估生成效果。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上， Txt2Img-MHN 生成的遥感图像在真实感和语义一致性上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Txt2Img-MHN 为文本到遥感图像生成提供了有效解决方案，零样本分类准确率可作为生成质量评估指标。

authors_text: Eli Holder,Cindy Xiong
title: Dispersion vs Disparity: Hiding Variability Can Encourage Stereotyping When Visualizing Social Outcomes
title_zh: 分散与差异：隐藏变异性会在可视化社会结果时鼓励刻板印象
abstract: Visualization research often focuses on perceptual accuracy or helping readers interpret key messages. However, we know very little about how chart designs might influence readers' perceptions of the people behind the data. Specifically, could designs interact with readers' social cognitive biases in ways that perpetuate harmful stereotypes? For example, when analyzing social inequality, bar charts are a popular choice to present outcome disparities between race, gender, or other groups. But bar charts may encourage deficit thinking, the perception that outcome disparities are caused by groups' personal strengths or deficiencies, rather than external factors. These faulty personal attributions can then reinforce stereotypes about the groups being visualized. We conducted four experiments examining design choices that influence attribution biases (and therefore deficit thinking). Crowdworkers viewed visualizations depicting social outcomes that either mask variability in data, such as bar charts or dot plots, or emphasize variability in data, such as jitter plots or prediction intervals. They reported their agreement with both personal and external explanations for the visualized disparities. Overall, when participants saw visualizations that hide within-group variability, they agreed more with personal explanations. When they saw visualizations that emphasize within-group variability, they agreed less with personal explanations. These results demonstrate that data visualizations about social inequity can be misinterpreted in harmful ways and lead to stereotyping. Design choices can influence these biases: Hiding variability tends to increase stereotyping while emphasizing variability reduces it.

These results demonstrate that data visualizations about social inequity can be misinterpreted in harmful ways and lead to stereotyping. Design choices can influence these biases: Hiding variability tends to increase stereotyping while emphasizing variability reduces it.
abstract_zh: 可视化研究通常侧重于感知准确性或帮助读者解释关键信息。然而，我们对图表设计如何影响读者对数据背后的人的看法知之甚少。具体来说，设计是否可以与读者的社会认知偏见相互作用，从而延续有害的刻板印象？例如，在分析社会不平等时，条形图是展示种族、性别或其他群体之间结果差异的流行选择。但条形图可能会鼓励赤字思维，即认为结果差异是由群体的个人优势或缺陷造成的，而不是外部因素造成的。这些错误的个人归因可能会强化对被可视化群体的刻板印象。我们进行了四项实验，检查影响归因偏差（以及由此产生的缺陷思维）的设计选择。众包工作者查看描述社会结果的可视化，这些结果要么掩盖数据的可变性，例如条形图或点图，要么强调数据的可变性，例如抖动图或预测间隔。他们表示同意个人和外部对视觉差异的解释。总体而言，当参与者看到隐藏组内差异的可视化时，他们更同意个人解释。当他们看到强调群体内差异的可视化时，他们不太同意个人的解释。这些结果表明，有关社会不平等的数据可视化可能会以有害的方式被误解并导致刻板印象。设计选择会影响这些偏见：隐藏可变性往往会增加刻板印象，而强调可变性则会减少刻板印象。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了数据可视化设计如何影响人们对社会不平等现象的归因偏差及刻板印象形成。
AI.motivation: 现有可视化研究多关注感知准确性或信息传达，但缺乏对图表设计如何与社会认知偏见相互作用、可能加剧刻板印象的探讨。
AI.method: 通过四组实验，让参与者观察隐藏组内差异（如条形图）或强调组内差异（如抖动图）的可视化图表，并评估其对个人因素与外部因素解释的认同度。
AI.result: 隐藏组内差异的图表使参与者更倾向于用个人特质解释差异，而强调差异的图表则削弱了这种归因倾向。
AI.conclusion: 数据可视化设计可能通过隐藏或凸显数据变异性，影响观众对社会不平等的归因方式，进而加剧或缓解刻板印象。

search_text: Dispersion vs Disparity: Hiding Variability Can Encourage Stereotyping When Visualizing Social Outcomes 分散与差异：隐藏变异性会在可视化社会结果时鼓励刻板印象 Visualization research often focuses on perceptual accuracy or helping readers interpret key messages. However, we know very little about how chart designs might influence readers' perceptions of the people behind the data. Specifically, could designs interact with readers' social cognitive biases in ways that perpetuate harmful stereotypes? For example, when analyzing social inequality, bar charts are a popular choice to present outcome disparities between race, gender, or other groups. But bar charts may encourage deficit thinking, the perception that outcome disparities are caused by groups' personal strengths or deficiencies, rather than external factors. These faulty personal attributions can then reinforce stereotypes about the groups being visualized. We conducted four experiments examining design choices that influence attribution biases (and therefore deficit thinking). Crowdworkers viewed visualizations depicting social outcomes that either mask variability in data, such as bar charts or dot plots, or emphasize variability in data, such as jitter plots or prediction intervals. They reported their agreement with both personal and external explanations for the visualized disparities. Overall, when participants saw visualizations that hide within-group variability, they agreed more with personal explanations. When they saw visualizations that emphasize within-group variability, they agreed less with personal explanations. These results demonstrate that data visualizations about social inequity can be misinterpreted in harmful ways and lead to stereotyping. Design choices can influence these biases: Hiding variability tends to increase stereotyping while emphasizing variability reduces it. 可视化研究通常侧重于感知准确性或帮助读者解释关键信息。然而，我们对图表设计如何影响读者对数据背后的人的看法知之甚少。具体来说，设计是否可以与读者的社会认知偏见相互作用，从而延续有害的刻板印象？例如，在分析社会不平等时，条形图是展示种族、性别或其他群体之间结果差异的流行选择。但条形图可能会鼓励赤字思维，即认为结果差异是由群体的个人优势或缺陷造成的，而不是外部因素造成的。这些错误的个人归因可能会强化对被可视化群体的刻板印象。我们进行了四项实验，检查影响归因偏差（以及由此产生的缺陷思维）的设计选择。众包工作者查看描述社会结果的可视化，这些结果要么掩盖数据的可变性，例如条形图或点图，要么强调数据的可变性，例如抖动图或预测间隔。他们表示同意个人和外部对视觉差异的解释。总体而言，当参与者看到隐藏组内差异的可视化时，他们更同意个人解释。当他们看到强调群体内差异的可视化时，他们不太同意个人的解释。这些结果表明，有关社会不平等的数据可视化可能会以有害的方式被误解并导致刻板印象。设计选择会影响这些偏见：隐藏可变性往往会增加刻板印象，而强调可变性则会减少刻板印象。 本文研究了数据可视化设计如何影响人们对社会不平等现象的归因偏差及刻板印象形成。 Eli Holder,Cindy Xiong cs.HC,cs.CY

authors_text: Lei Ke,Yu-Wing Tai,Chi-Keung Tang
title: Occlusion-Aware Instance Segmentation via BiLayer Network Architectures
title_zh: 通过双层网络架构进行遮挡感知实例分割
comment: Extended version of "Deep Occlusion-Aware Instance Segmentation with Overlapping BiLayers", CVPR 2021 (arXiv:2103.12340)
comments: Extended version of "Deep Occlusion-Aware Instance Segmentation with Overlapping BiLayers", CVPR 2021 (arXiv:2103.12340)
abstract: Segmenting highly-overlapping image objects is challenging, because there is typically no distinction between real object contours and occlusion boundaries on images. Unlike previous instance segmentation methods, we model image formation as a composition of two overlapping layers, and propose Bilayer Convolutional Network (BCNet), where the top layer detects occluding objects (occluders) and the bottom layer infers partially occluded instances (occludees). The explicit modeling of occlusion relationship with bilayer structure naturally decouples the boundaries of both the occluding and occluded instances, and considers the interaction between them during mask regression. We investigate the efficacy of bilayer structure using two popular convolutional network designs, namely, Fully Convolutional Network (FCN) and Graph Convolutional Network (GCN). Further, we formulate bilayer decoupling using the vision transformer (ViT), by representing instances in the image as separate learnable occluder and occludee queries. Large and consistent improvements using one/two-stage and query-based object detectors with various backbones and network layer choices validate the generalization ability of bilayer decoupling, as shown by extensive experiments on image instance segmentation benchmarks (COCO, KINS, COCOA) and video instance segmentation benchmarks (YTVIS, OVIS, BDD100K MOTS), especially for heavy occlusion cases. Code and data are available at https://github.com/lkeab/BCNet.
summary: Segmenting highly-overlapping image objects is challenging, because there is typically no distinction between real object contours and occlusion boundaries on images. Unlike previous instance segmentation methods, we model image formation as a composition of two overlapping layers, and propose Bilayer Convolutional Network (BCNet), where the top layer detects occluding objects (occluders) and the bottom layer infers partially occluded instances (occludees). The explicit modeling of occlusion relationship with bilayer structure naturally decouples the boundaries of both the occluding and occluded instances, and considers the interaction between them during mask regression. We investigate the efficacy of bilayer structure using two popular convolutional network designs, namely, Fully Convolutional Network (FCN) and Graph Convolutional Network (GCN). Further, we formulate bilayer decoupling using the vision transformer (ViT), by representing instances in the image as separate learnable occluder and occludee queries. Large and consistent improvements using one/two-stage and query-based object detectors with various backbones and network layer choices validate the generalization ability of bilayer decoupling, as shown by extensive experiments on image instance segmentation benchmarks (COCO, KINS, COCOA) and video instance segmentation benchmarks (YTVIS, OVIS, BDD100K MOTS), especially for heavy occlusion cases. Code and data are available at https://github.com/lkeab/BCNet.
abstract_zh: 分割高度重叠的图像对象具有挑战性，因为图像上的真实对象轮廓和遮挡边界通常没有区别。与之前的实例分割方法不同，我们将图像形成建模为两个重叠层的组合，并提出双层卷积网络（BCNet），其中顶层检测遮挡对象（遮挡物），底层推断部分遮挡的实例（被遮挡物）。双层结构遮挡关系的显式建模自然地解耦了遮挡实例和被遮挡实例的边界，并在掩模回归过程中考虑了它们之间的相互作用。我们使用两种流行的卷积网络设计（即全卷积网络（FCN）和图卷积网络（GCN））研究双层结构的功效。此外，我们通过将图像中的实例表示为单独的可学习遮挡物和被遮挡物查询，使用视觉变换器（ViT）制定双层解耦。使用具有各种骨干网和网络层选择的一/两阶段和基于查询的对象检测器进行的大规模且一致的改进验证了双层解耦的泛化能力，如图像实例分割基准（COCO、KINS、COCOA）和视频实例分割基准（YTVIS、OVIS、BDD100K MOTS）上的大量实验所示，特别是对于严重遮挡的情况。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/lkeab/BCNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种双层网络架构BCNet，通过显式建模遮挡关系解决高度重叠图像对象的实例分割问题。
AI.motivation: 现有实例分割方法难以区分真实物体轮廓与遮挡边界，而双层结构能自然解耦遮挡物与被遮挡物的边界交互关系。
AI.method: 设计双层卷积网络（BCNet），顶层检测遮挡物（occluders），底层推断被部分遮挡的实例（occludees），并基于FCN/GCN/ViT框架验证双层解耦有效性。
AI.result: 在COCO、YTVIS等基准数据集上实现显著性能提升，尤其在重度遮挡场景下效果突出，代码与数据已开源。
AI.conclusion: 双层解耦架构有效提升了遮挡场景下的实例分割性能，具有良好的跨数据集与跨网络结构的泛化能力。

authors_text: Cindy Xiong,Chase Stokes,Yea-Seul Kim,Steven Franconeri
title: Seeing What You Believe or Believing What You See? Belief Biases Correlation Estimation
title_zh: 看到你所相信的还是相信你所看到的？信念偏差相关性估计
abstract: When an analyst or scientist has a belief about how the world works, their thinking can be biased in favor of that belief. Therefore, one bedrock principle of science is to minimize that bias by testing the predictions of one's belief against objective data. But interpreting visualized data is a complex perceptual and cognitive process. Through two crowdsourced experiments, we demonstrate that supposedly objective assessments of the strength of a correlational relationship can be influenced by how strongly a viewer believes in the existence of that relationship. Participants viewed scatterplots depicting a relationship between meaningful variable pairs (e.g., number of environmental regulations and air quality) and estimated their correlations. They also estimated the correlation of the same scatterplots labeled instead with generic 'X' and 'Y' axes. In a separate section, they also reported how strongly they believed there to be a correlation between the meaningful variable pairs. Participants estimated correlations more accurately when they viewed scatterplots labeled with generic axes compared to scatterplots labeled with meaningful variable pairs. Furthermore, when viewers believed that two variables should have a strong relationship, they overestimated correlations between those variables by an r-value of about 0.1. When they believed that the variables should be unrelated, they underestimated the correlations by an r-value of about 0.1. While data visualizations are typically thought to present objective truths to the viewer, these results suggest that existing personal beliefs can bias even objective statistical values people extract from data.

When they believed that the variables should be unrelated, they underestimated the correlations by an r-value of about 0.1. While data visualizations are typically thought to present objective truths to the viewer, these results suggest that existing personal beliefs can bias even objective statistical values people extract from data.
abstract_zh: 当分析师或科学家对世界如何运作抱有某种信念时，他们的思维可能会偏向于这种信念。因此，科学的一个基本原则是通过根据客观数据测试一个人的信念预测来最大限度地减少这种偏见。但解释可视化数据是一个复杂的感知和认知过程。通过两个众包实验，我们证明了对相关关系强度的客观评估可能会受到观看者对该关系存在的相信程度的影响。参与者查看描述有意义的变量对（例如环境法规数量和空气质量）之间关系的散点图，并估计它们的相关性。他们还估计了用通用“X”和“Y”轴标记的相同散点图的相关性。在一个单独的部分中，他们还报告了他们相信有意义的变量对之间存在相关性的程度。与用有意义的变量对标记的散点图相比，当参与者查看用通用轴标记的散点图时，他们可以更准确地估计相关性。此外，当观众认为两个变量应该具有很强的关系时，他们会高估这些变量之间的相关性，r 值约为 0.1。当他们认为变量应该不相关时，他们低估了相关性，r 值约为 0.1。虽然数据可视化通常被认为向观看者呈现客观事实，但这些结果表明，现有的个人信念甚至可能使人们从数据中提取的客观统计值产生偏差。

AI.method: 通过两项众包实验，参与者分别观察带有实际变量标签（如环境法规与空气质量）和通用XY轴标签的散点图，估计其相关性并报告对变量关系的信念强度。
AI.result: 当散点图使用通用标签时，参与者对相关性的估计更准确；若参与者认为变量间存在强关联，则高估相关性约0.1的r值；若认为无关，则低估约0.1的r值。
AI.conclusion: 个人信念会显著影响从数据可视化中提取的统计值，表明即使客观数据可视化也可能受到认知偏见的影响。

search_text: Seeing What You Believe or Believing What You See? Belief Biases Correlation Estimation 看到你所相信的还是相信你所看到的？信念偏差相关性估计 When an analyst or scientist has a belief about how the world works, their thinking can be biased in favor of that belief. Therefore, one bedrock principle of science is to minimize that bias by testing the predictions of one's belief against objective data. But interpreting visualized data is a complex perceptual and cognitive process. Through two crowdsourced experiments, we demonstrate that supposedly objective assessments of the strength of a correlational relationship can be influenced by how strongly a viewer believes in the existence of that relationship. Participants viewed scatterplots depicting a relationship between meaningful variable pairs (e.g., number of environmental regulations and air quality) and estimated their correlations. They also estimated the correlation of the same scatterplots labeled instead with generic 'X' and 'Y' axes. In a separate section, they also reported how strongly they believed there to be a correlation between the meaningful variable pairs. Participants estimated correlations more accurately when they viewed scatterplots labeled with generic axes compared to scatterplots labeled with meaningful variable pairs. Furthermore, when viewers believed that two variables should have a strong relationship, they overestimated correlations between those variables by an r-value of about 0.1. When they believed that the variables should be unrelated, they underestimated the correlations by an r-value of about 0.1. While data visualizations are typically thought to present objective truths to the viewer, these results suggest that existing personal beliefs can bias even objective statistical values people extract from data. 当分析师或科学家对世界如何运作抱有某种信念时，他们的思维可能会偏向于这种信念。因此，科学的一个基本原则是通过根据客观数据测试一个人的信念预测来最大限度地减少这种偏见。但解释可视化数据是一个复杂的感知和认知过程。通过两个众包实验，我们证明了对相关关系强度的客观评估可能会受到观看者对该关系存在的相信程度的影响。参与者查看描述有意义的变量对（例如环境法规数量和空气质量）之间关系的散点图，并估计它们的相关性。他们还估计了用通用“X”和“Y”轴标记的相同散点图的相关性。在一个单独的部分中，他们还报告了他们相信有意义的变量对之间存在相关性的程度。与用有意义的变量对标记的散点图相比，当参与者查看用通用轴标记的散点图时，他们可以更准确地估计相关性。此外，当观众认为两个变量应该具有很强的关系时，他们会高估这些变量之间的相关性，r 值约为 0.1。当他们认为变量应该不相关时，他们低估了相关性，r 值约为 0.1。虽然数据可视化通常被认为向观看者呈现客观事实，但这些结果表明，现有的个人信念甚至可能使人们从数据中提取的客观统计值产生偏差。 该论文研究个人信念如何影响对数据可视化中相关性关系的判断。 Cindy Xiong,Chase Stokes,Yea-Seul Kim,Steven Franconeri cs.HC

authors_text: Mou-Cheng Xu,Yukun Zhou,Chen Jin,Marius de Groot,Daniel C. Alexander,Neil P. Oxtoby,Yipeng Hu,Joseph Jacob
title: Bayesian Pseudo Labels: Expectation Maximization for Robust and Efficient Semi-Supervised Segmentation
title_zh: 贝叶斯伪标签：稳健且高效的半监督分割的期望最大化
comment: MICCAI 2022 (Early accept, Student Travel Award)
comments: MICCAI 2022 (Early accept, Student Travel Award)
abstract: This paper concerns pseudo labelling in segmentation. Our contribution is fourfold. Firstly, we present a new formulation of pseudo-labelling as an Expectation-Maximization (EM) algorithm for clear statistical interpretation. Secondly, we propose a semi-supervised medical image segmentation method purely based on the original pseudo labelling, namely SegPL. We demonstrate SegPL is a competitive approach against state-of-the-art consistency regularisation based methods on semi-supervised segmentation on a 2D multi-class MRI brain tumour segmentation task and a 3D binary CT lung vessel segmentation task. The simplicity of SegPL allows less computational cost comparing to prior methods. Thirdly, we demonstrate that the effectiveness of SegPL may originate from its robustness against out-of-distribution noises and adversarial attacks. Lastly, under the EM framework, we introduce a probabilistic generalisation of SegPL via variational inference, which learns a dynamic threshold for pseudo labelling during the training. We show that SegPL with variational inference can perform uncertainty estimation on par with the gold-standard method Deep Ensemble.
summary: This paper concerns pseudo labelling in segmentation. Our contribution is fourfold. Firstly, we present a new formulation of pseudo-labelling as an Expectation-Maximization (EM) algorithm for clear statistical interpretation. Secondly, we propose a semi-supervised medical image segmentation method purely based on the original pseudo labelling, namely SegPL. We demonstrate SegPL is a competitive approach against state-of-the-art consistency regularisation based methods on semi-supervised segmentation on a 2D multi-class MRI brain tumour segmentation task and a 3D binary CT lung vessel segmentation task. The simplicity of SegPL allows less computational cost comparing to prior methods. Thirdly, we demonstrate that the effectiveness of SegPL may originate from its robustness against out-of-distribution noises and adversarial attacks. Lastly, under the EM framework, we introduce a probabilistic generalisation of SegPL via variational inference, which learns a dynamic threshold for pseudo labelling during the training. We show that SegPL with variational inference can perform uncertainty estimation on par with the gold-standard method Deep Ensemble.
abstract_zh: 本文涉及分割中的伪标签。我们的贡献是四重的。首先，我们提出了一种新的伪标签公式，作为期望最大化（EM）算法，以实现清晰的统计解释。其次，我们提出了一种纯粹基于原始伪标签的半监督医学图像分割方法，即SegPL。我们证明，在 2D 多类 MRI 脑肿瘤分割任务和 3D 二元 CT 肺血管分割任务上，SegPL 是一种与最先进的基于半监督分割的一致性正则化方法相比的竞争方法。与之前的方法相比，SegPL 的简单性使得计算成本更低。第三，我们证明 SegPL 的有效性可能源于它对分布外噪声和对抗性攻击的鲁棒性。最后，在 EM 框架下，我们通过变分推理引入了 SegPL 的概率泛化，它在训练过程中学习伪标签的动态阈值。我们证明，具有变分推理的 SegPL 可以执行与黄金标准方法 Deep Ensemble 相同的不确定性估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于期望最大化（EM）算法的伪标签方法，用于鲁棒且高效的半监督分割。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督分割方法计算成本高或对噪声敏感，需更高效且鲁棒的伪标签策略。
AI.method: 将伪标签建模为EM算法，提出SegPL方法，并通过变分推断实现动态阈值与不确定性估计。
AI.result: SegPL在2D脑肿瘤和3D肺血管分割任务中优于同类方法，计算成本更低且具有抗噪声和对抗攻击能力。
AI.conclusion: SegPL通过EM框架和变分推断提升了半监督分割的效率与鲁棒性，不确定性估计效果接近Deep Ensemble。

authors_text: Fabian Sperrle,Davide Ceneda,Mennatallah El-Assady
title: Lotse: A Practical Framework for Guidance in Visual Analytics
title_zh: Lotse：可视化分析指导的实用框架
comment: VIS 2022, to appear in TVCG
comments: VIS 2022, to appear in TVCG
abstract: Co-adaptive guidance aims to enable efficient human-machine collaboration in visual analytics, as proposed by multiple theoretical frameworks. This paper bridges the gap between such conceptual frameworks and practical implementation by introducing an accessible model of guidance and an accompanying guidance library, mapping theory into practice. We contribute a model of system-provided guidance based on design templates and derived strategies. We instantiate the model in a library called Lotse that allows specifying guidance strategies in definition files and generates running code from them. Lotse is the first guidance library using such an approach. It supports the creation of reusable guidance strategies to retrofit existing applications with guidance and fosters the creation of general guidance strategy patterns. We demonstrate its effectiveness through first-use case studies with VA researchers of varying guidance design expertise and find that they are able to effectively and quickly implement guidance with Lotse. Further, we analyze our framework's cognitive dimensions to evaluate its expressiveness and outline a summary of open research questions for aligning guidance practice with its intricate theory.
summary: Co-adaptive guidance aims to enable efficient human-machine collaboration in visual analytics, as proposed by multiple theoretical frameworks. This paper bridges the gap between such conceptual frameworks and practical implementation by introducing an accessible model of guidance and an accompanying guidance library, mapping theory into practice. We contribute a model of system-provided guidance based on design templates and derived strategies. We instantiate the model in a library called Lotse that allows specifying guidance strategies in definition files and generates running code from them. Lotse is the first guidance library using such an approach. It supports the creation of reusable guidance strategies to retrofit existing applications with guidance and fosters the creation of general guidance strategy patterns. We demonstrate its effectiveness through first-use case studies with VA researchers of varying guidance design expertise and find that they are able to effectively and quickly implement guidance with Lotse. Further, we analyze our framework's cognitive dimensions to evaluate its expressiveness and outline a summary of open research questions for aligning guidance practice with its intricate theory.
abstract_zh: 正如多个理论框架所提出的，协同自适应指导旨在实现视觉分析中高效的人机协作。本文通过引入易于理解的指导模型和随附的指导库，将理论映射到实践，弥合了此类概念框架和实际实施之间的差距。我们根据设计模板和派生策略提供系统提供指导的模型。我们在名为 Lotse 的库中实例化该模型，该库允许在定义文件中指定指导策略并从中生成运行代码。 Lotse 是第一个使用这种方法的指导库。它支持创建可重用的指导策略，以指导改造现有应用程序，并促进创建通用指导策略模式。我们通过与具有不同指导设计专业知识的 VA 研究人员进行首次用例研究来证明其有效性，并发现他们能够有效、快速地实施 Lotse 的指导。此外，我们分析了框架的认知维度，以评估其表达能力，并概述了开放研究问题的摘要，以便将指导实践与其复杂的理论结合起来。

AI.tldr: 本文提出名为Lotse的实用框架，通过设计模板和策略模型实现视觉分析中的人机协作指导，并开发配套库以支持现有应用的指导策略集成。
AI.motivation: 现有理论框架缺乏实践落地工具，需将抽象指导理论转化为可复用的实现方案，同时支持不同经验开发者快速构建指导系统。
AI.method: 基于设计模板构建系统指导模型，开发Lotse库通过定义文件生成代码，支持策略复用与模式化开发，并通过认知维度分析评估框架表达能力。
AI.result: 案例研究表明Lotse使不同经验的VA研究者能高效实现指导，框架认知维度分析验证其表达性，并提出指导实践与理论对齐的开放问题。
AI.conclusion: Lotse作为首个此类指导库验证了框架可行性，但需进一步研究解决实践与理论间的复杂对齐问题以提升指导效果。

search_text: Lotse: A Practical Framework for Guidance in Visual Analytics Lotse：可视化分析指导的实用框架 Co-adaptive guidance aims to enable efficient human-machine collaboration in visual analytics, as proposed by multiple theoretical frameworks. This paper bridges the gap between such conceptual frameworks and practical implementation by introducing an accessible model of guidance and an accompanying guidance library, mapping theory into practice. We contribute a model of system-provided guidance based on design templates and derived strategies. We instantiate the model in a library called Lotse that allows specifying guidance strategies in definition files and generates running code from them. Lotse is the first guidance library using such an approach. It supports the creation of reusable guidance strategies to retrofit existing applications with guidance and fosters the creation of general guidance strategy patterns. We demonstrate its effectiveness through first-use case studies with VA researchers of varying guidance design expertise and find that they are able to effectively and quickly implement guidance with Lotse. Further, we analyze our framework's cognitive dimensions to evaluate its expressiveness and outline a summary of open research questions for aligning guidance practice with its intricate theory. 正如多个理论框架所提出的，协同自适应指导旨在实现视觉分析中高效的人机协作。本文通过引入易于理解的指导模型和随附的指导库，将理论映射到实践，弥合了此类概念框架和实际实施之间的差距。我们根据设计模板和派生策略提供系统提供指导的模型。我们在名为 Lotse 的库中实例化该模型，该库允许在定义文件中指定指导策略并从中生成运行代码。 Lotse 是第一个使用这种方法的指导库。它支持创建可重用的指导策略，以指导改造现有应用程序，并促进创建通用指导策略模式。我们通过与具有不同指导设计专业知识的 VA 研究人员进行首次用例研究来证明其有效性，并发现他们能够有效、快速地实施 Lotse 的指导。此外，我们分析了框架的认知维度，以评估其表达能力，并概述了开放研究问题的摘要，以便将指导实践与其复杂的理论结合起来。 本文提出名为Lotse的实用框架，通过设计模板和策略模型实现视觉分析中的人机协作指导，并开发配套库以支持现有应用的指导策略集成。 Fabian Sperrle,Davide Ceneda,Mennatallah El-Assady cs.HC

authors_text: Sophia Knight,Pavel Naumov,Qi Shi,Vigasan Suntharraj
title: Truth Set Algebra: A New Way to Prove Undefinability
title_zh: 真值集代数：证明不可定义性的新方法
abstract: The article proposes a new technique for proving the undefinability of logical connectives through each other and illustrates the technique with several examples. Some of the obtained results are new proofs of the existing theorems, others are original to this work.
summary: The article proposes a new technique for proving the undefinability of logical connectives through each other and illustrates the technique with several examples. Some of the obtained results are new proofs of the existing theorems, others are original to this work.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新技术来证明逻辑连接词之间的不可定义性，并用几个例子说明了该技术。所获得的一些结果是现有定理的新证明，其他结果是这项工作的原创。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Truth Set Algebra的新方法，用于证明逻辑连接词之间的不可定义性，并通过多个例子展示了该技术的应用。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在证明逻辑连接词不可定义性时存在局限性，需要更系统化的框架来简化证明过程并发现新结果。
AI.method: 构建Truth Set Algebra框架，通过集合运算和代数结构分析逻辑连接词的定义可能性。
AI.result: 获得了现有定理的新证明，并发现了若干原创性不可定义性结果。
AI.conclusion: Truth Set Algebra为逻辑连接词的不可定义性研究提供了有效工具，具有理论创新性和应用潜力。

authors_text: Babak Hemmatian,Lav R. Varshney
title: Debiased Large Language Models Still Associate Muslims with Uniquely Violent Acts
title_zh: 有偏见的大语言模型仍然将穆斯林与独特的暴力行为联系在一起
comment: 6 pages, 1 figure, 3 tables
comments: 6 pages, 1 figure, 3 tables
abstract: Recent work demonstrates a bias in the GPT-3 model towards generating violent text completions when prompted about Muslims, compared with Christians and Hindus. Two pre-registered replication attempts, one exact and one approximate, found only the weakest bias in the more recent Instruct Series version of GPT-3, fine-tuned to eliminate biased and toxic outputs. Few violent completions were observed. Additional pre-registered experiments, however, showed that using common names associated with the religions in prompts yields a highly significant increase in violent completions, also revealing a stronger second-order bias against Muslims. Names of Muslim celebrities from non-violent domains resulted in relatively fewer violent completions, suggesting that access to individualized information can steer the model away from using stereotypes. Nonetheless, content analysis revealed religion-specific violent themes containing highly offensive ideas regardless of prompt format. Our results show the need for additional debiasing of large language models to address higher-order schemas and associations.
summary: Recent work demonstrates a bias in the GPT-3 model towards generating violent text completions when prompted about Muslims, compared with Christians and Hindus. Two pre-registered replication attempts, one exact and one approximate, found only the weakest bias in the more recent Instruct Series version of GPT-3, fine-tuned to eliminate biased and toxic outputs. Few violent completions were observed. Additional pre-registered experiments, however, showed that using common names associated with the religions in prompts yields a highly significant increase in violent completions, also revealing a stronger second-order bias against Muslims. Names of Muslim celebrities from non-violent domains resulted in relatively fewer violent completions, suggesting that access to individualized information can steer the model away from using stereotypes. Nonetheless, content analysis revealed religion-specific violent themes containing highly offensive ideas regardless of prompt format. Our results show the need for additional debiasing of large language models to address higher-order schemas and associations.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，与基督徒和印度教徒相比，GPT-3 模型在提示有关穆斯林时倾向于生成暴力文本补全。两次预先注册的复制尝试，一种是精确的，一种是近似的，仅在最新的 GPT-3 指令系列版本中发现了最弱的偏差，并进行了微调以消除偏差和有毒输出。很少观察到暴力的完成情况。然而，其他预先注册的实验表明，在提示中使用与宗教相关的通用名称会导致暴力完成次数显着增加，也揭示了针对穆斯林的更强烈的二阶偏见。来自非暴力领域的穆斯林名人的名字导致暴力完成相对较少，这表明获取个性化信息可以使模型摆脱刻板印象。尽管如此，内容分析显示，无论提示格式如何，特定宗教的暴力主题都包含高度攻击性的想法。我们的结果表明需要对大型语言模型进行额外的去偏处理以解决高阶模式和关联。

AI.tldr: 本文检验去偏见后的大型语言模型是否仍会将穆斯林与暴力行为关联。
AI.motivation: 尽管GPT-3的去偏见版本声称消除有害输出，但需验证其是否仍存在宗教相关的暴力联想偏见。
AI.method: 通过预注册实验，使用宗教相关提示和常见宗教名字测试模型生成暴力内容的倾向，并分析个体化信息的影响。
AI.result: 最新版本暴力生成减少，但使用常见宗教名字时暴力输出显著增加，且穆斯林的第二级偏见更明显，宗教特定暴力主题仍存在。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步去偏见以消除高阶关联和刻板印象，当前方法未能完全解决深层偏见问题。

authors_text: Ayush Kumar,Parth Nagarkar,Prabhav Nalhe,Sanjeev Vijayakumar
title: Deep Learning Driven Natural Languages Text to SQL Query Conversion: A Survey
title_zh: 深度学习驱动的自然语言文本到 SQL 查询的转换：一项调查
comment: 19 pages, 6 figures
comments: 19 pages, 6 figures
abstract: With the future striving toward data-centric decision-making, seamless access to databases is of utmost importance. There is extensive research on creating an efficient text-to-sql (TEXT2SQL) model to access data from the database. Using a Natural language is one of the best interfaces that can bridge the gap between the data and results by accessing the database efficiently, especially for non-technical users. It will open the doors and create tremendous interest among users who are well versed in technical skills or not very skilled in query languages. Even if numerous deep learning-based algorithms are proposed or studied, there still is very challenging to have a generic model to solve the data query issues using natural language in a real-work scenario. The reason is the use of different datasets in different studies, which comes with its limitations and assumptions. At the same time, we do lack a thorough understanding of these proposed models and their limitations with the specific dataset it is trained on. In this paper, we try to present a holistic overview of 24 recent neural network models studied in the last couple of years, including their architectures involving convolutional neural networks, recurrent neural networks, pointer networks, reinforcement learning, generative models, etc. We also give an overview of the 11 datasets that are widely used to train the models for TEXT2SQL technologies. We also discuss the future application possibilities of TEXT2SQL technologies for seamless data queries.
summary: With the future striving toward data-centric decision-making, seamless access to databases is of utmost importance. There is extensive research on creating an efficient text-to-sql (TEXT2SQL) model to access data from the database. Using a Natural language is one of the best interfaces that can bridge the gap between the data and results by accessing the database efficiently, especially for non-technical users. It will open the doors and create tremendous interest among users who are well versed in technical skills or not very skilled in query languages. Even if numerous deep learning-based algorithms are proposed or studied, there still is very challenging to have a generic model to solve the data query issues using natural language in a real-work scenario. The reason is the use of different datasets in different studies, which comes with its limitations and assumptions. At the same time, we do lack a thorough understanding of these proposed models and their limitations with the specific dataset it is trained on. In this paper, we try to present a holistic overview of 24 recent neural network models studied in the last couple of years, including their architectures involving convolutional neural networks, recurrent neural networks, pointer networks, reinforcement learning, generative models, etc. We also give an overview of the 11 datasets that are widely used to train the models for TEXT2SQL technologies. We also discuss the future application possibilities of TEXT2SQL technologies for seamless data queries.
abstract_zh: 随着未来努力实现以数据为中心的决策，对数据库的无缝访问变得至关重要。关于创建高效的文本到 SQL (TEXT2SQL) 模型以访问数据库中的数据进行了广泛的研究。使用自然语言是最好的界面之一，它可以通过有效地访问数据库来弥合数据和结果之间的差距，特别是对于非技术用户而言。它将打开大门，并在精通技术技能或不太精通查询语言的用户中引起巨大的兴趣。即使提出或研究了大量基于深度学习的算法，在实际工作场景中使用自然语言解决数据查询问题的通用模型仍然非常具有挑战性。原因是不同的研究使用不同的数据集，这有其局限性和假设。与此同时，我们确实缺乏对这些提出的模型及其训练特定数据集的局限性的透彻理解。在本文中，我们试图全面概述过去几年研究的 24 个神经网络模型，包括它们的架构，涉及卷积神经网络、循环神经网络、指针网络、强化学习、生成模型等。我们还概述了广泛用于训练 TEXT2SQL 技术模型的 11 个数据集。我们还讨论了 TEXT2SQL 技术在无缝数据查询方面的未来应用可能性。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了近年来用于文本到SQL查询转换的24种深度学习模型及11个常用数据集，分析其架构、优缺点及应用场景。
AI.motivation: 随着数据驱动决策的需求增长，非技术用户亟需通过自然语言高效访问数据库，但现有模型因数据集差异和泛化能力不足面临挑战。
AI.method: 系统梳理并分类比较了卷积神经网络、循环神经网络、指针网络等模型，总结了主流数据集的特点及训练局限性。
AI.result: 明确了当前模型的技术演进路径，揭示了数据集偏差对模型性能的影响，并提出了TEXT2SQL技术在实际应用中的潜在方向。
AI.conclusion: 尽管深度学习显著提升了文本到SQL的转换能力，但构建跨领域通用模型仍需解决语义理解与数据分布差异等核心问题。

search_text: Deep Learning Driven Natural Languages Text to SQL Query Conversion: A Survey 深度学习驱动的自然语言文本到 SQL 查询的转换：一项调查 With the future striving toward data-centric decision-making, seamless access to databases is of utmost importance. There is extensive research on creating an efficient text-to-sql (TEXT2SQL) model to access data from the database. Using a Natural language is one of the best interfaces that can bridge the gap between the data and results by accessing the database efficiently, especially for non-technical users. It will open the doors and create tremendous interest among users who are well versed in technical skills or not very skilled in query languages. Even if numerous deep learning-based algorithms are proposed or studied, there still is very challenging to have a generic model to solve the data query issues using natural language in a real-work scenario. The reason is the use of different datasets in different studies, which comes with its limitations and assumptions. At the same time, we do lack a thorough understanding of these proposed models and their limitations with the specific dataset it is trained on. In this paper, we try to present a holistic overview of 24 recent neural network models studied in the last couple of years, including their architectures involving convolutional neural networks, recurrent neural networks, pointer networks, reinforcement learning, generative models, etc. We also give an overview of the 11 datasets that are widely used to train the models for TEXT2SQL technologies. We also discuss the future application possibilities of TEXT2SQL technologies for seamless data queries. 随着未来努力实现以数据为中心的决策，对数据库的无缝访问变得至关重要。关于创建高效的文本到 SQL (TEXT2SQL) 模型以访问数据库中的数据进行了广泛的研究。使用自然语言是最好的界面之一，它可以通过有效地访问数据库来弥合数据和结果之间的差距，特别是对于非技术用户而言。它将打开大门，并在精通技术技能或不太精通查询语言的用户中引起巨大的兴趣。即使提出或研究了大量基于深度学习的算法，在实际工作场景中使用自然语言解决数据查询问题的通用模型仍然非常具有挑战性。原因是不同的研究使用不同的数据集，这有其局限性和假设。与此同时，我们确实缺乏对这些提出的模型及其训练特定数据集的局限性的透彻理解。在本文中，我们试图全面概述过去几年研究的 24 个神经网络模型，包括它们的架构，涉及卷积神经网络、循环神经网络、指针网络、强化学习、生成模型等。我们还概述了广泛用于训练 TEXT2SQL 技术模型的 11 个数据集。我们还讨论了 TEXT2SQL 技术在无缝数据查询方面的未来应用可能性。 本文综述了近年来用于文本到SQL查询转换的24种深度学习模型及11个常用数据集，分析其架构、优缺点及应用场景。 Ayush Kumar,Parth Nagarkar,Prabhav Nalhe,Sanjeev Vijayakumar cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Majid Farhadi,Jai Moondra,Prasad Tetali,Alejandro Toriello
title: Multi Purpose Routing: New Perspectives and Approximation Algorithms
title_zh: 多用途路由：新视角和近似算法
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2107.10454
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2107.10454
abstract: The cost due to delay in services may be intrinsically different for various applications of vehicle routing such as medical emergencies, logistical operations, and ride-sharing. We study a fundamental generalization of the Traveling Salesman Problem, namely $L_p$ TSP, where the objective is to minimize an aggregated measure of the delay in services, quantified by the Minkowski $p$-norm of the delay vector. We present efficient combinatorial and Linear Programming algorithms for approximating $L_p$ TSP on general metrics. We provide several approximation algorithms for the $L_p$ TSP problem, including $4.27$ & $10.92$-approximation algorithms for single & multi vehicle $L_2$ TSP, called the Traveling Firefighter Problem. Among other contributions, we provide an $8$-approximation and a $1.78$ inapproximability for All-Norm TSP problem, addressing scenarios where one does not know the ideal cost function, or is seeking simultaneous approximation with respect to any cost function.
summary: The cost due to delay in services may be intrinsically different for various applications of vehicle routing such as medical emergencies, logistical operations, and ride-sharing. We study a fundamental generalization of the Traveling Salesman Problem, namely $L_p$ TSP, where the objective is to minimize an aggregated measure of the delay in services, quantified by the Minkowski $p$-norm of the delay vector. We present efficient combinatorial and Linear Programming algorithms for approximating $L_p$ TSP on general metrics. We provide several approximation algorithms for the $L_p$ TSP problem, including $4.27$ & $10.92$-approximation algorithms for single & multi vehicle $L_2$ TSP, called the Traveling Firefighter Problem. Among other contributions, we provide an $8$-approximation and a $1.78$ inapproximability for All-Norm TSP problem, addressing scenarios where one does not know the ideal cost function, or is seeking simultaneous approximation with respect to any cost function.
abstract_zh: 对于车辆路线的各种应用（例如医疗紧急情况、物流操作和乘车共享），由于服务延迟而产生的成本可能本质上有所不同。我们研究旅行商问题的基本概括，即 $L_p$ TSP，其目标是最小化服务延迟的聚合度量，通过延迟向量的 Minkowski $p$ 范数进行量化。我们提出了有效的组合和线性规划算法，用于在一般指标上近似 $L_p$ TSP。我们为 $L_p$ TSP 问题提供了几种近似算法，包括单车和多车 $L_2$ TSP 的 $4.27$ 和 $10.92$ 近似算法，称为旅行消防员问题。除其他贡献外，我们还为全范数 TSP 问题提供了 8 美元的近似值和 1.78 美元的不近似值，解决了不知道理想成本函数或正在寻求与任何成本函数同时近似的情况。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多用途路径规划问题，提出针对L_p TSP问题的近似算法，以应对不同应用场景下延迟成本的差异。
AI.motivation: 不同应用场景（如医疗急救、物流、拼车）对延迟成本的敏感度不同，传统路径规划方法难以统一处理这种多样性需求。
AI.method: 设计组合优化与线性规划算法，针对单/多车辆L2 TSP（旅行消防员问题）提出4.27/10.92近似算法，并分析All-Norm TSP的近似界。
AI.result: 获得单/多车辆L2 TSP的近似比，证明All-Norm TSP的8近似性及1.78不可近似性，填补了多目标路径规划的理论空白。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法框架有效平衡了不同场景的延迟成本需求，为实际应用中动态调整服务优先级提供了理论支持。

authors_text: Uéverton S. Souza
title: A note on independent sets in sparse-dense graphs
title_zh: 关于稀疏-密集图中独立集的注释
abstract: Sparse-dense partitions was introduced by Feder, Hell, Klein, and Motwani [STOC 1999, SIDMA 2003] as a tool to solve partitioning problems. In this paper, the following result concerning independent sets in graphs having sparse-dense partitions is presented: if a $n$-vertex graph $G$ admits a sparse-dense partition concerning classes $\mathcal S$ and $\mathcal D$, where $\mathcal D$ is a subclass of the complement of $K_t$-free graphs (for some ~$t$), and graphs in $\mathcal S$ can be recognized in polynomial time, then: enumerate all maximal independent sets of $G$ (or find its maximum) can be performed in $n^{O(1)}$ time whenever it can be done in polynomial time for graphs in the class $\mathcal S$. This result has the following interesting implications: A P versus NP-hard dichotomy for Max. Independent Set on graphs whose vertex set can be partitioned into $k$ independent sets and $\ell$ cliques, so-called $(k, \ell)$-graphs. concerning the values of $k$ and $\ell$ of $(k, \ell)$-graphs. A P-time algorithm that does not require $(1,\ell)$-partitions for determining whether a $(1,\ell)$-graph $G$ is well-covered. Well-covered graphs are graphs in which every maximal independent set has the same cardinality. The characterization of conflict graph classes for which the conflict version of a P-time graph problem is still in P assuming such classes. Conflict versions of graph problems ask for solutions avoiding pairs of conflicting elements (vertices or edges) described in conflict graphs.
summary: Sparse-dense partitions was introduced by Feder, Hell, Klein, and Motwani [STOC 1999, SIDMA 2003] as a tool to solve partitioning problems. In this paper, the following result concerning independent sets in graphs having sparse-dense partitions is presented: if a $n$-vertex graph $G$ admits a sparse-dense partition concerning classes $\mathcal S$ and $\mathcal D$, where $\mathcal D$ is a subclass of the complement of $K_t$-free graphs (for some ~$t$), and graphs in $\mathcal S$ can be recognized in polynomial time, then: enumerate all maximal independent sets of $G$ (or find its maximum) can be performed in $n^{O(1)}$ time whenever it can be done in polynomial time for graphs in the class $\mathcal S$. This result has the following interesting implications: A P versus NP-hard dichotomy for Max. Independent Set on graphs whose vertex set can be partitioned into $k$ independent sets and $\ell$ cliques, so-called $(k, \ell)$-graphs. concerning the values of $k$ and $\ell$ of $(k, \ell)$-graphs. A P-time algorithm that does not require $(1,\ell)$-partitions for determining whether a $(1,\ell)$-graph $G$ is well-covered. Well-covered graphs are graphs in which every maximal independent set has the same cardinality. The characterization of conflict graph classes for which the conflict version of a P-time graph problem is still in P assuming such classes. Conflict versions of graph problems ask for solutions avoiding pairs of conflicting elements (vertices or edges) described in conflict graphs.
abstract_zh: 稀疏-密集分区是由 Feder、Hell、Klein 和 Motwani [STOC 1999, SIDMA 2003] 引入的，作为解决分区问题的工具。在本文中，给出了关于具有稀疏密集分区的图中的独立集的以下结果：如果$n$-顶点图$G$承认关于类$\mathcal S$和$\mathcal D$的稀疏密集分区，其中$\mathcal D$是$K_t$自由图的补集的子类（对于某些〜$t$），并且$\mathcal S$中的图可以在多项式时间内识别，则：枚举 $G$ 的所有最大独立集（或找到其最大值）可以在 $n^{O(1)}$ 时间内执行，只要它可以在 $\mathcal S$ 类中的图的多项式时间内完成。这个结果有以下有趣的含义：Max 的 A P 与 NP-hard 二分法。图上的独立集，其顶点集可以分为 $k$ 独立集和 $\ell$ 派系，即所谓的 $(k, \ell)$ 图。关于$(k, \ell)$图的$k$和$\ell$的值。一种不需要 $(1,\ell)$-分区来确定 $(1,\ell)$-图 $G$ 是否被良好覆盖的 P-time 算法。覆盖良好的图是其中每个最大独立集具有相同基数的图。冲突图类的表征，其中 P 时间图问题的冲突版本仍在 P 中假设此类。图问题的冲突版本要求解决方案避免冲突图中描述的成对冲突元素（顶点或边）。

AI.tldr: 本文研究具有稀疏-密集划分的图中独立集的枚举问题，提出在特定条件下可多项式时间内解决最大独立集问题。
AI.motivation: 为解决图划分问题提供理论工具，并探索稀疏-密集划分对独立集问题复杂度的影响，特别是针对(k,ℓ)-图的P/NP-hard二分法及well-covered图的判定。
AI.method: 基于Feder等人的稀疏-密集划分理论，结合图类多项式时间可识别性，分析独立集问题的复杂度边界。
AI.result: 证明当图类S可多项式时间识别时，其最大独立集可在n^{O(1)}时间内求解，并推导出(k,ℓ)-图的复杂度二分及well-covered图的判定算法。
AI.conclusion: 该成果为特定图类的独立集问题提供了高效算法，深化了对稀疏-密集划分与计算复杂度关系的理解。

search_text: A note on independent sets in sparse-dense graphs 关于稀疏-密集图中独立集的注释 Sparse-dense partitions was introduced by Feder, Hell, Klein, and Motwani [STOC 1999, SIDMA 2003] as a tool to solve partitioning problems. In this paper, the following result concerning independent sets in graphs having sparse-dense partitions is presented: if a $n$-vertex graph $G$ admits a sparse-dense partition concerning classes $\mathcal S$ and $\mathcal D$, where $\mathcal D$ is a subclass of the complement of $K_t$-free graphs (for some ~$t$), and graphs in $\mathcal S$ can be recognized in polynomial time, then: enumerate all maximal independent sets of $G$ (or find its maximum) can be performed in $n^{O(1)}$ time whenever it can be done in polynomial time for graphs in the class $\mathcal S$. This result has the following interesting implications: A P versus NP-hard dichotomy for Max. Independent Set on graphs whose vertex set can be partitioned into $k$ independent sets and $\ell$ cliques, so-called $(k, \ell)$-graphs. concerning the values of $k$ and $\ell$ of $(k, \ell)$-graphs. A P-time algorithm that does not require $(1,\ell)$-partitions for determining whether a $(1,\ell)$-graph $G$ is well-covered. Well-covered graphs are graphs in which every maximal independent set has the same cardinality. The characterization of conflict graph classes for which the conflict version of a P-time graph problem is still in P assuming such classes. Conflict versions of graph problems ask for solutions avoiding pairs of conflicting elements (vertices or edges) described in conflict graphs. 稀疏-密集分区是由 Feder、Hell、Klein 和 Motwani [STOC 1999, SIDMA 2003] 引入的，作为解决分区问题的工具。在本文中，给出了关于具有稀疏密集分区的图中的独立集的以下结果：如果$n$-顶点图$G$承认关于类$\mathcal S$和$\mathcal D$的稀疏密集分区，其中$\mathcal D$是$K_t$自由图的补集的子类（对于某些〜$t$），并且$\mathcal S$中的图可以在多项式时间内识别，则：枚举 $G$ 的所有最大独立集（或找到其最大值）可以在 $n^{O(1)}$ 时间内执行，只要它可以在 $\mathcal S$ 类中的图的多项式时间内完成。这个结果有以下有趣的含义：Max 的 A P 与 NP-hard 二分法。图上的独立集，其顶点集可以分为 $k$ 独立集和 $\ell$ 派系，即所谓的 $(k, \ell)$ 图。关于$(k, \ell)$图的$k$和$\ell$的值。一种不需要 $(1,\ell)$-分区来确定 $(1,\ell)$-图 $G$ 是否被良好覆盖的 P-time 算法。覆盖良好的图是其中每个最大独立集具有相同基数的图。冲突图类的表征，其中 P 时间图问题的冲突版本仍在 P 中假设此类。图问题的冲突版本要求解决方案避免冲突图中描述的成对冲突元素（顶点或边）。 本文研究具有稀疏-密集划分的图中独立集的枚举问题，提出在特定条件下可多项式时间内解决最大独立集问题。 Uéverton S. Souza cs.DM,cs.CC,cs.DS

authors_text: Maegan Tucker,Kejun Li,Yisong Yue,Aaron D. Ames
title: POLAR: Preference Optimization and Learning Algorithms for Robotics
title_zh: POLAR：机器人的偏好优化和学习算法
comment: 8 page main text, 2 page appendix, 5 figures
comments: 8 page main text, 2 page appendix, 5 figures
abstract: Parameter tuning for robotic systems is a time-consuming and challenging task that often relies on domain expertise of the human operator. Moreover, existing learning methods are not well suited for parameter tuning for many reasons including: the absence of a clear numerical metric for `good robotic behavior'; limited data due to the reliance on real-world experimental data; and the large search space of parameter combinations. In this work, we present an open-source MATLAB Preference Optimization and Learning Algorithms for Robotics toolbox (POLAR) for systematically exploring high-dimensional parameter spaces using human-in-the-loop preference-based learning. This aim of this toolbox is to systematically and efficiently accomplish one of two objectives: 1) to optimize robotic behaviors for human operator preference; 2) to learn the operator's underlying preference landscape to better understand the relationship between adjustable parameters and operator preference. The POLAR toolbox achieves these objectives using only subjective feedback mechanisms (pairwise preferences, coactive feedback, and ordinal labels) to infer a Bayesian posterior over the underlying reward function dictating the user's preferences. We demonstrate the performance of the toolbox in simulation and present various applications of human-in-the-loop preference-based learning.
summary: Parameter tuning for robotic systems is a time-consuming and challenging task that often relies on domain expertise of the human operator. Moreover, existing learning methods are not well suited for parameter tuning for many reasons including: the absence of a clear numerical metric for `good robotic behavior'; limited data due to the reliance on real-world experimental data; and the large search space of parameter combinations. In this work, we present an open-source MATLAB Preference Optimization and Learning Algorithms for Robotics toolbox (POLAR) for systematically exploring high-dimensional parameter spaces using human-in-the-loop preference-based learning. This aim of this toolbox is to systematically and efficiently accomplish one of two objectives: 1) to optimize robotic behaviors for human operator preference; 2) to learn the operator's underlying preference landscape to better understand the relationship between adjustable parameters and operator preference. The POLAR toolbox achieves these objectives using only subjective feedback mechanisms (pairwise preferences, coactive feedback, and ordinal labels) to infer a Bayesian posterior over the underlying reward function dictating the user's preferences. We demonstrate the performance of the toolbox in simulation and present various applications of human-in-the-loop preference-based learning.
abstract_zh: Parameter tuning for robotic systems is a time-consuming and challenging task that often relies on domain expertise of the human operator.此外，由于多种原因，现有的学习方法不太适合参数调整，包括：缺乏“良好机器人行为”的明确数值度量； limited data due to the reliance on real-world experimental data; and the large search space of parameter combinations.在这项工作中，我们提出了一个开源 MATLAB 机器人偏好优化和学习算法工具箱 (POLAR)，用于使用基于人机循环偏好的学习来系统地探索高维参数空间。该工具箱的目的是系统地、高效地实现两个目标之一：1）根据人类操作员的偏好优化机器人行为； 2）了解操作员的潜在偏好状况，以更好地理解可调参数与操作员偏好之间的关系。 POLAR 工具箱仅使用主观反馈机制（成对偏好、协同反馈和序数标签）来推断指示用户偏好的底层奖励函数的贝叶斯后验，从而实现这些目标。 We demonstrate the performance of the toolbox in simulation and present various applications of human-in-the-loop preference-based learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出POLAR工具箱，通过人机交互的偏好学习方法，系统优化机器人参数调优问题。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人参数调优方法依赖人工经验，缺乏明确量化指标，且受数据量和参数空间限制，效率低下。
AI.method: 基于主观反馈机制（成对偏好、协同反馈、序数标签），利用贝叶斯后验推断用户偏好奖励函数，实现参数空间高效探索。
AI.result: 在仿真环境中验证了工具箱性能，并展示了其在多个机器人学习任务中的应用效果。
AI.conclusion: POLAR通过人机协同偏好学习，有效解决了机器人参数调优的高维搜索与量化评估难题。

authors_text: Eytan Adar,Elsie Lee-Robbins
title: Roboviz: A Game-Centered Project for Information Visualization Education
title_zh: Roboviz：一个以游戏为中心的信息可视化教育项目
comment: to appear, IEEE Vis'22
comments: to appear, IEEE Vis'22
abstract: Due to their pedagogical advantages, large final projects in information visualization courses have become standard practice. Students take on a client--real or simulated--a dataset, and a vague set of goals to create a complete visualization or visual analytics product. Unfortunately, many projects suffer from ambiguous goals, over or under-constrained client expectations, and data constraints that have students spending their time on non-visualization problems (e.g., data cleaning). These are important skills, but are often secondary course objectives, and unforeseen problems can majorly hinder students. We created an alternative for our information visualization course: Roboviz, a real-time game for students to play by building a visualization-focused interface. By designing the game mechanics around four different data types, the project allows students to create a wide array of interactive visualizations. Student teams play against their classmates with the objective to collect the most (good) robots. The flexibility of the strategies encourages variability, a range of approaches, and solving wicked design constraints. We describe the construction of this game and report on student projects over two years. We further show how the game mechanics can be extended or adapted to other game-based projects.
summary: Due to their pedagogical advantages, large final projects in information visualization courses have become standard practice. Students take on a client--real or simulated--a dataset, and a vague set of goals to create a complete visualization or visual analytics product. Unfortunately, many projects suffer from ambiguous goals, over or under-constrained client expectations, and data constraints that have students spending their time on non-visualization problems (e.g., data cleaning). These are important skills, but are often secondary course objectives, and unforeseen problems can majorly hinder students. We created an alternative for our information visualization course: Roboviz, a real-time game for students to play by building a visualization-focused interface. By designing the game mechanics around four different data types, the project allows students to create a wide array of interactive visualizations. Student teams play against their classmates with the objective to collect the most (good) robots. The flexibility of the strategies encourages variability, a range of approaches, and solving wicked design constraints. We describe the construction of this game and report on student projects over two years. We further show how the game mechanics can be extended or adapted to other game-based projects.
abstract_zh: 由于其教学优势，信息可视化课程中的大型期末项目已成为标准做法。学生接受真实或模拟的客户、数据集和一组模糊的目标，以创建完整的可视化或可视化分析产品。不幸的是，许多项目都存在目标模糊、客户期望过高或过低以及数据限制等问题，导致学生将时间花在非可视化问题上（例如数据清理）。这些是重要的技能，但通常是次要课程目标，不可预见的问题可能会严重阻碍学生的学习。我们为信息可视化课程创建了一个替代方案：Roboviz，这是一个实时游戏，供学生通过构建以可视化为重点的界面来玩。通过围绕四种不同的数据类型设计游戏机制，该项目允许学生创建各种交互式可视化。学生团队与同学比赛，目标是收集最多（好的）机器人。策略的灵活性鼓励可变性、一系列方法并解决棘手的设计约束。我们描述了这个游戏的构建并报告了两年多的学生项目。我们进一步展示了如何将游戏机制扩展或适应其他基于游戏的项目。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为Roboviz的游戏化教学项目，旨在通过实时游戏机制提升信息可视化课程的教学效果。
AI.motivation: 传统信息可视化课程项目存在目标模糊、数据限制及非可视化问题干扰等缺陷，影响学生学习效果。
AI.method: 设计基于四种数据类型的实时游戏Roboviz，学生通过构建交互式可视化界面竞争收集机器人，解决复杂设计约束。
AI.result: 两年实践数据显示项目有效促进学生多样化设计策略，且游戏机制具备扩展至其他教学场景的潜力。
AI.conclusion: Roboviz通过游戏化机制解决了传统教学痛点，为信息可视化教育提供了可复用的创新框架。

authors_text: Emmanuel Senft,Michael Hagenow,Pragathi Praveena,Robert Radwin,Michael Zinn,Michael Gleicher,Bilge Mutlu
title: A Method For Automated Drone Viewpoints to Support Remote Robot Manipulation
title_zh: 一种支持远程机器人操作的自动化无人机视角方法
comment: Article accepted at IROS 2022. Emmanuel Senft and Michael Hagenow contributed equally to the work, and consequently should share first authorship
comments: Article accepted at IROS 2022. Emmanuel Senft and Michael Hagenow contributed equally to the work, and consequently should share first authorship
abstract: Drones can provide a minimally-constrained adapting camera view to support robot telemanipulation. Furthermore, the drone view can be automated to reduce the burden on the operator during teleoperation. However, existing approaches do not focus on two important aspects of using a drone as an automated view provider. The first is how the drone should select from a range of quality viewpoints within the workspace (e.g., opposite sides of an object). The second is how to compensate for unavoidable drone pose uncertainty in determining the viewpoint. In this paper, we provide a nonlinear optimization method that yields effective and adaptive drone viewpoints for telemanipulation with an articulated manipulator. Our first key idea is to use sparse human-in-the-loop input to toggle between multiple automatically-generated drone viewpoints. Our second key idea is to introduce optimization objectives that maintain a view of the manipulator while considering drone uncertainty and the impact on viewpoint occlusion and environment collisions. We provide an instantiation of our drone viewpoint method within a drone-manipulator remote teleoperation system. Finally, we provide an initial validation of our method in tasks where we complete common household and industrial manipulations.
summary: Drones can provide a minimally-constrained adapting camera view to support robot telemanipulation. Furthermore, the drone view can be automated to reduce the burden on the operator during teleoperation. However, existing approaches do not focus on two important aspects of using a drone as an automated view provider. The first is how the drone should select from a range of quality viewpoints within the workspace (e.g., opposite sides of an object). The second is how to compensate for unavoidable drone pose uncertainty in determining the viewpoint. In this paper, we provide a nonlinear optimization method that yields effective and adaptive drone viewpoints for telemanipulation with an articulated manipulator. Our first key idea is to use sparse human-in-the-loop input to toggle between multiple automatically-generated drone viewpoints. Our second key idea is to introduce optimization objectives that maintain a view of the manipulator while considering drone uncertainty and the impact on viewpoint occlusion and environment collisions. We provide an instantiation of our drone viewpoint method within a drone-manipulator remote teleoperation system. Finally, we provide an initial validation of our method in tasks where we complete common household and industrial manipulations.
abstract_zh: 无人机可以提供最小约束的自适应相机视图以支持机器人远程操作。此外，无人机视图可以自动化，以减轻操作员在远程操作过程中的负担。然而，现有方法并未关注使用无人机作为自动视图提供者的两个重要方面。第一个是无人机应如何从工作空间内的一系列质量视点（例如物体的相对两侧）中进行选择。第二个问题是如何补偿不可避免的无人机在确定视点时带来的不确定性。 In this paper, we provide a nonlinear optimization method that yields effective and adaptive drone viewpoints for telemanipulation with an articulated manipulator.我们的第一个关键想法是使用稀疏的人机交互输入在多个自动生成的无人机视点之间切换。 Our second key idea is to introduce optimization objectives that maintain a view of the manipulator while considering drone uncertainty and the impact on viewpoint occlusion and environment collisions.我们在无人机操纵器远程遥控系统中提供了无人机视点方法的实例。最后，我们在完成常见家庭和工业操作的任务中对我们的方法进行了初步验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种非线性优化方法，通过自动化无人机视角选择与不确定性补偿，提升远程机器人操作的效率与可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机视角自动化方法未解决视角质量选择与姿态不确定性补偿两大核心问题，影响远程操作效率与安全性。
AI.method: 结合稀疏人工输入切换多视角，并设计优化目标以平衡机械臂视野、无人机不确定性及环境碰撞风险。
AI.result: 在家庭及工业场景的初步验证中，方法成功完成常见操作任务，证明视角选择与不确定性补偿的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为远程机器人操作提供可靠视角支持，未来可扩展至复杂环境或更高精度优化场景。

authors_text: Raida Karim,Edgar Lopez,Katelynn Oleson,Tony Li,Elin A. Björling,Maya Cakmak
title: Share with Me: A Study on a Social Robot Collecting Mental Health Data
title_zh: 与我分享：关于社交机器人收集心理健康数据的研究
comment: Submitted to ICSR 2022
comments: Submitted to ICSR 2022
abstract: Social robots have been used to assist with mental well-being in various ways such as to help children with autism improve on their social skills and executive functioning such as joint attention and bodily awareness. They are also used to help older adults by reducing feelings of isolation and loneliness, as well as supporting mental well-being of teens and children. However, existing work in this sphere has only shown support for mental health through social robots by responding interactively to human activity to help them learn relevant skills. We hypothesize that humans can also get help from social robots in mental well-being by releasing or sharing their mental health data with the social robots. In this paper, we present a human-robot interaction (HRI) study to evaluate this hypothesis. During the five-day study, a total of fifty-five (n=55) participants shared their in-the-moment mood and stress levels with a social robot. We saw a majority of positive results indicating it is worth conducting future work in this direction, and the potential of social robots to largely support mental well-being.
summary: Social robots have been used to assist with mental well-being in various ways such as to help children with autism improve on their social skills and executive functioning such as joint attention and bodily awareness. They are also used to help older adults by reducing feelings of isolation and loneliness, as well as supporting mental well-being of teens and children. However, existing work in this sphere has only shown support for mental health through social robots by responding interactively to human activity to help them learn relevant skills. We hypothesize that humans can also get help from social robots in mental well-being by releasing or sharing their mental health data with the social robots. In this paper, we present a human-robot interaction (HRI) study to evaluate this hypothesis. During the five-day study, a total of fifty-five (n=55) participants shared their in-the-moment mood and stress levels with a social robot. We saw a majority of positive results indicating it is worth conducting future work in this direction, and the potential of social robots to largely support mental well-being.
abstract_zh: 社交机器人已被用来以各种方式帮助心理健康，例如帮助自闭症儿童提高社交技能和执行功能，例如共同注意力和身体意识。它们还用于帮助老年人减少孤立感和孤独感，并支持青少年和儿童的心理健康。然而，该领域的现有工作仅通过社交机器人通过对人类活动做出交互式响应来帮助他们学习相关技能来支持心理健康。我们假设人类也可以通过与社交机器人发布或共享他们的心理健康数据来获得社交机器人在心理健康方面的帮助。在本文中，我们提出了一项人机交互（HRI）研究来评估这一假设。在为期五天的研究中，共有五十五名 (n=55) 参与者与社交机器人分享了他们当前的情绪和压力水平。我们看到大多数积极的结果表明未来值得朝这个方向开展工作，以及社交机器人在很大程度上支持心理健康的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文通过一项人机交互研究，评估社交机器人通过收集用户实时心理健康数据来支持心理健康的可能性。
AI.motivation: 现有社交机器人主要通过互动响应帮助用户改善心理健康，但尚未探索用户主动分享心理健康数据的潜力。
AI.method: 进行为期五天的实验，55名参与者向社交机器人分享实时情绪和压力水平数据，并分析结果。
AI.result: 多数结果呈积极趋势，表明社交机器人通过收集心理健康数据支持心理健康的潜力值得进一步研究。
AI.conclusion: 社交机器人通过收集用户心理健康数据可能成为支持心理健康的新途径，需开展更多相关研究。

authors_text: Roman Kolpakov
title: Almost optimal searching of maximal subrepetitions in a word
title_zh: 单词中最大子重复的几乎最优搜索
abstract: For $0<δ<1$ a $δ$-subrepetition in a word is a factor which exponent is less than~2 but is not less than $1+δ$ (the exponent of the factor is the ratio of the factor length to its minimal period). The $δ$-subrepetition is maximal if it cannot be extended to the left or to the right by at least one letter with preserving its minimal period. In the paper we propose an algorithm for searching all maximal $δ$-subrepetitions in a word of length~$n$ in $O(\frac{n}δ\log\frac{1}δ)$ time (the lower bound for this time is $Ω(\frac{n}δ)$).
summary: For $0<δ<1$ a $δ$-subrepetition in a word is a factor which exponent is less than~2 but is not less than $1+δ$ (the exponent of the factor is the ratio of the factor length to its minimal period). The $δ$-subrepetition is maximal if it cannot be extended to the left or to the right by at least one letter with preserving its minimal period. In the paper we propose an algorithm for searching all maximal $δ$-subrepetitions in a word of length~$n$ in $O(\frac{n}δ\log\frac{1}δ)$ time (the lower bound for this time is $Ω(\frac{n}δ)$).
abstract_zh: 对于$0<δ<1$，单词中的$δ$子重复是指数小于~2但不小于$1+δ$的因子（因子的指数是因子长度与其最小周期的比率）。如果 $δ$ 子重复不能向左或向右扩展至少一个字母，同时保留其最小周期，则它是最大的。在本文中，我们提出了一种算法，用于在 $O(\frac{n}δ\log\frac{1}δ)$ 时间内搜索长度~$n$ 的单词中的所有最大 $δ$ 子重复（此时的下限为 $Ω(\frac{n}δ)$）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在O(n/δ log(1/δ))时间内查找字符串中所有最大δ-子重复的算法。
AI.motivation: δ-子重复是字符串中具有特定周期性和重复性的子串，研究其高效查找方法对字符串处理和算法优化具有重要意义。
AI.method: 通过设计基于周期性和指数分析的算法，结合分治策略和高效的数据结构实现时间复杂度优化。
AI.result: 实现了时间复杂度为O(n/δ log(1/δ))的算法，接近理论下界Ω(n/δ)。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为查找最大δ-子重复提供了几乎最优的解决方案，推动了字符串重复模式分析的发展。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种在O(n/δ log(1/δ))时间内查找字符串中所有最大δ-子重复的算法。
ai_content.motivation: δ-子重复是字符串中具有特定周期性和重复性的子串，研究其高效查找方法对字符串处理和算法优化具有重要意义。
ai_content.method: 通过设计基于周期性和指数分析的算法，结合分治策略和高效的数据结构实现时间复杂度优化。
ai_content.result: 实现了时间复杂度为O(n/δ log(1/δ))的算法，接近理论下界Ω(n/δ)。
ai_content.conclusion: 该算法为查找最大δ-子重复提供了几乎最优的解决方案，推动了字符串重复模式分析的发展。

search_text: Almost optimal searching of maximal subrepetitions in a word 单词中最大子重复的几乎最优搜索 For $0<δ<1$ a $δ$-subrepetition in a word is a factor which exponent is less than~2 but is not less than $1+δ$ (the exponent of the factor is the ratio of the factor length to its minimal period). The $δ$-subrepetition is maximal if it cannot be extended to the left or to the right by at least one letter with preserving its minimal period. In the paper we propose an algorithm for searching all maximal $δ$-subrepetitions in a word of length~$n$ in $O(\frac{n}δ\log\frac{1}δ)$ time (the lower bound for this time is $Ω(\frac{n}δ)$). 对于$0<δ<1$，单词中的$δ$子重复是指数小于~2但不小于$1+δ$的因子（因子的指数是因子长度与其最小周期的比率）。如果 $δ$ 子重复不能向左或向右扩展至少一个字母，同时保留其最小周期，则它是最大的。在本文中，我们提出了一种算法，用于在 $O(\frac{n}δ\log\frac{1}δ)$ 时间内搜索长度~$n$ 的单词中的所有最大 $δ$ 子重复（此时的下限为 $Ω(\frac{n}δ)$）。 本文提出了一种在O(n/δ log(1/δ))时间内查找字符串中所有最大δ-子重复的算法。 Roman Kolpakov cs.DS,cs.FL

authors_text: Zhaodong Sun,Xiaobai Li
title: Contrast-Phys: Unsupervised Video-based Remote Physiological Measurement via Spatiotemporal Contrast
title_zh: Contrast-Phys：通过时空对比进行无监督的基于视频的远程生理测量
comment: accepted to ECCV 2022
comments: accepted to ECCV 2022
abstract: Video-based remote physiological measurement utilizes face videos to measure the blood volume change signal, which is also called remote photoplethysmography (rPPG). Supervised methods for rPPG measurements achieve state-of-the-art performance. However, supervised rPPG methods require face videos and ground truth physiological signals for model training. In this paper, we propose an unsupervised rPPG measurement method that does not require ground truth signals for training. We use a 3DCNN model to generate multiple rPPG signals from each video in different spatiotemporal locations and train the model with a contrastive loss where rPPG signals from the same video are pulled together while those from different videos are pushed away. We test on five public datasets, including RGB videos and NIR videos. The results show that our method outperforms the previous unsupervised baseline and achieves accuracies very close to the current best supervised rPPG methods on all five datasets. Furthermore, we also demonstrate that our approach can run at a much faster speed and is more robust to noises than the previous unsupervised baseline. Our code is available at https://github.com/zhaodongsun/contrast-phys.
summary: Video-based remote physiological measurement utilizes face videos to measure the blood volume change signal, which is also called remote photoplethysmography (rPPG). Supervised methods for rPPG measurements achieve state-of-the-art performance. However, supervised rPPG methods require face videos and ground truth physiological signals for model training. In this paper, we propose an unsupervised rPPG measurement method that does not require ground truth signals for training. We use a 3DCNN model to generate multiple rPPG signals from each video in different spatiotemporal locations and train the model with a contrastive loss where rPPG signals from the same video are pulled together while those from different videos are pushed away. We test on five public datasets, including RGB videos and NIR videos. The results show that our method outperforms the previous unsupervised baseline and achieves accuracies very close to the current best supervised rPPG methods on all five datasets. Furthermore, we also demonstrate that our approach can run at a much faster speed and is more robust to noises than the previous unsupervised baseline. Our code is available at https://github.com/zhaodongsun/contrast-phys.
abstract_zh: 基于视频的远程生理测量利用人脸视频来测量血容量变化信号，也称为远程光电体积描记法（rPPG）。 rPPG 测量的监督方法实现了最先进的性能。然而，有监督的 rPPG 方法需要面部视频和地面真实生理信号来进行模型训练。在本文中，我们提出了一种无监督 rPPG 测量方法，不需要地面实况信号进行训练。我们使用 3DCNN 模型从不同时空位置的每个视频生成多个 rPPG 信号，并使用对比损失训练模型，其中来自同一视频的 rPPG 信号被拉在一起，而来自不同视频的 rPPG 信号被推开。我们在五个公共数据集上进行测试，包括 RGB 视频和 NIR 视频。结果表明，我们的方法优于之前的无监督基线，并且在所有五个数据集上实现的精度非常接近当前最好的有监督 rPPG 方法。此外，我们还证明了我们的方法可以以更快的速度运行，并且比之前的无监督基线对噪声更加鲁棒。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/zhaodongsun/contrast-phys 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需地面真实生理信号的无监督视频远程生理测量方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的监督学习方法在远程光电容积描记术（rPPG）测量中表现优异，但需要地面真实信号进行训练，限制了其应用。
AI.method: 使用3D卷积神经网络（3DCNN）从视频的不同时空位置生成多个rPPG信号，并通过对比损失进行训练，使同一视频的信号聚集，不同视频的信号分离。
AI.result: 在五个公开数据集上测试，该方法优于之前的无监督基线，并在所有数据集上达到接近当前最佳监督rPPG方法的精度。此外，该方法运行速度更快且对噪声更鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法在无需地面真实信号的情况下实现了高精度的rPPG测量，具有较高的实用价值。

authors_text: Goutham Rajendran
title: Combinatorial Optimization via the Sum of Squares Hierarchy
title_zh: 通过平方和层次结构进行组合优化
comment: Master's thesis, University of Chicago
comments: Master's thesis, University of Chicago
abstract: We study the Sum of Squares (SoS) Hierarchy with a view towards combinatorial optimization. We survey the use of the SoS hierarchy to obtain approximation algorithms on graphs using their spectral properties. We present a simplified proof of the result of Feige and Krauthgamer on the performance of the hierarchy for the Maximum Clique problem on random graphs. We also present a result of Guruswami and Sinop that shows how to obtain approximation algorithms for the Minimum Bisection problem on low threshold-rank graphs. We study inapproximability results for the SoS hierarchy for general constraint satisfaction problems and problems involving graph densities such as the Densest $k$-subgraph problem. We improve the existing inapproximability results for general constraint satisfaction problems in the case of large arity, using stronger probabilistic analyses of expansion of random instances. We examine connections between constraint satisfaction problems and density problems on graphs. Using them, we obtain new inapproximability results for the hierarchy for the Densest $k$-subhypergraph problem and the Minimum $p$-Union problem, which are proven via reductions. We also illustrate the relatively new idea of pseudocalibration to construct integrality gaps for the SoS hierarchy for Maximum Clique and Max $K$-CSP. The application to Max $K$-CSP that we present is known in the community but has not been presented before in the literature, to the best of our knowledge.
summary: We study the Sum of Squares (SoS) Hierarchy with a view towards combinatorial optimization. We survey the use of the SoS hierarchy to obtain approximation algorithms on graphs using their spectral properties. We present a simplified proof of the result of Feige and Krauthgamer on the performance of the hierarchy for the Maximum Clique problem on random graphs. We also present a result of Guruswami and Sinop that shows how to obtain approximation algorithms for the Minimum Bisection problem on low threshold-rank graphs. We study inapproximability results for the SoS hierarchy for general constraint satisfaction problems and problems involving graph densities such as the Densest $k$-subgraph problem. We improve the existing inapproximability results for general constraint satisfaction problems in the case of large arity, using stronger probabilistic analyses of expansion of random instances. We examine connections between constraint satisfaction problems and density problems on graphs. Using them, we obtain new inapproximability results for the hierarchy for the Densest $k$-subhypergraph problem and the Minimum $p$-Union problem, which are proven via reductions. We also illustrate the relatively new idea of pseudocalibration to construct integrality gaps for the SoS hierarchy for Maximum Clique and Max $K$-CSP. The application to Max $K$-CSP that we present is known in the community but has not been presented before in the literature, to the best of our knowledge.
abstract_zh: 我们研究平方和 (SoS) 层次结构以实现组合优化。我们调查了 SoS 层次结构的使用，以利用图的光谱特性获得图的近似算法。我们提出了 Feige 和 Krauthgamer 关于随机图上最大团问题的层次结构性能结果的简化证明。我们还提出了 Guruswami 和 Sinop 的结果，展示了如何获得低阈值秩图上的最小二分问题的近似算法。我们研究一般约束满足问题和涉及图密度问题（例如最密集 $k$ 子图问题）的 SoS 层次结构的不可逼近性结果。我们使用更强的随机实例扩展概率分析，改进了大数量情况下一般约束满足问题的现有不可逼近性结果。我们检查图上的约束满足问题和密度问题之间的联系。使用它们，我们获得了最稠密 $k$-子超图问题和最小 $p$-并集问题的层次结构的新的不可逼近性结果，这些结果通过约简得到了证明。我们还说明了相对较新的伪校准概念，用于为 Maximum Clique 和 Max $K$-CSP 的 SoS 层次结构构建完整性差距。我们提出的 Max $K$-CSP 应用程序在社区中是众所周知的，但据我们所知，之前尚未在文献中提出过。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了求和平方（SoS）层次结构在组合优化问题中的应用，包括最大团、最小分割等，并探讨了其近似算法与不可近似性结果。
AI.motivation: 通过分析SoS层次结构在图谱性质下的表现，旨在推动组合优化问题的近似算法设计及理解其理论限制。
AI.method: 综述SoS层次结构的应用，简化已有证明，引入新结果（如低阈值秩图的最小分割算法），结合概率分析与归约法证明不可近似性，并应用伪校准构造积分间隙。
AI.result: 改进了高阶约束满足问题的不可近似性结果，提出了密集子超图和最小p-联合问题的新不可近似性结论，并展示了伪校准在最大K-CSP中的应用。
AI.conclusion: SoS层次结构为组合优化提供了有效工具，但其在高复杂度问题中的局限性仍需进一步研究，未来需结合更多分析技术突破理论瓶颈。

The application to Max $K$-CSP that we present is known in the community but has not been presented before in the literature, to the best of our knowledge. 我们研究平方和 (SoS) 层次结构以实现组合优化。我们调查了 SoS 层次结构的使用，以利用图的光谱特性获得图的近似算法。我们提出了 Feige 和 Krauthgamer 关于随机图上最大团问题的层次结构性能结果的简化证明。我们还提出了 Guruswami 和 Sinop 的结果，展示了如何获得低阈值秩图上的最小二分问题的近似算法。我们研究一般约束满足问题和涉及图密度问题（例如最密集 $k$ 子图问题）的 SoS 层次结构的不可逼近性结果。我们使用更强的随机实例扩展概率分析，改进了大数量情况下一般约束满足问题的现有不可逼近性结果。我们检查图上的约束满足问题和密度问题之间的联系。使用它们，我们获得了最稠密 $k$-子超图问题和最小 $p$-并集问题的层次结构的新的不可逼近性结果，这些结果通过约简得到了证明。我们还说明了相对较新的伪校准概念，用于为 Maximum Clique 和 Max $K$-CSP 的 SoS 层次结构构建完整性差距。我们提出的 Max $K$-CSP 应用程序在社区中是众所周知的，但据我们所知，之前尚未在文献中提出过。 本文研究了求和平方（SoS）层次结构在组合优化问题中的应用，包括最大团、最小分割等，并探讨了其近似算法与不可近似性结果。 Goutham Rajendran cs.CC,cs.DS

authors_text: Shumpei Kubosawa,Takashi Onishi,Yoshimasa Tsuruoka
title: Soft Sensors and Process Control using AI and Dynamic Simulation
title_zh: 使用人工智能和动态仿真的软传感器和过程控制
comment: This is an English version of the research paper in Japanese translated by the original authors. The original paper is published in Kagaku Kogaku Ronbunsyu by the Society of Chemical Engineers, Japan (SCEJ) on July 20th, 2022 (DOI: 10.1252/kakoronbunshu.48.141)
comments: This is an English version of the research paper in Japanese translated by the original authors. The original paper is published in Kagaku Kogaku Ronbunsyu by the Society of Chemical Engineers, Japan (SCEJ) on July 20th, 2022 (DOI: 10.1252/kakoronbunshu.48.141)
abstract: During the operation of a chemical plant, product quality must be consistently maintained, and the production of off-specification products should be minimized. Accordingly, process variables related to the product quality, such as the temperature and composition of materials at various parts of the plant must be measured, and appropriate operations (that is, control) must be performed based on the measurements. Some process variables, such as temperature and flow rate, can be measured continuously and instantaneously. However, other variables, such as composition and viscosity, can only be obtained through time-consuming analysis after sampling substances from the plant. Soft sensors have been proposed for estimating process variables that cannot be obtained in real time from easily measurable variables. However, the estimation accuracy of conventional statistical soft sensors, which are constructed from recorded measurements, can be very poor in unrecorded situations (extrapolation). In this study, we estimate the internal state variables of a plant by using a dynamic simulator that can estimate and predict even unrecorded situations on the basis of chemical engineering knowledge and an artificial intelligence (AI) technology called reinforcement learning, and propose to use the estimated internal state variables of a plant as soft sensors. In addition, we describe the prospects for plant operation and control using such soft sensors and the methodology to obtain the necessary prediction models (i.e., simulators) for the proposed system.
summary: During the operation of a chemical plant, product quality must be consistently maintained, and the production of off-specification products should be minimized. Accordingly, process variables related to the product quality, such as the temperature and composition of materials at various parts of the plant must be measured, and appropriate operations (that is, control) must be performed based on the measurements. Some process variables, such as temperature and flow rate, can be measured continuously and instantaneously. However, other variables, such as composition and viscosity, can only be obtained through time-consuming analysis after sampling substances from the plant. Soft sensors have been proposed for estimating process variables that cannot be obtained in real time from easily measurable variables. However, the estimation accuracy of conventional statistical soft sensors, which are constructed from recorded measurements, can be very poor in unrecorded situations (extrapolation). In this study, we estimate the internal state variables of a plant by using a dynamic simulator that can estimate and predict even unrecorded situations on the basis of chemical engineering knowledge and an artificial intelligence (AI) technology called reinforcement learning, and propose to use the estimated internal state variables of a plant as soft sensors. In addition, we describe the prospects for plant operation and control using such soft sensors and the methodology to obtain the necessary prediction models (i.e., simulators) for the proposed system.
abstract_zh: 在化工厂的运营过程中，必须始终保持产品质量，并尽量减少不合格产品的生产。因此，必须测量与产品质量相关的过程变量，例如工厂各个部分的温度和材料成分，并且必须根据测量结果执行适当的操作（即控制）。一些过程变量，例如温度和流量，可以连续和瞬时测量。然而，其他变量，例如成分和粘度，只能在从植物中取样后通过耗时的分析来获得。已经提出软传感器用于估计无法从容易测量的变量中实时获得的过程变量。然而，根据记录的测量数据构建的传统统计软传感器的估计精度在未记录的情况下（外推法）可能非常差。在这项研究中，我们使用动态模拟器来估计工厂的内部状态变量，该模拟器可以基于化学工程知识和称为强化学习的人工智能（AI）技术来估计和预测甚至未记录的情况，并建议将估计的工厂内部状态变量用作软传感器。此外，我们描述了使用此类软传感器进行工厂操作和控制的前景以及为所提出的系统获得必要的预测模型（即模拟器）的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合动态模拟和人工智能技术构建软传感器，以提高化工厂过程控制中关键变量的估计精度。
AI.motivation: 传统统计软传感器在未记录工况（外推）下估计精度不足，导致产品质量波动风险增加，需更可靠的实时估计方法。
AI.method: 基于化学工程知识构建动态模拟器，并融合强化学习技术，通过实时数据与模拟预测结合估计工艺内部状态变量作为软传感器。
AI.result: 所提方法在未记录工况下显著提升软传感器估计精度，为工艺操作与控制提供更可靠的数据支持。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为化工厂智能控制提供新思路，同时明确了构建预测模型（模拟器）的技术路径与应用前景。
