authors_text: Guangcong Wang,Guangrun Wang,Wenqi Liang,Jianhuang Lai
title: Understanding Weight Similarity of Neural Networks via Chain Normalization Rule and Hypothesis-Training-Testing
title_zh: 通过链归一化规则和假设-训练-测试了解神经网络的权重相似性
comment: Weight Similarity of Neural Networks
comments: Weight Similarity of Neural Networks
abstract: We present a weight similarity measure method that can quantify the weight similarity of non-convex neural networks. To understand the weight similarity of different trained models, we propose to extract the feature representation from the weights of neural networks. We first normalize the weights of neural networks by introducing a chain normalization rule, which is used for weight representation learning and weight similarity measure. We extend the traditional hypothesis-testing method to a hypothesis-training-testing statistical inference method to validate the hypothesis on the weight similarity of neural networks. With the chain normalization rule and the new statistical inference, we study the weight similarity measure on Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP), Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), and Recurrent Neural Network (RNN), and find that the weights of an identical neural network optimized with the Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) algorithm converge to a similar local solution in a metric space. The weight similarity measure provides more insight into the local solutions of neural networks. Experiments on several datasets consistently validate the hypothesis of weight similarity measure.
summary: We present a weight similarity measure method that can quantify the weight similarity of non-convex neural networks. To understand the weight similarity of different trained models, we propose to extract the feature representation from the weights of neural networks. We first normalize the weights of neural networks by introducing a chain normalization rule, which is used for weight representation learning and weight similarity measure. We extend the traditional hypothesis-testing method to a hypothesis-training-testing statistical inference method to validate the hypothesis on the weight similarity of neural networks. With the chain normalization rule and the new statistical inference, we study the weight similarity measure on Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP), Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), and Recurrent Neural Network (RNN), and find that the weights of an identical neural network optimized with the Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) algorithm converge to a similar local solution in a metric space. The weight similarity measure provides more insight into the local solutions of neural networks. Experiments on several datasets consistently validate the hypothesis of weight similarity measure.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种权重相似度度量方法，可以量化非凸神经网络的权重相似度。为了了解不同训练模型的权重相似性，我们建议从神经网络的权重中提取特征表示。我们首先通过引入链归一化规则来归一化神经网络的权重，该规则用于权重表示学习和权重相似性度量。我们将传统的假设检验方法扩展到假设训练检验统计推断方法，以验证神经网络权重相似性的假设。利用链归一化规则和新的统计推断，我们研究了多层感知器（MLP）、卷积神经网络（CNN）和循环神经网络（RNN）上的权重相似性度量，发现使用随机梯度下降（SGD）算法优化的相同神经网络的权重收敛于度量空间中的相似局部解。权重相似性度量可以更深入地了解神经网络的局部解决方案。对多个数据集的实验一致验证了权重相似性度量的假设。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过链式归一化规则和假设-训练-测试方法量化神经网络权重相似性的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以有效衡量非凸神经网络的权重相似性，而理解权重相似性对模型泛化和优化过程至关重要。
AI.method: 引入链式归一化规则对权重进行归一化表示，并扩展传统假设检验为假设-训练-测试统计推断方法，验证权重相似性假设。
AI.result: 实验表明，相同神经网络经SGD优化后在度量空间中收敛到相似局部解，且该度量方法在多个数据集上有效验证了假设。
AI.conclusion: 权重相似性度量方法揭示了神经网络局部解的特性，为理解模型训练动态提供了新视角。

authors_text: Andrea Panizza,Szymon Tomasz Stefanek,Stefano Melacci,Giacomo Veneri,Marco Gori
title: Learning to Identify Drilling Defects in Turbine Blades with Single Stage Detectors
title_zh: 学习使用单级探测器识别涡轮叶片中的钻孔缺陷
comment: Workshop on machine learning for engineering modeling, simulation and design @ NeurIPS 2020
comments: Workshop on machine learning for engineering modeling, simulation and design @ NeurIPS 2020
abstract: Nondestructive testing (NDT) is widely applied to defect identification of turbine components during manufacturing and operation. Operational efficiency is key for gas turbine OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturers). Automating the inspection process as much as possible, while minimizing the uncertainties involved, is thus crucial. We propose a model based on RetinaNet to identify drilling defects in X-ray images of turbine blades. The application is challenging due to the large image resolutions in which defects are very small and hardly captured by the commonly used anchor sizes, and also due to the small size of the available dataset. As a matter of fact, all these issues are pretty common in the application of Deep Learning-based object detection models to industrial defect data. We overcome such issues using open source models, splitting the input images into tiles and scaling them up, applying heavy data augmentation, and optimizing the anchor size and aspect ratios with a differential evolution solver. We validate the model with $3$-fold cross-validation, showing a very high accuracy in identifying images with defects. We also define a set of best practices which can help other practitioners overcome similar challenges.
summary: Nondestructive testing (NDT) is widely applied to defect identification of turbine components during manufacturing and operation. Operational efficiency is key for gas turbine OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturers). Automating the inspection process as much as possible, while minimizing the uncertainties involved, is thus crucial. We propose a model based on RetinaNet to identify drilling defects in X-ray images of turbine blades. The application is challenging due to the large image resolutions in which defects are very small and hardly captured by the commonly used anchor sizes, and also due to the small size of the available dataset. As a matter of fact, all these issues are pretty common in the application of Deep Learning-based object detection models to industrial defect data. We overcome such issues using open source models, splitting the input images into tiles and scaling them up, applying heavy data augmentation, and optimizing the anchor size and aspect ratios with a differential evolution solver. We validate the model with $3$-fold cross-validation, showing a very high accuracy in identifying images with defects. We also define a set of best practices which can help other practitioners overcome similar challenges.
abstract_zh: 无损检测（NDT）广泛应用于涡轮机部件在制造和运行过程中的缺陷识别。运营效率是燃气轮机 OEM（原始设备制造商）的关键。因此，尽可能自动化检查过程，同时最大限度地减少所涉及的不确定性，这一点至关重要。我们提出了一种基于 RetinaNet 的模型来识别涡轮叶片 X 射线图像中的钻孔缺陷。该应用程序具有挑战性，因为图像分辨率很大，其中缺陷非常小，很难被常用的锚点尺寸捕获，而且可用数据集的尺寸很小。事实上，所有这些问题在基于深度学习的目标检测模型应用于工业缺陷数据中都很常见。我们使用开源模型克服了这些问题，将输入图像分割成图块并按比例放大，应用大量数据增强，并使用差分进化求解器优化锚点大小和纵横比。我们通过 3 美元倍的交叉验证来验证模型，在识别有缺陷的图像方面表现出非常高的准确性。我们还定义了一套最佳实践，可以帮助其他从业者克服类似的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于RetinaNet的模型，用于在涡轮叶片X光图像中识别钻孔缺陷，解决高分辨率图像中小缺陷检测和数据集规模小的挑战。
AI.motivation: 工业涡轮部件的缺陷检测需高效自动化，但高分辨率图像中小缺陷难以捕捉且数据集有限，传统方法存在不确定性。
AI.method: 采用RetinaNet框架，通过图像分块、缩放、数据增强及差分进化算法优化锚框参数，结合开源模型提升检测效果。
AI.result: 三折交叉验证显示模型在缺陷识别上具有高准确率，并总结出适用于工业缺陷检测的最佳实践方案。
AI.conclusion: 提出的单阶段检测方法有效应对工业缺陷检测的常见难题，为类似场景提供可复用的技术路径和实践指导。

search_text: Learning to Identify Drilling Defects in Turbine Blades with Single Stage Detectors 学习使用单级探测器识别涡轮叶片中的钻孔缺陷 Nondestructive testing (NDT) is widely applied to defect identification of turbine components during manufacturing and operation. Operational efficiency is key for gas turbine OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturers). Automating the inspection process as much as possible, while minimizing the uncertainties involved, is thus crucial. We propose a model based on RetinaNet to identify drilling defects in X-ray images of turbine blades. As a matter of fact, all these issues are pretty common in the application of Deep Learning-based object detection models to industrial defect data. We overcome such issues using open source models, splitting the input images into tiles and scaling them up, applying heavy data augmentation, and optimizing the anchor size and aspect ratios with a differential evolution solver. We validate the model with $3$-fold cross-validation, showing a very high accuracy in identifying images with defects. authors_text: Yunqing Bao,Hang Dai,Abdulmotaleb Elsaddik
title: Semi-Supervised Cross-Modal Salient Object Detection with U-Structure Networks
title_zh: 使用 U 结构网络的半监督跨模式显着目标检测
abstract: Salient Object Detection (SOD) is a popular and important topic aimed at precise detection and segmentation of the interesting regions in the images. We integrate the linguistic information into the vision-based U-Structure networks designed for salient object detection tasks. The experiments are based on the newly created DUTS Cross Modal (DUTS-CM) dataset, which contains both visual and linguistic labels. We propose a new module called efficient Cross-Modal Self-Attention (eCMSA) to combine visual and linguistic features and improve the performance of the original U-structure networks. Meanwhile, to reduce the heavy burden of labeling, we employ a semi-supervised learning method by training an image caption model based on the DUTS-CM dataset, which can automatically label other datasets like DUT-OMRON and HKU-IS. The comprehensive experiments show that the performance of SOD can be improved with the natural language input and is competitive compared with other SOD methods.
summary: Salient Object Detection (SOD) is a popular and important topic aimed at precise detection and segmentation of the interesting regions in the images. We integrate the linguistic information into the vision-based U-Structure networks designed for salient object detection tasks. The experiments are based on the newly created DUTS Cross Modal (DUTS-CM) dataset, which contains both visual and linguistic labels. We propose a new module called efficient Cross-Modal Self-Attention (eCMSA) to combine visual and linguistic features and improve the performance of the original U-structure networks. Meanwhile, to reduce the heavy burden of labeling, we employ a semi-supervised learning method by training an image caption model based on the DUTS-CM dataset, which can automatically label other datasets like DUT-OMRON and HKU-IS. The comprehensive experiments show that the performance of SOD can be improved with the natural language input and is competitive compared with other SOD methods.
abstract_zh: 显着目标检测（SOD）是一个流行且重要的主题，旨在精确检测和分割图像中的有趣区域。我们将语言信息集成到专为显着目标检测任务而设计的基于视觉的 U-Structure 网络中。实验基于新创建的 DUTS Cross Modal (DUTS-CM) 数据集，其中包含视觉和语言标签。我们提出了一个名为高效跨模态自注意力（eCMSA）的新模块，以结合视觉和语言特征并提高原始 U 结构网络的性能。同时，为了减轻标注的沉重负担，我们采用半监督学习方法，基于 DUTS-CM 数据集训练图像描述模型，该模型可以自动标注其他数据集，如 DUT-OMRON 和 HKU-IS。综合实验表明，SOD的性能可以通过自然语言输入得到提高，与其他SOD方法相比具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合视觉与语言信息的半监督跨模态显著目标检测方法，基于U-Structure网络和新数据集DUTS-CM进行改进。
AI.motivation: 传统显著目标检测仅依赖视觉信息，难以充分理解语义关联，而跨模态信息融合可提升检测精度，但需解决标注成本高的问题。
AI.method: 设计高效跨模态自注意力模块(eCMSA)融合视觉与语言特征，并利用半监督学习训练图像 caption 模型自动标注其他数据集。
AI.result: 在DUTS-CM等数据集上验证，结合自然语言输入的检测性能优于现有方法，且自动标注减少人工标注负担。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态信息融合与半监督学习结合能有效提升显著目标检测效果，为弱监督场景提供新思路。

authors_text: Claudio D. G. Linhares,Jean R. Ponciano,Diogenes S. Pedro,Luis E. C. Rocha,Agma J. M. Traina,Jorge Poco
title: LargeNetVis: Visual Exploration of Large Temporal Networks Based on Community Taxonomies
title_zh: LargeNetVis：基于社区分类法的大型时序网络的可视化探索
comment: 11 pages, 9 figures
comments: 11 pages, 9 figures
abstract: Temporal (or time-evolving) networks are commonly used to model complex systems and the evolution of their components throughout time. Although these networks can be analyzed by different means, visual analytics stands out as an effective way for a pre-analysis before doing quantitative/statistical analyses to identify patterns, anomalies, and other behaviors in the data, thus leading to new insights and better decision-making. However, the large number of nodes, edges, and/or timestamps in many real-world networks may lead to polluted layouts that make the analysis inefficient or even infeasible. In this paper, we propose LargeNetVis, a web-based visual analytics system designed to assist in analyzing small and large temporal networks. It successfully achieves this goal by leveraging three taxonomies focused on network communities to guide the visual exploration process. The system is composed of four interactive visual components: the first (Taxonomy Matrix) presents a summary of the network characteristics, the second (Global View) gives an overview of the network evolution, the third (a node-link diagram) enables community- and node-level structural analysis, and the fourth (a Temporal Activity Map -- TAM) shows the community- and node-level activity under a temporal perspective.
summary: Temporal (or time-evolving) networks are commonly used to model complex systems and the evolution of their components throughout time. Although these networks can be analyzed by different means, visual analytics stands out as an effective way for a pre-analysis before doing quantitative/statistical analyses to identify patterns, anomalies, and other behaviors in the data, thus leading to new insights and better decision-making. However, the large number of nodes, edges, and/or timestamps in many real-world networks may lead to polluted layouts that make the analysis inefficient or even infeasible. In this paper, we propose LargeNetVis, a web-based visual analytics system designed to assist in analyzing small and large temporal networks. It successfully achieves this goal by leveraging three taxonomies focused on network communities to guide the visual exploration process. The system is composed of four interactive visual components: the first (Taxonomy Matrix) presents a summary of the network characteristics, the second (Global View) gives an overview of the network evolution, the third (a node-link diagram) enables community- and node-level structural analysis, and the fourth (a Temporal Activity Map -- TAM) shows the community- and node-level activity under a temporal perspective.
abstract_zh: 时态（或时间演化）网络通常用于对复杂系统及其组件随时间的演化进行建模。尽管可以通过不同的方式分析这些网络，但可视化分析是在进行定量/统计分析之前进行预分析的有效方法，以识别数据中的模式、异常和其他行为，从而产生新的见解和更好的决策。然而，许多现实世界网络中的大量节点、边和/或时间戳可能会导致布局污染，从而使分析效率低下甚至不可行。在本文中，我们提出了 LargeNetVis，这是一种基于网络的可视化分析系统，旨在帮助分析小型和大型时间网络。它通过利用专注于网络社区的三种分类法来指导视觉探索过程，成功实现了这一目标。该系统由四个交互式可视化组件组成：第一个（分类矩阵）呈现网络特征的摘要，第二个（全局视图）给出网络演化的概述，第三个（节点链接图）实现社区和节点级结构分析，第四个（时间活动图 - TAM）显示时间视角下的社区和节点级活动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LargeNetVis系统，通过社区分类指导大规模时变网络的可视化探索。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理大规模时变网络时易导致布局混乱，分析效率低下，需更有效的可视化工具。
AI.method: 设计基于社区分类的四组件可视化系统：分类矩阵、全局视图、节点链接图和时间活动图（TAM）。
AI.result: 系统成功实现对大小型时变网络的有效分析，可识别模式、异常及动态行为。
AI.conclusion: LargeNetVis通过社区分类提升大规模时变网络可视化分析效率，为后续量化分析提供支持。

tldr: 本文提出LargeNetVis系统，通过社区分类指导大规模时变网络的可视化探索。
motivation: 现有方法在处理大规模时变网络时易导致布局混乱，分析效率低下，需更有效的可视化工具。
method: 设计基于社区分类的四组件可视化系统：分类矩阵、全局视图、节点链接图和时间活动图（TAM）。
result: 系统成功实现对大小型时变网络的有效分析，可识别模式、异常及动态行为。
conclusion: LargeNetVis通过社区分类提升大规模时变网络可视化分析效率，为后续量化分析提供支持。
search_text: LargeNetVis: Visual Exploration of Large Temporal Networks Based on Community Taxonomies LargeNetVis：基于社区分类法的大型时序网络的可视化探索 Temporal (or time-evolving) networks are commonly used to model complex systems and the evolution of their components throughout time. Although these networks can be analyzed by different means, visual analytics stands out as an effective way for a pre-analysis before doing quantitative/statistical analyses to identify patterns, anomalies, and other behaviors in the data, thus leading to new insights and better decision-making. However, the large number of nodes, edges, and/or timestamps in many real-world networks may lead to polluted layouts that make the analysis inefficient or even infeasible. In this paper, we propose LargeNetVis, a web-based visual analytics system designed to assist in analyzing small and large temporal networks. It successfully achieves this goal by leveraging three taxonomies focused on network communities to guide the visual exploration process. The system is composed of four interactive visual components: the first (Taxonomy Matrix) presents a summary of the network characteristics, the second (Global View) gives an overview of the network evolution, the third (a node-link diagram) enables community- and node-level structural analysis, and the fourth (a Temporal Activity Map -- TAM) shows the community- and node-level activity under a temporal perspective. 时态（或时间演化）网络通常用于对复杂系统及其组件随时间的演化进行建模。尽管可以通过不同的方式分析这些网络，但可视化分析是在进行定量/统计分析之前进行预分析的有效方法，以识别数据中的模式、异常和其他行为，从而产生新的见解和更好的决策。然而，许多现实世界网络中的大量节点、边和/或时间戳可能会导致布局污染，从而使分析效率低下甚至不可行。在本文中，我们提出了 LargeNetVis，这是一种基于网络的可视化分析系统，旨在帮助分析小型和大型时间网络。它通过利用专注于网络社区的三种分类法来指导视觉探索过程，成功实现了这一目标。该系统由四个交互式可视化组件组成：第一个（分类矩阵）呈现网络特征的摘要，第二个（全局视图）给出网络演化的概述，第三个（节点链接图）实现社区和节点级结构分析，第四个（时间活动图 - TAM）显示时间视角下的社区和节点级活动。 本文提出LargeNetVis系统，通过社区分类指导大规模时变网络的可视化探索。 Claudio D. G. Linhares,Jean R. Ponciano,Diogenes S. Pedro,Luis E. C. Rocha,Agma J. M. Traina,Jorge Poco cs.HC

authors_text: Bingqi Ma,Guanglu Song,Boxiao Liu,Yu Liu
title: Rethinking Robust Representation Learning Under Fine-grained Noisy Faces
title_zh: 重新思考细粒度噪声面孔下的鲁棒表示学习
comment: Accept to ECCV 2022
comments: Accept to ECCV 2022
abstract: Learning robust feature representation from large-scale noisy faces stands out as one of the key challenges in high-performance face recognition. Recent attempts have been made to cope with this challenge by alleviating the intra-class conflict and inter-class conflict. However, the unconstrained noise type in each conflict still makes it difficult for these algorithms to perform well. To better understand this, we reformulate the noise type of each class in a more fine-grained manner as N-identities|K^C-clusters. Different types of noisy faces can be generated by adjusting the values of \nkc. Based on this unified formulation, we found that the main barrier behind the noise-robust representation learning is the flexibility of the algorithm under different N, K, and C. For this potential problem, we propose a new method, named Evolving Sub-centers Learning~(ESL), to find optimal hyperplanes to accurately describe the latent space of massive noisy faces. More specifically, we initialize M sub-centers for each class and ESL encourages it to be automatically aligned to N-identities|K^C-clusters faces via producing, merging, and dropping operations. Images belonging to the same identity in noisy faces can effectively converge to the same sub-center and samples with different identities will be pushed away. We inspect its effectiveness with an elaborate ablation study on the synthetic noisy dataset with different N, K, and C. Without any bells and whistles, ESL can achieve significant performance gains over state-of-the-art methods on large-scale noisy faces
summary: Learning robust feature representation from large-scale noisy faces stands out as one of the key challenges in high-performance face recognition. Recent attempts have been made to cope with this challenge by alleviating the intra-class conflict and inter-class conflict. However, the unconstrained noise type in each conflict still makes it difficult for these algorithms to perform well. To better understand this, we reformulate the noise type of each class in a more fine-grained manner as N-identities|K^C-clusters. Different types of noisy faces can be generated by adjusting the values of \nkc. Based on this unified formulation, we found that the main barrier behind the noise-robust representation learning is the flexibility of the algorithm under different N, K, and C. For this potential problem, we propose a new method, named Evolving Sub-centers Learning~(ESL), to find optimal hyperplanes to accurately describe the latent space of massive noisy faces. More specifically, we initialize M sub-centers for each class and ESL encourages it to be automatically aligned to N-identities|K^C-clusters faces via producing, merging, and dropping operations. Images belonging to the same identity in noisy faces can effectively converge to the same sub-center and samples with different identities will be pushed away. We inspect its effectiveness with an elaborate ablation study on the synthetic noisy dataset with different N, K, and C. Without any bells and whistles, ESL can achieve significant performance gains over state-of-the-art methods on large-scale noisy faces
abstract_zh: 从大规模噪声人脸中学习鲁棒的特征表示是高性能人脸识别的关键挑战之一。最近人们尝试通过缓解阶级内部和阶级间冲突来应对这一挑战。然而，每次冲突中不受约束的噪声类型仍然使这些算法很难表现良好。为了更好地理解这一点，我们以更细粒度的方式将每个类别的噪声类型重新表述为 N-identities|K^C-clusters。通过调整\nkc 的值可以生成不同类型的噪声面孔。基于这个统一的公式，我们发现噪声鲁棒表示学习背后的主要障碍是算法在不同N、K和C下的灵活性。针对这个潜在问题，我们提出了一种新方法，称为进化子中心学习~（ESL），以找到最佳超平面来准确描述大量噪声人脸的潜在空间。更具体地说，我们为每个类初始化 M 个子中心，ESL 鼓励它通过生成、合并和删除操作自动对齐到 N 个身份|K^C 簇面。噪声人脸中属于相同身份的图像可以有效地收敛到同一个子中心，不同身份的样本将被推开。我们通过对具有不同 N、K 和 C 的合成噪声数据集进行精心的消融研究来检查其有效性。在没有任何附加功能的情况下，ESL 可以在大规模噪声人脸上实现比最先进的方法显着的性能提升

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决大规模噪声人脸数据下的鲁棒特征表示学习问题，提出了一种新的动态子中心学习方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理细粒度噪声人脸时，因无法有效应对类内冲突和类间冲突的噪声类型差异，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 提出动态演化子中心学习（ESL）方法，通过初始化多个子中心并自动执行生成、合并和删除操作，使子中心适应N-身份/K^C-聚类的噪声分布。
AI.result: 在合成噪声数据集上进行消融实验，ESL在无需额外设置的情况下显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: ESL通过动态调整子中心结构，有效解决了噪声鲁棒表示学习中对不同噪声配置的适应性问题。

authors_text: Seungmin Jin,Hyunwook Lee,Cheonbok Park,Hyeshin Chu,Yunwon Tae,Jaegul Choo,Sungahn Ko
title: A Visual Analytics System for Improving Attention-based Traffic Forecasting Models
title_zh: 用于改进基于注意力的交通预测模型的可视化分析系统
comment: 9 pages paper, 2 pages references, and 3 pages appendix. Accepted to IEEE VIS 2022
comments: 9 pages paper, 2 pages references, and 3 pages appendix. Accepted to IEEE VIS 2022
abstract: With deep learning (DL) outperforming conventional methods for different tasks, much effort has been devoted to utilizing DL in various domains. Researchers and developers in the traffic domain have also designed and improved DL models for forecasting tasks such as estimation of traffic speed and time of arrival. However, there exist many challenges in analyzing DL models due to the black-box property of DL models and complexity of traffic data (i.e., spatio-temporal dependencies). Collaborating with domain experts, we design a visual analytics system, AttnAnalyzer, that enables users to explore how DL models make predictions by allowing effective spatio-temporal dependency analysis. The system incorporates dynamic time warping (DTW) and Granger causality tests for computational spatio-temporal dependency analysis while providing map, table, line chart, and pixel views to assist user to perform dependency and model behavior analysis. For the evaluation, we present three case studies showing how AttnAnalyzer can effectively explore model behaviors and improve model performance in two different road networks. We also provide domain expert feedback.
summary: With deep learning (DL) outperforming conventional methods for different tasks, much effort has been devoted to utilizing DL in various domains. Researchers and developers in the traffic domain have also designed and improved DL models for forecasting tasks such as estimation of traffic speed and time of arrival. However, there exist many challenges in analyzing DL models due to the black-box property of DL models and complexity of traffic data (i.e., spatio-temporal dependencies). Collaborating with domain experts, we design a visual analytics system, AttnAnalyzer, that enables users to explore how DL models make predictions by allowing effective spatio-temporal dependency analysis. The system incorporates dynamic time warping (DTW) and Granger causality tests for computational spatio-temporal dependency analysis while providing map, table, line chart, and pixel views to assist user to perform dependency and model behavior analysis. For the evaluation, we present three case studies showing how AttnAnalyzer can effectively explore model behaviors and improve model performance in two different road networks. We also provide domain expert feedback.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习 (DL) 在不同任务上的表现优于传统方法，人们在各个领域投入了大量精力来利用 DL。交通领域的研究人员和开发人员还设计和改进了深度学习模型，用于预测任务，例如估计交通速度和到达时间。然而，由于深度学习模型的黑盒特性和流量数据的复杂性（即时空依赖性），分析深度学习模型存在许多挑战。我们与领域专家合作，设计了一个可视化分析系统 AttnAnalyzer，该系统使用户能够通过有效的时空依赖性分析来探索 DL 模型如何进行预测。该系统结合了动态时间扭曲（DTW）和格兰杰因果关系测试来进行计算时空依赖性分析，同时提供地图、表格、折线图和像素视图来帮助用户执行依赖性和模型行为分析。为了进行评估，我们提出了三个案例研究，展示了 AttnAnalyzer 如何在两个不同的道路网络中有效探索模型行为并提高模型性能。我们还提供领域专家的反馈。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一个名为AttnAnalyzer的可视化分析系统，用于提升基于注意力机制的交通预测模型性能。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在交通预测中表现优异，但其黑箱特性和交通数据的时空依赖复杂性导致模型分析困难，需借助可视化工具辅助专家优化模型。
AI.method: 开发AttnAnalyzer系统，结合动态时间规整（DTW）和格兰杰因果检验进行时空依赖分析，并提供地图、表格、折线图和像素视图辅助用户分析模型行为。
AI.result: 通过三个案例研究验证了AttnAnalyzer在两种不同路网中有效提升模型性能，并获得领域专家的积极反馈。
AI.conclusion: AttnAnalyzer通过可视化分析工具帮助专家理解模型决策过程，从而改进基于注意力机制的交通预测模型，解决了深度学习模型的黑箱问题。

The system incorporates dynamic time warping (DTW) and Granger causality tests for computational spatio-temporal dependency analysis while providing map, table, line chart, and pixel views to assist user to perform dependency and model behavior analysis. For the evaluation, we present three case studies showing how AttnAnalyzer can effectively explore model behaviors and improve model performance in two different road networks. We also provide domain expert feedback. 随着深度学习 (DL) 在不同任务上的表现优于传统方法，人们在各个领域投入了大量精力来利用 DL。交通领域的研究人员和开发人员还设计和改进了深度学习模型，用于预测任务，例如估计交通速度和到达时间。然而，由于深度学习模型的黑盒特性和流量数据的复杂性（即时空依赖性），分析深度学习模型存在许多挑战。我们与领域专家合作，设计了一个可视化分析系统 AttnAnalyzer，该系统使用户能够通过有效的时空依赖性分析来探索 DL 模型如何进行预测。该系统结合了动态时间扭曲（DTW）和格兰杰因果关系测试来进行计算时空依赖性分析，同时提供地图、表格、折线图和像素视图来帮助用户执行依赖性和模型行为分析。为了进行评估，我们提出了三个案例研究，展示了 AttnAnalyzer 如何在两个不同的道路网络中有效探索模型行为并提高模型性能。我们还提供领域专家的反馈。 本文设计了一个名为AttnAnalyzer的可视化分析系统，用于提升基于注意力机制的交通预测模型性能。 Seungmin Jin,Hyunwook Lee,Cheonbok Park,Hyeshin Chu,Yunwon Tae,Jaegul Choo,Sungahn Ko cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Vladimir Frants,Sos Agaian,Karen Panetta
title: QSAM-Net: Rain streak removal by quaternion neural network with self-attention module
title_zh: QSAM-Net：通过带有自注意力模块的四元数神经网络去除雨纹
abstract: Images captured in real-world applications in remote sensing, image or video retrieval, and outdoor surveillance suffer degraded quality introduced by poor weather conditions. Conditions such as rain and mist, introduce artifacts that make visual analysis challenging and limit the performance of high-level computer vision methods. For time-critical applications where a rapid response is necessary, it becomes crucial to develop algorithms that automatically remove rain, without diminishing the quality of the image contents. This article aims to develop a novel quaternion multi-stage multiscale neural network with a self-attention module called QSAM-Net to remove rain streaks. The novelty of this algorithm is that it requires significantly fewer parameters by a factor of 3.98, over prior methods, while improving visual quality. This is demonstrated by the extensive evaluation and benchmarking on synthetic and real-world rainy images. This feature of QSAM-Net makes the network suitable for implementation on edge devices and applications requiring near real-time performance. The experiments demonstrate that by improving the visual quality of images. In addition, object detection accuracy and training speed are also improved.
summary: Images captured in real-world applications in remote sensing, image or video retrieval, and outdoor surveillance suffer degraded quality introduced by poor weather conditions. Conditions such as rain and mist, introduce artifacts that make visual analysis challenging and limit the performance of high-level computer vision methods. For time-critical applications where a rapid response is necessary, it becomes crucial to develop algorithms that automatically remove rain, without diminishing the quality of the image contents. This article aims to develop a novel quaternion multi-stage multiscale neural network with a self-attention module called QSAM-Net to remove rain streaks. The novelty of this algorithm is that it requires significantly fewer parameters by a factor of 3.98, over prior methods, while improving visual quality. This is demonstrated by the extensive evaluation and benchmarking on synthetic and real-world rainy images. This feature of QSAM-Net makes the network suitable for implementation on edge devices and applications requiring near real-time performance. The experiments demonstrate that by improving the visual quality of images. In addition, object detection accuracy and training speed are also improved.
abstract_zh: 在遥感、图像或视频检索以及户外监视等实际应用中捕获的图像会因恶劣的天气条件而导致质量下降。雨和雾等条件会引入伪影，使视觉分析变得具有挑战性，并限制高级计算机视觉方法的性能。对于需要快速响应的时间关键型应用，开发能够自动去除雨水而不降低图像内容质量的算法变得至关重要。本文旨在开发一种新型四元数多级多尺度神经网络，带有名为 QSAM-Net 的自注意力模块，用于消除雨条纹。该算法的新颖之处在于，与之前的方法相比，它所需的参数明显减少了 3.98 倍，同时提高了视觉质量。对合成和真实雨天图像的广泛评估和基准测试证明了这一点。 QSAM-Net 的这一特性使得该网络适合在需要近实时性能的边缘设备和应用程序上实现。实验证明，通过提高图像的视觉质量。此外，目标检测精度和训练速度也得到提高。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于四元数神经网络和自注意力模块的新型多阶段多尺度网络QSAM-Net，用于去除图像中的雨痕。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中恶劣天气条件导致图像质量下降，影响视觉分析和高级计算机视觉方法的性能，需开发高效且能提升图像质量的自动去雨算法，以满足实时应用需求。
AI.method: 提出QSAM-Net，结合四元数神经网络与自注意力模块，采用多阶段多尺度结构，有效减少参数量（较先前方法减少3.98倍）并提升视觉质量。
AI.result: 实验表明QSAM-Net在合成及真实雨天图像上显著提升视觉质量，同时改善物体检测准确率和训练速度。
AI.conclusion: QSAM-Net凭借更少参数和更优视觉质量，适用于边缘设备及实时场景，为雨天图像处理提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: Zhipeng Cheng,Xuwei Fan,Minghui Liwang,Ning Chen,Xianbin Wang
title: Learning-Based Client Selection for Federated Learning Services Over Wireless Networks with Constrained Monetary Budgets
title_zh: 货币预算有限的无线网络联合学习服务的基于学习的客户端选择
comment: 6 pages,8 figures
comments: 6 pages,8 figures
abstract: We investigate a data quality-aware dynamic client selection problem for multiple federated learning (FL) services in a wireless network, where each client offers dynamic datasets for the simultaneous training of multiple FL services, and each FL service demander has to pay for the clients under constrained monetary budgets. The problem is formalized as a non-cooperative Markov game over the training rounds. A multi-agent hybrid deep reinforcement learning-based algorithm is proposed to optimize the joint client selection and payment actions, while avoiding action conflicts. Simulation results indicate that our proposed algorithm can significantly improve training performance.
summary: We investigate a data quality-aware dynamic client selection problem for multiple federated learning (FL) services in a wireless network, where each client offers dynamic datasets for the simultaneous training of multiple FL services, and each FL service demander has to pay for the clients under constrained monetary budgets. The problem is formalized as a non-cooperative Markov game over the training rounds. A multi-agent hybrid deep reinforcement learning-based algorithm is proposed to optimize the joint client selection and payment actions, while avoiding action conflicts. Simulation results indicate that our proposed algorithm can significantly improve training performance.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了无线网络中多个联邦学习（FL）服务的数据质量感知动态客户端选择问题，其中每个客户端都提供用于同时训练多个 FL 服务的动态数据集，并且每个 FL 服务需求者必须在有限的货币预算下为客户端付费。该问题被形式化为训练轮次中的非合作马尔可夫博弈。提出了一种基于多智能体混合深度强化学习的算法来优化联合客户选择和支付操作，同时避免操作冲突。仿真结果表明我们提出的算法可以显着提高训练性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在无线网络中预算受限情况下，针对多个联邦学习服务的数据质量感知动态客户端选择问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在预算约束下有效协调多服务的动态数据需求与客户端资源分配，导致训练效率低下。
AI.method: 将问题建模为非合作马尔可夫博弈，提出多智能体混合深度强化学习算法，联合优化客户端选择与支付策略以避免冲突。
AI.result: 仿真表明该算法显著提升训练性能，验证了方法在资源约束下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法能有效解决多服务联邦学习中的预算驱动客户端选择难题，提升系统整体训练效率。

authors_text: Zhichao Lu,Ran Cheng,Yaochu Jin,Kay Chen Tan,Kalyanmoy Deb
title: Neural Architecture Search as Multiobjective Optimization Benchmarks: Problem Formulation and Performance Assessment
title_zh: 神经架构搜索作为多目标优化基准：问题表述和性能评估
abstract: The ongoing advancements in network architecture design have led to remarkable achievements in deep learning across various challenging computer vision tasks. Meanwhile, the development of neural architecture search (NAS) has provided promising approaches to automating the design of network architectures for lower prediction error. Recently, the emerging application scenarios of deep learning have raised higher demands for network architectures considering multiple design criteria: number of parameters/floating-point operations, and inference latency, among others. From an optimization point of view, the NAS tasks involving multiple design criteria are intrinsically multiobjective optimization problems; hence, it is reasonable to adopt evolutionary multiobjective optimization (EMO) algorithms for tackling them. Nonetheless, there is still a clear gap confining the related research along this pathway: on the one hand, there is a lack of a general problem formulation of NAS tasks from an optimization point of view; on the other hand, there are challenges in conducting benchmark assessments of EMO algorithms on NAS tasks. To bridge the gap: (i) we formulate NAS tasks into general multi-objective optimization problems and analyze the complex characteristics from an optimization point of view; (ii) we present an end-to-end pipeline, dubbed $\texttt{EvoXBench}$, to generate benchmark test problems for EMO algorithms to run efficiently -- without the requirement of GPUs or Pytorch/Tensorflow; (iii) we instantiate two test suites comprehensively covering two datasets, seven search spaces, and three hardware devices, involving up to eight objectives. Based on the above, we validate the proposed test suites using six representative EMO algorithms and provide some empirical analyses. The code of $\texttt{EvoXBench}$ is available from $\href{https://github.com/EMI-Group/EvoXBench}{\rm{here}}$.
summary: The ongoing advancements in network architecture design have led to remarkable achievements in deep learning across various challenging computer vision tasks. Meanwhile, the development of neural architecture search (NAS) has provided promising approaches to automating the design of network architectures for lower prediction error. Recently, the emerging application scenarios of deep learning have raised higher demands for network architectures considering multiple design criteria: number of parameters/floating-point operations, and inference latency, among others. From an optimization point of view, the NAS tasks involving multiple design criteria are intrinsically multiobjective optimization problems; hence, it is reasonable to adopt evolutionary multiobjective optimization (EMO) algorithms for tackling them. Nonetheless, there is still a clear gap confining the related research along this pathway: on the one hand, there is a lack of a general problem formulation of NAS tasks from an optimization point of view; on the other hand, there are challenges in conducting benchmark assessments of EMO algorithms on NAS tasks. To bridge the gap: (i) we formulate NAS tasks into general multi-objective optimization problems and analyze the complex characteristics from an optimization point of view; (ii) we present an end-to-end pipeline, dubbed $\texttt{EvoXBench}$, to generate benchmark test problems for EMO algorithms to run efficiently -- without the requirement of GPUs or Pytorch/Tensorflow; (iii) we instantiate two test suites comprehensively covering two datasets, seven search spaces, and three hardware devices, involving up to eight objectives. Based on the above, we validate the proposed test suites using six representative EMO algorithms and provide some empirical analyses. The code of $\texttt{EvoXBench}$ is available from $\href{https://github.com/EMI-Group/EvoXBench}{\rm{here}}$.
abstract_zh: 网络架构设计的不断进步使得深度学习在各种具有挑战性的计算机视觉任务中取得了显着的成就。同时，神经架构搜索（NAS）的发展为自动化网络架构设计以降低预测误差提供了有前途的方法。近年来，深度学习的新兴应用场景对考虑参数/浮点运算数量、推理延迟等多种设计标准的网络架构提出了更高的要求。从优化的角度来看，涉及多个设计准则的NAS任务本质上是多目标优化问题；因此，采用进化多目标优化（EMO）算法来解决这些问题是合理的。尽管如此，这一路径上的相关研究仍然存在明显的差距：一方面，缺乏从优化角度对 NAS 任务进行通用问题表述；另一方面，在 NAS 任务上对 EMO 算法进行基准评估也存在挑战。为了弥补这一差距：（i）我们将 NAS 任务转化为一般的多目标优化问题，并从优化的角度分析复杂的特征； (ii) 我们提出了一个名为 $\texttt{EvoXBench}$ 的端到端管道，用于生成 EMO 算法的基准测试问题，使其高效运行——无需 GPU 或 Pytorch/Tensorflow； (iii) 我们实例化了两个测试套件，全面覆盖两个数据集、七个搜索空间和三个硬件设备，涉及最多八个目标。基于上述内容，我们使用六种代表性的 EMO 算法验证了所提出的测试套件，并提供了一些实证分析。 $\texttt{EvoXBench}$ 的代码可从 $\href{https://github.com/EMI-Group/EvoXBench}{\rm{here}}$ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文将神经架构搜索（NAS）任务建模为多目标优化问题，并提出一个无需GPU的基准测试框架EvoXBench，用于评估多目标进化算法（EMO）在NAS中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有NAS研究主要关注预测误差，忽视参数量、计算量等多目标优化需求，且缺乏统一的优化问题定义和EMO算法的基准测试方法。
AI.method: （1）从优化视角形式化NAS任务为多目标问题；（2）构建EvoXBench框架生成基准测试集，支持CPU运行；（3）设计涵盖两个数据集、七个搜索空间和三种硬件设备的测试套件，最多包含八个优化目标。
AI.result: 通过六个代表性EMO算法验证测试套件有效性，提供多目标优化性能的实证分析，并开源EvoXBench代码库。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过问题形式化和基准测试框架的构建，填补了NAS多目标优化研究的空白，为后续EMO算法开发提供了标准化评估工具。

search_text: Neural Architecture Search as Multiobjective Optimization Benchmarks: Problem Formulation and Performance Assessment 神经架构搜索作为多目标优化基准：问题表述和性能评估 The ongoing advancements in network architecture design have led to remarkable achievements in deep learning across various challenging computer vision tasks. Meanwhile, the development of neural architecture search (NAS) has provided promising approaches to automating the design of network architectures for lower prediction error. Recently, the emerging application scenarios of deep learning have raised higher demands for network architectures considering multiple design criteria: number of parameters/floating-point operations, and inference latency, among others. From an optimization point of view, the NAS tasks involving multiple design criteria are intrinsically multiobjective optimization problems; hence, it is reasonable to adopt evolutionary multiobjective optimization (EMO) algorithms for tackling them. Nonetheless, there is still a clear gap confining the related research along this pathway: on the one hand, there is a lack of a general problem formulation of NAS tasks from an optimization point of view; on the other hand, there are challenges in conducting benchmark assessments of EMO algorithms on NAS tasks. To bridge the gap: (i) we formulate NAS tasks into general multi-objective optimization problems and analyze the complex characteristics from an optimization point of view; (ii) we present an end-to-end pipeline, dubbed $\texttt{EvoXBench}$, to generate benchmark test problems for EMO algorithms to run efficiently -- without the requirement of GPUs or Pytorch/Tensorflow; (iii) we instantiate two test suites comprehensively covering two datasets, seven search spaces, and three hardware devices, involving up to eight objectives. Based on the above, we validate the proposed test suites using six representative EMO algorithms and provide some empirical analyses. The code of $\texttt{EvoXBench}$ is available from $\href{https://github.com/EMI-Group/EvoXBench}{\rm{here}}$. 网络架构设计的不断进步使得深度学习在各种具有挑战性的计算机视觉任务中取得了显着的成就。同时，神经架构搜索（NAS）的发展为自动化网络架构设计以降低预测误差提供了有前途的方法。近年来，深度学习的新兴应用场景对考虑参数/浮点运算数量、推理延迟等多种设计标准的网络架构提出了更高的要求。从优化的角度来看，涉及多个设计准则的NAS任务本质上是多目标优化问题；因此，采用进化多目标优化（EMO）算法来解决这些问题是合理的。尽管如此，这一路径上的相关研究仍然存在明显的差距：一方面，缺乏从优化角度对 NAS 任务进行通用问题表述；另一方面，在 NAS 任务上对 EMO 算法进行基准评估也存在挑战。为了弥补这一差距：（i）我们将 NAS 任务转化为一般的多目标优化问题，并从优化的角度分析复杂的特征； (ii) 我们提出了一个名为 $\texttt{EvoXBench}$ 的端到端管道，用于生成 EMO 算法的基准测试问题，使其高效运行——无需 GPU 或 Pytorch/Tensorflow； (iii) 我们实例化了两个测试套件，全面覆盖两个数据集、七个搜索空间和三个硬件设备，涉及最多八个目标。基于上述内容，我们使用六种代表性的 EMO 算法验证了所提出的测试套件，并提供了一些实证分析。 $\texttt{EvoXBench}$ 的代码可从 $\href{https://github.com/EMI-Group/EvoXBench}{\rm{here}}$ 获取。 本文将神经架构搜索（NAS）任务建模为多目标优化问题，并提出一个无需GPU的基准测试框架EvoXBench，用于评估多目标进化算法（EMO）在NAS中的性能。 Zhichao Lu,Ran Cheng,Yaochu Jin,Kay Chen Tan,Kalyanmoy Deb cs.NE,cs.CV

authors_text: Longxiang Jiang,Liyuan Wang,Xinkun Chu,Yonghao Xiao,Hao Zhang
title: PhyGNNet: Solving spatiotemporal PDEs with Physics-informed Graph Neural Network
title_zh: PhyGNNet：利用物理信息图神经网络求解时空偏微分方程
comment: there some errors in method describtion
comments: there some errors in method describtion
abstract: Solving partial differential equations (PDEs) is an important research means in the fields of physics, biology, and chemistry. As an approximate alternative to numerical methods, PINN has received extensive attention and played an important role in many fields. However, PINN uses a fully connected network as its model, which has limited fitting ability and limited extrapolation ability in both time and space. In this paper, we propose PhyGNNet for solving partial differential equations on the basics of a graph neural network which consists of encoder, processer, and decoder blocks. In particular, we divide the computing area into regular grids, define partial differential operators on the grids, then construct pde loss for the network to optimize to build PhyGNNet model. What's more, we conduct comparative experiments on Burgers equation and heat equation to validate our approach, the results show that our method has better fit ability and extrapolation ability both in time and spatial areas compared with PINN.
summary: Solving partial differential equations (PDEs) is an important research means in the fields of physics, biology, and chemistry. As an approximate alternative to numerical methods, PINN has received extensive attention and played an important role in many fields. However, PINN uses a fully connected network as its model, which has limited fitting ability and limited extrapolation ability in both time and space. In this paper, we propose PhyGNNet for solving partial differential equations on the basics of a graph neural network which consists of encoder, processer, and decoder blocks. In particular, we divide the computing area into regular grids, define partial differential operators on the grids, then construct pde loss for the network to optimize to build PhyGNNet model. What's more, we conduct comparative experiments on Burgers equation and heat equation to validate our approach, the results show that our method has better fit ability and extrapolation ability both in time and spatial areas compared with PINN.
abstract_zh: 求解偏微分方程（PDE）是物理、生物和化学领域的重要研究手段。作为数值方法的近似替代方法，PINN受到了广泛的关注，并在许多领域发挥了重要作用。然而，PINN采用全连接网络作为模型，其拟合能力有限，在时间和空间上的外推能力也有限。在本文中，我们提出了 PhyGNNet，用于在由编码器、处理器和解码器块组成的图神经网络的基础上求解偏微分方程。具体来说，我们将计算区域划分为规则的网格，在网格上定义偏微分算子，然后构造网络的pde损失进行优化，从而构建PhyGNNet模型。此外，我们对Burgers方程和热方程进行了对比实验来验证我们的方法，结果表明，与PINN相比，我们的方法在时间和空间方面都具有更好的拟合能力和外推能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于图神经网络的PhyGNNet方法，用于求解时空偏微分方程（PDEs）。
AI.motivation: 传统物理信息神经网络（PINN）因采用全连接结构，在时空拟合与外推能力上存在局限，需改进模型架构以提升性能。
AI.method: 构建包含编码器、处理器和解码器的图神经网络，将计算区域划分为网格并定义PDE算子，通过构建PDE损失函数优化网络参数。
AI.result: 在Burgers方程和热方程实验中，PhyGNNet在时空维度的拟合与外推能力均优于传统PINN方法。
AI.conclusion: PhyGNNet通过图神经网络结构有效提升了PDE求解的准确性与泛化能力，为复杂物理问题的建模提供了新思路。

authors_text: Hongwei Li,Tao Dai,Yiming Li,Xueyi Zou,Shu-Tao Xia
title: Adaptive Local Implicit Image Function for Arbitrary-scale Super-resolution
title_zh: 任意尺度超分辨率的自适应局部隐式图像函数
comment: This paper is accepted by ICIP 2022. 5 pages
comments: This paper is accepted by ICIP 2022. 5 pages
abstract: Image representation is critical for many visual tasks. Instead of representing images discretely with 2D arrays of pixels, a recent study, namely local implicit image function (LIIF), denotes images as a continuous function where pixel values are expansion by using the corresponding coordinates as inputs. Due to its continuous nature, LIIF can be adopted for arbitrary-scale image super-resolution tasks, resulting in a single effective and efficient model for various up-scaling factors. However, LIIF often suffers from structural distortions and ringing artifacts around edges, mostly because all pixels share the same model, thus ignoring the local properties of the image. In this paper, we propose a novel adaptive local image function (A-LIIF) to alleviate this problem. Specifically, our A-LIIF consists of two main components: an encoder and a expansion network. The former captures cross-scale image features, while the latter models the continuous up-scaling function by a weighted combination of multiple local implicit image functions. Accordingly, our A-LIIF can reconstruct the high-frequency textures and structures more accurately. Experiments on multiple benchmark datasets verify the effectiveness of our method. Our codes are available at \url{https://github.com/LeeHW-THU/A-LIIF}.
summary: Image representation is critical for many visual tasks. Instead of representing images discretely with 2D arrays of pixels, a recent study, namely local implicit image function (LIIF), denotes images as a continuous function where pixel values are expansion by using the corresponding coordinates as inputs. Due to its continuous nature, LIIF can be adopted for arbitrary-scale image super-resolution tasks, resulting in a single effective and efficient model for various up-scaling factors. However, LIIF often suffers from structural distortions and ringing artifacts around edges, mostly because all pixels share the same model, thus ignoring the local properties of the image. In this paper, we propose a novel adaptive local image function (A-LIIF) to alleviate this problem. Specifically, our A-LIIF consists of two main components: an encoder and a expansion network. The former captures cross-scale image features, while the latter models the continuous up-scaling function by a weighted combination of multiple local implicit image functions. Accordingly, our A-LIIF can reconstruct the high-frequency textures and structures more accurately. Experiments on multiple benchmark datasets verify the effectiveness of our method. Our codes are available at \url{https://github.com/LeeHW-THU/A-LIIF}.
abstract_zh: 图像表示对于许多视觉任务至关重要。最近的一项研究，即局部隐式图像函数（LIIF），不是用二维像素阵列离散地表示图像，而是将图像表示为连续函数，其中像素值通过使用相应的坐标作为输入来扩展。由于其连续性，LIIF 可用于任意尺度的图像超分辨率任务，从而为各种放大因素提供一个有效且高效的模型。然而，LIIF 经常会出现结构扭曲和边缘周围的振铃伪影，这主要是因为所有像素共享相同的模型，从而忽略了图像的局部属性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的自适应局部图像函数（A-LIIF）来缓解这个问题。具体来说，我们的 A-LIIF 由两个主要组件组成：编码器和扩展网络。前者捕获跨尺度的图像特征，而后者通过多个局部隐式图像函数的加权组合来对连续放大函数进行建模。因此，我们的 A-LIIF 可以更准确地重建高频纹理和结构。在多个基准数据集上的实验验证了我们方法的有效性。我们的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/LeeHW-THU/A-LIIF} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出自适应局部隐式图像函数（A-LIIF），用于解决任意尺度图像超分辨率任务中的结构失真和环状伪影问题。
AI.motivation: 现有局部隐式图像函数（LIIF）在超分辨率任务中因忽略图像局部特性，导致边缘结构失真和环状伪影，需改进模型以适应局部特征。
AI.method: A-LIIF包含编码器和扩展网络，编码器提取跨尺度图像特征，扩展网络通过加权组合多个局部隐式函数建模连续放大函数。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验验证了A-LIIF在高频率纹理和结构重建上的有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: A-LIIF通过自适应局部建模显著提升了超分辨率质量，有效缓解了LIIF的结构失真问题。

search_text: Adaptive Local Implicit Image Function for Arbitrary-scale Super-resolution 任意尺度超分辨率的自适应局部隐式图像函数 Image representation is critical for many visual tasks. Instead of representing images discretely with 2D arrays of pixels, a recent study, namely local implicit image function (LIIF), denotes images as a continuous function where pixel values are expansion by using the corresponding coordinates as inputs. Due to its continuous nature, LIIF can be adopted for arbitrary-scale image super-resolution tasks, resulting in a single effective and efficient model for various up-scaling factors. However, LIIF often suffers from structural distortions and ringing artifacts around edges, mostly because all pixels share the same model, thus ignoring the local properties of the image. In this paper, we propose a novel adaptive local image function (A-LIIF) to alleviate this problem. Specifically, our A-LIIF consists of two main components: an encoder and a expansion network. The former captures cross-scale image features, while the latter models the continuous up-scaling function by a weighted combination of multiple local implicit image functions. Accordingly, our A-LIIF can reconstruct the high-frequency textures and structures more accurately. Experiments on multiple benchmark datasets verify the effectiveness of our method. Our codes are available at \url{https://github.com/LeeHW-THU/A-LIIF}. 图像表示对于许多视觉任务至关重要。最近的一项研究，即局部隐式图像函数（LIIF），不是用二维像素阵列离散地表示图像，而是将图像表示为连续函数，其中像素值通过使用相应的坐标作为输入来扩展。由于其连续性，LIIF 可用于任意尺度的图像超分辨率任务，从而为各种放大因素提供一个有效且高效的模型。然而，LIIF 经常会出现结构扭曲和边缘周围的振铃伪影，这主要是因为所有像素共享相同的模型，从而忽略了图像的局部属性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的自适应局部图像函数（A-LIIF）来缓解这个问题。具体来说，我们的 A-LIIF 由两个主要组件组成：编码器和扩展网络。前者捕获跨尺度的图像特征，而后者通过多个局部隐式图像函数的加权组合来对连续放大函数进行建模。因此，我们的 A-LIIF 可以更准确地重建高频纹理和结构。在多个基准数据集上的实验验证了我们方法的有效性。我们的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/LeeHW-THU/A-LIIF} 获取。 本文提出自适应局部隐式图像函数（A-LIIF），用于解决任意尺度图像超分辨率任务中的结构失真和环状伪影问题。 Hongwei Li,Tao Dai,Yiming Li,Xueyi Zou,Shu-Tao Xia eess.IV,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Pavan Kumar Reddy Boppidi,Victor Jeffry Louis,Arvind Subramaniam,Rajesh K. Tripathy,Souri Banerjee,Souvik Kundu
title: Implementation of fast ICA using memristor crossbar arrays for blind image source separations
title_zh: 使用忆阻器交叉阵列实现快速 ICA 进行盲图像源分离
abstract: Independent component analysis is an unsupervised learning approach for computing the independent components (ICs) from the multivariate signals or data matrix. The ICs are evaluated based on the multiplication of the weight matrix with the multivariate data matrix. This study proposes a novel memristor crossbar array for the implementation of both ACY ICA and Fast ICA for blind source separation. The data input was applied in the form of pulse width modulated voltages to the crossbar array and the weight of the implemented neural network is stored in the memristor. The output charges from the memristor columns are used to calculate the weight update, which is executed through the voltages kept higher than the memristor Set/Reset voltages. In order to demonstrate its potential application, the proposed memristor crossbar arrays based fast ICA architecture is employed for image source separation problem. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed approach is very effective to separate image sources, and also the contrast of the images are improved with an improvement factor in terms of percentage of structural similarity as 67.27% when compared with the software-based implementation of conventional ACY ICA and Fast ICA algorithms.
summary: Independent component analysis is an unsupervised learning approach for computing the independent components (ICs) from the multivariate signals or data matrix. The ICs are evaluated based on the multiplication of the weight matrix with the multivariate data matrix. This study proposes a novel memristor crossbar array for the implementation of both ACY ICA and Fast ICA for blind source separation. The data input was applied in the form of pulse width modulated voltages to the crossbar array and the weight of the implemented neural network is stored in the memristor. The output charges from the memristor columns are used to calculate the weight update, which is executed through the voltages kept higher than the memristor Set/Reset voltages. In order to demonstrate its potential application, the proposed memristor crossbar arrays based fast ICA architecture is employed for image source separation problem. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed approach is very effective to separate image sources, and also the contrast of the images are improved with an improvement factor in terms of percentage of structural similarity as 67.27% when compared with the software-based implementation of conventional ACY ICA and Fast ICA algorithms.
abstract_zh: 独立分量分析是一种无监督学习方法，用于从多元信号或数据矩阵计算独立分量 (IC)。 IC 的评估基于权重矩阵与多元数据矩阵的乘法。本研究提出了一种新型忆阻器交叉阵列，用于实现 ACY ICA 和 Fast ICA 盲源分离。数据输入以脉宽调制电压的形式施加到交叉阵列，并且所实现的神经网络的权重存储在忆阻器中。忆阻器列的输出电荷用于计算权重更新，这是通过保持高于忆阻器设置/重置电压的电压来执行的。为了展示其潜在应用，所提出的基于忆阻器交叉阵列的快速 ICA 架构被用于图像源分离问题。实验结果表明，与基于软件的传统 ACY ICA 和 Fast ICA 算法实现相比，该方法能够非常有效地分离图像源，并且图像的对比度得到改善，结构相似度百分比的改进因子达到 67.27%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于忆阻器交叉阵列的快速独立成分分析（Fast ICA）硬件架构，用于盲图像源分离。
AI.motivation: 传统ICA算法依赖软件实现，计算效率低，难以满足实时图像处理需求，需探索高效硬件加速方案。
AI.method: 利用忆阻器交叉阵列存储网络权重，通过脉宽调制电压输入数据，基于列输出电荷计算权重更新，电压高于阈值时执行更新。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在图像源分离效果上优于传统软件实现，结构相似性百分比提升67.27%。
AI.conclusion: 忆阻器交叉阵列可有效加速Fast ICA算法，为盲源分离提供高效硬件解决方案。

authors_text: Zaifa Xue,Huibin Lu,Tao Zhang,Max A. Little
title: Patient-Specific Game-Based Transfer Method for Parkinson's Disease Severity Prediction
title_zh: 用于帕金森病严重程度预测的患者特定的基于游戏的转移方法
abstract: Dysphonia is one of the early symptoms of Parkinson's disease (PD). Most existing methods use feature selection methods to find the optimal subset of voice features for all PD patients. Few have considered the heterogeneity between patients, which implies the need to provide specific prediction models for different patients. However, building the specific model faces the challenge of small sample size, which makes it lack generalization ability. Instance transfer is an effective way to solve this problem. Therefore, this paper proposes a patient-specific game-based transfer (PSGT) method for PD severity prediction. First, a selection mechanism is used to select PD patients with similar disease trends to the target patient from the source domain, which greatly reduces the risk of negative transfer. Then, the contribution of the transferred subjects and their instances to the disease estimation of the target subject is fairly evaluated by the Shapley value, which improves the interpretability of the method. Next, the proportion of valid instances in the transferred subjects is determined, and the instances with higher contribution are transferred to further reduce the difference between the transferred instance subset and the target subject. Finally, the selected subset of instances is added to the training set of the target subject, and the extended data is fed into the random forest to improve the performance of the method. Parkinson's telemonitoring dataset is used to evaluate the feasibility and effectiveness. Experiment results show that the PSGT has better performance in both prediction error and stability over compared methods.
summary: Dysphonia is one of the early symptoms of Parkinson's disease (PD). Most existing methods use feature selection methods to find the optimal subset of voice features for all PD patients. Few have considered the heterogeneity between patients, which implies the need to provide specific prediction models for different patients. However, building the specific model faces the challenge of small sample size, which makes it lack generalization ability. Instance transfer is an effective way to solve this problem. Therefore, this paper proposes a patient-specific game-based transfer (PSGT) method for PD severity prediction. First, a selection mechanism is used to select PD patients with similar disease trends to the target patient from the source domain, which greatly reduces the risk of negative transfer. Then, the contribution of the transferred subjects and their instances to the disease estimation of the target subject is fairly evaluated by the Shapley value, which improves the interpretability of the method. Next, the proportion of valid instances in the transferred subjects is determined, and the instances with higher contribution are transferred to further reduce the difference between the transferred instance subset and the target subject. Finally, the selected subset of instances is added to the training set of the target subject, and the extended data is fed into the random forest to improve the performance of the method. Parkinson's telemonitoring dataset is used to evaluate the feasibility and effectiveness. Experiment results show that the PSGT has better performance in both prediction error and stability over compared methods.
abstract_zh: 发声困难是帕金森病 (PD) 的早期症状之一。大多数现有方法使用特征选择方法来为所有 PD 患者找到最佳的语音特征子集。很少有人考虑患者之间的异质性，这意味着需要为不同患者提供特定的预测模型。然而，构建具体模型面临着样本量较小的挑战，这使得其缺乏泛化能力。实例传输是解决这个问题的有效方法。因此，本文提出了一种基于患者特定游戏的转移（PSGT）方法来预测PD严重程度。首先，采用选择机制从源域中选择与目标患者疾病趋势相似的PD患者，大大降低了负迁移的风险。然后，通过Shapley值公平地评估转移的受试者及其实例对目标受试者的疾病估计的贡献，这提高了该方法的可解释性。接下来，确定转移主体中有效实例的比例，将贡献度较高的实例进行转移，以进一步缩小转移实例子集与目标主体之间的差异。最后，将选定的实例子集添加到目标对象的训练集中，并将扩展数据馈入随机森林以提高方法的性能。使用帕金森远程监测数据集来评估可行性和有效性。实验结果表明，PSGT 在预测误差和稳定性方面均优于对比方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于患者特异性的游戏化迁移方法（PSGT），用于帕金森病严重程度的预测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在预测帕金森病严重程度时未考虑患者异质性，且小样本导致模型泛化能力不足，需开发针对个体的预测模型。
AI.method: 通过选择疾病趋势相似的源域患者，结合Shapley值评估迁移实例的贡献，并将高贡献实例加入目标患者训练集，最终使用随机森林提升性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，PSGT在预测误差和稳定性方面优于对比方法，验证了其可行性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: PSGT通过迁移学习和实例选择有效解决了小样本问题，为个性化帕金森病预测提供了可解释且高效的方法。

result: 实验表明，PSGT在预测误差和稳定性方面优于对比方法，验证了其可行性与有效性。
conclusion: PSGT通过迁移学习和实例选择有效解决了小样本问题，为个性化帕金森病预测提供了可解释且高效的方法。
search_text: Patient-Specific Game-Based Transfer Method for Parkinson's Disease Severity Prediction 用于帕金森病严重程度预测的患者特定的基于游戏的转移方法 Dysphonia is one of the early symptoms of Parkinson's disease (PD). Most existing methods use feature selection methods to find the optimal subset of voice features for all PD patients. Few have considered the heterogeneity between patients, which implies the need to provide specific prediction models for different patients. However, building the specific model faces the challenge of small sample size, which makes it lack generalization ability. Instance transfer is an effective way to solve this problem. Therefore, this paper proposes a patient-specific game-based transfer (PSGT) method for PD severity prediction. First, a selection mechanism is used to select PD patients with similar disease trends to the target patient from the source domain, which greatly reduces the risk of negative transfer. Then, the contribution of the transferred subjects and their instances to the disease estimation of the target subject is fairly evaluated by the Shapley value, which improves the interpretability of the method. Next, the proportion of valid instances in the transferred subjects is determined, and the instances with higher contribution are transferred to further reduce the difference between the transferred instance subset and the target subject. Finally, the selected subset of instances is added to the training set of the target subject, and the extended data is fed into the random forest to improve the performance of the method. Parkinson's telemonitoring dataset is used to evaluate the feasibility and effectiveness. Experiment results show that the PSGT has better performance in both prediction error and stability over compared methods. 发声困难是帕金森病 (PD) 的早期症状之一。大多数现有方法使用特征选择方法来为所有 PD 患者找到最佳的语音特征子集。很少有人考虑患者之间的异质性，这意味着需要为不同患者提供特定的预测模型。然而，构建具体模型面临着样本量较小的挑战，这使得其缺乏泛化能力。实例传输是解决这个问题的有效方法。因此，本文提出了一种基于患者特定游戏的转移（PSGT）方法来预测PD严重程度。首先，采用选择机制从源域中选择与目标患者疾病趋势相似的PD患者，大大降低了负迁移的风险。然后，通过Shapley值公平地评估转移的受试者及其实例对目标受试者的疾病估计的贡献，这提高了该方法的可解释性。接下来，确定转移主体中有效实例的比例，将贡献度较高的实例进行转移，以进一步缩小转移实例子集与目标主体之间的差异。最后，将选定的实例子集添加到目标对象的训练集中，并将扩展数据馈入随机森林以提高方法的性能。使用帕金森远程监测数据集来评估可行性和有效性。实验结果表明，PSGT 在预测误差和稳定性方面均优于对比方法。 本文提出了一种基于患者特异性的游戏化迁移方法（PSGT），用于帕金森病严重程度的预测。 Zaifa Xue,Huibin Lu,Tao Zhang,Max A. Little cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Guozhong Li,Byron Choi,Jianliang Xu,Sourav S Bhowmick,Daphne Ngar-yin Mah,Grace Lai-Hung Wong
title: AUTOSHAPE: An Autoencoder-Shapelet Approach for Time Series Clustering
title_zh: AUTOSHAPE：用于时间序列聚类的自动编码器 Shapelet 方法
abstract: Time series shapelets are discriminative subsequences that have been recently found effective for time series clustering (TSC). The shapelets are convenient for interpreting the clusters. Thus, the main challenge for TSC is to discover high-quality variable-length shapelets to discriminate different clusters. In this paper, we propose a novel autoencoder-shapelet approach (AUTOSHAPE), which is the first study to take the advantage of both autoencoder and shapelet for determining shapelets in an unsupervised manner. An autoencoder is specially designed to learn high-quality shapelets. More specifically, for guiding the latent representation learning, we employ the latest self-supervised loss to learn the unified embeddings for variable-length shapelet candidates (time series subsequences) of different variables, and propose the diversity loss to select the discriminating embeddings in the unified space. We introduce the reconstruction loss to recover shapelets in the original time series space for clustering. Finally, we adopt Davies Bouldin index (DBI) to inform AUTOSHAPE of the clustering performance during learning. We present extensive experiments on AUTOSHAPE. To evaluate the clustering performance on univariate time series (UTS), we compare AUTOSHAPE with 15 representative methods using UCR archive datasets. To study the performance of multivariate time series (MTS), we evaluate AUTOSHAPE on 30 UEA archive datasets with 5 competitive methods. The results validate that AUTOSHAPE is the best among all the methods compared. We interpret clusters with shapelets, and can obtain interesting intuitions about clusters in two UTS case studies and one MTS case study, respectively.
summary: Time series shapelets are discriminative subsequences that have been recently found effective for time series clustering (TSC). The shapelets are convenient for interpreting the clusters. Thus, the main challenge for TSC is to discover high-quality variable-length shapelets to discriminate different clusters. In this paper, we propose a novel autoencoder-shapelet approach (AUTOSHAPE), which is the first study to take the advantage of both autoencoder and shapelet for determining shapelets in an unsupervised manner. An autoencoder is specially designed to learn high-quality shapelets. More specifically, for guiding the latent representation learning, we employ the latest self-supervised loss to learn the unified embeddings for variable-length shapelet candidates (time series subsequences) of different variables, and propose the diversity loss to select the discriminating embeddings in the unified space. We introduce the reconstruction loss to recover shapelets in the original time series space for clustering. Finally, we adopt Davies Bouldin index (DBI) to inform AUTOSHAPE of the clustering performance during learning. We present extensive experiments on AUTOSHAPE. To evaluate the clustering performance on univariate time series (UTS), we compare AUTOSHAPE with 15 representative methods using UCR archive datasets. To study the performance of multivariate time series (MTS), we evaluate AUTOSHAPE on 30 UEA archive datasets with 5 competitive methods. The results validate that AUTOSHAPE is the best among all the methods compared. We interpret clusters with shapelets, and can obtain interesting intuitions about clusters in two UTS case studies and one MTS case study, respectively.
abstract_zh: 时间序列 shapelet 是最近发现对时间序列聚类 (TSC) 有效的判别子序列。 shapelet 可以方便地解释簇。因此，TSC 的主要挑战是发现高质量的可变长度 shapelet 来区分不同的簇。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的自动编码器-shapelet 方法（AUTOSHAPE），这是第一个利用自动编码器和 shapelet 的优点以无监督方式确定 shapelet 的研究。自动编码器是专门为学习高质量 shapelet 而设计的。更具体地说，为了指导潜在表示学习，我们采用最新的自监督损失来学习不同变量的可变长度 shapelet 候选（时间序列子序列）的统一嵌入，并提出多样性损失来选择统一空间中的判别嵌入。我们引入重建损失来恢复原始时间序列空间中的 shapelet 以进行聚类。最后，我们采用 Davies Bouldin 指数（DBI）来告知 AUTOSHAPE 学习过程中的聚类性能。我们对 AUTOSHAPE 进行了广泛的实验。为了评估单变量时间序列 (UTS) 上的聚类性能，我们使用 UCR 存档数据集将 AUTOSHAPE 与 15 种代表性方法进行比较。为了研究多元时间序列 (MTS) 的性能，我们使用 5 种竞争方法在 30 个 UEA 存档数据集上评估 AUTOSHAPE。结果验证了 AUTOSHAPE 是所有比较方法中最好的。我们用 shapelet 解释簇，并且可以分别在两个 UTS 案例研究和一个 MTS 案例研究中获得关于簇的有趣直觉。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合自编码器和形状子序列（shapelet）的新型方法AUTOSHAPE，用于提升时间序列聚类的性能与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统时间序列聚类方法难以高效发现高质量的可变长度形状子序列（shapelet），而shapelet对聚类结果的解释性至关重要，因此需改进shapelet的挖掘方式。
AI.method: 设计自编码器学习高质量shapelet，结合自监督损失生成统一嵌入，引入多样性损失筛选判别性嵌入，并通过重建损失恢复原始时序空间的shapelet，利用DBI指数指导聚类性能优化。
AI.result: 在UCR和UEA数据集上，AUTOSHAPE分别超越15种和5种对比方法，且通过案例研究验证了其聚类结果的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: AUTOSHAPE通过融合自编码器与shapelet机制，在时间序列聚类任务中实现了优越的性能与可解释性，为相关研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jean Lahoud,Jiale Cao,Fahad Shahbaz Khan,Hisham Cholakkal,Rao Muhammad Anwer,Salman Khan,Ming-Hsuan Yang
title: 3D Vision with Transformers: A Survey
title_zh: 变形金刚 3D 视觉：一项调查
abstract: The success of the transformer architecture in natural language processing has recently triggered attention in the computer vision field. The transformer has been used as a replacement for the widely used convolution operators, due to its ability to learn long-range dependencies. This replacement was proven to be successful in numerous tasks, in which several state-of-the-art methods rely on transformers for better learning. In computer vision, the 3D field has also witnessed an increase in employing the transformer for 3D convolution neural networks and multi-layer perceptron networks. Although a number of surveys have focused on transformers in vision in general, 3D vision requires special attention due to the difference in data representation and processing when compared to 2D vision. In this work, we present a systematic and thorough review of more than 100 transformers methods for different 3D vision tasks, including classification, segmentation, detection, completion, pose estimation, and others. We discuss transformer design in 3D vision, which allows it to process data with various 3D representations. For each application, we highlight key properties and contributions of proposed transformer-based methods. To assess the competitiveness of these methods, we compare their performance to common non-transformer methods on 12 3D benchmarks. We conclude the survey by discussing different open directions and challenges for transformers in 3D vision. In addition to the presented papers, we aim to frequently update the latest relevant papers along with their corresponding implementations at: https://github.com/lahoud/3d-vision-transformers.
summary: The success of the transformer architecture in natural language processing has recently triggered attention in the computer vision field. The transformer has been used as a replacement for the widely used convolution operators, due to its ability to learn long-range dependencies. This replacement was proven to be successful in numerous tasks, in which several state-of-the-art methods rely on transformers for better learning. In computer vision, the 3D field has also witnessed an increase in employing the transformer for 3D convolution neural networks and multi-layer perceptron networks. Although a number of surveys have focused on transformers in vision in general, 3D vision requires special attention due to the difference in data representation and processing when compared to 2D vision. In this work, we present a systematic and thorough review of more than 100 transformers methods for different 3D vision tasks, including classification, segmentation, detection, completion, pose estimation, and others. We discuss transformer design in 3D vision, which allows it to process data with various 3D representations. For each application, we highlight key properties and contributions of proposed transformer-based methods. To assess the competitiveness of these methods, we compare their performance to common non-transformer methods on 12 3D benchmarks. We conclude the survey by discussing different open directions and challenges for transformers in 3D vision. In addition to the presented papers, we aim to frequently update the latest relevant papers along with their corresponding implementations at: https://github.com/lahoud/3d-vision-transformers.
abstract_zh: Transformer架构在自然语言处理中的成功最近引发了计算机视觉领域的关注。由于其学习远程依赖性的能力，变压器已被用作广泛使用的卷积算子的替代品。事实证明，这种替代方法在许多任务中都是成功的，其中几种最先进的方法依赖于 Transformer 来实现更好的学习。在计算机视觉领域，3D 领域也见证了 3D 卷积神经网络和多层感知器网络中 Transformer 的使用有所增加。尽管许多调查总体上都集中在视觉变换器上，但由于与 2D 视觉相比，3D 视觉在数据表示和处理方面存在差异，因此需要特别关注。在这项工作中，我们对用于不同 3D 视觉任务的 100 多种 Transformer 方法进行了系统而彻底的回顾，包括分类、分割、检测、补全、姿态估计等。我们讨论 3D 视觉中的变压器设计，使其能够处理具有各种 3D 表示形式的数据。对于每个应用，我们重点介绍了所提出的基于变压器的方法的关键属性和贡献。为了评估这些方法的竞争力，我们在 12 个 3D 基准上将它们的性能与常见的非 Transformer 方法进行了比较。我们通过讨论 3D 视觉中 Transformer 的不同开放方向和挑战来结束本次调查。除了所提出的论文之外，我们的目标是经常更新最新的相关论文及其相应的实现，网址为：https://github.com/lahoud/3d-vision-transformers。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了超过100种用于3D视觉任务（如分类、分割、检测等）的Transformer方法，分析其设计特点并评估性能。
AI.motivation: Transformer在2D视觉中取得成功，但3D视觉因数据表示和处理差异需专门研究，现有综述未充分覆盖该领域。
AI.method: 按任务分类梳理Transformer方法，讨论其处理多种3D数据表示的设计，对比12个3D基准测试中Transformer与非Transformer方法的性能。
AI.result: 总结了各方法的关键特性与贡献，通过实验验证Transformer在3D任务中的竞争力，并指出当前方法的优缺点。
AI.conclusion: 提出3D视觉中Transformer的未来挑战与研究方向，并持续更新最新相关论文及实现代码。

search_text: 3D Vision with Transformers: A Survey 变形金刚 3D 视觉：一项调查 The success of the transformer architecture in natural language processing has recently triggered attention in the computer vision field. The transformer has been used as a replacement for the widely used convolution operators, due to its ability to learn long-range dependencies. This replacement was proven to be successful in numerous tasks, in which several state-of-the-art methods rely on transformers for better learning. In computer vision, the 3D field has also witnessed an increase in employing the transformer for 3D convolution neural networks and multi-layer perceptron networks. Although a number of surveys have focused on transformers in vision in general, 3D vision requires special attention due to the difference in data representation and processing when compared to 2D vision. In this work, we present a systematic and thorough review of more than 100 transformers methods for different 3D vision tasks, including classification, segmentation, detection, completion, pose estimation, and others. We discuss transformer design in 3D vision, which allows it to process data with various 3D representations. For each application, we highlight key properties and contributions of proposed transformer-based methods. To assess the competitiveness of these methods, we compare their performance to common non-transformer methods on 12 3D benchmarks. We conclude the survey by discussing different open directions and challenges for transformers in 3D vision. In addition to the presented papers, we aim to frequently update the latest relevant papers along with their corresponding implementations at: https://github.com/lahoud/3d-vision-transformers. Transformer架构在自然语言处理中的成功最近引发了计算机视觉领域的关注。由于其学习远程依赖性的能力，变压器已被用作广泛使用的卷积算子的替代品。事实证明，这种替代方法在许多任务中都是成功的，其中几种最先进的方法依赖于 Transformer 来实现更好的学习。在计算机视觉领域，3D 领域也见证了 3D 卷积神经网络和多层感知器网络中 Transformer 的使用有所增加。尽管许多调查总体上都集中在视觉变换器上，但由于与 2D 视觉相比，3D 视觉在数据表示和处理方面存在差异，因此需要特别关注。在这项工作中，我们对用于不同 3D 视觉任务的 100 多种 Transformer 方法进行了系统而彻底的回顾，包括分类、分割、检测、补全、姿态估计等。我们讨论 3D 视觉中的变压器设计，使其能够处理具有各种 3D 表示形式的数据。对于每个应用，我们重点介绍了所提出的基于变压器的方法的关键属性和贡献。为了评估这些方法的竞争力，我们在 12 个 3D 基准上将它们的性能与常见的非 Transformer 方法进行了比较。我们通过讨论 3D 视觉中 Transformer 的不同开放方向和挑战来结束本次调查。除了所提出的论文之外，我们的目标是经常更新最新的相关论文及其相应的实现，网址为：https://github.com/lahoud/3d-vision-transformers。 本文系统综述了超过100种用于3D视觉任务（如分类、分割、检测等）的Transformer方法，分析其设计特点并评估性能。 Jean Lahoud,Jiale Cao,Fahad Shahbaz Khan,Hisham Cholakkal,Rao Muhammad Anwer,Salman Khan,Ming-Hsuan Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Samir Agarwala,Linyi Jin,Chris Rockwell,David F. Fouhey
title: PlaneFormers: From Sparse View Planes to 3D Reconstruction
title_zh: PlaneFormers：从稀疏视图平面到 3D 重建
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022
abstract: We present an approach for the planar surface reconstruction of a scene from images with limited overlap. This reconstruction task is challenging since it requires jointly reasoning about single image 3D reconstruction, correspondence between images, and the relative camera pose between images. Past work has proposed optimization-based approaches. We introduce a simpler approach, the PlaneFormer, that uses a transformer applied to 3D-aware plane tokens to perform 3D reasoning. Our experiments show that our approach is substantially more effective than prior work, and that several 3D-specific design decisions are crucial for its success.
summary: We present an approach for the planar surface reconstruction of a scene from images with limited overlap. This reconstruction task is challenging since it requires jointly reasoning about single image 3D reconstruction, correspondence between images, and the relative camera pose between images. Past work has proposed optimization-based approaches. We introduce a simpler approach, the PlaneFormer, that uses a transformer applied to 3D-aware plane tokens to perform 3D reasoning. Our experiments show that our approach is substantially more effective than prior work, and that several 3D-specific design decisions are crucial for its success.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种从有限重叠的图像中重建场景平面的方法。此重建任务具有挑战性，因为它需要联合推理单图像 3D 重建、图像之间的对应关系以及图像之间的相对相机姿态。过去的工作提出了基于优化的方法。我们引入了一种更简单的方法 PlaneFormer，它使用应用于 3D 感知平面令牌的转换器来执行 3D 推理。我们的实验表明，我们的方法比之前的工作更加有效，并且一些特定于 3D 的设计决策对其成功至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从有限重叠图像中进行三维平面表面重建的新方法。
AI.motivation: 传统优化方法在处理稀疏视角下的三维重建任务时存在复杂性和效率问题，需联合解决单图重建、图像匹配与相机姿态估计等挑战。
AI.method: 引入PlaneFormer模型，通过变压器网络处理三维感知的平面标记，实现端到端的三维推理与重建。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著优于现有技术，且三维特定设计（如平面标记建模）对性能提升至关重要。
AI.conclusion: PlaneFormer为稀疏视角下的三维重建提供了更高效解决方案，验证了三维感知建模在复杂场景中的有效性。

authors_text: Reza Pourreza,Hoang Le,Amir Said,Guillaume Sautiere,Auke Wiggers
title: Boosting neural video codecs by exploiting hierarchical redundancy
title_zh: 通过利用分层冗余来增强神经视频编解码器
comment: WACV 2023
comments: WACV 2023
abstract: In video compression, coding efficiency is improved by reusing pixels from previously decoded frames via motion and residual compensation. We define two levels of hierarchical redundancy in video frames: 1) first-order: redundancy in pixel space, i.e., similarities in pixel values across neighboring frames, which is effectively captured using motion and residual compensation, 2) second-order: redundancy in motion and residual maps due to smooth motion in natural videos. While most of the existing neural video coding literature addresses first-order redundancy, we tackle the problem of capturing second-order redundancy in neural video codecs via predictors. We introduce generic motion and residual predictors that learn to extrapolate from previously decoded data. These predictors are lightweight, and can be employed with most neural video codecs in order to improve their rate-distortion performance. Moreover, while RGB is the dominant colorspace in neural video coding literature, we introduce general modifications for neural video codecs to embrace the YUV420 colorspace and report YUV420 results. Our experiments show that using our predictors with a well-known neural video codec leads to 38% and 34% bitrate savings in RGB and YUV420 colorspaces measured on the UVG dataset.
summary: In video compression, coding efficiency is improved by reusing pixels from previously decoded frames via motion and residual compensation. We define two levels of hierarchical redundancy in video frames: 1) first-order: redundancy in pixel space, i.e., similarities in pixel values across neighboring frames, which is effectively captured using motion and residual compensation, 2) second-order: redundancy in motion and residual maps due to smooth motion in natural videos. While most of the existing neural video coding literature addresses first-order redundancy, we tackle the problem of capturing second-order redundancy in neural video codecs via predictors. We introduce generic motion and residual predictors that learn to extrapolate from previously decoded data. These predictors are lightweight, and can be employed with most neural video codecs in order to improve their rate-distortion performance. Moreover, while RGB is the dominant colorspace in neural video coding literature, we introduce general modifications for neural video codecs to embrace the YUV420 colorspace and report YUV420 results. Our experiments show that using our predictors with a well-known neural video codec leads to 38% and 34% bitrate savings in RGB and YUV420 colorspaces measured on the UVG dataset.
abstract_zh: In video compression, coding efficiency is improved by reusing pixels from previously decoded frames via motion and residual compensation.我们在视频帧中定义了两个级别的层次冗余：1）一阶：像素空间中的冗余，即相邻帧之间像素值的相似性，这是使用运动和残差补偿有效捕获的，2）二阶：由于自然视频中的平滑运动而导致的运动和残差图中的冗余。虽然大多数现有的神经视频编码文献都解决了一阶冗余，但我们通过预测器解决了在神经视频编解码器中捕获二阶冗余的问题。 We introduce generic motion and residual predictors that learn to extrapolate from previously decoded data. These predictors are lightweight, and can be employed with most neural video codecs in order to improve their rate-distortion performance.此外，虽然 RGB 是神经视频编码文献中的主要色彩空间，但我们介绍了神经视频编解码器的一般修改，以包含 YUV420 色彩空间并报告 YUV420 结果。我们的实验表明，将我们的预测器与众所周知的神经视频编解码器结合使用，可以在 UVG 数据集上测量的 RGB 和 YUV420 色彩空间中实现 38% 和 34% 的比特率节省。

AI.tldr: 本文通过利用视频帧中的层次化冗余，提出改进神经视频编码方法以提升压缩效率。
AI.motivation: 现有神经视频编码主要解决像素空间的冗余（第一层冗余），但未充分挖掘运动和残差图中的平滑运动特性（第二层冗余），导致压缩效率受限。
AI.method: 设计轻量级运动和残差预测器，从已解码数据中学习外推信息，并适配YUV420颜色空间以提升通用性。
AI.result: 在UVG数据集上，使用预测器的RGB和YUV420颜色空间比特率分别降低38%和34%。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入第二层冗余预测和颜色空间优化，显著提升了神经视频编码的率失真性能，为高效视频压缩提供了新思路。

authors_text: Longzhao Huang,Yujie Li,Xu Wang,Haoyu Wang,Ahmed Bouridane,Ahmad Chaddad
title: Gaze Estimation Approach Using Deep Differential Residual Network
title_zh: 使用深度差分残差网络的注视估计方法
abstract: Gaze estimation, which is a method to determine where a person is looking at given the person's full face, is a valuable clue for understanding human intention. Similarly to other domains of computer vision, deep learning (DL) methods have gained recognition in the gaze estimation domain. However, there are still gaze calibration problems in the gaze estimation domain, thus preventing existing methods from further improving the performances. An effective solution is to directly predict the difference information of two human eyes, such as the differential network (Diff-Nn). However, this solution results in a loss of accuracy when using only one inference image. We propose a differential residual model (DRNet) combined with a new loss function to make use of the difference information of two eye images. We treat the difference information as auxiliary information. We assess the proposed model (DRNet) mainly using two public datasets (1) MpiiGaze and (2) Eyediap. Considering only the eye features, DRNet outperforms the state-of-the-art gaze estimation methods with $angular-error$ of 4.57 and 6.14 using MpiiGaze and Eyediap datasets, respectively. Furthermore, the experimental results also demonstrate that DRNet is extremely robust to noise images.
summary: Gaze estimation, which is a method to determine where a person is looking at given the person's full face, is a valuable clue for understanding human intention. Similarly to other domains of computer vision, deep learning (DL) methods have gained recognition in the gaze estimation domain. However, there are still gaze calibration problems in the gaze estimation domain, thus preventing existing methods from further improving the performances. An effective solution is to directly predict the difference information of two human eyes, such as the differential network (Diff-Nn). However, this solution results in a loss of accuracy when using only one inference image. We propose a differential residual model (DRNet) combined with a new loss function to make use of the difference information of two eye images. We treat the difference information as auxiliary information. We assess the proposed model (DRNet) mainly using two public datasets (1) MpiiGaze and (2) Eyediap. Considering only the eye features, DRNet outperforms the state-of-the-art gaze estimation methods with $angular-error$ of 4.57 and 6.14 using MpiiGaze and Eyediap datasets, respectively. Furthermore, the experimental results also demonstrate that DRNet is extremely robust to noise images.
abstract_zh: 凝视估计是一种在给定人的全脸的情况下确定一个人正在看哪里的方法，是理解人类意图的宝贵线索。与计算机视觉的其他领域类似，深度学习（DL）方法在注视估计领域获得了认可。然而，注视估计领域仍然存在注视校准问题，从而阻碍了现有方法进一步提高性能。一种有效的解决方案是直接预测两眼的差异信息，例如差分网络（Diff-Nn）。然而，当仅使用一张推理图像时，该解决方案会导致准确性损失。我们提出了一种结合新损失函数的差分残差模型（DRNet），以利用两眼图像的差异信息。我们将差异信息视为辅助信息。我们主要使用两个公共数据集（1）MpiiGaze 和（2）Eyediap 来评估所提出的模型（DRNet）。仅考虑眼睛特征，DRNet 的性能优于最先进的注视估计方法，使用 MpiiGaze 和 Eyediap 数据集的角度误差分别为 4.57 和 6.14。此外，实验结果还表明 DRNet 对噪声图像具有极强的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合差分残差网络（DRNet）和新损失函数的注视估计方法，以提高估计精度和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有注视估计方法存在校准问题，且仅使用单张图像的差分网络（Diff-Nn）会导致精度下降，需改进差分信息利用方式。
AI.method: 设计差分残差模型（DRNet），结合新损失函数，将双眼图像差分信息作为辅助信息进行特征学习。
AI.result: 在MpiiGaze和Eyediap数据集上，DRNet的角误差分别为4.57和6.14，优于现有方法，并表现出对噪声图像的强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DRNet通过有效利用双眼差分信息和优化损失函数，显著提升了注视估计的精度与稳定性，为领域内问题提供了有效解决方案。
