search_text: Gaze Estimation Approach Using Deep Differential Residual Network 使用深度差分残差网络的注视估计方法 Gaze estimation, which is a method to determine where a person is looking at given the person's full face, is a valuable clue for understanding human intention. Similarly to other domains of computer vision, deep learning (DL) methods have gained recognition in the gaze estimation domain. However, there are still gaze calibration problems in the gaze estimation domain, thus preventing existing methods from further improving the performances. An effective solution is to directly predict the difference information of two human eyes, such as the differential network (Diff-Nn). However, this solution results in a loss of accuracy when using only one inference image. We propose a differential residual model (DRNet) combined with a new loss function to make use of the difference information of two eye images. We treat the difference information as auxiliary information. We assess the proposed model (DRNet) mainly using two public datasets (1) MpiiGaze and (2) Eyediap. Considering only the eye features, DRNet outperforms the state-of-the-art gaze estimation methods with $angular-error$ of 4.57 and 6.14 using MpiiGaze and Eyediap datasets, respectively. Furthermore, the experimental results also demonstrate that DRNet is extremely robust to noise images. 凝视估计是一种在给定人的全脸的情况下确定一个人正在看哪里的方法，是理解人类意图的宝贵线索。与计算机视觉的其他领域类似，深度学习（DL）方法在注视估计领域获得了认可。然而，注视估计领域仍然存在注视校准问题，从而阻碍了现有方法进一步提高性能。一种有效的解决方案是直接预测两眼的差异信息，例如差分网络（Diff-Nn）。然而，当仅使用一张推理图像时，该解决方案会导致准确性损失。我们提出了一种结合新损失函数的差分残差模型（DRNet），以利用两眼图像的差异信息。我们将差异信息视为辅助信息。我们主要使用两个公共数据集（1）MpiiGaze 和（2）Eyediap 来评估所提出的模型（DRNet）。仅考虑眼睛特征，DRNet 的性能优于最先进的注视估计方法，使用 MpiiGaze 和 Eyediap 数据集的角度误差分别为 4.57 和 6.14。此外，实验结果还表明 DRNet 对噪声图像具有极强的鲁棒性。 本文提出了一种结合差分残差网络（DRNet）和新损失函数的注视估计方法，以提高估计精度和鲁棒性。 Longzhao Huang,Yujie Li,Xu Wang,Haoyu Wang,Ahmed Bouridane,Ahmad Chaddad cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.GR,stat.AP

authors_text: S. Travis Waller,Moeid Qurashi,Anna Sotnikova,Lavina Karva,Sai Chand
title: Analyzing and modeling network travel patterns during the Ukraine invasion using crowd-sourced pervasive traffic data
title_zh: 使用众包的普遍流量数据对乌克兰入侵期间的网络出行模式进行分析和建模
abstract: In 2022, Ukraine is suffering an invasion which has resulted in acute impacts playing out over time and geography. This paper examines the impact of the ongoing disruption on traffic behavior using analytics as well as zonal-based network models. The methodology is a data-driven approach that utilizes obtained travel-time conditions within an evolutionary algorithm framework which infers origin-destination demand values in an automated process based on traffic assignment. Because of the automation of the implementation, numerous daily models can be approximated for multiple cities. The novelty of this paper versus the previously published core methodology includes an analysis to ensure the obtained data is appropriate since some data sources were disabled due to the ongoing disruption. Further, novelty includes a direct linkage of the analysis to the timeline of disruptions to examine the interaction in a new way. Finally, specific network metrics are identified which are particularly suited for conceptualizing the impact of conflict disruptions on traffic network conditions. The ultimate aim is to establish processes, concepts and analysis to advance the broader activity of rapidly quantifying the traffic impacts of conflict scenarios.
summary: In 2022, Ukraine is suffering an invasion which has resulted in acute impacts playing out over time and geography. This paper examines the impact of the ongoing disruption on traffic behavior using analytics as well as zonal-based network models. The methodology is a data-driven approach that utilizes obtained travel-time conditions within an evolutionary algorithm framework which infers origin-destination demand values in an automated process based on traffic assignment. Because of the automation of the implementation, numerous daily models can be approximated for multiple cities. The novelty of this paper versus the previously published core methodology includes an analysis to ensure the obtained data is appropriate since some data sources were disabled due to the ongoing disruption. Further, novelty includes a direct linkage of the analysis to the timeline of disruptions to examine the interaction in a new way. Finally, specific network metrics are identified which are particularly suited for conceptualizing the impact of conflict disruptions on traffic network conditions. The ultimate aim is to establish processes, concepts and analysis to advance the broader activity of rapidly quantifying the traffic impacts of conflict scenarios.
abstract_zh: 2022 年，乌克兰遭受入侵，随着时间的推移和地理的变化，造成了严重的影响。本文使用分析和基于区域的网络模型研究了持续中断对交通行为的影响。该方法是一种数据驱动的方法，利用进化算法框架内获得的旅行时间条件，在基于交通分配的自动化过程中推断出发地-目的地需求值。由于实施的自动化，可以对多个城市进行大量日常模型的近似。与之前发布的核心方法相比，本文的新颖之处在于进行了分析，以确保所获得的数据是适当的，因为一些数据源由于持续的中断而被禁用。此外，新颖性包括将分析与中断时间线直接联系起来，以新的方式检查相互作用。最后，确定了特别适合概念化冲突中断对交通网络状况的影响的特定网络指标。最终目标是建立流程、概念和分析，以推进快速量化冲突场景的交通影响的更广泛活动。

AI.tldr: 本文利用众包交通数据，分析并建模乌克兰入侵期间的网络出行模式，以量化冲突对交通网络的影响。
AI.motivation: 乌克兰入侵导致交通网络严重中断，需快速量化冲突对交通的影响以支持应急响应和规划。
AI.method: 采用数据驱动方法，结合进化算法框架和分区网络模型，自动推断出行需求，并验证数据可靠性及与冲突时间线的关联性。
AI.result: 建立了多城市每日交通模型，识别出反映冲突影响的关键网络指标，验证了方法在数据受限环境下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为快速量化冲突场景下的交通影响提供了可推广的流程和分析框架，有助于提升危机管理能力。

authors_text: Sungpil Kho,Pilhyeon Lee,Wonyoung Lee,Minsong Ki,Hyeran Byun
title: Exploiting Shape Cues for Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 利用形状线索进行弱监督语义分割
comment: Accepted by Pattern Recognition. The first two authors contributed equally
comments: Accepted by Pattern Recognition. The first two authors contributed equally
abstract: Weakly supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS) aims to produce pixel-wise class predictions with only image-level labels for training. To this end, previous methods adopt the common pipeline: they generate pseudo masks from class activation maps (CAMs) and use such masks to supervise segmentation networks. However, it is challenging to derive comprehensive pseudo masks that cover the whole extent of objects due to the local property of CAMs, i.e., they tend to focus solely on small discriminative object parts. In this paper, we associate the locality of CAMs with the texture-biased property of convolutional neural networks (CNNs). Accordingly, we propose to exploit shape information to supplement the texture-biased CNN features, thereby encouraging mask predictions to be not only comprehensive but also well-aligned with object boundaries. We further refine the predictions in an online fashion with a novel refinement method that takes into account both the class and the color affinities, in order to generate reliable pseudo masks to supervise the model. Importantly, our model is end-to-end trained within a single-stage framework and therefore efficient in terms of the training cost. Through extensive experiments on PASCAL VOC 2012, we validate the effectiveness of our method in producing precise and shape-aligned segmentation results. Specifically, our model surpasses the existing state-of-the-art single-stage approaches by large margins. What is more, it also achieves a new state-of-the-art performance over multi-stage approaches, when adopted in a simple two-stage pipeline without bells and whistles.
summary: Weakly supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS) aims to produce pixel-wise class predictions with only image-level labels for training. To this end, previous methods adopt the common pipeline: they generate pseudo masks from class activation maps (CAMs) and use such masks to supervise segmentation networks. However, it is challenging to derive comprehensive pseudo masks that cover the whole extent of objects due to the local property of CAMs, i.e., they tend to focus solely on small discriminative object parts. In this paper, we associate the locality of CAMs with the texture-biased property of convolutional neural networks (CNNs). Accordingly, we propose to exploit shape information to supplement the texture-biased CNN features, thereby encouraging mask predictions to be not only comprehensive but also well-aligned with object boundaries. We further refine the predictions in an online fashion with a novel refinement method that takes into account both the class and the color affinities, in order to generate reliable pseudo masks to supervise the model. Importantly, our model is end-to-end trained within a single-stage framework and therefore efficient in terms of the training cost. Through extensive experiments on PASCAL VOC 2012, we validate the effectiveness of our method in producing precise and shape-aligned segmentation results. Specifically, our model surpasses the existing state-of-the-art single-stage approaches by large margins. What is more, it also achieves a new state-of-the-art performance over multi-stage approaches, when adopted in a simple two-stage pipeline without bells and whistles.
abstract_zh: 弱监督语义分割（WSSS）旨在仅使用用于训练的图像级标签来生成像素级别的类别预测。为此，以前的方法采用通用管道：它们从类激活图（CAM）生成伪掩码，并使用此类掩码来监督分割网络。然而，由于 CAM 的局部属性，即它们往往只关注小的有区别的对象部分，导出覆盖整个对象范围的综合伪掩模具有挑战性。在本文中，我们将 CAM 的局部性与卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的纹理偏置特性联系起来。因此，我们建议利用形状信息来补充纹理偏置的 CNN 特征，从而鼓励掩模预测不仅全面，而且与对象边界良好对齐。我们使用一种新颖的细化方法以在线方式进一步细化预测，该方法考虑了类别和颜色亲和力，以便生成可靠的伪掩模来监督模型。重要的是，我们的模型是在单阶段框架内进行端到端训练的，因此在训练成本方面是高效的。通过在 PASCAL VOC 2012 上进行大量实验，我们验证了我们的方法在产生精确且形状对齐的分割结果方面的有效性。具体来说，我们的模型大幅超越了现有最先进的单阶段方法。更重要的是，当在没有任何附加功能的简单两级管道中采用时，它还比多级方法实现了新的最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用形状线索的弱监督语义分割方法，通过结合类别激活图的局部性和卷积神经网络的纹理偏向性，生成更全面且对齐物体边界的伪掩码。
AI.motivation: 现有方法生成的伪掩码因类别激活图（CAMs）的局部性难以覆盖完整物体区域，导致分割结果不全面，需补充形状信息以提升掩码质量。
AI.method: 提出结合形状信息与纹理特征的单阶段框架，通过在线细化方法同时考虑类别和颜色亲和力，生成可靠伪掩码并端到端训练。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC 2012数据集上，该方法在单阶段和多阶段框架下均达到新状态-of-the-art性能，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合形状线索与纹理特征，所提方法有效解决了弱监督分割中伪掩码不全面的问题，且具有高效训练优势。

motivation: 现有方法生成的伪掩码因类别激活图（CAMs）的局部性难以覆盖完整物体区域，导致分割结果不全面，需补充形状信息以提升掩码质量。
method: 提出结合形状信息与纹理特征的单阶段框架，通过在线细化方法同时考虑类别和颜色亲和力，生成可靠伪掩码并端到端训练。
result: 在PASCAL VOC 2012数据集上，该方法在单阶段和多阶段框架下均达到新状态-of-the-art性能，显著优于现有方法。
conclusion: 通过整合形状线索与纹理特征，所提方法有效解决了弱监督分割中伪掩码不全面的问题，且具有高效训练优势。
search_text: Exploiting Shape Cues for Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation 利用形状线索进行弱监督语义分割 Weakly supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS) aims to produce pixel-wise class predictions with only image-level labels for training. To this end, previous methods adopt the common pipeline: they generate pseudo masks from class activation maps (CAMs) and use such masks to supervise segmentation networks. However, it is challenging to derive comprehensive pseudo masks that cover the whole extent of objects due to the local property of CAMs, i.e., they tend to focus solely on small discriminative object parts. In this paper, we associate the locality of CAMs with the texture-biased property of convolutional neural networks (CNNs). Accordingly, we propose to exploit shape information to supplement the texture-biased CNN features, thereby encouraging mask predictions to be not only comprehensive but also well-aligned with object boundaries. We further refine the predictions in an online fashion with a novel refinement method that takes into account both the class and the color affinities, in order to generate reliable pseudo masks to supervise the model. Importantly, our model is end-to-end trained within a single-stage framework and therefore efficient in terms of the training cost. Through extensive experiments on PASCAL VOC 2012, we validate the effectiveness of our method in producing precise and shape-aligned segmentation results. Specifically, our model surpasses the existing state-of-the-art single-stage approaches by large margins. What is more, it also achieves a new state-of-the-art performance over multi-stage approaches, when adopted in a simple two-stage pipeline without bells and whistles. 弱监督语义分割（WSSS）旨在仅使用用于训练的图像级标签来生成像素级别的类别预测。为此，以前的方法采用通用管道：它们从类激活图（CAM）生成伪掩码，并使用此类掩码来监督分割网络。然而，由于 CAM 的局部属性，即它们往往只关注小的有区别的对象部分，导出覆盖整个对象范围的综合伪掩模具有挑战性。在本文中，我们将 CAM 的局部性与卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的纹理偏置特性联系起来。因此，我们建议利用形状信息来补充纹理偏置的 CNN 特征，从而鼓励掩模预测不仅全面，而且与对象边界良好对齐。我们使用一种新颖的细化方法以在线方式进一步细化预测，该方法考虑了类别和颜色亲和力，以便生成可靠的伪掩模来监督模型。重要的是，我们的模型是在单阶段框架内进行端到端训练的，因此在训练成本方面是高效的。通过在 PASCAL VOC 2012 上进行大量实验，我们验证了我们的方法在产生精确且形状对齐的分割结果方面的有效性。具体来说，我们的模型大幅超越了现有最先进的单阶段方法。更重要的是，当在没有任何附加功能的简单两级管道中采用时，它还比多级方法实现了新的最先进的性能。 本文提出一种利用形状线索的弱监督语义分割方法，通过结合类别激活图的局部性和卷积神经网络的纹理偏向性，生成更全面且对齐物体边界的伪掩码。 Sungpil Kho,Pilhyeon Lee,Wonyoung Lee,Minsong Ki,Hyeran Byun cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Atreyee Saha,Salman S Khan,Sagar Sehrawat,Sanjana S Prabhu,Shanti Bhattacharya,Kaushik Mitra
title: LWGNet: Learned Wirtinger Gradients for Fourier Ptychographic Phase Retrieval
title_zh: LWGNet：用于傅里叶叠图相位检索的学习 Wirtinger 梯度
abstract: Fourier Ptychographic Microscopy (FPM) is an imaging procedure that overcomes the traditional limit on Space-Bandwidth Product (SBP) of conventional microscopes through computational means. It utilizes multiple images captured using a low numerical aperture (NA) objective and enables high-resolution phase imaging through frequency domain stitching. Existing FPM reconstruction methods can be broadly categorized into two approaches: iterative optimization based methods, which are based on the physics of the forward imaging model, and data-driven methods which commonly employ a feed-forward deep learning framework. We propose a hybrid model-driven residual network that combines the knowledge of the forward imaging system with a deep data-driven network. Our proposed architecture, LWGNet, unrolls traditional Wirtinger flow optimization algorithm into a novel neural network design that enhances the gradient images through complex convolutional blocks. Unlike other conventional unrolling techniques, LWGNet uses fewer stages while performing at par or even better than existing traditional and deep learning techniques, particularly, for low-cost and low dynamic range CMOS sensors. This improvement in performance for low-bit depth and low-cost sensors has the potential to bring down the cost of FPM imaging setup significantly. Finally, we show consistently improved performance on our collected real data.
summary: Fourier Ptychographic Microscopy (FPM) is an imaging procedure that overcomes the traditional limit on Space-Bandwidth Product (SBP) of conventional microscopes through computational means. It utilizes multiple images captured using a low numerical aperture (NA) objective and enables high-resolution phase imaging through frequency domain stitching. Existing FPM reconstruction methods can be broadly categorized into two approaches: iterative optimization based methods, which are based on the physics of the forward imaging model, and data-driven methods which commonly employ a feed-forward deep learning framework. We propose a hybrid model-driven residual network that combines the knowledge of the forward imaging system with a deep data-driven network. Our proposed architecture, LWGNet, unrolls traditional Wirtinger flow optimization algorithm into a novel neural network design that enhances the gradient images through complex convolutional blocks. Unlike other conventional unrolling techniques, LWGNet uses fewer stages while performing at par or even better than existing traditional and deep learning techniques, particularly, for low-cost and low dynamic range CMOS sensors. This improvement in performance for low-bit depth and low-cost sensors has the potential to bring down the cost of FPM imaging setup significantly. Finally, we show consistently improved performance on our collected real data.
abstract_zh: 傅里叶叠层显微镜（FPM）是一种通过计算手段克服传统显微镜空间带宽积（SBP）限制的成像程序。它利用低数值孔径 (NA) 物镜捕获的多个图像，并通过频域拼接实现高分辨率相位成像。现有的 FPM 重建方法可大致分为两种方法：基于迭代优化的方法（基于前向成像模型的物理原理）和数据驱动的方法（通常采用前馈深度学习框架）。我们提出了一种混合模型驱动的残差网络，它将前向成像系统的知识与深度数据驱动的网络相结合。我们提出的架构 LWGNet 将传统的 Wirtinger 流优化算法展开为一种新颖的神经网络设计，通过复杂的卷积块增强梯度图像。与其他传统的展开技术不同，LWGNet 使用更少的级，同时性能与现有的传统和深度学习技术相当甚至更好，特别是对于低成本和低动态范围 CMOS 传感器。低位深度和低成本传感器的性能改进有可能显着降低 FPM 成像设置的成本。最后，我们在收集的真实数据上展示了持续改进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LWGNet，一种结合物理模型与深度学习的混合网络，用于傅里叶ptychography相位恢复，通过学习Wirtinger梯度提升成像性能。
AI.motivation: 传统傅里叶ptychography重建方法存在迭代优化计算量大、数据驱动方法依赖高质量数据等问题，尤其在低成本低动态范围传感器上表现不足。
AI.method: 将Wirtinger流优化算法解耦为神经网络结构，设计复数卷积块增强梯度图像，通过物理模型与深度网络的混合架构实现高效相位恢复。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上验证了LWGNet在低比特深度和低成本CMOS传感器上的优越性能，相比现有方法阶段数更少且效果更优。
AI.conclusion: LWGNet通过物理先验与深度学习的结合，为低成本傅里叶ptychography成像提供了高效解决方案，有望显著降低系统成本。

authors_text: Ayaan Haque,Hankyu Moon,Heng Hao,Sima Didari,Jae Oh Woo,Patrick Bangert
title: Self-Supervised Contrastive Representation Learning for 3D Mesh Segmentation
title_zh: 用于 3D 网格分割的自监督对比表示学习
comment: AAAI 2023
comments: AAAI 2023
abstract: 3D deep learning is a growing field of interest due to the vast amount of information stored in 3D formats. Triangular meshes are an efficient representation for irregular, non-uniform 3D objects. However, meshes are often challenging to annotate due to their high geometrical complexity. Specifically, creating segmentation masks for meshes is tedious and time-consuming. Therefore, it is desirable to train segmentation networks with limited-labeled data. Self-supervised learning (SSL), a form of unsupervised representation learning, is a growing alternative to fully-supervised learning which can decrease the burden of supervision for training. We propose SSL-MeshCNN, a self-supervised contrastive learning method for pre-training CNNs for mesh segmentation. We take inspiration from traditional contrastive learning frameworks to design a novel contrastive learning algorithm specifically for meshes. Our preliminary experiments show promising results in reducing the heavy labeled data requirement needed for mesh segmentation by at least 33%.
summary: 3D deep learning is a growing field of interest due to the vast amount of information stored in 3D formats. Triangular meshes are an efficient representation for irregular, non-uniform 3D objects. However, meshes are often challenging to annotate due to their high geometrical complexity. Specifically, creating segmentation masks for meshes is tedious and time-consuming. Therefore, it is desirable to train segmentation networks with limited-labeled data. Self-supervised learning (SSL), a form of unsupervised representation learning, is a growing alternative to fully-supervised learning which can decrease the burden of supervision for training. We propose SSL-MeshCNN, a self-supervised contrastive learning method for pre-training CNNs for mesh segmentation. We take inspiration from traditional contrastive learning frameworks to design a novel contrastive learning algorithm specifically for meshes. Our preliminary experiments show promising results in reducing the heavy labeled data requirement needed for mesh segmentation by at least 33%.
abstract_zh: 由于以 3D 格式存储的大量信息，3D 深度学习成为一个日益受到关注的领域。三角形网格是不规则、不均匀 3D 对象的有效表示。然而，由于网格的几何复杂性很高，因此注释起来往往很困难。具体来说，为网格创建分割蒙版既繁琐又耗时。因此，需要使用有限的标记数据来训练分割网络。自监督学习（SSL）是无监督表征学习的一种形式，是完全监督学习的一种日益增长的替代方案，可以减轻训练监督的负担。我们提出了 SSL-MeshCNN，这是一种用于预训练 CNN 进行网格分割的自监督对比学习方法。我们从传统的对比学习框架中汲取灵感，设计了一种专门针对网格的新颖的对比学习算法。我们的初步实验显示出可喜的结果，可以将网格分割所需的大量标记数据需求减少至少 33%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督对比学习方法SSL-MeshCNN，用于预训练卷积神经网络以解决3D网格分割问题。
AI.motivation: 3D网格因几何复杂性导致标注困难且耗时，传统全监督学习依赖大量标注数据，而自监督学习可降低标注负担。
AI.method: 受传统对比学习框架启发，设计针对网格的对比学习算法，通过自监督预训练CNN以提升分割性能。
AI.result: 初步实验表明，该方法可将网格分割所需的标注数据量减少至少33%。
AI.conclusion: SSL-MeshCNN有效降低了网格分割对标注数据的依赖，为少样本场景提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Yifei Ren,Binbin Xu,Christopher L. Choi,Stefan Leutenegger
title: Visual-Inertial Multi-Instance Dynamic SLAM with Object-level Relocalisation
title_zh: 具有对象级重定位的视觉惯性多实例动态 SLAM
comment: International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
comments: International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
abstract: In this paper, we present a tightly-coupled visual-inertial object-level multi-instance dynamic SLAM system. Even in extremely dynamic scenes, it can robustly optimise for the camera pose, velocity, IMU biases and build a dense 3D reconstruction object-level map of the environment. Our system can robustly track and reconstruct the geometries of arbitrary objects, their semantics and motion by incrementally fusing associated colour, depth, semantic, and foreground object probabilities into each object model thanks to its robust sensor and object tracking. In addition, when an object is lost or moved outside the camera field of view, our system can reliably recover its pose upon re-observation. We demonstrate the robustness and accuracy of our method by quantitatively and qualitatively testing it in real-world data sequences.
summary: In this paper, we present a tightly-coupled visual-inertial object-level multi-instance dynamic SLAM system. Even in extremely dynamic scenes, it can robustly optimise for the camera pose, velocity, IMU biases and build a dense 3D reconstruction object-level map of the environment. Our system can robustly track and reconstruct the geometries of arbitrary objects, their semantics and motion by incrementally fusing associated colour, depth, semantic, and foreground object probabilities into each object model thanks to its robust sensor and object tracking. In addition, when an object is lost or moved outside the camera field of view, our system can reliably recover its pose upon re-observation. We demonstrate the robustness and accuracy of our method by quantitatively and qualitatively testing it in real-world data sequences.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种紧耦合的视觉惯性对象级多实例动态 SLAM 系统。即使在极其动态的场景中，它也可以针对相机姿态、速度、IMU 偏差进行稳健优化，并构建密集的 3D 重建环境对象级地图。凭借其强大的传感器和对象跟踪功能，我们的系统可以通过将相关的颜色、深度、语义和前景对象概率逐步融合到每个对象模型中，来稳健地跟踪和重建任意对象的几何形状、其语义和运动。此外，当物体丢失或移动到相机视野之外时，我们的系统可以在重新观察时可靠地恢复其姿态。我们通过在现实世界的数据序列中进行定量和定性测试来证明我们的方法的稳健性和准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种紧密结合的视觉惯性多实例动态SLAM系统，能够在极端动态场景中实现相机姿态、速度、IMU偏差优化，并构建环境对象级稠密3D重建地图。
AI.motivation: 传统SLAM在动态场景中难以处理移动物体的跟踪与重建，且存在物体丢失或移出视野时无法可靠恢复姿态的问题。
AI.method: 通过增量融合颜色、深度、语义及前景物体概率数据到每个物体模型中，系统实现对任意物体几何、语义及运动的鲁棒跟踪与重建，并支持物体重新观测时的位姿恢复。
AI.result: 在真实世界数据序列中通过定性和定量测试验证了方法的鲁棒性与准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在动态场景下实现了相机位姿优化与对象级地图重建，有效解决了物体丢失后的可靠位姿恢复问题。

authors_text: Benjamin J Smith,Robert Klassert,Roland Pihlakas
title: Improving performance in multi-objective decision-making in Bottles environments with soft maximin approaches
title_zh: 使用软极大极小方法提高 Bottles 环境中多目标决策的性能
abstract: Balancing multiple competing and conflicting objectives is an essential task for any artificial intelligence tasked with satisfying human values or preferences. Conflict arises both from misalignment between individuals with competing values, but also between conflicting value systems held by a single human. Starting with principle of loss-aversion, we designed a set of soft maximin function approaches to multi-objective decision-making. Bench-marking these functions in a set of previously-developed environments, we found that one new approach in particular, 'split-function exp-log loss aversion' (SFELLA), learns faster than the state of the art thresholded alignment objective method (Vamplew et al, 2021) on three of four tasks it was tested on, and achieved the same optimal performance after learning. SFELLA also showed relative robustness improvements against changes in objective scale, which may highlight an advantage dealing with distribution shifts in the environment dynamics. Due to publishing rules, further work could not be presented in the preprint, but in the final published version, we will further compare SFELLA to the multi-objective reward exponentials (MORE) approach (Rolf, 2020), demonstrating that SFELLA performs similarly to MORE in a simple previously-described foraging task, but in a modified foraging environment with a new resource that was not depleted as the agent worked, SFELLA collected more of the new resource with very little cost incurred in terms of the old resource. Overall, we found SFELLA useful for avoiding problems that sometimes occur with a thresholded approach, and more reward-responsive than MORE while retaining its conservative, loss-averse incentive structure.
summary: Balancing multiple competing and conflicting objectives is an essential task for any artificial intelligence tasked with satisfying human values or preferences. Conflict arises both from misalignment between individuals with competing values, but also between conflicting value systems held by a single human. Starting with principle of loss-aversion, we designed a set of soft maximin function approaches to multi-objective decision-making. Bench-marking these functions in a set of previously-developed environments, we found that one new approach in particular, 'split-function exp-log loss aversion' (SFELLA), learns faster than the state of the art thresholded alignment objective method (Vamplew et al, 2021) on three of four tasks it was tested on, and achieved the same optimal performance after learning. SFELLA also showed relative robustness improvements against changes in objective scale, which may highlight an advantage dealing with distribution shifts in the environment dynamics. Due to publishing rules, further work could not be presented in the preprint, but in the final published version, we will further compare SFELLA to the multi-objective reward exponentials (MORE) approach (Rolf, 2020), demonstrating that SFELLA performs similarly to MORE in a simple previously-described foraging task, but in a modified foraging environment with a new resource that was not depleted as the agent worked, SFELLA collected more of the new resource with very little cost incurred in terms of the old resource. Overall, we found SFELLA useful for avoiding problems that sometimes occur with a thresholded approach, and more reward-responsive than MORE while retaining its conservative, loss-averse incentive structure.
abstract_zh: 对于任何负责满足人类价值观或偏好的人工智能来说，平衡多个相互竞争和冲突的目标是一项基本任务。冲突既源于具有竞争价值观的个人之间的不一致，也源于同一个人持有的相互冲突的价值观体系之间的不一致。从损失规避原理出发，我们设计了一套用于多目标决策的软极大极小函数方法。在一组先前开发的环境中对这些函数进行基准测试，我们发现一种新方法，特别是“分割函数 exp-log 损失厌恶”（SFELLA），在测试的四个任务中的三个上比最先进的阈值对齐目标方法（Vamplew 等人，2021）学习得更快，并且在学习后实现了相同的最佳性能。 SFELLA 还显示出针对目标规模变化的相对鲁棒性改进，这可能凸显了处理环境动态分布变化的优势。由于出版规则，进一步的工作无法在预印本中呈现，但在最终发布的版本中，我们将进一步将 SFELLA 与多目标奖励指数（MORE）方法（Rolf，2020）进行比较，证明 SFELLA 在先前描述的简单觅食任务中与 MORE 的表现类似，但在修改后的觅食环境中，新资源在代理工作时并未耗尽，SFELLA 收集了更多新资源，而在以下方面产生的成本非常低旧资源。总体而言，我们发现 SFELLA 有助于避免阈值方法有时出现的问题，并且比 MORE 更具奖励响应性，同时保留其保守的、厌恶损失的激励结构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SFELLA的软最大化方法，用于改进多目标决策环境中的性能。
AI.motivation: 多目标决策中存在目标冲突和价值系统差异，传统方法如阈值对齐目标存在局限性，需更稳健的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于损失厌恶原理设计软最大化函数，提出SFELLA方法，并在基准环境中与现有方法对比验证。
AI.result: SFELLA在三个任务中学习速度优于阈值对齐方法，达到相同最优性能，且对目标尺度变化更鲁棒；在修改后的觅食环境中收集新资源更高效。
AI.conclusion: SFELLA有效避免阈值方法的问题，在保持保守激励结构的同时比MORE方法更具奖励响应性。

authors_text: Hei Law,Jia Deng
title: Label-Free Synthetic Pretraining of Object Detectors
title_zh: 目标检测器的无标记综合预训练
abstract: We propose a new approach, Synthetic Optimized Layout with Instance Detection (SOLID), to pretrain object detectors with synthetic images. Our "SOLID" approach consists of two main components: (1) generating synthetic images using a collection of unlabelled 3D models with optimized scene arrangement; (2) pretraining an object detector on "instance detection" task - given a query image depicting an object, detecting all instances of the exact same object in a target image. Our approach does not need any semantic labels for pretraining and allows the use of arbitrary, diverse 3D models. Experiments on COCO show that with optimized data generation and a proper pretraining task, synthetic data can be highly effective data for pretraining object detectors. In particular, pretraining on rendered images achieves performance competitive with pretraining on real images while using significantly less computing resources. Code is available at https://github.com/princeton-vl/SOLID.
summary: We propose a new approach, Synthetic Optimized Layout with Instance Detection (SOLID), to pretrain object detectors with synthetic images. Our "SOLID" approach consists of two main components: (1) generating synthetic images using a collection of unlabelled 3D models with optimized scene arrangement; (2) pretraining an object detector on "instance detection" task - given a query image depicting an object, detecting all instances of the exact same object in a target image. Our approach does not need any semantic labels for pretraining and allows the use of arbitrary, diverse 3D models. Experiments on COCO show that with optimized data generation and a proper pretraining task, synthetic data can be highly effective data for pretraining object detectors. In particular, pretraining on rendered images achieves performance competitive with pretraining on real images while using significantly less computing resources. Code is available at https://github.com/princeton-vl/SOLID.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新方法，即带有实例检测的合成优化布局（SOLID），用合成图像来预训练对象检测器。我们的“SOLID”方法由两个主要部分组成：(1) 使用一组未标记的 3D 模型和优化的场景排列生成合成图像； (2) 在“实例检测”任务上预训练对象检测器 - 给定描绘对象的查询图像，检测目标图像中完全相同对象的所有实例。我们的方法不需要任何语义标签进行预训练，并且允许使用任意、多样化的 3D 模型。 COCO 上的实验表明，通过优化数据生成和适当的预训练任务，合成数据可以成为预训练目标检测器的高效数据。特别是，对渲染图像进行预训练可实现与对真实图像进行预训练相媲美的性能，同时使用的计算资源显着减少。代码可在 https://github.com/princeton-vl/SOLID 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需标注的合成数据预训练目标检测器的方法SOLID，通过优化场景布局生成合成图像并进行实例检测预训练。
AI.motivation: 传统目标检测预训练依赖大量标注数据，而标注成本高昂。本文旨在利用未标注的3D模型生成合成数据，降低预训练对标注数据的依赖。
AI.method: SOLID方法包含两部分：1）使用优化场景布局的未标注3D模型生成合成图像；2）在实例检测任务上预训练检测器，即给定查询图像中的物体，在目标图像中检测相同物体的所有实例。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上的实验表明，使用优化生成的合成图像进行预训练，性能可与真实图像预训练媲美，同时显著减少计算资源消耗。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据通过优化生成和合适的预训练任务，能有效替代真实数据进行目标检测预训练，具有更高的资源效率。

search_text: Label-Free Synthetic Pretraining of Object Detectors 目标检测器的无标记综合预训练 We propose a new approach, Synthetic Optimized Layout with Instance Detection (SOLID), to pretrain object detectors with synthetic images. Our "SOLID" approach consists of two main components: (1) generating synthetic images using a collection of unlabelled 3D models with optimized scene arrangement; (2) pretraining an object detector on "instance detection" task - given a query image depicting an object, detecting all instances of the exact same object in a target image. Our approach does not need any semantic labels for pretraining and allows the use of arbitrary, diverse 3D models. Experiments on COCO show that with optimized data generation and a proper pretraining task, synthetic data can be highly effective data for pretraining object detectors. In particular, pretraining on rendered images achieves performance competitive with pretraining on real images while using significantly less computing resources. Code is available at https://github.com/princeton-vl/SOLID. 我们提出了一种新方法，即带有实例检测的合成优化布局（SOLID），用合成图像来预训练对象检测器。我们的“SOLID”方法由两个主要部分组成：(1) 使用一组未标记的 3D 模型和优化的场景排列生成合成图像； (2) 在“实例检测”任务上预训练对象检测器 - 给定描绘对象的查询图像，检测目标图像中完全相同对象的所有实例。我们的方法不需要任何语义标签进行预训练，并且允许使用任意、多样化的 3D 模型。 COCO 上的实验表明，通过优化数据生成和适当的预训练任务，合成数据可以成为预训练目标检测器的高效数据。特别是，对渲染图像进行预训练可实现与对真实图像进行预训练相媲美的性能，同时使用的计算资源显着减少。代码可在 https://github.com/princeton-vl/SOLID 获取。 本文提出了一种无需标注的合成数据预训练目标检测器的方法SOLID，通过优化场景布局生成合成图像并进行实例检测预训练。 Hei Law,Jia Deng cs.CV

authors_text: Youyuan Zhang,Jiuniu Wang,Hao Wu,Wenjia Xu
title: Distinctive Image Captioning via CLIP Guided Group Optimization
title_zh: 通过 CLIP 引导组优化实现独特的图像字幕
comment: Proceedings of the 17th European Conference on Computer Vision Workshops (ECCVW 2022)
comments: Proceedings of the 17th European Conference on Computer Vision Workshops (ECCVW 2022)
abstract: Image captioning models are usually trained according to human annotated ground-truth captions, which could generate accurate but generic captions. In this paper, we focus on generating distinctive captions that can distinguish the target image from other similar images. To evaluate the distinctiveness of captions, we introduce a series of metrics that use large-scale vision-language pre-training model CLIP to quantify the distinctiveness. To further improve the distinctiveness of captioning models, we propose a simple and effective training strategy that trains the model by comparing target image with similar image group and optimizing the group embedding gap. Extensive experiments are conducted on various baseline models to demonstrate the wide applicability of our strategy and the consistency of metric results with human evaluation. By comparing the performance of our best model with existing state-of-the-art models, we claim that our model achieves new state-of-the-art towards distinctiveness objective.
summary: Image captioning models are usually trained according to human annotated ground-truth captions, which could generate accurate but generic captions. In this paper, we focus on generating distinctive captions that can distinguish the target image from other similar images. To evaluate the distinctiveness of captions, we introduce a series of metrics that use large-scale vision-language pre-training model CLIP to quantify the distinctiveness. To further improve the distinctiveness of captioning models, we propose a simple and effective training strategy that trains the model by comparing target image with similar image group and optimizing the group embedding gap. Extensive experiments are conducted on various baseline models to demonstrate the wide applicability of our strategy and the consistency of metric results with human evaluation. By comparing the performance of our best model with existing state-of-the-art models, we claim that our model achieves new state-of-the-art towards distinctiveness objective.
abstract_zh: 图像字幕模型通常根据人类注释的真实字幕进行训练，这可以生成准确但通用的字幕。在本文中，我们专注于生成独特的标题，可以将目标图像与其他类似图像区分开来。为了评估字幕的独特性，我们引入了一系列使用大规模视觉语言预训练模型 CLIP 来量化独特性的指标。为了进一步提高字幕模型的独特性，我们提出了一种简单有效的训练策略，通过将目标图像与相似图像组进行比较并优化组嵌入间隙来训练模型。在各种基线模型上进行了大量的实验，以证明我们的策略的广泛适用性以及指标结果与人类评估的一致性。通过将我们最佳模型的性能与现有最先进模型的性能进行比较，我们声称我们的模型实现了新的最先进模型以实现独特性目标。

AI.tldr: 生成能够区分目标图像与其他相似图像的有区别的图像字幕
AI.motivation: 现有图像字幕模型生成的字幕虽准确但缺乏独特性，难以区分相似图像，需提升字幕的区别性以增强识别能力
AI.method: 引入基于CLIP的指标量化字幕区别性，并提出通过比较目标图像与相似图像组优化嵌入差距的训练策略
AI.result: 实验表明策略适用于多种基线模型，指标结果与人类评估一致，最佳模型在区别性目标上达到新状态-of-the-art水平
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升字幕区别性，验证了策略有效性及指标合理性，推动图像字幕生成向更精准区分方向发展

authors_text: Xinyi Chen,Boyu Zhou,Jiarong Lin,Yichen Zhang,Fu Zhang,Shaojie Shen
title: Fast 3D Sparse Topological Skeleton Graph Generation for Mobile Robot Global Planning
title_zh: 用于移动机器人全局规划的快速 3D 稀疏拓扑骨架图生成
abstract: In recent years, mobile robots are becoming ambitious and deployed in large-scale scenarios. Serving as a high-level understanding of environments, a sparse skeleton graph is beneficial for more efficient global planning. Currently, existing solutions for skeleton graph generation suffer from several major limitations, including poor adaptiveness to different map representations, dependency on robot inspection trajectories and high computational overhead. In this paper, we propose an efficient and flexible algorithm generating a trajectory-independent 3D sparse topological skeleton graph capturing the spatial structure of the free space. In our method, an efficient ray sampling and validating mechanism are adopted to find distinctive free space regions, which contributes to skeleton graph vertices, with traversability between adjacent vertices as edges. A cycle formation scheme is also utilized to maintain skeleton graph compactness. Benchmark comparison with state-of-the-art works demonstrates that our approach generates sparse graphs in a substantially shorter time, giving high-quality global planning paths. Experiments conducted in real-world maps further validate the capability of our method in real-world scenarios. Our method will be made open source to benefit the community.
summary: In recent years, mobile robots are becoming ambitious and deployed in large-scale scenarios. Serving as a high-level understanding of environments, a sparse skeleton graph is beneficial for more efficient global planning. Currently, existing solutions for skeleton graph generation suffer from several major limitations, including poor adaptiveness to different map representations, dependency on robot inspection trajectories and high computational overhead. In this paper, we propose an efficient and flexible algorithm generating a trajectory-independent 3D sparse topological skeleton graph capturing the spatial structure of the free space. In our method, an efficient ray sampling and validating mechanism are adopted to find distinctive free space regions, which contributes to skeleton graph vertices, with traversability between adjacent vertices as edges. A cycle formation scheme is also utilized to maintain skeleton graph compactness. Benchmark comparison with state-of-the-art works demonstrates that our approach generates sparse graphs in a substantially shorter time, giving high-quality global planning paths. Experiments conducted in real-world maps further validate the capability of our method in real-world scenarios. Our method will be made open source to benefit the community.
abstract_zh: In recent years, mobile robots are becoming ambitious and deployed in large-scale scenarios. Serving as a high-level understanding of environments, a sparse skeleton graph is beneficial for more efficient global planning.目前，现有的骨架图生成解决方案存在几个主要限制，包括对不同地图表示的适应性差、对机器人检查轨迹的依赖以及高计算开销。在本文中，我们提出了一种高效灵活的算法，生成与轨迹无关的 3D 稀疏拓扑骨架图，捕获自由空间的空间结构。在我们的方法中，采用有效的射线采样和验证机制来寻找独特的自由空间区域，这有助于骨架图顶点，并且相邻顶点之间的可遍历性作为边。 A cycle formation scheme is also utilized to maintain skeleton graph compactness.与最先进作品的基准比较表明，我们的方法在更短的时间内生成稀疏图，从而提供高质量的全局规划路径。 Experiments conducted in real-world maps further validate the capability of our method in real-world scenarios. Our method will be made open source to benefit the community.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的3D稀疏拓扑骨架图生成算法，用于移动机器人的全局路径规划。
AI.motivation: 现有的骨架图生成方法存在适应性差、依赖机器人轨迹和计算开销大等问题，需要一种更高效、灵活的算法。
AI.method: 采用高效的射线采样和验证机制，找到自由空间的显著区域，生成骨架图的顶点和边，并利用循环形成方案保持图的紧凑性。
AI.result: 与现有方法相比，该方法在生成稀疏图方面速度更快，并在真实世界地图中验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法在生成高质量的全局路径规划路径方面表现出色，并将开源以造福社区。

In our method, an efficient ray sampling and validating mechanism are adopted to find distinctive free space regions, which contributes to skeleton graph vertices, with traversability between adjacent vertices as edges. A cycle formation scheme is also utilized to maintain skeleton graph compactness. Benchmark comparison with state-of-the-art works demonstrates that our approach generates sparse graphs in a substantially shorter time, giving high-quality global planning paths. Experiments conducted in real-world maps further validate the capability of our method in real-world scenarios. Our method will be made open source to benefit the community. In recent years, mobile robots are becoming ambitious and deployed in large-scale scenarios. Serving as a high-level understanding of environments, a sparse skeleton graph is beneficial for more efficient global planning.目前，现有的骨架图生成解决方案存在几个主要限制，包括对不同地图表示的适应性差、对机器人检查轨迹的依赖以及高计算开销。在本文中，我们提出了一种高效灵活的算法，生成与轨迹无关的 3D 稀疏拓扑骨架图，捕获自由空间的空间结构。在我们的方法中，采用有效的射线采样和验证机制来寻找独特的自由空间区域，这有助于骨架图顶点，并且相邻顶点之间的可遍历性作为边。 A cycle formation scheme is also utilized to maintain skeleton graph compactness.与最先进作品的基准比较表明，我们的方法在更短的时间内生成稀疏图，从而提供高质量的全局规划路径。 Experiments conducted in real-world maps further validate the capability of our method in real-world scenarios. Our method will be made open source to benefit the community. 本文提出了一种高效的3D稀疏拓扑骨架图生成算法，用于移动机器人的全局路径规划。 Xinyi Chen,Boyu Zhou,Jiarong Lin,Yichen Zhang,Fu Zhang,Shaojie Shen cs.RO

authors_text: Malachy Moran,Kayla Woputz,Derrick Hee,Manuela Girotto,Paolo D'Odorico,Ritwik Gupta,Daniel Feldman,Puya Vahabi,Alberto Todeschini,Colorado J Reed
title: Snowpack Estimation in Key Mountainous Water Basins from Openly-Available, Multimodal Data Sources
title_zh: 根据公开可用的多模式数据源对主要山区水盆地的积雪进行估算
comment: Accepted Oral Presentation at CVPR 2022 MultiEarth
comments: Accepted Oral Presentation at CVPR 2022 MultiEarth
abstract: Accurately estimating the snowpack in key mountainous basins is critical for water resource managers to make decisions that impact local and global economies, wildlife, and public policy. Currently, this estimation requires multiple LiDAR-equipped plane flights or in situ measurements, both of which are expensive, sparse, and biased towards accessible regions. In this paper, we demonstrate that fusing spatial and temporal information from multiple, openly-available satellite and weather data sources enables estimation of snowpack in key mountainous regions. Our multisource model outperforms single-source estimation by 5.0 inches RMSE, as well as outperforms sparse in situ measurements by 1.2 inches RMSE.
summary: Accurately estimating the snowpack in key mountainous basins is critical for water resource managers to make decisions that impact local and global economies, wildlife, and public policy. Currently, this estimation requires multiple LiDAR-equipped plane flights or in situ measurements, both of which are expensive, sparse, and biased towards accessible regions. In this paper, we demonstrate that fusing spatial and temporal information from multiple, openly-available satellite and weather data sources enables estimation of snowpack in key mountainous regions. Our multisource model outperforms single-source estimation by 5.0 inches RMSE, as well as outperforms sparse in situ measurements by 1.2 inches RMSE.
abstract_zh: 准确估计主要山区盆地的积雪对于水资源管理者做出影响当地和全球经济、野生动物和公共政策的决策至关重要。目前，这种估计需要多次配备激光雷达的飞机飞行或现场测量，这两种方法都很昂贵、稀疏，并且偏向可到达的区域。在本文中，我们证明融合来自多个公开可用的卫星和天气数据源的空间和时间信息可以估计关键山区的积雪。我们的多源模型比单源估计高 5.0 英寸 RMSE，比稀疏原位测量高 1.2 英寸 RMSE。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用多源开放数据估计关键山地流域积雪深度的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统积雪测量方法成本高且覆盖范围有限，难以满足水资源管理对精确数据的需求。
AI.method: 融合多源卫星和气象数据的时空信息，构建多源数据模型进行积雪深度估计。
AI.result: 多源模型相比单源数据降低5.0英寸RMSE，相比稀疏实地测量降低1.2英寸RMSE。
AI.conclusion: 多源数据融合方法显著提升积雪估计精度，为山地水资源管理提供有效技术手段。

authors_text: Jing Tan,Ramin Khalili,Holger Karl,Artur Hecker
title: Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Long-Term Network Resource Allocation through Auction: a V2X Application
title_zh: 通过拍卖进行长期网络资源分配的多智能体强化学习：V2X 应用
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.02267
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.02267
abstract: We formulate offloading of computational tasks from a dynamic group of mobile agents (e.g., cars) as decentralized decision making among autonomous agents. We design an interaction mechanism that incentivizes such agents to align private and system goals by balancing between competition and cooperation. In the static case, the mechanism provably has Nash equilibria with optimal resource allocation. In a dynamic environment, this mechanism's requirement of complete information is impossible to achieve. For such environments, we propose a novel multi-agent online learning algorithm that learns with partial, delayed and noisy state information, thus greatly reducing information need. Our algorithm is also capable of learning from long-term and sparse reward signals with varying delay. Empirical results from the simulation of a V2X application confirm that through learning, agents with the learning algorithm significantly improve both system and individual performance, reducing up to 30% of offloading failure rate, communication overhead and load variation, increasing computation resource utilization and fairness. Results also confirm the algorithm's good convergence and generalization property in different environments.
summary: We formulate offloading of computational tasks from a dynamic group of mobile agents (e.g., cars) as decentralized decision making among autonomous agents. We design an interaction mechanism that incentivizes such agents to align private and system goals by balancing between competition and cooperation. In the static case, the mechanism provably has Nash equilibria with optimal resource allocation. In a dynamic environment, this mechanism's requirement of complete information is impossible to achieve. For such environments, we propose a novel multi-agent online learning algorithm that learns with partial, delayed and noisy state information, thus greatly reducing information need. Our algorithm is also capable of learning from long-term and sparse reward signals with varying delay. Empirical results from the simulation of a V2X application confirm that through learning, agents with the learning algorithm significantly improve both system and individual performance, reducing up to 30% of offloading failure rate, communication overhead and load variation, increasing computation resource utilization and fairness. Results also confirm the algorithm's good convergence and generalization property in different environments.
abstract_zh: 我们将动态移动代理组（例如汽车）的计算任务卸载制定为自治代理之间的分散决策。我们设计了一种交互机制，通过平衡竞争与合作来激励这些代理来协调私人目标和系统目标。在静态情况下，该机制可证明具有最优资源分配的纳什均衡。在动态环境下，这种机制对完整信息的要求是不可能实现的。对于这样的环境，我们提出了一种新颖的多智能体在线学习算法，该算法利用部分、延迟和噪声状态信息进行学习，从而大大减少信息需求。我们的算法还能够从具有不同延迟的长期稀疏奖励信号中学习。 V2X 应用模拟的实证结果证实，通过学习，采用学习算法的智能体显着提高了系统和个体性能，将卸载故障率、通信开销和负载变化降低高达 30%，提高了计算资源利用率和公平性。结果也证实了该算法在不同环境下具有良好的收敛性和泛化性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多智能体强化学习的机制，用于在V2X应用中实现长期网络资源分配。
AI.motivation: 在车联网（V2X）应用中，如何高效地分配计算资源以满足动态变化的需求是一个关键问题，传统的静态方法难以适应动态环境。
AI.method: 本文设计了一种交互机制，通过拍卖方式激励移动代理（如车辆）在竞争与合作之间取得平衡，并提出了一种多智能体在线学习算法，能够在部分信息、延迟和噪声环境下学习长期和稀疏的奖励信号。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，该算法显著提升了系统和个体的性能，减少了高达30%的任务卸载失败率、通信开销和负载波动，提高了计算资源利用率和公平性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在不同环境中表现出良好的收敛性和泛化能力，为V2X应用中的长期网络资源分配提供了一种有效的方法。

authors_text: Zhen Meng,Changyang She,Guodong Zhao,Daniele De Martini
title: Sampling, Communication, and Prediction Co-Design for Synchronizing the Real-World Device and Digital Model in Metaverse
title_zh: 采样、通信和预测协同设计，用于同步元宇宙中的真实设备和数字模型
abstract: The metaverse has the potential to revolutionize the next generation of the Internet by supporting highly interactive services with the help of Mixed Reality (MR) technologies; still, to provide a satisfactory experience for users, the synchronization between the physical world and its digital models is crucial. This work proposes a sampling, communication and prediction co-design framework to minimize the communication load subject to a constraint on tracking the Mean Squared Error (MSE) between a real-world device and its digital model in the metaverse. To optimize the sampling rate and the prediction horizon, we exploit expert knowledge and develop a constrained Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) algorithm, named Knowledge-assisted Constrained Twin-Delayed Deep Deterministic (KC-TD3) policy gradient algorithm. We validate our framework on a prototype composed of a real-world robotic arm and its digital model. Compared with existing approaches: (1) When the tracking error constraint is stringent (MSE=0.002 degrees), our policy degenerates into the policy in the sampling-communication co-design framework. (2) When the tracking error constraint is mild (MSE=0.007 degrees), our policy degenerates into the policy in the prediction-communication co-design framework. (3) Our framework achieves a better trade-off between the average MSE and the average communication load compared with a communication system without sampling and prediction. For example, the average communication load can be reduced up to 87% when the track error constraint is 0.002 degrees. (4) Our policy outperforms the benchmark with the static sampling rate and prediction horizon optimized by exhaustive search, in terms of the tail probability of the tracking error. Furthermore, with the assistance of expert knowledge, the proposed algorithm KC-TD3 achieves better convergence time, stability, and final policy performance.
summary: The metaverse has the potential to revolutionize the next generation of the Internet by supporting highly interactive services with the help of Mixed Reality (MR) technologies; still, to provide a satisfactory experience for users, the synchronization between the physical world and its digital models is crucial. This work proposes a sampling, communication and prediction co-design framework to minimize the communication load subject to a constraint on tracking the Mean Squared Error (MSE) between a real-world device and its digital model in the metaverse. To optimize the sampling rate and the prediction horizon, we exploit expert knowledge and develop a constrained Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) algorithm, named Knowledge-assisted Constrained Twin-Delayed Deep Deterministic (KC-TD3) policy gradient algorithm. We validate our framework on a prototype composed of a real-world robotic arm and its digital model. Compared with existing approaches: (1) When the tracking error constraint is stringent (MSE=0.002 degrees), our policy degenerates into the policy in the sampling-communication co-design framework. (2) When the tracking error constraint is mild (MSE=0.007 degrees), our policy degenerates into the policy in the prediction-communication co-design framework. (3) Our framework achieves a better trade-off between the average MSE and the average communication load compared with a communication system without sampling and prediction. For example, the average communication load can be reduced up to 87% when the track error constraint is 0.002 degrees. (4) Our policy outperforms the benchmark with the static sampling rate and prediction horizon optimized by exhaustive search, in terms of the tail probability of the tracking error. Furthermore, with the assistance of expert knowledge, the proposed algorithm KC-TD3 achieves better convergence time, stability, and final policy performance.
abstract_zh: 虚拟宇宙有潜力通过混合现实（MR）技术支持高度交互的服务，从而彻底改变下一代互联网；尽管如此，为了给用户提供满意的体验，物理世界与其数字模型之间的同步至关重要。这项工作提出了一种采样、通信和预测协同设计框架，以最大程度地减少跟踪现实世界设备与其虚拟宇宙中的数字模型之间的均方误差 (MSE) 的约束条件下的通信负载。为了优化采样率和预测范围，我们利用专家知识并开发了一种约束深度强化学习（DRL）算法，称为知识辅助约束双延迟深度确定性（KC-TD3）策略梯度算法。我们在由真实世界的机械臂及其数字模型组成的原型上验证了我们的框架。与现有方法相比：（1）当跟踪误差约束严格（MSE = 0.002度）时，我们的策略退化为采样通信协同设计框架中的策略。 （2）当跟踪误差约束较弱（MSE=0.007度）时，我们的策略退化为预测-通信协同设计框架中的策略。 (3) 与没有采样和预测的通信系统相比，我们的框架在平均 MSE 和平均通信负载之间实现了更好的权衡。例如，当轨道误差约束为0.002度时，平均通信负载最多可降低87%。 (4) 在跟踪误差的尾部概率方面，我们的策略优于通过穷举搜索优化的静态采样率和预测范围的基准。此外，在专家知识的帮助下，所提出的算法KC-TD3实现了更好的收敛时间、稳定性和最终策略性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种采样、通信与预测协同设计框架，用于在元宇宙中同步现实世界设备与其数字模型，以最小化通信负载并满足跟踪误差约束。
AI.motivation: 元宇宙需通过混合现实技术实现高度交互服务，但现实设备与数字模型的同步对用户体验至关重要，现有方法难以在通信负载与跟踪误差间取得平衡。
AI.method: 结合专家知识设计约束深度强化学习算法KC-TD3，优化采样率与预测时间窗，通过现实机械臂与数字模型原型验证框架有效性。
AI.result: 在严格误差约束下通信负载降低87%，尾部跟踪误差概率优于基准方法，算法收敛速度、稳定性及最终性能均提升。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过协同设计有效平衡通信效率与跟踪精度，验证了专家知识辅助的DRL算法在复杂系统优化中的优势。

search_text: Sampling, Communication, and Prediction Co-Design for Synchronizing the Real-World Device and Digital Model in Metaverse 采样、通信和预测协同设计，用于同步元宇宙中的真实设备和数字模型 The metaverse has the potential to revolutionize the next generation of the Internet by supporting highly interactive services with the help of Mixed Reality (MR) technologies; still, to provide a satisfactory experience for users, the synchronization between the physical world and its digital models is crucial. This work proposes a sampling, communication and prediction co-design framework to minimize the communication load subject to a constraint on tracking the Mean Squared Error (MSE) between a real-world device and its digital model in the metaverse. To optimize the sampling rate and the prediction horizon, we exploit expert knowledge and develop a constrained Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) algorithm, named Knowledge-assisted Constrained Twin-Delayed Deep Deterministic (KC-TD3) policy gradient algorithm. We validate our framework on a prototype composed of a real-world robotic arm and its digital model. Compared with existing approaches: (1) When the tracking error constraint is stringent (MSE=0.002 degrees), our policy degenerates into the policy in the sampling-communication co-design framework. (2) When the tracking error constraint is mild (MSE=0.007 degrees), our policy degenerates into the policy in the prediction-communication co-design framework. (3) Our framework achieves a better trade-off between the average MSE and the average communication load compared with a communication system without sampling and prediction. For example, the average communication load can be reduced up to 87% when the track error constraint is 0.002 degrees. (4) Our policy outperforms the benchmark with the static sampling rate and prediction horizon optimized by exhaustive search, in terms of the tail probability of the tracking error. Furthermore, with the assistance of expert knowledge, the proposed algorithm KC-TD3 achieves better convergence time, stability, and final policy performance. 虚拟宇宙有潜力通过混合现实（MR）技术支持高度交互的服务，从而彻底改变下一代互联网；尽管如此，为了给用户提供满意的体验，物理世界与其数字模型之间的同步至关重要。这项工作提出了一种采样、通信和预测协同设计框架，以最大程度地减少跟踪现实世界设备与其虚拟宇宙中的数字模型之间的均方误差 (MSE) 的约束条件下的通信负载。为了优化采样率和预测范围，我们利用专家知识并开发了一种约束深度强化学习（DRL）算法，称为知识辅助约束双延迟深度确定性（KC-TD3）策略梯度算法。我们在由真实世界的机械臂及其数字模型组成的原型上验证了我们的框架。与现有方法相比：（1）当跟踪误差约束严格（MSE = 0.002度）时，我们的策略退化为采样通信协同设计框架中的策略。 （2）当跟踪误差约束较弱（MSE=0.007度）时，我们的策略退化为预测-通信协同设计框架中的策略。 (3) 与没有采样和预测的通信系统相比，我们的框架在平均 MSE 和平均通信负载之间实现了更好的权衡。例如，当轨道误差约束为0.002度时，平均通信负载最多可降低87%。 (4) 在跟踪误差的尾部概率方面，我们的策略优于通过穷举搜索优化的静态采样率和预测范围的基准。此外，在专家知识的帮助下，所提出的算法KC-TD3实现了更好的收敛时间、稳定性和最终策略性能。 本文提出一种采样、通信与预测协同设计框架，用于在元宇宙中同步现实世界设备与其数字模型，以最小化通信负载并满足跟踪误差约束。 Zhen Meng,Changyang She,Guodong Zhao,Daniele De Martini cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Ebadollah Taheri,Sudeep Pasricha,Mahdi Nikdast
title: ReSiPI: A Reconfigurable Silicon-Photonic 2.5D Chiplet Network with PCMs for Energy-Efficient Interposer Communication
title_zh: ReSiPI：可重构硅光子 2.5D Chiplet 网络，具有用于节能中介层通信的 PCM
comment: This paper is accepted and will appear in IEEE/ACM ICCAD 2022 proceedings
comments: This paper is accepted and will appear in IEEE/ACM ICCAD 2022 proceedings
abstract: 2.5D chiplet systems have been proposed to improve the low manufacturing yield of large-scale chips. However, connecting the chiplets through an electronic interposer imposes a high traffic load on the interposer network. Silicon photonics technology has shown great promise towards handling a high volume of traffic with low latency in intra-chip network-on-chip (NoC) fabrics. Although recent advances in silicon photonic devices have extended photonic NoCs to enable high bandwidth communication in 2.5D chiplet systems, such interposer-based photonic networks still suffer from high power consumption. In this work, we design and analyze a novel Reconfigurable power-efficient and congestion-aware Silicon Photonic 2.5D Interposer network, called ReSiPI. Considering run-time traffic, ReSiPI is able to dynamically deploy inter-chiplet photonic gateways to improve the overall network congestion. ReSiPI also employs switching elements based on phase change materials (PCMs) to dynamically reconfigure and power-gate the photonic interposer network, thereby improving the network power efficiency. Compared to the best prior state-of-the-art 2.5D photonic network, ReSiPI demonstrates, on average, 37% lower latency, 25% power reduction, and 53% energy minimization in the network.
summary: 2.5D chiplet systems have been proposed to improve the low manufacturing yield of large-scale chips. However, connecting the chiplets through an electronic interposer imposes a high traffic load on the interposer network. Silicon photonics technology has shown great promise towards handling a high volume of traffic with low latency in intra-chip network-on-chip (NoC) fabrics. Although recent advances in silicon photonic devices have extended photonic NoCs to enable high bandwidth communication in 2.5D chiplet systems, such interposer-based photonic networks still suffer from high power consumption. In this work, we design and analyze a novel Reconfigurable power-efficient and congestion-aware Silicon Photonic 2.5D Interposer network, called ReSiPI. Considering run-time traffic, ReSiPI is able to dynamically deploy inter-chiplet photonic gateways to improve the overall network congestion. ReSiPI also employs switching elements based on phase change materials (PCMs) to dynamically reconfigure and power-gate the photonic interposer network, thereby improving the network power efficiency. Compared to the best prior state-of-the-art 2.5D photonic network, ReSiPI demonstrates, on average, 37% lower latency, 25% power reduction, and 53% energy minimization in the network.
abstract_zh: 2.5D小芯片系统被提出来改善大规模芯片的低制造良率。然而，通过电子中介层连接小芯片会给中介层网络带来高流量负载。硅光子技术在片内片上网络 (NoC) 结构中以低延迟处理大量流量方面展现出了巨大的前景。尽管硅光子器件的最新进展已经扩展了光子 NoC，以实现 2.5D 小芯片系统中的高带宽通信，但这种基于中介层的光子网络仍然面临高功耗的问题。在这项工作中，我们设计并分析了一种新型可重构、节能且拥塞感知的硅光子 2.5D 中介层网络，称为 ReSiPI。考虑到运行时流量，ReSiPI能够动态部署芯片间光子网关，以改善整体网络拥塞。 ReSiPI 还采用基于相变材料 (PCM) 的开关元件来动态重新配置光子中介层网络并对其进行功率门控，从而提高网络功率效率。与现有最先进的 2.5D 光子网络相比，ReSiPI 的网络延迟平均降低了 37%，功耗降低了 25%，能耗最小化了 53%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ReSiPI的可重构硅光子2.5D芯片网络，用于提高芯片间通信的能效。
AI.motivation: 2.5D芯片系统虽然可以提高大规模芯片的制造良率，但通过电子中介层连接芯片时会带来高流量负载，而硅光子技术在低延迟和高带宽方面表现优异，但现有基于中介层的光子网络仍存在高功耗问题。
AI.method: 本文设计了一种可重构且节能的硅光子2.5D中介层网络ReSiPI，通过动态部署芯片间光子网关和基于相变材料的开关元件，实现网络拥塞控制和功耗优化。
AI.result: 与最先进的2.5D光子网络相比，ReSiPI平均降低了37%的延迟、25%的功耗和53%的能量消耗。
AI.conclusion: ReSiPI通过动态配置和功耗管理有效提升了2.5D芯片系统的通信效率和能效，为未来高性能计算系统提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Jorge Martín-Pérez,Nuria Molner,Francesco Malandrino,Carlos Jesús Bernardos,Antonio de la Oliva,David Gomez-Barquero
title: Choose, not Hoard: Information-to-Model Matching for Artificial Intelligence in O-RAN
title_zh: 选择，而不是囤积：O-RAN 中人工智能的信息到模型匹配
comment: ef:IEEE Communications Magazine, 2022
comments: ef:IEEE Communications Magazine, 2022
abstract: Open Radio Access Network (O-RAN) is an emerging paradigm, whereby virtualized network infrastructure elements from different vendors communicate via open, standardized interfaces. A key element therein is the RAN Intelligent Controller (RIC), an Artificial Intelligence (AI)-based controller. Traditionally, all data available in the network has been used to train a single AI model to be used at the RIC. This paper introduces, discusses, and evaluates the creation of multiple AI model instances at different RICs, leveraging information from some (or all) locations for their training. This brings about a flexible relationship between gNBs, the AI models used to control them, and the data such models are trained with. Experiments with real-world traces show how using multiple AI model instances that choose training data from specific locations improve the performance of traditional approaches following the hoarding strategy.
summary: Open Radio Access Network (O-RAN) is an emerging paradigm, whereby virtualized network infrastructure elements from different vendors communicate via open, standardized interfaces. A key element therein is the RAN Intelligent Controller (RIC), an Artificial Intelligence (AI)-based controller. Traditionally, all data available in the network has been used to train a single AI model to be used at the RIC. This paper introduces, discusses, and evaluates the creation of multiple AI model instances at different RICs, leveraging information from some (or all) locations for their training. This brings about a flexible relationship between gNBs, the AI models used to control them, and the data such models are trained with. Experiments with real-world traces show how using multiple AI model instances that choose training data from specific locations improve the performance of traditional approaches following the hoarding strategy.
abstract_zh: 开放无线接入网络 (O-RAN) 是一种新兴范例，来自不同供应商的虚拟化网络基础设施元素通过开放、标准化接口进行通信。其中的关键要素是 RAN 智能控制器 (RIC)，这是一种基于人工智能 (AI) 的控制器。传统上，网络中的所有可用数据都用于训练 RIC 中使用的单个 AI 模型。本文介绍、讨论和评估在不同 RIC 上创建多个 AI 模型实例，利用来自部分（或全部）位置的信息进行训练。这在 gNB、用于控制它们的人工智能模型以及训练这些模型的数据之间带来了灵活的关系。对现实世界痕迹的实验表明，使用从特定位置选择训练数据的多个人工智能模型实例如何提高遵循囤积策略的传统方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种信息到模型匹配的方法，在O-RAN架构中通过为不同RIC创建多个AI模型实例，利用特定位置的数据进行训练，以替代传统的单一模型使用所有数据的策略。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将所有网络数据用于训练单一AI模型，可能导致模型性能受限。通过为不同位置的RIC选择性地训练多个模型，可提升灵活性和性能。
AI.method: 在多个RIC部署独立AI模型实例，每个模型仅使用部分或特定位置的数据进行训练，并通过真实网络数据验证该方法的有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于特定位置数据的多模型方法相比传统单一模型策略，在性能上实现了显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 信息到模型的匹配策略优于数据集中式的‘囤积’方法，为O-RAN中的AI应用提供了更高效的模型训练和部署方案。

search_text: Choose, not Hoard: Information-to-Model Matching for Artificial Intelligence in O-RAN 选择，而不是囤积：O-RAN 中人工智能的信息到模型匹配 Open Radio Access Network (O-RAN) is an emerging paradigm, whereby virtualized network infrastructure elements from different vendors communicate via open, standardized interfaces. A key element therein is the RAN Intelligent Controller (RIC), an Artificial Intelligence (AI)-based controller. Traditionally, all data available in the network has been used to train a single AI model to be used at the RIC. This paper introduces, discusses, and evaluates the creation of multiple AI model instances at different RICs, leveraging information from some (or all) locations for their training. This brings about a flexible relationship between gNBs, the AI models used to control them, and the data such models are trained with. Experiments with real-world traces show how using multiple AI model instances that choose training data from specific locations improve the performance of traditional approaches following the hoarding strategy. 开放无线接入网络 (O-RAN) 是一种新兴范例，来自不同供应商的虚拟化网络基础设施元素通过开放、标准化接口进行通信。其中的关键要素是 RAN 智能控制器 (RIC)，这是一种基于人工智能 (AI) 的控制器。传统上，网络中的所有可用数据都用于训练 RIC 中使用的单个 AI 模型。本文介绍、讨论和评估在不同 RIC 上创建多个 AI 模型实例，利用来自部分（或全部）位置的信息进行训练。这在 gNB、用于控制它们的人工智能模型以及训练这些模型的数据之间带来了灵活的关系。对现实世界痕迹的实验表明，使用从特定位置选择训练数据的多个人工智能模型实例如何提高遵循囤积策略的传统方法的性能。 本文提出了一种信息到模型匹配的方法，在O-RAN架构中通过为不同RIC创建多个AI模型实例，利用特定位置的数据进行训练，以替代传统的单一模型使用所有数据的策略。 Jorge Martín-Pérez,Nuria Molner,Francesco Malandrino,Carlos Jesús Bernardos,Antonio de la Oliva,David Gomez-Barquero cs.NI,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Davide Dalle Pezze,Denis Deronjic,Chiara Masiero,Diego Tosato,Alessandro Beghi,Gian Antonio Susto
title: A Multi-label Continual Learning Framework to Scale Deep Learning Approaches for Packaging Equipment Monitoring
title_zh: 用于扩展包装设备监控深度学习方法的多标签持续学习框架
abstract: Continual Learning aims to learn from a stream of tasks, being able to remember at the same time both new and old tasks. While many approaches were proposed for single-class classification, multi-label classification in the continual scenario remains a challenging problem. For the first time, we study multi-label classification in the Domain Incremental Learning scenario. Moreover, we propose an efficient approach that has a logarithmic complexity with regard to the number of tasks, and can be applied also in the Class Incremental Learning scenario. We validate our approach on a real-world multi-label Alarm Forecasting problem from the packaging industry. For the sake of reproducibility, the dataset and the code used for the experiments are publicly available.
summary: Continual Learning aims to learn from a stream of tasks, being able to remember at the same time both new and old tasks. While many approaches were proposed for single-class classification, multi-label classification in the continual scenario remains a challenging problem. For the first time, we study multi-label classification in the Domain Incremental Learning scenario. Moreover, we propose an efficient approach that has a logarithmic complexity with regard to the number of tasks, and can be applied also in the Class Incremental Learning scenario. We validate our approach on a real-world multi-label Alarm Forecasting problem from the packaging industry. For the sake of reproducibility, the dataset and the code used for the experiments are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 持续学习的目的是从一系列任务中学习，能够同时记住新任务和旧任务。虽然针对单类分类提出了许多方法，但连续场景中的多标签分类仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。我们第一次研究领域增量学习场景中的多标签分类。此外，我们提出了一种有效的方法，其任务数量具有对数复杂度，并且也可以应用于类增量学习场景。我们针对包装行业的真实多标签警报预测问题验证了我们的方法。为了可重复性，用于实验的数据集和代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的多标签持续学习框架，用于包装设备监控中的深度学习方法扩展。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习方法多针对单分类任务，而工业监控中常见的多标签分类在持续学习场景下仍存在挑战，需解决任务增量时的遗忘问题。
AI.method: 设计具有对数复杂度的任务增量学习框架，通过动态特征重加权机制适应新旧任务，支持领域增量和类别增量两种学习场景。
AI.result: 在包装行业报警预测数据集上验证了方法有效性，实验结果优于基线方法，且公开了数据集和代码以保证可复现性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架有效解决了多标签持续学习的扩展性难题，为工业设备监控等实际应用场景提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Sameer Ambekar,Matteo Tafuro,Ankit Ankit,Diego van der Mast,Mark Alence,Christos Athanasiadis
title: SKDCGN: Source-free Knowledge Distillation of Counterfactual Generative Networks using cGANs
title_zh: SKDCGN：使用 cGAN 对反事实生成网络进行无源知识蒸馏
comment: Accepted at ECCV 2022 Workshop VIPriors
comments: Accepted at ECCV 2022 Workshop VIPriors
abstract: With the usage of appropriate inductive biases, Counterfactual Generative Networks (CGNs) can generate novel images from random combinations of shape, texture, and background manifolds. These images can be utilized to train an invariant classifier, avoiding the wide spread problem of deep architectures learning spurious correlations rather than meaningful ones. As a consequence, out-of-domain robustness is improved. However, the CGN architecture comprises multiple over parameterized networks, namely BigGAN and U2-Net. Training these networks requires appropriate background knowledge and extensive computation. Since one does not always have access to the precise training details, nor do they always possess the necessary knowledge of counterfactuals, our work addresses the following question: Can we use the knowledge embedded in pre-trained CGNs to train a lower-capacity model, assuming black-box access (i.e., only access to the pretrained CGN model) to the components of the architecture? In this direction, we propose a novel work named SKDCGN that attempts knowledge transfer using Knowledge Distillation (KD). In our proposed architecture, each independent mechanism (shape, texture, background) is represented by a student 'TinyGAN' that learns from the pretrained teacher 'BigGAN'. We demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed method using state-of-the-art datasets such as ImageNet, and MNIST by using KD and appropriate loss functions. Moreover, as an additional contribution, our paper conducts a thorough study on the composition mechanism of the CGNs, to gain a better understanding of how each mechanism influences the classification accuracy of an invariant classifier. Code available at: https://github.com/ambekarsameer96/SKDCGN
summary: With the usage of appropriate inductive biases, Counterfactual Generative Networks (CGNs) can generate novel images from random combinations of shape, texture, and background manifolds. These images can be utilized to train an invariant classifier, avoiding the wide spread problem of deep architectures learning spurious correlations rather than meaningful ones. As a consequence, out-of-domain robustness is improved. However, the CGN architecture comprises multiple over parameterized networks, namely BigGAN and U2-Net. Training these networks requires appropriate background knowledge and extensive computation. Since one does not always have access to the precise training details, nor do they always possess the necessary knowledge of counterfactuals, our work addresses the following question: Can we use the knowledge embedded in pre-trained CGNs to train a lower-capacity model, assuming black-box access (i.e., only access to the pretrained CGN model) to the components of the architecture? In this direction, we propose a novel work named SKDCGN that attempts knowledge transfer using Knowledge Distillation (KD). In our proposed architecture, each independent mechanism (shape, texture, background) is represented by a student 'TinyGAN' that learns from the pretrained teacher 'BigGAN'. We demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed method using state-of-the-art datasets such as ImageNet, and MNIST by using KD and appropriate loss functions. Moreover, as an additional contribution, our paper conducts a thorough study on the composition mechanism of the CGNs, to gain a better understanding of how each mechanism influences the classification accuracy of an invariant classifier. Code available at: https://github.com/ambekarsameer96/SKDCGN
abstract_zh: 通过使用适当的归纳偏差，反事实生成网络（CGN）可以从形状、纹理和背景流形的随机组合生成新颖的图像。这些图像可用于训练不变分类器，避免深度架构学习虚假相关性而不是有意义的相关性的广泛问题。因此，域外的鲁棒性得到了提高。然而，CGN 架构包含多个超参数化网络，即 BigGAN 和 U2-Net。训练这些网络需要适当的背景知识和大量的计算。由于人们并不总是能够访问精确的训练细节，也不总是拥有必要的反事实知识，因此我们的工作解决了以下问题：假设对架构组件进行黑盒访问（即仅访问预训练的 CGN 模型），我们是否可以使用预训练的 CGN 中嵌入的知识来训练较低容量的模型？在这个方向上，我们提出了一项名为 SKDCGN 的新颖工作，尝试使用知识蒸馏（KD）进行知识转移。在我们提出的架构中，每个独立的机制（形状、纹理、背景）都由学生“TinyGAN”表示，该学生向预训练的教师“BigGAN”学习。我们通过使用 KD 和适当的损失函数，使用 ImageNet 和 MNIST 等最先进的数据集证明了所提出方法的有效性。此外，作为额外的贡献，我们的论文对 CGN 的组成机制进行了深入的研究，以更好地理解每种机制如何影响不变分类器的分类精度。代码位于：https://github.com/ambekarsameer96/SKDCGN

AI.tldr: 本文提出SKDCGN方法，通过知识蒸馏从预训练的Counterfactual Generative Networks（CGN）中提取知识，训练轻量级模型以提升分类鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: CGN能生成具有形状、纹理和背景的图像以训练不变分类器，但其依赖复杂网络（如BigGAN和U2-Net）且需大量计算资源，难以获取训练细节。
AI.method: 设计TinyGAN作为学生模型，通过知识蒸馏从预训练的BigGAN（教师模型）学习形状、纹理和背景机制，并结合损失函数优化。
AI.result: 在ImageNet和MNIST数据集上验证了方法有效性，分类准确率提升且模型复杂度降低，同时分析了CGN组件对分类的影响。
AI.conclusion: SKDCGN实现了无需原始训练数据的CGN知识迁移，为轻量化模型训练提供了可行方案，并深化了对CGN结构机制的理解。

tldr: 本文提出SKDCGN方法，通过知识蒸馏从预训练的Counterfactual Generative Networks（CGN）中提取知识，训练轻量级模型以提升分类鲁棒性。
motivation: CGN能生成具有形状、纹理和背景的图像以训练不变分类器，但其依赖复杂网络（如BigGAN和U2-Net）且需大量计算资源，难以获取训练细节。
method: 设计TinyGAN作为学生模型，通过知识蒸馏从预训练的BigGAN（教师模型）学习形状、纹理和背景机制，并结合损失函数优化。
result: 在ImageNet和MNIST数据集上验证了方法有效性，分类准确率提升且模型复杂度降低，同时分析了CGN组件对分类的影响。
conclusion: SKDCGN实现了无需原始训练数据的CGN知识迁移，为轻量化模型训练提供了可行方案，并深化了对CGN结构机制的理解。
search_text: SKDCGN: Source-free Knowledge Distillation of Counterfactual Generative Networks using cGANs SKDCGN：使用 cGAN 对反事实生成网络进行无源知识蒸馏 With the usage of appropriate inductive biases, Counterfactual Generative Networks (CGNs) can generate novel images from random combinations of shape, texture, and background manifolds. These images can be utilized to train an invariant classifier, avoiding the wide spread problem of deep architectures learning spurious correlations rather than meaningful ones. As a consequence, out-of-domain robustness is improved. However, the CGN architecture comprises multiple over parameterized networks, namely BigGAN and U2-Net. Training these networks requires appropriate background knowledge and extensive computation. Since one does not always have access to the precise training details, nor do they always possess the necessary knowledge of counterfactuals, our work addresses the following question: Can we use the knowledge embedded in pre-trained CGNs to train a lower-capacity model, assuming black-box access (i.e., only access to the pretrained CGN model) to the components of the architecture? In this direction, we propose a novel work named SKDCGN that attempts knowledge transfer using Knowledge Distillation (KD). In our proposed architecture, each independent mechanism (shape, texture, background) is represented by a student 'TinyGAN' that learns from the pretrained teacher 'BigGAN'. We demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed method using state-of-the-art datasets such as ImageNet, and MNIST by using KD and appropriate loss functions. Moreover, as an additional contribution, our paper conducts a thorough study on the composition mechanism of the CGNs, to gain a better understanding of how each mechanism influences the classification accuracy of an invariant classifier. Code available at: https://github.com/ambekarsameer96/SKDCGN 通过使用适当的归纳偏差，反事实生成网络（CGN）可以从形状、纹理和背景流形的随机组合生成新颖的图像。这些图像可用于训练不变分类器，避免深度架构学习虚假相关性而不是有意义的相关性的广泛问题。因此，域外的鲁棒性得到了提高。然而，CGN 架构包含多个超参数化网络，即 BigGAN 和 U2-Net。训练这些网络需要适当的背景知识和大量的计算。由于人们并不总是能够访问精确的训练细节，也不总是拥有必要的反事实知识，因此我们的工作解决了以下问题：假设对架构组件进行黑盒访问（即仅访问预训练的 CGN 模型），我们是否可以使用预训练的 CGN 中嵌入的知识来训练较低容量的模型？在这个方向上，我们提出了一项名为 SKDCGN 的新颖工作，尝试使用知识蒸馏（KD）进行知识转移。在我们提出的架构中，每个独立的机制（形状、纹理、背景）都由学生“TinyGAN”表示，该学生向预训练的教师“BigGAN”学习。我们通过使用 KD 和适当的损失函数，使用 ImageNet 和 MNIST 等最先进的数据集证明了所提出方法的有效性。此外，作为额外的贡献，我们的论文对 CGN 的组成机制进行了深入的研究，以更好地理解每种机制如何影响不变分类器的分类精度。代码位于：https://github.com/ambekarsameer96/SKDCGN 本文提出SKDCGN方法，通过知识蒸馏从预训练的Counterfactual Generative Networks（CGN）中提取知识，训练轻量级模型以提升分类鲁棒性。 Sameer Ambekar,Matteo Tafuro,Ankit Ankit,Diego van der Mast,Mark Alence,Christos Athanasiadis cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ziheng Chen,Fabrizio Silvestri,Jia Wang,Yongfeng Zhang,Zhenhua Huang,Hongshik Ahn,Gabriele Tolomei
title: GREASE: Generate Factual and Counterfactual Explanations for GNN-based Recommendations
title_zh: GREASE：为基于 GNN 的建议生成事实和反事实解释
abstract: Recently, graph neural networks (GNNs) have been widely used to develop successful recommender systems. Although powerful, it is very difficult for a GNN-based recommender system to attach tangible explanations of why a specific item ends up in the list of suggestions for a given user. Indeed, explaining GNN-based recommendations is unique, and existing GNN explanation methods are inappropriate for two reasons. First, traditional GNN explanation methods are designed for node, edge, or graph classification tasks rather than ranking, as in recommender systems. Second, standard machine learning explanations are usually intended to support skilled decision-makers. Instead, recommendations are designed for any end-user, and thus their explanations should be provided in user-understandable ways. In this work, we propose GREASE, a novel method for explaining the suggestions provided by any black-box GNN-based recommender system. Specifically, GREASE first trains a surrogate model on a target user-item pair and its $l$-hop neighborhood. Then, it generates both factual and counterfactual explanations by finding optimal adjacency matrix perturbations to capture the sufficient and necessary conditions for an item to be recommended, respectively. Experimental results conducted on real-world datasets demonstrate that GREASE can generate concise and effective explanations for popular GNN-based recommender models.
summary: Recently, graph neural networks (GNNs) have been widely used to develop successful recommender systems. Although powerful, it is very difficult for a GNN-based recommender system to attach tangible explanations of why a specific item ends up in the list of suggestions for a given user. Indeed, explaining GNN-based recommendations is unique, and existing GNN explanation methods are inappropriate for two reasons. First, traditional GNN explanation methods are designed for node, edge, or graph classification tasks rather than ranking, as in recommender systems. Second, standard machine learning explanations are usually intended to support skilled decision-makers. Instead, recommendations are designed for any end-user, and thus their explanations should be provided in user-understandable ways. In this work, we propose GREASE, a novel method for explaining the suggestions provided by any black-box GNN-based recommender system. Specifically, GREASE first trains a surrogate model on a target user-item pair and its $l$-hop neighborhood. Then, it generates both factual and counterfactual explanations by finding optimal adjacency matrix perturbations to capture the sufficient and necessary conditions for an item to be recommended, respectively. Experimental results conducted on real-world datasets demonstrate that GREASE can generate concise and effective explanations for popular GNN-based recommender models.
abstract_zh: 最近，图神经网络（GNN）已被广泛用于开发成功的推荐系统。尽管功能强大，但基于 GNN 的推荐系统很难附加具体解释为什么特定项目最终会出现在给定用户的建议列表中。事实上，解释基于 GNN 的推荐是独特的，现有的 GNN 解释方法不合适有两个原因。首先，传统的 GNN 解释方法是为节点、边缘或图分类任务而设计的，而不是像推荐系统那样进行排序。其次，标准的机器学习解释通常旨在支持熟练的决策者。相反，建议是为任何最终用户设计的，因此应以用户可以理解的方式提供其解释。在这项工作中，我们提出了 GREASE，这是一种解释任何基于 GNN 的黑盒推荐系统提供的建议的新方法。具体来说，GREASE 首先在目标用户-项目对及其 $l$-hop 邻域上训练代理模型。然后，它通过寻找最佳邻接矩阵扰动来生成事实和反事实解释，以分别捕获要推荐的项目的充分和必要条件。在现实世界数据集上进行的实验结果表明，GREASE 可以为流行的基于 GNN 的推荐模型生成简洁有效的解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GREASE方法，用于为基于图神经网络（GNN）的推荐系统生成事实性和反事实性解释。
AI.motivation: 现有GNN解释方法不适用于推荐系统的排序任务，且难以以用户可理解的方式提供解释。
AI.method: 通过训练用户-物品对的替代模型，并扰动邻接矩阵生成事实性和反事实性解释。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上验证了GREASE能为流行GNN推荐模型生成简洁有效的解释。
AI.conclusion: GREASE有效解决了GNN推荐系统的可解释性问题，适用于任意黑盒GNN推荐器。

authors_text: Conrad D. Hougen,Lance M. Kaplan,Federico Cerutti,Alfred O. Hero III
title: Uncertain Bayesian Networks: Learning from Incomplete Data
title_zh: 不确定的贝叶斯网络：从不完整的数据中学习
comment: 6 pages, appeared at 2021 IEEE International Workshop on Machine Learning for Signal Processing (MLSP)
comments: 6 pages, appeared at 2021 IEEE International Workshop on Machine Learning for Signal Processing (MLSP)
abstract: When the historical data are limited, the conditional probabilities associated with the nodes of Bayesian networks are uncertain and can be empirically estimated. Second order estimation methods provide a framework for both estimating the probabilities and quantifying the uncertainty in these estimates. We refer to these cases as uncer tain or second-order Bayesian networks. When such data are complete, i.e., all variable values are observed for each instantiation, the conditional probabilities are known to be Dirichlet-distributed. This paper improves the current state-of-the-art approaches for handling uncertain Bayesian networks by enabling them to learn distributions for their parameters, i.e., conditional probabilities, with incomplete data. We extensively evaluate various methods to learn the posterior of the parameters through the desired and empirically derived strength of confidence bounds for various queries.
summary: When the historical data are limited, the conditional probabilities associated with the nodes of Bayesian networks are uncertain and can be empirically estimated. Second order estimation methods provide a framework for both estimating the probabilities and quantifying the uncertainty in these estimates. We refer to these cases as uncer tain or second-order Bayesian networks. When such data are complete, i.e., all variable values are observed for each instantiation, the conditional probabilities are known to be Dirichlet-distributed. This paper improves the current state-of-the-art approaches for handling uncertain Bayesian networks by enabling them to learn distributions for their parameters, i.e., conditional probabilities, with incomplete data. We extensively evaluate various methods to learn the posterior of the parameters through the desired and empirically derived strength of confidence bounds for various queries.
abstract_zh: 当历史数据有限时，与贝叶斯网络节点相关的条件概率是不确定的，可以凭经验估计。二阶估计方法提供了估计概率和量化这些估计中的不确定性的框架。我们将这些情况称为不确定或二阶贝叶斯网络。当此类数据完整时，即观察到每个实例的所有变量值时，条件概率已知为狄利克雷分布。本文改进了当前处理不确定贝叶斯网络的最先进方法，使它们能够学习不完整数据的参数分布，即条件概率。我们广泛评估了各种方法，通过各种查询所需的和凭经验得出的置信界限强度来学习参数的后验。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在数据不完整的情况下，如何通过学习条件概率分布来改进不确定贝叶斯网络的参数估计方法。
AI.motivation: 传统贝叶斯网络在处理不完整数据时存在局限性，而现有方法难以有效量化参数估计的不确定性，需改进以应对实际应用中的数据缺失问题。
AI.method: 基于二阶估计框架，结合Dirichlet分布特性，提出参数分布学习方法，并通过置信区间强度评估后验分布。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在不同查询任务下优于现有技术，能够更准确地处理不完整数据的不确定性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的参数分布学习方法有效提升了不确定贝叶斯网络在不完整数据场景下的建模能力与预测可靠性。
