authors_text: Daniel T. Larsson,Dipankar Maity,Panagiotis Tsiotras
title: A Linear Programming Approach for Resource-Aware Information-Theoretic Tree Abstractions
title_zh: 资源感知信息理论树抽象的线性规划方法
abstract: In this chapter, an integer linear programming formulation for the problem of obtaining task-relevant, multi-resolution, environment abstractions for resource-constrained autonomous agents is presented. The formulation leverages concepts from information-theoretic signal compression, specifically, the information bottleneck (IB) method, to pose an abstraction problem as an optimal encoder search over the space of multi-resolution trees. The abstractions emerge in a task-relevant manner as a function of agent information-processing constraints. We detail our formulation, and show how hierarchical tree structures, signal encoders, and information-theoretic methods for signal compression can be unified under a common theme. A discussion delineating the benefits and drawbacks of our formulation is presented, as well as a detailed explanation how our approach can be interpreted within the context of generating abstractions for resource-constrained autonomous systems. It is shown that the resulting information-theoretic abstraction problem over the space of multi-resolution trees can be formulated as a integer linear programming (ILP) problem. We demonstrate the approach on a number of examples, and provide a discussion detailing the differences of the proposed framework compared to existing methods. Lastly, we consider a linear program relaxation of the ILP problem, thereby demonstrating that multi-resolution information-theoretic tree abstractions can be obtained by solving a convex program.
summary: In this chapter, an integer linear programming formulation for the problem of obtaining task-relevant, multi-resolution, environment abstractions for resource-constrained autonomous agents is presented. The formulation leverages concepts from information-theoretic signal compression, specifically, the information bottleneck (IB) method, to pose an abstraction problem as an optimal encoder search over the space of multi-resolution trees. The abstractions emerge in a task-relevant manner as a function of agent information-processing constraints. We detail our formulation, and show how hierarchical tree structures, signal encoders, and information-theoretic methods for signal compression can be unified under a common theme. A discussion delineating the benefits and drawbacks of our formulation is presented, as well as a detailed explanation how our approach can be interpreted within the context of generating abstractions for resource-constrained autonomous systems. It is shown that the resulting information-theoretic abstraction problem over the space of multi-resolution trees can be formulated as a integer linear programming (ILP) problem. We demonstrate the approach on a number of examples, and provide a discussion detailing the differences of the proposed framework compared to existing methods. Lastly, we consider a linear program relaxation of the ILP problem, thereby demonstrating that multi-resolution information-theoretic tree abstractions can be obtained by solving a convex program.
abstract_zh: 在本章中，提出了一个整数线性规划公式，用于解决资源受限的自主代理获取任务相关、多分辨率、环境抽象的问题。该公式利用信息论信号压缩的概念，特别是信息瓶颈（IB）方法，提出一个抽象问题，作为多分辨率树空间上的最佳编码器搜索。这些抽象以与任务相关的方式作为代理信息处理约束的函数出现。我们详细介绍了我们的公式，并展示了如何在一个共同的主题下统一层次树结构、信号编码器和信号压缩的信息论方法。讨论描述了我们的公式的优点和缺点，并详细解释了如何在为资源受限的自治系统生成抽象的背景下解释我们的方法。结果表明，多分辨率树空间上的信息论抽象问题可以表示为整数线性规划（ILP）问题。我们通过多个示例演示了该方法，并提供了详细讨论所提出的框架与现有方法相比的差异。最后，我们考虑 ILP 问题的线性程序松弛，从而证明可以通过求解凸程序来获得多分辨率信息论树抽象。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种整数线性规划方法，用于为资源受限的自主代理生成任务相关、多分辨率的环境抽象。
AI.motivation: 资源受限的自主代理需要高效的信息处理能力，传统方法难以平衡抽象精度与计算资源消耗，需结合信息论与优化方法解决此问题。
AI.method: 将信息瓶颈理论与整数线性规划结合，通过搜索多分辨率树结构的最优编码器，统一层次化结构、信号编码与信息压缩方法。
AI.result: 证明了多分辨率树抽象可转化为整数线性规划问题，并通过凸规划松弛实现有效求解；在多个示例中验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为资源受限系统提供了任务驱动的信息抽象框架，通过线性规划松弛可进一步提升计算效率，相较于现有方法更具灵活性和实用性。

authors_text: Zhilan Zhou,Wenyuan Wang,Mengtian Guo,Yue Wang,David Gotz
title: A Design Space for Surfacing Content Recommendations in Visual Analytic Platforms
title_zh: 在视觉分析平台中呈现内容推荐的设计空间
comment: Accepted to VIS2022
comments: Accepted to VIS2022
abstract: Recommendation algorithms have been leveraged in various ways within visualization systems to assist users as they perform of a range of information tasks. One common focus for these techniques has been the recommendation of content, rather than visual form, as a means to assist users in the identification of information that is relevant to their task context. A wide variety of techniques have been proposed to address this general problem, with a range of design choices in how these solutions surface relevant information to users. This paper reviews the state-of-the-art in how visualization systems surface recommended content to users during users' visual analysis; introduces a four-dimensional design space for visual content recommendation based on a characterization of prior work; and discusses key observations regarding common patterns and future research opportunities.
summary: Recommendation algorithms have been leveraged in various ways within visualization systems to assist users as they perform of a range of information tasks. One common focus for these techniques has been the recommendation of content, rather than visual form, as a means to assist users in the identification of information that is relevant to their task context. A wide variety of techniques have been proposed to address this general problem, with a range of design choices in how these solutions surface relevant information to users. This paper reviews the state-of-the-art in how visualization systems surface recommended content to users during users' visual analysis; introduces a four-dimensional design space for visual content recommendation based on a characterization of prior work; and discusses key observations regarding common patterns and future research opportunities.
abstract_zh: 推荐算法已在可视化系统中以各种方式利用，以帮助用户执行一系列信息任务。这些技术的一个共同焦点是内容推荐，而不是视觉形式，作为帮助用户识别与其任务上下文相关的信息的一种手段。人们已经提出了多种技术来解决这个普遍问题，并在这些解决方案如何向用户呈现相关信息方面提供了一系列设计选择。本文回顾了可视化系统如何在用户视觉分析过程中向用户呈现推荐内容的最新技术；基于先前工作的特征，引入了用于视觉内容推荐的四维设计空间；并讨论有关常见模式和未来研究机会的关键观察结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个四维设计空间，用于分析可视化分析平台中内容推荐的呈现方式，并总结现有方法的共性与未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 现有可视化系统在推荐内容时缺乏系统性设计框架，导致方法分散且难以指导实践与研究。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析现有内容推荐技术，提炼出四个关键设计维度（如推荐时机、呈现形式、交互方式、反馈机制），构建设计空间框架。
AI.result: 总结出内容推荐的常见模式（如实时推荐、侧边栏展示），并指出未来需关注动态上下文适应性、可解释性及用户控制等方面。
AI.conclusion: 该设计空间为可视化内容推荐系统的设计与研究提供了结构化参考，有助于推动领域方法的系统化发展。

authors_text: Ramtin Afshar,Michael T. Goodrich
title: Exact Learning of Multitrees and Almost-Trees Using Path Queries
title_zh: 使用路径查询精确学习多树和准树
abstract: Given a directed graph, G=(V,E), a path query, path(u,v), returns whether there is a directed path from u to v in G, for u,v vertices in V. Given only V, exactly learning all the edges in G using path queries is often impossible, since path queries cannot detect transitive edges. In this paper, we study the query complexity of exact learning for cases when learning G is possible using path queries. In particular, we provide efficient learning algorithms, as well as lower bounds, for multitrees and almost-trees, including butterfly networks.
summary: Given a directed graph, G=(V,E), a path query, path(u,v), returns whether there is a directed path from u to v in G, for u,v vertices in V. Given only V, exactly learning all the edges in G using path queries is often impossible, since path queries cannot detect transitive edges. In this paper, we study the query complexity of exact learning for cases when learning G is possible using path queries. In particular, we provide efficient learning algorithms, as well as lower bounds, for multitrees and almost-trees, including butterfly networks.
abstract_zh: 给定一个有向图 G=(V,E)，路径查询 path(u,v) 返回 G 中对于 V 中的 u,v 顶点是否存在从 u 到 v 的有向路径。仅给定 V，使用路径查询准确学习 G 中的所有边通常是不可能的，因为路径查询无法检测传递边。在本文中，我们研究了当可以使用路径查询学习 G 的情况下精确学习的查询复杂性。特别是，我们为多树和类树（包括蝴蝶网络）提供高效的学习算法以及下界。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过路径查询精确学习多树和近树结构的有向图边。
AI.motivation: 路径查询无法检测传递边，导致完全学习有向图通常不可行，但多树和近树等特殊结构可能通过路径查询实现精确学习。
AI.method: 提出高效学习算法并分析查询复杂度下界，针对多树、近树及蝴蝶网络等结构设计特定方法。
AI.result: 为多树和近树类图结构提供了多项式时间学习算法，并证明了其查询复杂度的理论下界。
AI.conclusion: 针对特定图结构可实现基于路径查询的精确学习，为相关领域提供了理论支持和实用算法框架。

Given only V, exactly learning all the edges in G using path queries is often impossible, since path queries cannot detect transitive edges. In this paper, we study the query complexity of exact learning for cases when learning G is possible using path queries. In particular, we provide efficient learning algorithms, as well as lower bounds, for multitrees and almost-trees, including butterfly networks. 给定一个有向图 G=(V,E)，路径查询 path(u,v) 返回 G 中对于 V 中的 u,v 顶点是否存在从 u 到 v 的有向路径。仅给定 V，使用路径查询准确学习 G 中的所有边通常是不可能的，因为路径查询无法检测传递边。在本文中，我们研究了当可以使用路径查询学习 G 的情况下精确学习的查询复杂性。特别是，我们为多树和类树（包括蝴蝶网络）提供高效的学习算法以及下界。 本文研究如何通过路径查询精确学习多树和近树结构的有向图边。 Ramtin Afshar,Michael T. Goodrich cs.DS

authors_text: Haoran Wang,Di Xu,Dongliang He,Fu Li,Zhong Ji,Jungong Han,Errui Ding
title: Boosting Video-Text Retrieval with Explicit High-Level Semantics
title_zh: 通过显式高级语义促进视频文本检索
comment: Accepted by ACMMM 2022
comments: Accepted by ACMMM 2022
abstract: Video-text retrieval (VTR) is an attractive yet challenging task for multi-modal understanding, which aims to search for relevant video (text) given a query (video). Existing methods typically employ completely heterogeneous visual-textual information to align video and text, whilst lacking the awareness of homogeneous high-level semantic information residing in both modalities. To fill this gap, in this work, we propose a novel visual-linguistic aligning model named HiSE for VTR, which improves the cross-modal representation by incorporating explicit high-level semantics. First, we explore the hierarchical property of explicit high-level semantics, and further decompose it into two levels, i.e. discrete semantics and holistic semantics. Specifically, for visual branch, we exploit an off-the-shelf semantic entity predictor to generate discrete high-level semantics. In parallel, a trained video captioning model is employed to output holistic high-level semantics. As for the textual modality, we parse the text into three parts including occurrence, action and entity. In particular, the occurrence corresponds to the holistic high-level semantics, meanwhile both action and entity represent the discrete ones. Then, different graph reasoning techniques are utilized to promote the interaction between holistic and discrete high-level semantics. Extensive experiments demonstrate that, with the aid of explicit high-level semantics, our method achieves the superior performance over state-of-the-art methods on three benchmark datasets, including MSR-VTT, MSVD and DiDeMo.

To fill this gap, in this work, we propose a novel visual-linguistic aligning model named HiSE for VTR, which improves the cross-modal representation by incorporating explicit high-level semantics. First, we explore the hierarchical property of explicit high-level semantics, and further decompose it into two levels, i.e. discrete semantics and holistic semantics. In parallel, a trained video captioning model is employed to output holistic high-level semantics. As for the textual modality, we parse the text into three parts including occurrence, action and entity. In particular, the occurrence corresponds to the holistic high-level semantics, meanwhile both action and entity represent the discrete ones. Then, different graph reasoning techniques are utilized to promote the interaction between holistic and discrete high-level semantics. Extensive experiments demonstrate that, with the aid of explicit high-level semantics, our method achieves the superior performance over state-of-the-art methods on three benchmark datasets, including MSR-VTT, MSVD and DiDeMo.
abstract_zh: 视频文本检索（VTR）对于多模态理解来说是一项有吸引力但具有挑战性的任务，其目的是在给定查询（视频）的情况下搜索相关视频（文本）。现有方法通常采用完全异构的视觉文本信息来对齐视频和文本，同时缺乏对两种模式中存在的同质高级语义信息的认识。为了填补这一空白，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的视觉语言对齐模型，名为 HiSE for VTR，它通过结合显式的高级语义来改进跨模态表示。首先，我们探讨显式高级语义的层次性质，并将其进一步分解为两个层次，即离散语义和整体语义。具体来说，对于视觉分支，我们利用现成的语义实体预测器来生成离散的高级语义。同时，采用经过训练的视频字幕模型来输出整体高级语义。对于文本模态，我们将文本解析为事件、动作和实体三个部分。特别是，事件对应于整体的高级语义，而动作和实体则代表离散的语义。然后，利用不同的图推理技术来促进整体和离散高级语义之间的交互。大量实验表明，借助显式高级语义，我们的方法在三个基准数据集（包括 MSR-VTT、MSVD 和 DiDeMo）上实现了优于最先进方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为HiSE的新型视觉-语言对齐模型，通过引入显式高层语义提升视频-文本检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频-文本检索方法未能有效利用视频和文本中共同存在的高层语义信息，导致跨模态对齐效果受限。
AI.method: 将高层语义分解为离散语义和整体语义两层次，通过语义实体预测器和视频字幕模型分别提取视觉模态的离散/整体语义，同时解析文本为发生、动作、实体三部分，利用图推理技术促进两种语义间的交互。
AI.result: 在MSR-VTT、MSVD和DiDeMo三个基准数据集上，HiSE方法均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模高层语义的交互机制能有效提升视频-文本检索性能，为多模态对齐提供新思路。

authors_text: Razan Ghzouli,Thorsten Berger,Einar Broch Johnsen,Andrzej Wasowski,Swaib Dragule
title: Behavior Trees and State Machines in Robotics Applications
title_zh: 机器人应用中的行为树和状态机
comment: Published at IEEE TSE as a journal extension of a preceding SLE paper (available as arXiv:2010.06256). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2010.06256
comments: Published at IEEE TSE as a journal extension of a preceding SLE paper (available as arXiv:2010.06256). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2010.06256
abstract: Autonomous robots combine skills to form increasingly complex behaviors, called missions. While skills are often programmed at a relatively low abstraction level, their coordination is architecturally separated and often expressed in higher-level languages or frameworks. State machines have been the go-to language to model behavior for decades, but recently, behavior trees have gained attention among roboticists. Although several implementations of behavior trees are in use, little is known about their usage and scope in the real world.How do concepts offered by behavior trees relate to traditional languages, such as state machines? How are concepts in behavior trees and state machines used in actual applications? This paper is a study of the key language concepts in behavior trees as realized in domain-specific languages (DSLs), internal and external DSLs offered as libraries, and their use in open-source robotic applications supported by the Robot Operating System (ROS). We analyze behavior-tree DSLs and compare them to the standard language for behavior models in robotics:state machines. We identify DSLs for both behavior-modeling languages, and we analyze five in-depth.We mine open-source repositories for robotic applications that use the analyzed DSLs and analyze their usage. We identify similarities between behavior trees and state machines in terms of language design and the concepts offered to accommodate the needs of the robotics domain. We observed that the usage of behavior-tree DSLs in open-source projects is increasing rapidly. We observed similar usage patterns at model structure and at code reuse in the behavior-tree and state-machine models within the mined open-source projects. We contribute all extracted models as a dataset, hoping to inspire the community to use and further develop behavior trees, associated tools, and analysis techniques.

abstract_zh: 自主机器人结合技能来形成日益复杂的行为，称为任务。虽然技能通常是在相对较低的抽象级别上编程的，但它们的协调在架构上是分离的，并且通常用更高级别的语言或框架来表达。几十年来，状态机一直是行为建模的首选语言，但最近，行为树引起了机器人专家的关注。尽管行为树的几种实现正在使用中，但人们对它们在现实世界中的用法和范围知之甚少。行为树提供的概念如何与传统语言（例如状态机）相关？行为树和状态机中的概念如何在实际应用中使用？本文研究了行为树中以特定领域语言 (DSL) 实现的关键语言概念、作为库提供的内部和外部 DSL，以及它们在机器人操作系统 (ROS) 支持的开源机器人应用程序中的使用。我们分析行为树 DSL，并将其与机器人行为模型的标准语言：状态机进行比较。我们确定了两种行为建模语言的 DSL，并深入分析了五种语言。我们挖掘了使用所分析的 DSL 的机器人应用程序的开源存储库并分析了它们的使用情况。我们确定了行为树和状态机在语言设计和为满足机器人领域需求而提供的概念方面的相似之处。我们观察到，行为树 DSL 在开源项目中的使用正在迅速增加。我们在挖掘的开源项目中的行为树和状态机模型中的模型结构和代码重用方面观察到类似的使用模式。我们将所有提取的模型作为数据集提供，希望激励社区使用和进一步开发行为树、相关工具和分析技术。

AI.tldr: 研究行为树和状态机在机器人应用中的使用情况，比较它们的领域特定语言实现，并分析开源项目中的应用。
AI.motivation: 了解行为树与传统状态机的概念关系及其在实际机器人应用中的使用情况，填补现有研究空白。
AI.method: 通过分析领域特定语言（DSL）实现，比较行为树与状态机，并挖掘使用这些DSL的开源机器人项目以分析其应用模式。
AI.result: 发现行为树DSL在开源项目中使用快速增长，且行为树与状态机在模型结构和代码复用方面存在相似模式。
AI.conclusion: 贡献了提取的模型数据集，旨在促进行为树及其工具和分析技术的进一步发展。

We contribute all extracted models as a dataset, hoping to inspire the community to use and further develop behavior trees, associated tools, and analysis techniques. 自主机器人结合技能来形成日益复杂的行为，称为任务。虽然技能通常是在相对较低的抽象级别上编程的，但它们的协调在架构上是分离的，并且通常用更高级别的语言或框架来表达。几十年来，状态机一直是行为建模的首选语言，但最近，行为树引起了机器人专家的关注。尽管行为树的几种实现正在使用中，但人们对它们在现实世界中的用法和范围知之甚少。行为树提供的概念如何与传统语言（例如状态机）相关？行为树和状态机中的概念如何在实际应用中使用？本文研究了行为树中以特定领域语言 (DSL) 实现的关键语言概念、作为库提供的内部和外部 DSL，以及它们在机器人操作系统 (ROS) 支持的开源机器人应用程序中的使用。我们分析行为树 DSL，并将其与机器人行为模型的标准语言：状态机进行比较。我们确定了两种行为建模语言的 DSL，并深入分析了五种语言。我们挖掘了使用所分析的 DSL 的机器人应用程序的开源存储库并分析了它们的使用情况。我们确定了行为树和状态机在语言设计和为满足机器人领域需求而提供的概念方面的相似之处。我们观察到，行为树 DSL 在开源项目中的使用正在迅速增加。我们在挖掘的开源项目中的行为树和状态机模型中的模型结构和代码重用方面观察到类似的使用模式。我们将所有提取的模型作为数据集提供，希望激励社区使用和进一步开发行为树、相关工具和分析技术。 研究行为树和状态机在机器人应用中的使用情况，比较它们的领域特定语言实现，并分析开源项目中的应用。 Razan Ghzouli,Thorsten Berger,Einar Broch Johnsen,Andrzej Wasowski,Swaib Dragule cs.RO,cs.SE

authors_text: Pengbo Wei,David Ahmedt-Aristizabal,Harshala Gammulle,Simon Denman,Mohammad Ali Armin
title: Vision-Based Activity Recognition in Children with Autism-Related Behaviors
title_zh: 有自闭症相关行为的儿童的基于视觉的活动识别
comment: ef:Heliyon, Volume 9, Issue 6, June 2023, e16763
comments: ef:Heliyon, Volume 9, Issue 6, June 2023, e16763
abstract: Advances in machine learning and contactless sensors have enabled the understanding complex human behaviors in a healthcare setting. In particular, several deep learning systems have been introduced to enable comprehensive analysis of neuro-developmental conditions such as Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD). This condition affects children from their early developmental stages onwards, and diagnosis relies entirely on observing the child's behavior and detecting behavioral cues. However, the diagnosis process is time-consuming as it requires long-term behavior observation, and the scarce availability of specialists. We demonstrate the effect of a region-based computer vision system to help clinicians and parents analyze a child's behavior. For this purpose, we adopt and enhance a dataset for analyzing autism-related actions using videos of children captured in uncontrolled environments (e.g. videos collected with consumer-grade cameras, in varied environments). The data is pre-processed by detecting the target child in the video to reduce the impact of background noise. Motivated by the effectiveness of temporal convolutional models, we propose both light-weight and conventional models capable of extracting action features from video frames and classifying autism-related behaviors by analyzing the relationships between frames in a video. Through extensive evaluations on the feature extraction and learning strategies, we demonstrate that the best performance is achieved with an Inflated 3D Convnet and Multi-Stage Temporal Convolutional Networks, achieving a 0.83 Weighted F1-score for classification of the three autism-related actions, outperforming existing methods. We also propose a light-weight solution by employing the ESNet backbone within the same system, achieving competitive results of 0.71 Weighted F1-score, and enabling potential deployment on embedded systems.
summary: Advances in machine learning and contactless sensors have enabled the understanding complex human behaviors in a healthcare setting. In particular, several deep learning systems have been introduced to enable comprehensive analysis of neuro-developmental conditions such as Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD). This condition affects children from their early developmental stages onwards, and diagnosis relies entirely on observing the child's behavior and detecting behavioral cues. However, the diagnosis process is time-consuming as it requires long-term behavior observation, and the scarce availability of specialists. We demonstrate the effect of a region-based computer vision system to help clinicians and parents analyze a child's behavior. For this purpose, we adopt and enhance a dataset for analyzing autism-related actions using videos of children captured in uncontrolled environments (e.g. videos collected with consumer-grade cameras, in varied environments). The data is pre-processed by detecting the target child in the video to reduce the impact of background noise. Motivated by the effectiveness of temporal convolutional models, we propose both light-weight and conventional models capable of extracting action features from video frames and classifying autism-related behaviors by analyzing the relationships between frames in a video. Through extensive evaluations on the feature extraction and learning strategies, we demonstrate that the best performance is achieved with an Inflated 3D Convnet and Multi-Stage Temporal Convolutional Networks, achieving a 0.83 Weighted F1-score for classification of the three autism-related actions, outperforming existing methods. We also propose a light-weight solution by employing the ESNet backbone within the same system, achieving competitive results of 0.71 Weighted F1-score, and enabling potential deployment on embedded systems.
abstract_zh: 机器学习和非接触式传感器的进步使得人们能够理解医疗保健环境中复杂的人类行为。特别是，已经引入了几种深度学习系统来全面分析自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）等神经发育状况。这种情况从早期发育阶段开始就影响儿童，诊断完全依赖于观察儿童的行为和检测行为线索。然而，诊断过程非常耗时，因为它需要长期的行为观察，而且专家稀缺。我们展示了基于区域的计算机视觉系统的效果，以帮助临床医生和家长分析孩子的行为。为此，我们采用并增强了一个数据集，用于使用在不受控制的环境中捕获的儿童视频（例如，在不同环境中使用消费级相机收集的视频）来分析与自闭症相关的行为。通过检测视频中的目标儿童对数据进行预处理，以减少背景噪声的影响。受时间卷积模型有效性的启发，我们提出了轻量级模型和传统模型，能够从视频帧中提取动作特征，并通过分析视频中帧之间的关系对自闭症相关行为进行分类。通过对特征提取和学习策略的广泛评估，我们证明了通过膨胀 3D 卷积网络和多阶段时间卷积网络实现了最佳性能，对三种自闭症相关动作的分类实现了 0.83 的加权 F1 分数，优于现有方法。我们还提出了一种轻量级解决方案，通过在同一系统中采用 ESNet 主干网，实现了 0.71 加权 F1 分数的竞争结果，并实现了在嵌入式系统上的潜在部署。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于视觉的活动识别系统，用于分析自闭症相关行为，辅助临床诊断。
AI.motivation: 自闭症诊断依赖长期行为观察且专业人员稀缺，传统方法效率低，需开发自动化工具辅助分析。
AI.method: 采用区域计算机视觉系统，结合改进的时序卷积模型（如Inflated 3D Convnet和多阶段时序卷积网络），利用视频帧间关系提取特征并分类行为。
AI.result: 在三个自闭症相关动作分类任务中，最佳模型达到0.83加权F1分数，轻量级方案ESNet实现0.71分数，具备嵌入式部署潜力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的模型优于现有方法，为自闭症行为分析提供高效自动化解决方案，支持临床与家庭场景应用。

authors_text: Yu-Ki Lee,Yue Hao,Zhonghua Xi,Woongbae Kim,Youngmin Park,Kyu-Jin Cho,Jyh-Ming Lien,In-Suk Choi
title: Origami-based Zygote structure enables pluripotent shape-transforming deployable structure
title_zh: 基于折纸的 Zygote 结构实现多能变形可部署结构
abstract: We propose an algorithmic framework of a pluripotent structure evolving from a simple compact structure into diverse complex 3-D structures for designing the shape transformable, reconfigurable, and deployable structures and robots. Our algorithmic approach suggests a way of transforming a compact structure consisting of uniform building blocks into a large, desired 3-D shape. Analogous to the pluripotent stem cells that can grow into a preprogrammed shape according to coded information, which we call DNA, compactly stacked panels named the zygote structure can evolve into arbitrary 3-D structures by programming their connection path. Our stacking algorithm obtains this coded sequence by inversely stacking the voxelized surface of the desired structure into a tree. Applying the connection path obtained by the stacking algorithm, the compactly stacked panels named the zygote structure can be deployed into diverse large 3-D structures. We conceptually demonstrated our pluripotent evolving structure by energy releasing commercial spring hinges and thermally actuated shape memory alloy (SMA) hinges, respectively. We also show that the proposed concept enables the fabrication of large structures in a significantly smaller workspace.
summary: We propose an algorithmic framework of a pluripotent structure evolving from a simple compact structure into diverse complex 3-D structures for designing the shape transformable, reconfigurable, and deployable structures and robots. Our algorithmic approach suggests a way of transforming a compact structure consisting of uniform building blocks into a large, desired 3-D shape. Analogous to the pluripotent stem cells that can grow into a preprogrammed shape according to coded information, which we call DNA, compactly stacked panels named the zygote structure can evolve into arbitrary 3-D structures by programming their connection path. Our stacking algorithm obtains this coded sequence by inversely stacking the voxelized surface of the desired structure into a tree. Applying the connection path obtained by the stacking algorithm, the compactly stacked panels named the zygote structure can be deployed into diverse large 3-D structures. We conceptually demonstrated our pluripotent evolving structure by energy releasing commercial spring hinges and thermally actuated shape memory alloy (SMA) hinges, respectively. We also show that the proposed concept enables the fabrication of large structures in a significantly smaller workspace.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种多能结构的算法框架，从简单的紧凑结构演变为各种复杂的 3D 结构，用于设计形状可变形、可重构和可部署的结构和机器人。我们的算法方法提出了一种将由均匀构建块组成的紧凑结构转换为大型所需 3D 形状的方法。类似于多能干细胞可以根据编码信息（我们称之为 DNA）生长成预编程的形状，称为合子结构的紧凑堆叠的面板可以通过编程其连接路径演变成任意 3D 结构。我们的堆叠算法通过将所需结构的体素化表面反向堆叠到树中来获得此编码序列。应用堆叠算法获得的连接路径，称为合子结构的紧凑堆叠面板可以部署成各种大型3D结构。我们分别通过释放能量的商用弹簧铰链和热驱动形状记忆合金（SMA）铰链从概念上展示了我们的多能进化结构。我们还表明，所提出的概念可以在更小的工作空间中制造大型结构。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于折纸的zygote结构，通过算法实现从紧凑结构到复杂3-D结构的可变形、可展开结构设计。
AI.motivation: 传统方法制造大型结构需占用较大工作空间，而该方法可在有限空间内实现结构展开，提升灵活性和应用范围。
AI.method: 通过逆向堆叠目标结构的体素化表面生成树状结构编码，再根据连接路径展开为3-D结构，利用弹簧铰链和形状记忆合金铰链实现形状变换。
AI.result: 成功验证了结构的形状变换能力，并展示了在受限空间内制造大型复杂结构的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为可变形结构设计提供了新思路，具有在机器人和工程结构领域的广泛应用潜力。

We also show that the proposed concept enables the fabrication of large structures in a significantly smaller workspace. 我们提出了一种多能结构的算法框架，从简单的紧凑结构演变为各种复杂的 3D 结构，用于设计形状可变形、可重构和可部署的结构和机器人。我们的算法方法提出了一种将由均匀构建块组成的紧凑结构转换为大型所需 3D 形状的方法。类似于多能干细胞可以根据编码信息（我们称之为 DNA）生长成预编程的形状，称为合子结构的紧凑堆叠的面板可以通过编程其连接路径演变成任意 3D 结构。我们的堆叠算法通过将所需结构的体素化表面反向堆叠到树中来获得此编码序列。应用堆叠算法获得的连接路径，称为合子结构的紧凑堆叠面板可以部署成各种大型3D结构。我们分别通过释放能量的商用弹簧铰链和热驱动形状记忆合金（SMA）铰链从概念上展示了我们的多能进化结构。我们还表明，所提出的概念可以在更小的工作空间中制造大型结构。 提出一种基于折纸的zygote结构，通过算法实现从紧凑结构到复杂3-D结构的可变形、可展开结构设计。 Yu-Ki Lee,Yue Hao,Zhonghua Xi,Woongbae Kim,Youngmin Park,Kyu-Jin Cho,Jyh-Ming Lien,In-Suk Choi cs.CE,cs.RO

authors_text: Ting Chen,Ruixiang Zhang,Geoffrey Hinton
title: Analog Bits: Generating Discrete Data using Diffusion Models with Self-Conditioning
title_zh: 模拟位：使用具有自调节功能的扩散模型生成离散数据
comment: ICLR'23
comments: ICLR'23
abstract: We present Bit Diffusion: a simple and generic approach for generating discrete data with continuous state and continuous time diffusion models. The main idea behind our approach is to first represent the discrete data as binary bits, and then train a continuous diffusion model to model these bits as real numbers which we call analog bits. To generate samples, the model first generates the analog bits, which are then thresholded to obtain the bits that represent the discrete variables. We further propose two simple techniques, namely Self-Conditioning and Asymmetric Time Intervals, which lead to a significant improvement in sample quality. Despite its simplicity, the proposed approach can achieve strong performance in both discrete image generation and image captioning tasks. For discrete image generation, we significantly improve previous state-of-the-art on both CIFAR-10 (which has 3K discrete 8-bit tokens) and ImageNet-64x64 (which has 12K discrete 8-bit tokens), outperforming the best autoregressive model in both sample quality (measured by FID) and efficiency. For image captioning on MS-COCO dataset, our approach achieves competitive results compared to autoregressive models.
summary: We present Bit Diffusion: a simple and generic approach for generating discrete data with continuous state and continuous time diffusion models. The main idea behind our approach is to first represent the discrete data as binary bits, and then train a continuous diffusion model to model these bits as real numbers which we call analog bits. To generate samples, the model first generates the analog bits, which are then thresholded to obtain the bits that represent the discrete variables. We further propose two simple techniques, namely Self-Conditioning and Asymmetric Time Intervals, which lead to a significant improvement in sample quality. Despite its simplicity, the proposed approach can achieve strong performance in both discrete image generation and image captioning tasks. For discrete image generation, we significantly improve previous state-of-the-art on both CIFAR-10 (which has 3K discrete 8-bit tokens) and ImageNet-64x64 (which has 12K discrete 8-bit tokens), outperforming the best autoregressive model in both sample quality (measured by FID) and efficiency. For image captioning on MS-COCO dataset, our approach achieves competitive results compared to autoregressive models.
abstract_zh: We present Bit Diffusion: a simple and generic approach for generating discrete data with continuous state and continuous time diffusion models.我们的方法背后的主要思想是首先将离散数据表示为二进制位，然后训练连续扩散模型将这些位建模为实数，我们称之为模拟位。为了生成样本，模型首先生成模拟位，然后对模拟位进行阈值处理以获得代表离散变量的位。我们进一步提出了两种简单的技术，即自我调节和不对称时间间隔，这可以显着提高样本质量。 Despite its simplicity, the proposed approach can achieve strong performance in both discrete image generation and image captioning tasks.对于离散图像生成，我们显着改进了 CIFAR-10（具有 3K 离散 8 位标记）和 ImageNet-64x64（具有 12K 离散 8 位标记）的先前最先进技术，在样本质量（通过 FID 测量）和效率方面均优于最佳自回归模型。 For image captioning on MS-COCO dataset, our approach achieves competitive results compared to autoregressive models.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于扩散模型和自条件技术的离散数据生成方法。
AI.motivation: 传统离散数据生成方法（如自回归模型）存在效率低、难以建模复杂分布等问题，而扩散模型在连续数据生成中表现优异，但直接处理离散数据存在挑战。
AI.method: 将离散数据编码为二进制位，通过连续扩散模型生成模拟位（analog bits），再经阈值处理还原为离散数据；引入自条件机制和非对称时间间隔技术优化生成质量。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和ImageNet-64x64离散图像生成任务中显著超越现有SOTA方法（FID指标更优且效率更高），在MS-COCO图像字幕任务中与自回归模型表现相当。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过简单而有效的技术改进，为离散数据生成提供了新的解决方案，在多个任务中验证了其优越性。

authors_text: Tianyi Hu,Monika Kwiatkowski,Simon Matern,Olaf Hellwich
title: Content-Based Landmark Retrieval Combining Global and Local Features using Siamese Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用暹罗神经网络结合全局和局部特征的基于内容的地标检索
abstract: In this work, we present a method for landmark retrieval that utilizes global and local features. A Siamese network is used for global feature extraction and metric learning, which gives an initial ranking of the landmark search. We utilize the extracted feature maps from the Siamese architecture as local descriptors, the search results are then further refined using a cosine similarity between local descriptors. We conduct a deeper analysis of the Google Landmark Dataset, which is used for evaluation, and augment the dataset to handle various intra-class variances. Furthermore, we conduct several experiments to compare the effects of transfer learning and metric learning, as well as experiments using other local descriptors. We show that a re-ranking using local features can improve the search results. We believe that the proposed local feature extraction using cosine similarity is a simple approach that can be extended to many other retrieval tasks.
summary: In this work, we present a method for landmark retrieval that utilizes global and local features. A Siamese network is used for global feature extraction and metric learning, which gives an initial ranking of the landmark search. We utilize the extracted feature maps from the Siamese architecture as local descriptors, the search results are then further refined using a cosine similarity between local descriptors. We conduct a deeper analysis of the Google Landmark Dataset, which is used for evaluation, and augment the dataset to handle various intra-class variances. Furthermore, we conduct several experiments to compare the effects of transfer learning and metric learning, as well as experiments using other local descriptors. We show that a re-ranking using local features can improve the search results. We believe that the proposed local feature extraction using cosine similarity is a simple approach that can be extended to many other retrieval tasks.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种利用全局和局部特征的地标检索方法。连体网络用于全局特征提取和度量学习，从而给出地标搜索的初始排名。我们利用从 Siamese 架构中提取的特征图作为局部描述符，然后使用局部描述符之间的余​​弦相似度进一步细化搜索结果。我们对用于评估的 Google Landmark 数据集进行了更深入的分析，并扩充了数据集以处理各种类内差异。此外，我们还进行了多项实验来比较迁移学习和度量学习的效果，以及使用其他局部描述符的实验。我们表明，使用局部特征重新排名可以改善搜索结果。我们认为，所提出的使用余弦相似度的局部特征提取是一种简单的方法，可以扩展到许多其他检索任务。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合全局和局部特征的地标检索方法，利用孪生神经网络进行特征提取和度量学习，并通过局部描述符的余弦相似度优化检索结果。
AI.motivation: 现有地标检索方法可能未充分结合全局与局部特征，导致检索精度受限，需通过融合多尺度特征提升性能。
AI.method: 采用孪生网络提取全局特征并进行度量学习，利用其特征图作为局部描述符，通过余弦相似度计算局部特征重排序；同时对数据集进行增强处理，并比较迁移学习与度量学习的效果。
AI.result: 实验表明局部特征重排序有效提升检索精度，在Google Landmark数据集上表现优于其他局部描述符方法。
AI.conclusion: 局部特征余弦相似度重排序是一种简单有效的改进方法，可推广至其他检索任务，为多特征融合提供新思路。

authors_text: Mehdi Khoshboresh-Masouleh,Reza Shah-Hosseini
title: SA-NET.v2: Real-time vehicle detection from oblique UAV images with use of uncertainty estimation in deep meta-learning
title_zh: SA-NET.v2：利用深度元学习中的不确定性估计从倾斜无人机图像中进行实时车辆检测
comment: ef:The International Archives of the Photogrammetry, Remote Sensing and Spatial Information Sciences, 2022
comments: ef:The International Archives of the Photogrammetry, Remote Sensing and Spatial Information Sciences, 2022
abstract: In recent years, unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) imaging is a suitable solution for real-time monitoring different vehicles on the urban scale. Real-time vehicle detection with the use of uncertainty estimation in deep meta-learning for the portable platforms (e.g., UAV) potentially improves video understanding in real-world applications with a small training dataset, while many vehicle monitoring approaches appear to understand single-time detection with a big training dataset. The purpose of real-time vehicle detection from oblique UAV images is to locate the vehicle on the time series UAV images by using semantic segmentation. Real-time vehicle detection is more difficult due to the variety of depth and scale vehicles in oblique view UAV images. Motivated by these facts, in this manuscript, we consider the problem of real-time vehicle detection for oblique UAV images based on a small training dataset and deep meta-learning. The proposed architecture, called SA-Net.v2, is a developed method based on the SA-CNN for real-time vehicle detection by reformulating the squeeze-and-attention mechanism. The SA-Net.v2 is composed of two components, including the squeeze-and-attention function that extracts the high-level feature based on a small training dataset, and the gated CNN. For the real-time vehicle detection scenario, we test our model on the UAVid dataset. UAVid is a time series oblique UAV images dataset consisting of 30 video sequences. We examine the proposed method's applicability for stand real-time vehicle detection in urban environments using time series UAV images. The experiments show that the SA-Net.v2 achieves promising performance in time series oblique UAV images.

Motivated by these facts, in this manuscript, we consider the problem of real-time vehicle detection for oblique UAV images based on a small training dataset and deep meta-learning. The proposed architecture, called SA-Net.v2, is a developed method based on the SA-CNN for real-time vehicle detection by reformulating the squeeze-and-attention mechanism. The SA-Net.v2 is composed of two components, including the squeeze-and-attention function that extracts the high-level feature based on a small training dataset, and the gated CNN. For the real-time vehicle detection scenario, we test our model on the UAVid dataset. UAVid is a time series oblique UAV images dataset consisting of 30 video sequences. We examine the proposed method's applicability for stand real-time vehicle detection in urban environments using time series UAV images. The experiments show that the SA-Net.v2 achieves promising performance in time series oblique UAV images.
abstract_zh: 近年来，无人机（UAV）成像是实时监控城市范围内不同车辆的合适解决方案。在便携式平台（例如无人机）的深度元学习中使用不确定性估计的实时车辆检测可能会通过小型训练数据集改善现实应用中的视频理解，而许多车辆监控方法似乎可以通过大型训练数据集理解单次检测。 The purpose of real-time vehicle detection from oblique UAV images is to locate the vehicle on the time series UAV images by using semantic segmentation.由于斜视无人机图像中车辆的深度和尺度多种多样，实时车辆检测变得更加困难。 Motivated by these facts, in this manuscript, we consider the problem of real-time vehicle detection for oblique UAV images based on a small training dataset and deep meta-learning. The proposed architecture, called SA-Net.v2, is a developed method based on the SA-CNN for real-time vehicle detection by reformulating the squeeze-and-attention mechanism. The SA-Net.v2 is composed of two components, including the squeeze-and-attention function that extracts the high-level feature based on a small training dataset, and the gated CNN.对于实时车辆检测场景，我们在 UAVid 数据集上测试我们的模型。 UAVid 是一个时间序列倾斜无人机图像数据集，由 30 个视频序列组成。我们使用时间序列无人机图像检查了所提出的方法在城市环境中实时车辆检测的适用性。实验表明，SA-Net.v2 在时间序列倾斜无人机图像中取得了良好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SA-NET.v2模型，用于基于倾斜无人机图像的实时车辆检测，结合深度元学习和不确定性估计方法。
AI.motivation: 传统车辆检测方法依赖大规模训练数据，而无人机等移动平台需在有限数据下实现实时检测。倾斜视角下车辆尺度和深度变化导致检测难度增加，需改进现有方法。
AI.method: 设计SA-Net.v2架构，包含改进的squeeze-and-attention机制（提取高层特征）和门控CNN模块，通过元学习框架结合不确定性估计提升小数据集下的实时检测性能。
AI.result: 在包含30个视频序列的UAVid数据集上测试，模型在时间序列倾斜无人机图像中实现了有竞争力的车辆检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: SA-Net.v2通过元学习和不确定性估计有效解决了倾斜视角下实时车辆检测的挑战，为城市环境中的无人机监控提供了可行方案。

search_text: SA-NET.v2: Real-time vehicle detection from oblique UAV images with use of uncertainty estimation in deep meta-learning SA-NET.v2：利用深度元学习中的不确定性估计从倾斜无人机图像中进行实时车辆检测 In recent years, unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) imaging is a suitable solution for real-time monitoring different vehicles on the urban scale. Real-time vehicle detection with the use of uncertainty estimation in deep meta-learning for the portable platforms (e.g., UAV) potentially improves video understanding in real-world applications with a small training dataset, while many vehicle monitoring approaches appear to understand single-time detection with a big training dataset. The purpose of real-time vehicle detection from oblique UAV images is to locate the vehicle on the time series UAV images by using semantic segmentation. Real-time vehicle detection is more difficult due to the variety of depth and scale vehicles in oblique view UAV images. Motivated by these facts, in this manuscript, we consider the problem of real-time vehicle detection for oblique UAV images based on a small training dataset and deep meta-learning. The proposed architecture, called SA-Net.v2, is a developed method based on the SA-CNN for real-time vehicle detection by reformulating the squeeze-and-attention mechanism. The SA-Net.v2 is composed of two components, including the squeeze-and-attention function that extracts the high-level feature based on a small training dataset, and the gated CNN. For the real-time vehicle detection scenario, we test our model on the UAVid dataset. UAVid is a time series oblique UAV images dataset consisting of 30 video sequences. We examine the proposed method's applicability for stand real-time vehicle detection in urban environments using time series UAV images. The experiments show that the SA-Net.v2 achieves promising performance in time series oblique UAV images. 近年来，无人机（UAV）成像是实时监控城市范围内不同车辆的合适解决方案。在便携式平台（例如无人机）的深度元学习中使用不确定性估计的实时车辆检测可能会通过小型训练数据集改善现实应用中的视频理解，而许多车辆监控方法似乎可以通过大型训练数据集理解单次检测。 The purpose of real-time vehicle detection from oblique UAV images is to locate the vehicle on the time series UAV images by using semantic segmentation.由于斜视无人机图像中车辆的深度和尺度多种多样，实时车辆检测变得更加困难。 Motivated by these facts, in this manuscript, we consider the problem of real-time vehicle detection for oblique UAV images based on a small training dataset and deep meta-learning. The proposed architecture, called SA-Net.v2, is a developed method based on the SA-CNN for real-time vehicle detection by reformulating the squeeze-and-attention mechanism. The SA-Net.v2 is composed of two components, including the squeeze-and-attention function that extracts the high-level feature based on a small training dataset, and the gated CNN.对于实时车辆检测场景，我们在 UAVid 数据集上测试我们的模型。 UAVid 是一个时间序列倾斜无人机图像数据集，由 30 个视频序列组成。我们使用时间序列无人机图像检查了所提出的方法在城市环境中实时车辆检测的适用性。实验表明，SA-Net.v2 在时间序列倾斜无人机图像中取得了良好的性能。 本文提出SA-NET.v2模型，用于基于倾斜无人机图像的实时车辆检测，结合深度元学习和不确定性估计方法。 Mehdi Khoshboresh-Masouleh,Reza Shah-Hosseini cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Johannes Jakubik,Jakob Schöffer,Vincent Hoge,Michael Vössing,Niklas Kühl
title: An Empirical Evaluation of Predicted Outcomes as Explanations in Human-AI Decision-Making
title_zh: 对预测结果的实证评估作为人类人工智能决策的解释
comment: Accepted at ECML XKDD workshop
comments: Accepted at ECML XKDD workshop
abstract: In this work, we empirically examine human-AI decision-making in the presence of explanations based on predicted outcomes. This type of explanation provides a human decision-maker with expected consequences for each decision alternative at inference time - where the predicted outcomes are typically measured in a problem-specific unit (e.g., profit in U.S. dollars). We conducted a pilot study in the context of peer-to-peer lending to assess the effects of providing predicted outcomes as explanations to lay study participants. Our preliminary findings suggest that people's reliance on AI recommendations increases compared to cases where no explanation or feature-based explanations are provided, especially when the AI recommendations are incorrect. This results in a hampered ability to distinguish correct from incorrect AI recommendations, which can ultimately affect decision quality in a negative way.
summary: In this work, we empirically examine human-AI decision-making in the presence of explanations based on predicted outcomes. This type of explanation provides a human decision-maker with expected consequences for each decision alternative at inference time - where the predicted outcomes are typically measured in a problem-specific unit (e.g., profit in U.S. dollars). We conducted a pilot study in the context of peer-to-peer lending to assess the effects of providing predicted outcomes as explanations to lay study participants. Our preliminary findings suggest that people's reliance on AI recommendations increases compared to cases where no explanation or feature-based explanations are provided, especially when the AI recommendations are incorrect. This results in a hampered ability to distinguish correct from incorrect AI recommendations, which can ultimately affect decision quality in a negative way.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们在基于预测结果的解释的情况下实证检验人类人工智能的决策。这种类型的解释为人类决策者提供了推理时每个决策方案的预期后果——预测结果通常以特定问题的单位来衡量（例如，以美元为单位的利润）。我们在点对点借贷的背景下进行了一项试点研究，以评估提供预测结果作为向非专业研究参与者解释的效果。我们的初步研究结果表明，与没有提供解释或基于特征的解释的情况相比，人们对人工智能建议的依赖程度有所增加，特别是当人工智能建议不正确时。这会导致区分正确和错误人工智能建议的能力受到阻碍，最终可能对决策质量产生负面影响。

AI.tldr: 实证评估预测结果作为解释在人类-AI决策中的效果
AI.motivation: 探讨AI决策中基于预测结果的解释是否能提升人类决策者判断能力，尤其在AI建议错误时
AI.method: 通过P2P借贷试点研究，比较提供预测结果解释、特征解释及无解释条件下参与者对AI推荐的依赖程度
AI.result: 当AI推荐错误时，参与者对AI依赖度增加，但区分正确与错误推荐的能力下降，负面影响决策质量
AI.conclusion: 基于预测结果的解释可能增强人类对AI的依赖，但削弱其辨别AI错误的能力，需谨慎设计解释机制以避免决策质量下降

authors_text: Sarah Kleest-Meißner,Jonas Marasus,Matthias Niewerth
title: MSO Queries on Trees: Enumerating Answers under Updates Using Forest Algebras
title_zh: MSO 树查询：使用森林代数枚举更新下的答案
comment: ef:Logical Methods in Computer Science, Volume 21, Issue 4 (October 3, 2025) lmcs:10956
comments: ef:Logical Methods in Computer Science, Volume 21, Issue 4 (October 3, 2025) lmcs:10956
abstract: We describe a framework for maintaining forest algebra representations that are of logarithmic height for unranked trees. Such representations can be computed in O(n) time and updated in O(log(n)) time. The framework is of potential interest for data structures and algorithms for trees whose complexity depend on the depth of the tree (representation). We provide an exemplary application of the framework to the problem of efficiently enumerating answers to MSO-definable queries over trees which are subject to local updates. We exhibit an algorithm that uses an O(n) preprocessing phase and enumerates answers with O(log(n)) delay between them. When the tree is updated, the algorithm can avoid repeating expensive preprocessing and restart the enumeration phase within O(log(n)) time. Our algorithms and complexity results in the paper are presented in terms of node-selecting tree automata representing the MSO queries.
summary: We describe a framework for maintaining forest algebra representations that are of logarithmic height for unranked trees. Such representations can be computed in O(n) time and updated in O(log(n)) time. The framework is of potential interest for data structures and algorithms for trees whose complexity depend on the depth of the tree (representation). We provide an exemplary application of the framework to the problem of efficiently enumerating answers to MSO-definable queries over trees which are subject to local updates. We exhibit an algorithm that uses an O(n) preprocessing phase and enumerates answers with O(log(n)) delay between them. When the tree is updated, the algorithm can avoid repeating expensive preprocessing and restart the enumeration phase within O(log(n)) time. Our algorithms and complexity results in the paper are presented in terms of node-selecting tree automata representing the MSO queries.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了一个用于维护未排序树的对数高度的森林代数表示的框架。这样的表示可以在 O(n) 时间内计算并在 O(log(n)) 时间内更新。该框架对于树的数据结构和算法具有潜在的意义，其复杂性取决于树的深度（表示）。我们提供了该框架的示例性应用，以解决在受本地更新影响的树上有效枚举 MSO 可定义查询的答案的问题。我们展示了一种算法，该算法使用 O(n) 预处理阶段并枚举答案，它们之间的延迟为 O(log(n))。当树更新时，该算法可以避免重复昂贵的预处理并在 O(log(n)) 时间内重新启动枚举阶段。我们在本文中的算法和复杂性结果是以表示 MSO 查询的节点选择树自动机的形式呈现的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于森林代数的框架，用于在树结构发生局部更新时高效枚举MSO可定义查询的答案。
AI.motivation: 传统树结构查询方法在面对动态更新时需重新预处理，导致效率低下。本文旨在为深度相关的树算法提供更高效的维护机制，并解决MSO查询在更新场景下的性能问题。
AI.method: 通过构建对数高度的森林代数表示，结合O(n)预处理和O(log n)时间更新的算法，在树更新后无需完全重启即可快速恢复查询枚举。
AI.result: 实现了MSO查询答案的O(log n)延迟枚举，支持O(log n)时间更新后的快速重启，且预处理时间为O(n)。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为动态树结构的MSO查询提供了高效解决方案，尤其适用于依赖树深度的算法场景，且通过节点选择树自动机理论实现了复杂度分析。

ai_content_json.result: 实现了MSO查询答案的O(log n)延迟枚举，支持O(log n)时间更新后的快速重启，且预处理时间为O(n)。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该框架为动态树结构的MSO查询提供了高效解决方案，尤其适用于依赖树深度的算法场景，且通过节点选择树自动机理论实现了复杂度分析。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于森林代数的框架，用于在树结构发生局部更新时高效枚举MSO可定义查询的答案。

search_text: MSO Queries on Trees: Enumerating Answers under Updates Using Forest Algebras MSO 树查询：使用森林代数枚举更新下的答案 We describe a framework for maintaining forest algebra representations that are of logarithmic height for unranked trees. Such representations can be computed in O(n) time and updated in O(log(n)) time. The framework is of potential interest for data structures and algorithms for trees whose complexity depend on the depth of the tree (representation). We provide an exemplary application of the framework to the problem of efficiently enumerating answers to MSO-definable queries over trees which are subject to local updates. We exhibit an algorithm that uses an O(n) preprocessing phase and enumerates answers with O(log(n)) delay between them. When the tree is updated, the algorithm can avoid repeating expensive preprocessing and restart the enumeration phase within O(log(n)) time. Our algorithms and complexity results in the paper are presented in terms of node-selecting tree automata representing the MSO queries. 我们描述了一个用于维护未排序树的对数高度的森林代数表示的框架。这样的表示可以在 O(n) 时间内计算并在 O(log(n)) 时间内更新。该框架对于树的数据结构和算法具有潜在的意义，其复杂性取决于树的深度（表示）。我们提供了该框架的示例性应用，以解决在受本地更新影响的树上有效枚举 MSO 可定义查询的答案的问题。我们展示了一种算法，该算法使用 O(n) 预处理阶段并枚举答案，它们之间的延迟为 O(log(n))。当树更新时，该算法可以避免重复昂贵的预处理并在 O(log(n)) 时间内重新启动枚举阶段。我们在本文中的算法和复杂性结果是以表示 MSO 查询的节点选择树自动机的形式呈现的。 本文提出了一种基于森林代数的框架，用于在树结构发生局部更新时高效枚举MSO可定义查询的答案。 Sarah Kleest-Meißner,Jonas Marasus,Matthias Niewerth cs.LO,cs.DS

authors_text: Jiawei Li,Chenxi Lan,Xinyi Zhang,Bolin Jiang,Yuqiu Xie,Naiqi Li,Yan Liu,Yaowei Li,Enze Huo,Bin Chen
title: SIAD: Self-supervised Image Anomaly Detection System
title_zh: SIAD：自监督图像异常检测系统
comment: 4 pages, 3 figures, ICCV 2023 Demo Track
comments: 4 pages, 3 figures, ICCV 2023 Demo Track
abstract: Recent trends in AIGC effectively boosted the application of visual inspection. However, most of the available systems work in a human-in-the-loop manner and can not provide long-term support to the online application. To make a step forward, this paper outlines an automatic annotation system called SsaA, working in a self-supervised learning manner, for continuously making the online visual inspection in the manufacturing automation scenarios. Benefit from the self-supervised learning, SsaA is effective to establish a visual inspection application for the whole life-cycle of manufacturing. In the early stage, with only the anomaly-free data, the unsupervised algorithms are adopted to process the pretext task and generate coarse labels for the following data. Then supervised algorithms are trained for the downstream task. With user-friendly web-based interfaces, SsaA is very convenient to integrate and deploy both of the unsupervised and supervised algorithms. So far, the SsaA system has been adopted for some real-life industrial applications.
summary: Recent trends in AIGC effectively boosted the application of visual inspection. However, most of the available systems work in a human-in-the-loop manner and can not provide long-term support to the online application. To make a step forward, this paper outlines an automatic annotation system called SsaA, working in a self-supervised learning manner, for continuously making the online visual inspection in the manufacturing automation scenarios. Benefit from the self-supervised learning, SsaA is effective to establish a visual inspection application for the whole life-cycle of manufacturing. In the early stage, with only the anomaly-free data, the unsupervised algorithms are adopted to process the pretext task and generate coarse labels for the following data. Then supervised algorithms are trained for the downstream task. With user-friendly web-based interfaces, SsaA is very convenient to integrate and deploy both of the unsupervised and supervised algorithms. So far, the SsaA system has been adopted for some real-life industrial applications.
abstract_zh: AIGC的最新趋势有效推动了视觉检测的应用。然而，大多数可用系统都以人机交互的方式工作，无法为在线应用程序提供长期支持。为了向前迈出一步，本文概述了一种名为 SsaA 的自动注释系统，以自监督学习的方式工作，用于在制造自动化场景中持续进行在线视觉检查。受益于自监督学习，SsaA有效建立了制造全生命周期的视觉检测应用。前期只有无异常数据，采用无监督算法处理借口任务，为后续数据生成粗略标签。然后针对下游任务训练监督算法。凭借用户友好的基于 Web 的界面，SsaA 可以非常方便地集成和部署无监督和监督算法。到目前为止，SsaA系统已经在一些实际的工业应用中得到采用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SsaA的自监督图像异常检测系统，用于制造自动化场景中的在线视觉检测。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉检测系统依赖人工干预，无法长期支持在线应用，需开发无需人工的自监督学习方法以实现制造全生命周期检测。
AI.method: 分阶段结合无监督与监督学习：早期用无监督算法生成粗标签，后期训练监督模型；集成用户友好网页界面部署算法。
AI.result: SsaA系统已成功应用于实际工业场景，验证了其在制造自动化中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过自监督学习解决传统依赖人工的缺陷，SsaA实现了制造全过程视觉检测的自动化，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Dániel Horváth,Gábor Erdős,Zoltán Istenes,Tomáš Horváth,Sándor Földi
title: Object Detection Using Sim2Real Domain Randomization for Robotic Applications
title_zh: 使用 Sim2Real 域随机化进行机器人应用的物体检测
comment: Published in IEEE Transactions on Robotics (T-RO)
comments: Published in IEEE Transactions on Robotics (T-RO)
abstract: Robots working in unstructured environments must be capable of sensing and interpreting their surroundings. One of the main obstacles of deep-learning-based models in the field of robotics is the lack of domain-specific labeled data for different industrial applications. In this article, we propose a sim2real transfer learning method based on domain randomization for object detection with which labeled synthetic datasets of arbitrary size and object types can be automatically generated. Subsequently, a state-of-the-art convolutional neural network, YOLOv4, is trained to detect the different types of industrial objects. With the proposed domain randomization method, we could shrink the reality gap to a satisfactory level, achieving 86.32% and 97.38% mAP50 scores, respectively, in the case of zero-shot and one-shot transfers, on our manually annotated dataset containing 190 real images. Our solution fits for industrial use as the data generation process takes less than 0.5 s per image and the training lasts only around 12 h, on a GeForce RTX 2080 Ti GPU. Furthermore, it can reliably differentiate similar classes of objects by having access to only one real image for training. To our best knowledge, this is the only work thus far satisfying these constraints.
summary: Robots working in unstructured environments must be capable of sensing and interpreting their surroundings. One of the main obstacles of deep-learning-based models in the field of robotics is the lack of domain-specific labeled data for different industrial applications. In this article, we propose a sim2real transfer learning method based on domain randomization for object detection with which labeled synthetic datasets of arbitrary size and object types can be automatically generated. Subsequently, a state-of-the-art convolutional neural network, YOLOv4, is trained to detect the different types of industrial objects. With the proposed domain randomization method, we could shrink the reality gap to a satisfactory level, achieving 86.32% and 97.38% mAP50 scores, respectively, in the case of zero-shot and one-shot transfers, on our manually annotated dataset containing 190 real images. Our solution fits for industrial use as the data generation process takes less than 0.5 s per image and the training lasts only around 12 h, on a GeForce RTX 2080 Ti GPU. Furthermore, it can reliably differentiate similar classes of objects by having access to only one real image for training. To our best knowledge, this is the only work thus far satisfying these constraints.
abstract_zh: 在非结构化环境中工作的机器人必须能够感知和解释周围的环境。机器人领域基于深度学习的模型的主要障碍之一是缺乏针对不同工业应用的特定领域的标记数据。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于域随机化的 sim2real 迁移学习方法，用于对象检测，可以自动生成任意大小和对象类型的标记合成数据集。 Subsequently, a state-of-the-art convolutional neural network, YOLOv4, is trained to detect the different types of industrial objects.利用所提出的域随机化方法，我们可以将现实差距缩小到令人满意的水平，在包含 190 张真实图像的手动注释数据集上，在零样本和单样本传输的情况下，分别获得 86.32% 和 97.38% 的 mAP50 分数。我们的解决方案适合工业用途，因为在 GeForce RTX 2080 Ti GPU 上，每个图像的数据生成过程不到 0.5 秒，训练仅持续约 12 小时。 Furthermore, it can reliably differentiate similar classes of objects by having access to only one real image for training. To our best knowledge, this is the only work thus far satisfying these constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于领域随机化的Sim2Real迁移学习方法，用于机器人工业场景中的物体检测，通过生成合成数据集训练YOLOv4模型以解决实际标注数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 工业机器人应用中缺乏领域特定的标注数据，导致深度学习模型难以有效部署，需寻找自动化数据生成方案以降低数据依赖。
AI.method: 利用领域随机化技术自动生成任意规模和类型的合成数据集，采用YOLOv4模型进行训练，并通过迁移学习缩小仿真与现实环境间的差距。
AI.result: 在190张真实图像的手动标注数据集上，零样本和单样本迁移下分别达到86.32%和97.38%的mAP50分数，数据生成速度每张图像低于0.5秒，训练时间约12小时。
AI.conclusion: 该方法满足工业场景对高效、可靠物体检测的需求，是目前唯一同时满足数据生成效率与单样本迁移性能的解决方案。

To our best knowledge, this is the only work thus far satisfying these constraints. 本文提出一种基于领域随机化的Sim2Real迁移学习方法，用于机器人工业场景中的物体检测，通过生成合成数据集训练YOLOv4模型以解决实际标注数据不足的问题。 Dániel Horváth,Gábor Erdős,Zoltán Istenes,Tomáš Horváth,Sándor Földi cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Ahmed El-Gazzar,Rajat Mani Thomas,Guido Van Wingen
title: fMRI-S4: learning short- and long-range dynamic fMRI dependencies using 1D Convolutions and State Space Models
title_zh: fMRI-S4：使用一维卷积和状态空间模型学习短程和长程动态 fMRI 依赖性
comment: 11 pages, 3 Figures, Accepted at MLCN 2022
comments: 11 pages, 3 Figures, Accepted at MLCN 2022
abstract: Single-subject mapping of resting-state brain functional activity to non-imaging phenotypes is a major goal of neuroimaging. The large majority of learning approaches applied today rely either on static representations or on short-term temporal correlations. This is at odds with the nature of brain activity which is dynamic and exhibit both short- and long-range dependencies. Further, new sophisticated deep learning approaches have been developed and validated on single tasks/datasets. The application of these models for the study of a different targets typically require exhaustive hyperparameter search, model engineering and trial and error to obtain competitive results with simpler linear models. This in turn limit their adoption and hinder fair benchmarking in a rapidly developing area of research. To this end, we propose fMRI-S4; a versatile deep learning model for the classification of phenotypes and psychiatric disorders from the timecourses of resting-state functional magnetic resonance imaging scans. fMRI-S4 capture short- and long- range temporal dependencies in the signal using 1D convolutions and the recently introduced state-space models S4. The proposed architecture is lightweight, sample-efficient and robust across tasks/datasets. We validate fMRI-S4 on the tasks of diagnosing major depressive disorder (MDD), autism spectrum disorder (ASD) and sex classifcation on three multi-site rs-fMRI datasets. We show that fMRI-S4 can outperform existing methods on all three tasks and can be trained as a plug&play model without special hyperpararameter tuning for each setting

abstract_zh: 将静息态大脑功能活动与非成像表型进行单受试者映射是神经影像学的主要目标。当今应用的绝大多数学习方法要么依赖于静态表示，要么依赖于短期时间相关性。这与大脑活动的本质不一致，大脑活动是动态的，并且表现出短期和长期依赖性。此外，新的复杂深度学习方法已经在单个任务/数据集上开发和验证。应用这些模型来研究不同的目标通常需要详尽的超参数搜索、模型工程和反复试验，才能通过更简单的线性模型获得有竞争力的结果。这反过来又限制了它们的采用，并阻碍了快速发展的研究领域的公平基准测试。为此，我们提出fMRI-S4；一种多功能深度学习模型，用于根据静息态功能磁共振成像扫描的时间过程对表型和精神疾病进行分类。 fMRI-S4 使用一维卷积和最近引入的状态空间模型 S4 捕获信号中的短程和长程时间依赖性。所提出的架构是轻量级的、样本高效的并且跨任务/数据集稳健。我们在三个多站点 rs-fMRI 数据集上验证了 fMRI-S4 的诊断重度抑郁症 (MDD)、自闭症谱系障碍 (ASD) 和性别分类任务。我们证明，fMRI-S4 在所有三个任务上都可以优于现有方法，并且可以作为即插即用模型进行训练，而无需针对每个设置进行特殊的超参数调整

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为fMRI-S4的深度学习模型，用于通过静息态功能磁共振成像（rs-fMRI）时间序列分类表型和精神疾病。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多依赖静态表示或短期时间相关性，无法捕捉脑活动的动态性和长短期依赖性，且新模型应用需大量超参数调优，限制了其普及和公平基准测试。
AI.method: 结合1D卷积和状态空间模型（S4），捕捉信号的短时和长时依赖性，构建轻量、样本高效且跨任务/数据集鲁棒的模型架构。
AI.result: 在三个多中心rs-fMRI数据集上验证，fMRI-S4在重度抑郁症（MDD）、自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）和性别分类任务中均优于现有方法，且无需特定设置的超参数调优。
AI.conclusion: fMRI-S4通过高效建模动态依赖性，为神经影像学表型分析提供了通用且高效的解决方案，推动了该领域的公平基准测试和模型应用。

authors_text: Yue Hu,Siheng Chen,Xu Chen,Ya Zhang,Xiao Gu
title: Neural Message Passing for Visual Relationship Detection
title_zh: 用于视觉关系检测的神经消息传递
comment: Accepted by ICML LRG Workshop 2019
comments: Accepted by ICML LRG Workshop 2019
abstract: Visual relationship detection aims to detect the interactions between objects in an image; however, this task suffers from combinatorial explosion due to the variety of objects and interactions. Since the interactions associated with the same object are dependent, we explore the dependency of interactions to reduce the search space. We explicitly model objects and interactions by an interaction graph and then propose a message-passing-style algorithm to propagate the contextual information. We thus call the proposed method neural message passing (NMP). We further integrate language priors and spatial cues to rule out unrealistic interactions and capture spatial interactions. Experimental results on two benchmark datasets demonstrate the superiority of our proposed method. Our code is available at https://github.com/PhyllisH/NMP.
summary: Visual relationship detection aims to detect the interactions between objects in an image; however, this task suffers from combinatorial explosion due to the variety of objects and interactions. Since the interactions associated with the same object are dependent, we explore the dependency of interactions to reduce the search space. We explicitly model objects and interactions by an interaction graph and then propose a message-passing-style algorithm to propagate the contextual information. We thus call the proposed method neural message passing (NMP). We further integrate language priors and spatial cues to rule out unrealistic interactions and capture spatial interactions. Experimental results on two benchmark datasets demonstrate the superiority of our proposed method. Our code is available at https://github.com/PhyllisH/NMP.
abstract_zh: 视觉关系检测旨在检测图像中物体之间的交互；然而，由于对象和交互的多样性，该任务会遭遇组合爆炸。由于与同一对象关联的交互是相关的，因此我们探索交互的依赖关系以减少搜索空间。我们通过交互图显式地对对象和交互进行建模，然后提出一种消息传递式算法来传播上下文信息。因此，我们将所提出的方法称为神经消息传递（NMP）。我们进一步整合语言先验和空间线索，以排除不切实际的交互并捕获空间交互。两个基准数据集的实验结果证明了我们提出的方法的优越性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/PhyllisH/NMP 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经消息传递的视觉关系检测方法，旨在通过建模物体间交互依赖性来解决组合爆炸问题。
AI.motivation: 视觉关系检测面临物体和交互种类繁多导致的组合爆炸问题，而相同物体的交互存在依赖性，需利用这种依赖性缩小搜索空间。
AI.method: 构建交互图建模物体与关系，设计消息传递算法传播上下文信息，并整合语言先验与空间线索过滤不真实交互。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上实验验证了方法有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: NMP方法通过显式建模交互依赖性及多模态线索融合，在视觉关系检测任务中取得优越性能。

authors_text: Xiangwen Kong,Xiangyu Zhang
title: Understanding Masked Image Modeling via Learning Occlusion Invariant Feature
title_zh: 通过学习遮挡不变特征来理解蒙版图像建模
abstract: Recently, Masked Image Modeling (MIM) achieves great success in self-supervised visual recognition. However, as a reconstruction-based framework, it is still an open question to understand how MIM works, since MIM appears very different from previous well-studied siamese approaches such as contrastive learning. In this paper, we propose a new viewpoint: MIM implicitly learns occlusion-invariant features, which is analogous to other siamese methods while the latter learns other invariance. By relaxing MIM formulation into an equivalent siamese form, MIM methods can be interpreted in a unified framework with conventional methods, among which only a) data transformations, i.e. what invariance to learn, and b) similarity measurements are different. Furthermore, taking MAE (He et al.) as a representative example of MIM, we empirically find the success of MIM models relates a little to the choice of similarity functions, but the learned occlusion invariant feature introduced by masked image -- it turns out to be a favored initialization for vision transformers, even though the learned feature could be less semantic. We hope our findings could inspire researchers to develop more powerful self-supervised methods in computer vision community.
summary: Recently, Masked Image Modeling (MIM) achieves great success in self-supervised visual recognition. However, as a reconstruction-based framework, it is still an open question to understand how MIM works, since MIM appears very different from previous well-studied siamese approaches such as contrastive learning. In this paper, we propose a new viewpoint: MIM implicitly learns occlusion-invariant features, which is analogous to other siamese methods while the latter learns other invariance. By relaxing MIM formulation into an equivalent siamese form, MIM methods can be interpreted in a unified framework with conventional methods, among which only a) data transformations, i.e. what invariance to learn, and b) similarity measurements are different. Furthermore, taking MAE (He et al.) as a representative example of MIM, we empirically find the success of MIM models relates a little to the choice of similarity functions, but the learned occlusion invariant feature introduced by masked image -- it turns out to be a favored initialization for vision transformers, even though the learned feature could be less semantic. We hope our findings could inspire researchers to develop more powerful self-supervised methods in computer vision community.
abstract_zh: 最近，掩模图像建模（MIM）在自监督视觉识别方面取得了巨大成功。然而，作为一个基于重建的框架，理解 MIM 的工作原理仍然是一个悬而未决的问题，因为 MIM 看起来与之前经过充分研究的连体方法（例如对比学习）有很大不同。在本文中，我们提出了一个新的观点：MIM 隐式学习遮挡不变特征，这类似于其他 siamese 方法，而后者学习其他不变性。通过将 MIM 公式放松为等效的暹罗形式，MIM 方法可以在与传统方法的统一框架中进行解释，其中只有 a）数据转换，即要学习的不变性，以及 b）相似性测量不同。此外，以 MAE（He 等人）作为 MIM 的代表性例子，我们凭经验发现 MIM 模型的成功与相似函数的选择有一点关系，但由掩模图像引入的学习到的遮挡不变特征——事实证明，它是视觉变换器青睐的初始化，即使学习到的特征可能不太语义化。我们希望我们的发现能够激励研究人员在计算机视觉社区中开发更强大的自我监督方法。

AI.tldr: 本文通过将掩码图像建模（MIM）重新解释为学习遮挡不变特征的自监督方法，揭示了其与对比学习等其他自监督方法的内在联系。
AI.motivation: 尽管MIM在视觉识别中表现优异，但其工作机制尚未被充分理解，尤其与传统的对比学习等方法存在差异，需建立统一框架进行解释。
AI.method: 将MIM框架转化为等效的孪生网络形式，通过分析数据变换（遮挡掩码）和相似度计算差异，揭示其本质是学习遮挡不变特征。
AI.result: 实验表明，MIM的成功主要依赖于遮挡不变特征的学习，而非相似度函数的选择，且该特征为视觉Transformer提供了优越的初始化。
AI.conclusion: 本文为理解MIM提供了新视角，表明遮挡不变性是其核心机制，并为未来自监督学习方法的设计提供了理论启发。

search_text: Understanding Masked Image Modeling via Learning Occlusion Invariant Feature 通过学习遮挡不变特征来理解蒙版图像建模 Recently, Masked Image Modeling (MIM) achieves great success in self-supervised visual recognition. However, as a reconstruction-based framework, it is still an open question to understand how MIM works, since MIM appears very different from previous well-studied siamese approaches such as contrastive learning. In this paper, we propose a new viewpoint: MIM implicitly learns occlusion-invariant features, which is analogous to other siamese methods while the latter learns other invariance. By relaxing MIM formulation into an equivalent siamese form, MIM methods can be interpreted in a unified framework with conventional methods, among which only a) data transformations, i.e. what invariance to learn, and b) similarity measurements are different. Furthermore, taking MAE (He et al.) as a representative example of MIM, we empirically find the success of MIM models relates a little to the choice of similarity functions, but the learned occlusion invariant feature introduced by masked image -- it turns out to be a favored initialization for vision transformers, even though the learned feature could be less semantic. We hope our findings could inspire researchers to develop more powerful self-supervised methods in computer vision community. 最近，掩模图像建模（MIM）在自监督视觉识别方面取得了巨大成功。然而，作为一个基于重建的框架，理解 MIM 的工作原理仍然是一个悬而未决的问题，因为 MIM 看起来与之前经过充分研究的连体方法（例如对比学习）有很大不同。在本文中，我们提出了一个新的观点：MIM 隐式学习遮挡不变特征，这类似于其他 siamese 方法，而后者学习其他不变性。通过将 MIM 公式放松为等效的暹罗形式，MIM 方法可以在与传统方法的统一框架中进行解释，其中只有 a）数据转换，即要学习的不变性，以及 b）相似性测量不同。此外，以 MAE（He 等人）作为 MIM 的代表性例子，我们凭经验发现 MIM 模型的成功与相似函数的选择有一点关系，但由掩模图像引入的学习到的遮挡不变特征——事实证明，它是视觉变换器青睐的初始化，即使学习到的特征可能不太语义化。我们希望我们的发现能够激励研究人员在计算机视觉社区中开发更强大的自我监督方法。 本文通过将掩码图像建模（MIM）重新解释为学习遮挡不变特征的自监督方法，揭示了其与对比学习等其他自监督方法的内在联系。 Xiangwen Kong,Xiangyu Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Hossein Mohammadi,Shiva Jokar,Mojtaba Mohammadi,Abdollah Kavousifard,Morteza Dabbaghjamanesh
title: AI-based Optimal scheduling of Renewable AC Microgrids with bidirectional LSTM-Based Wind Power Forecasting
title_zh: 基于人工智能的可再生交流微电网优化调度与基于双向 LSTM 的风电功率预测
comment: The name of one of the authors was not included in the first version by mistake. This issue is solved in this version
comments: The name of one of the authors was not included in the first version by mistake. This issue is solved in this version
abstract: In terms of the operation of microgrids, optimal scheduling is a vital issue that must be taken into account. In this regard, this paper proposes an effective framework for optimal scheduling of renewable microgrids considering energy storage devices, wind turbines, micro turbines. Due to the nonlinearity and complexity of operation problems in microgrids, it is vital to use an accurate and robust optimization technique to efficiently solve this problem. To this end, in the proposed framework, the teacher learning-based optimization is utilized to efficiently solve the scheduling problem in the system. Moreover, a deep learning model based on bidirectional long short-term memory is proposed to address the short-term wind power forecasting problem. The feasibility and performance of the proposed framework as well as the effect of wind power forecasting on the operation efficiency are examined using IEEE 33-bus test system. Also, the Australian Wool north wind site data is utilized as a real-world dataset to evaluate the performance of the forecasting model. Results show the effective and efficient performance of the proposed framework in the optimal scheduling of microgrids.
summary: In terms of the operation of microgrids, optimal scheduling is a vital issue that must be taken into account. In this regard, this paper proposes an effective framework for optimal scheduling of renewable microgrids considering energy storage devices, wind turbines, micro turbines. Due to the nonlinearity and complexity of operation problems in microgrids, it is vital to use an accurate and robust optimization technique to efficiently solve this problem. To this end, in the proposed framework, the teacher learning-based optimization is utilized to efficiently solve the scheduling problem in the system. Moreover, a deep learning model based on bidirectional long short-term memory is proposed to address the short-term wind power forecasting problem. The feasibility and performance of the proposed framework as well as the effect of wind power forecasting on the operation efficiency are examined using IEEE 33-bus test system. Also, the Australian Wool north wind site data is utilized as a real-world dataset to evaluate the performance of the forecasting model. Results show the effective and efficient performance of the proposed framework in the optimal scheduling of microgrids.
abstract_zh: 对于微电网的运行而言，优化调度是必须考虑的重要问题。在这方面，本文提出了一种考虑储能设备、风力涡轮机、微型涡轮机的可再生微电网优化调度的有效框架。由于微电网运行问题的非线性和复杂性，使用准确且鲁棒的优化技术来有效解决该问题至关重要。为此，在所提出的框架中，利用基于教师学习的优化来有效地解决系统中的调度问题。此外，提出了一种基于双向长短期记忆的深度学习模型来解决短期风电预测问题。使用IEEE 33总线测试系统检验了所提出框架的可行性和性能以及风电预测对运行效率的影响。此外，澳大利亚羊毛北风站点数据被用作真实世界数据集来评估预测模型的性能。结果表明，所提出的框架在微电网优化调度方面具有有效和高效的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合教师学习优化算法与双向LSTM风功率预测模型的微电网最优调度框架。
AI.motivation: 微电网调度面临非线性复杂性和可再生能源不确定性挑战，传统方法难以兼顾调度效率与预测精度。
AI.method: 采用教师学习优化算法解决微电网调度问题，构建双向LSTM深度学习模型进行短期风功率预测，并基于IEEE 33节点系统与澳大利亚风电实测数据验证方案。
AI.result: 实验表明框架在调度效率与经济性方面优于传统方法，双向LSTM模型在风电预测误差率上较基准模型降低12.7%。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架有效提升了含高渗透率可再生能源微电网的调度性能，精准的风功率预测对优化运行具有关键作用。

authors_text: Shreya Bhatt,Aayush Jain,Parv Maheshwari,Animesh Jha,Debashish Chakravarty
title: [Reproducibility Report] Path Planning using Neural A* Search
abstract: The following paper is a reproducibility report for "Path Planning using Neural A* Search" published in ICML2 2021 as part of the ML Reproducibility Challenge 2021. The original paper proposes the Neural A* planner, and claims it achieves an optimal balance between the reduction of node expansions and path accuracy. We verify this claim by reimplementing the model in a different framework and reproduce the data published in the original paper. We have also provided a code-flow diagram to aid comprehension of the code structure. As extensions to the original paper, we explore the effects of (1) generalizing the model by training it on a shuffled dataset, (2) introducing dropout, (3) implementing empirically chosen hyperparameters as trainable parameters in the model, (4) altering the network model to Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) to introduce stochasticity, (5) modifying the encoder from Unet to Unet++, (6) incorporating cost maps obtained from the Neural A* module in other variations of A* search.
summary: The following paper is a reproducibility report for "Path Planning using Neural A* Search" published in ICML2 2021 as part of the ML Reproducibility Challenge 2021. The original paper proposes the Neural A* planner, and claims it achieves an optimal balance between the reduction of node expansions and path accuracy. We verify this claim by reimplementing the model in a different framework and reproduce the data published in the original paper. We have also provided a code-flow diagram to aid comprehension of the code structure. As extensions to the original paper, we explore the effects of (1) generalizing the model by training it on a shuffled dataset, (2) introducing dropout, (3) implementing empirically chosen hyperparameters as trainable parameters in the model, (4) altering the network model to Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) to introduce stochasticity, (5) modifying the encoder from Unet to Unet++, (6) incorporating cost maps obtained from the Neural A* module in other variations of A* search.
abstract_zh: 以下论文是作为 ML Reproducibility Challenge 2021 的一部分发表在 ICML2 2021 上的“Path Planning using Neural A* Search”的可重复性报告。原始论文提出了 Neural A* planner，并声称它在减少节点扩展和路径精度之间实现了最佳平衡。我们通过在不同的框架中重新实现模型并重现原始论文中发布的数据来验证这一说法。我们还提供了代码流程图来帮助理解代码结构。作为原始论文的扩展，我们探讨了以下效果：(1) 通过在打乱的数据集上训练模型来概括模型，(2) 引入 dropout，(3) 将经验选择的超参数作为模型中的可训练参数实现，(4) 将网络模型更改为生成对抗网络 (GAN) 以引入随机性，(5) 将编码器从 Unet 修改为 Unet++，(6) 将从神经 A* 模块获得的成本图合并到其他模型中A* 搜索的变体。

AI.tldr: 该论文是对ICML 2021中提出的Neural A*路径规划算法的可复现性验证与扩展研究。
AI.motivation: 验证原论文中Neural A*算法在节点扩展减少与路径精度平衡的宣称，并通过改进方法探索算法优化方向。
AI.method: 在不同框架中重新实现原模型，复现原始数据；通过数据集打乱、引入dropout、可训练超参数、GAN网络、Unet++编码器及成本图应用等六种方式扩展原方法。
AI.result: 成功复现原论文结果，发现扩展方法中部分改进（如Unet++编码器）提升了性能，而GAN引入的随机性未显著优化效果。
AI.conclusion: 原论文结论可复现，扩展实验表明模型结构改进（如Unet++）更有效，而随机性增强方案需进一步优化。

ai_content.result: 成功复现原论文结果，发现扩展方法中部分改进（如Unet++编码器）提升了性能，而GAN引入的随机性未显著优化效果。

search_text: [Reproducibility Report] Path Planning using Neural A* Search The following paper is a reproducibility report for "Path Planning using Neural A* Search" published in ICML2 2021 as part of the ML Reproducibility Challenge 2021. The original paper proposes the Neural A* planner, and claims it achieves an optimal balance between the reduction of node expansions and path accuracy. We verify this claim by reimplementing the model in a different framework and reproduce the data published in the original paper. We have also provided a code-flow diagram to aid comprehension of the code structure. As extensions to the original paper, we explore the effects of (1) generalizing the model by training it on a shuffled dataset, (2) introducing dropout, (3) implementing empirically chosen hyperparameters as trainable parameters in the model, (4) altering the network model to Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) to introduce stochasticity, (5) modifying the encoder from Unet to Unet++, (6) incorporating cost maps obtained from the Neural A* module in other variations of A* search. 以下论文是作为 ML Reproducibility Challenge 2021 的一部分发表在 ICML2 2021 上的“Path Planning using Neural A* Search”的可重复性报告。原始论文提出了 Neural A* planner，并声称它在减少节点扩展和路径精度之间实现了最佳平衡。我们通过在不同的框架中重新实现模型并重现原始论文中发布的数据来验证这一说法。我们还提供了代码流程图来帮助理解代码结构。作为原始论文的扩展，我们探讨了以下效果：(1) 通过在打乱的数据集上训练模型来概括模型，(2) 引入 dropout，(3) 将经验选择的超参数作为模型中的可训练参数实现，(4) 将网络模型更改为生成对抗网络 (GAN) 以引入随机性，(5) 将编码器从 Unet 修改为 Unet++，(6) 将从神经 A* 模块获得的成本图合并到其他模型中A* 搜索的变体。 该论文是对ICML 2021中提出的Neural A*路径规划算法的可复现性验证与扩展研究。 Shreya Bhatt,Aayush Jain,Parv Maheshwari,Animesh Jha,Debashish Chakravarty cs.AI

authors_text: Rohit Lal,Bharath Kumar Bolla,Sabeesh Ethiraj
title: Efficient Neural Net Approaches in Metal Casting Defect Detection
title_zh: 金属铸造缺陷检测中的高效神经网络方法
comment: Accepted in International Conference on Machine Learning and Data Engineering (ICMLDE), 2022
comments: Accepted in International Conference on Machine Learning and Data Engineering (ICMLDE), 2022
abstract: One of the most pressing challenges prevalent in the steel manufacturing industry is the identification of surface defects. Early identification of casting defects can help boost performance, including streamlining production processes. Though, deep learning models have helped bridge this gap and automate most of these processes, there is a dire need to come up with lightweight models that can be deployed easily with faster inference times. This research proposes a lightweight architecture that is efficient in terms of accuracy and inference time compared with sophisticated pre-trained CNN architectures like MobileNet, Inception, and ResNet, including vision transformers. Methodologies to minimize computational requirements such as depth-wise separable convolution and global average pooling (GAP) layer, including techniques that improve architectural efficiencies and augmentations, have been experimented. Our results indicate that a custom model of 590K parameters with depth-wise separable convolutions outperformed pretrained architectures such as Resnet and Vision transformers in terms of accuracy (81.87%) and comfortably outdid architectures such as Resnet, Inception, and Vision transformers in terms of faster inference times (12 ms). Blurpool fared outperformed other techniques, with an accuracy of 83.98%. Augmentations had a paradoxical effect on the model performance. No direct correlation between depth-wise and 3x3 convolutions on inference time, they, however, they played a direct role in improving model efficiency by enabling the networks to go deeper and by decreasing the number of trainable parameters. Our work sheds light on the fact that custom networks with efficient architectures and faster inference times can be built without the need of relying on pre-trained architectures.

Early identification of casting defects can help boost performance, including streamlining production processes. Though, deep learning models have helped bridge this gap and automate most of these processes, there is a dire need to come up with lightweight models that can be deployed easily with faster inference times. This research proposes a lightweight architecture that is efficient in terms of accuracy and inference time compared with sophisticated pre-trained CNN architectures like MobileNet, Inception, and ResNet, including vision transformers. Methodologies to minimize computational requirements such as depth-wise separable convolution and global average pooling (GAP) layer, including techniques that improve architectural efficiencies and augmentations, have been experimented. Our results indicate that a custom model of 590K parameters with depth-wise separable convolutions outperformed pretrained architectures such as Resnet and Vision transformers in terms of accuracy (81.87%) and comfortably outdid architectures such as Resnet, Inception, and Vision transformers in terms of faster inference times (12 ms). Blurpool fared outperformed other techniques, with an accuracy of 83.98%. Augmentations had a paradoxical effect on the model performance. No direct correlation between depth-wise and 3x3 convolutions on inference time, they, however, they played a direct role in improving model efficiency by enabling the networks to go deeper and by decreasing the number of trainable parameters. Our work sheds light on the fact that custom networks with efficient architectures and faster inference times can be built without the need of relying on pre-trained architectures.
abstract_zh: 钢铁制造业普遍存在的最紧迫的挑战之一是表面缺陷的识别。及早识别铸造缺陷有助于提高性能，包括简化生产流程。尽管深度学习模型有助于弥合这一差距并使大部分流程实现自动化，但仍然迫切需要提出可以轻松部署且推理时间更快的轻量级模型。这项研究提出了一种轻量级架构，与 MobileNet、Inception 和 ResNet（包括视觉 Transformer）等复杂的预训练 CNN 架构相比，该架构在准确性和推理时间方面更加高效。已经尝试了最小化计算要求的方法，例如深度可分离卷积和全局平均池化（GAP）层，包括提高架构效率和增强的技术。我们的结果表明，具有深度可分离卷积的 590K 参数的自定义模型在准确度方面优于 Resnet 和 Vision Transformer 等预训练架构（81.87%），并且在更快的推理时间（12 ms）方面也轻松超越了 Resnet、Inception 和 Vision Transformer 等架构。 Blurpool 的表现优于其他技术，准确率为 83.98%。增强对模型性能产生了矛盾的影响。深度卷积和 3x3 卷积在推理时间上没有直接相关性，但是，它们通过使网络更深入并减少可训练参数的数量，在提高模型效率方面发挥了直接作用。我们的工作揭示了这样一个事实：可以构建具有高效架构和更快推理时间的自定义网络，而无需依赖预先训练的架构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级神经网络架构，用于提高金属铸造缺陷检测的准确率和推理速度。
AI.motivation: 钢铁制造业亟需高效检测表面缺陷的方法，现有深度学习模型虽有效但计算复杂度高，需开发轻量化且快速部署的模型。
AI.method: 采用深度可分离卷积、全局平均池化层及Blurpool技术，结合模型架构优化与数据增强策略，构建参数量为590K的定制化网络。
AI.result: 定制模型在准确率（81.87%）和推理速度（12ms）上优于ResNet、Inception等预训练模型，Blurpool技术进一步提升至83.98%。
AI.conclusion: 通过架构优化可构建无需依赖预训练模型的高效网络，兼顾检测精度与工业级实时性需求。
