authors_text: Khaled Alrfou,Amir Kordijazi,Tian Zhao
title: Computer Vision Methods for the Microstructural Analysis of Materials: The State-of-the-art and Future Perspectives
title_zh: 用于材料微观结构分析的计算机视觉方法：最新技术和未来展望
comment: 42 pages, 14 figures, 3 tables
comments: 42 pages, 14 figures, 3 tables
abstract: Finding quantitative descriptors representing the microstructural features of a given material is an ongoing research area in the paradigm of Materials-by-Design. Historically, microstructural analysis mostly relies on qualitative descriptions. However, to build a robust and accurate process-structure-properties relationship, which is required for designing new advanced high-performance materials, the extraction of quantitative and meaningful statistical data from the microstructural analysis is a critical step. In recent years, computer vision (CV) methods, especially those which are centered around convolutional neural network (CNN) algorithms have shown promising results for this purpose. This review paper focuses on the state-of-the-art CNN-based techniques that have been applied to various multi-scale microstructural image analysis tasks, including classification, object detection, segmentation, feature extraction, and reconstruction. Additionally, we identified the main challenges with regard to the application of these methods to materials science research. Finally, we discussed some possible future directions of research in this area. In particular, we emphasized the application of transformer-based models and their capabilities to improve the microstructural analysis of materials.
summary: Finding quantitative descriptors representing the microstructural features of a given material is an ongoing research area in the paradigm of Materials-by-Design. Historically, microstructural analysis mostly relies on qualitative descriptions. However, to build a robust and accurate process-structure-properties relationship, which is required for designing new advanced high-performance materials, the extraction of quantitative and meaningful statistical data from the microstructural analysis is a critical step. In recent years, computer vision (CV) methods, especially those which are centered around convolutional neural network (CNN) algorithms have shown promising results for this purpose. This review paper focuses on the state-of-the-art CNN-based techniques that have been applied to various multi-scale microstructural image analysis tasks, including classification, object detection, segmentation, feature extraction, and reconstruction. Additionally, we identified the main challenges with regard to the application of these methods to materials science research. Finally, we discussed some possible future directions of research in this area. In particular, we emphasized the application of transformer-based models and their capabilities to improve the microstructural analysis of materials.
abstract_zh: 寻找代表给定材料微观结构特征的定量描述符是材料设计范式中一个正在进行的研究领域。从历史上看，微观结构分析主要依赖于定性描述。然而，为了建立设计新型先进高性能材料所需的稳健且准确的工艺-结构-性能关系，从微观结构分析中提取定量且有意义的统计数据是关键步骤。近年来，计算机视觉（CV）方法，特别是那些以卷积神经网络（CNN）算法为中心的方法，在这方面显示出了有希望的结果。本综述重点介绍了最先进的基于 CNN 的技术，这些技术已应用于各种多尺度微结构图像分析任务，包括分类、对象检测、分割、特征提取和重建。此外，我们还确定了将这些方法应用于材料科学研究的主要挑战。最后，我们讨论了该领域未来可能的研究方向。我们特别强调了基于变压器的模型的应用及其改进材料微观结构分析的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的计算机视觉方法在材料微观结构分析中的最新进展，并探讨了未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 传统材料微观结构分析依赖定性描述，难以建立精确的工艺-结构-性能关系，亟需定量化的统计数据分析方法。
AI.method: 系统梳理了CNN在材料多尺度图像分析中的应用，涵盖分类、检测、分割等任务，并分析了现有方法的挑战。
AI.result: 明确了当前方法在数据多样性、模型可解释性等方面的局限性，提出基于Transformer模型的未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: Transformer等新型模型有望提升材料微观结构分析的精度与泛化能力，推动材料设计的智能化发展。

Historically, microstructural analysis mostly relies on qualitative descriptions. However, to build a robust and accurate process-structure-properties relationship, which is required for designing new advanced high-performance materials, the extraction of quantitative and meaningful statistical data from the microstructural analysis is a critical step. In recent years, computer vision (CV) methods, especially those which are centered around convolutional neural network (CNN) algorithms have shown promising results for this purpose. This review paper focuses on the state-of-the-art CNN-based techniques that have been applied to various multi-scale microstructural image analysis tasks, including classification, object detection, segmentation, feature extraction, and reconstruction. Additionally, we identified the main challenges with regard to the application of these methods to materials science research. Finally, we discussed some possible future directions of research in this area. In particular, we emphasized the application of transformer-based models and their capabilities to improve the microstructural analysis of materials. 寻找代表给定材料微观结构特征的定量描述符是材料设计范式中一个正在进行的研究领域。从历史上看，微观结构分析主要依赖于定性描述。然而，为了建立设计新型先进高性能材料所需的稳健且准确的工艺-结构-性能关系，从微观结构分析中提取定量且有意义的统计数据是关键步骤。近年来，计算机视觉（CV）方法，特别是那些以卷积神经网络（CNN）算法为中心的方法，在这方面显示出了有希望的结果。本综述重点介绍了最先进的基于 CNN 的技术，这些技术已应用于各种多尺度微结构图像分析任务，包括分类、对象检测、分割、特征提取和重建。此外，我们还确定了将这些方法应用于材料科学研究的主要挑战。最后，我们讨论了该领域未来可能的研究方向。我们特别强调了基于变压器的模型的应用及其改进材料微观结构分析的能力。 本文综述了基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的计算机视觉方法在材料微观结构分析中的最新进展，并探讨了未来研究方向。 Khaled Alrfou,Amir Kordijazi,Tian Zhao cond-mat.mtrl-sci,cs.CV,physics.app-ph,physics.data-an

authors_text: Youheng Zhang
title: A Historical Interaction between Artificial Intelligence and Philosophy
title_zh: 人工智能与哲学之间的历史互动
comment: ef:Teorie Vědy / Theory of Science, 1(1), Article 1 (2023)
comments: ef:Teorie Vědy / Theory of Science, 1(1), Article 1 (2023)
abstract: This paper reviews the historical development of AI and representative philosophical thinking from the perspective of the research paradigm. Additionally, it considers the methodology and applications of AI from a philosophical perspective and anticipates its continued advancement. In the history of AI, Symbolism and connectionism are the two main paradigms in AI research. Symbolism holds that the world can be explained by symbols and dealt with through precise, logical processes, but connectionism believes this process should be implemented through artificial neural networks. Regardless of how intelligent machines or programs should achieve their smart goals, the historical development of AI demonstrates the best answer at this time. Still, it is not the final answer of AI research.
summary: This paper reviews the historical development of AI and representative philosophical thinking from the perspective of the research paradigm. Additionally, it considers the methodology and applications of AI from a philosophical perspective and anticipates its continued advancement. In the history of AI, Symbolism and connectionism are the two main paradigms in AI research. Symbolism holds that the world can be explained by symbols and dealt with through precise, logical processes, but connectionism believes this process should be implemented through artificial neural networks. Regardless of how intelligent machines or programs should achieve their smart goals, the historical development of AI demonstrates the best answer at this time. Still, it is not the final answer of AI research.
abstract_zh: 本文从研究范式的角度回顾了人工智能的历史发展和代表性的哲学思想。此外，它从哲学角度思考人工智能的方法论和应用，并预测其持续进步。在人工智能发展史上，符号主义和联结主义是人工智能研究的两个主要范式。象征主义认为世界可以用符号来解释，并通过精确的逻辑过程来处理，但联结主义认为这个过程应该通过人工神经网络来实现。无论智能机器或程序如何实现其智能目标，人工智能的历史发展都在此时给出了最好的答案。尽管如此，这还不是人工智能研究的最终答案。

AI.tldr: 本文从研究范式角度回顾人工智能发展史，分析其与哲学思想的互动关系，并探讨AI方法论与应用的哲学视角。
AI.motivation: 通过梳理AI与哲学的历史互动，揭示两者在方法论和认知层面的关联，为AI未来研究提供哲学思考框架。
AI.method: 以符号主义与连接主义两大AI范式为切入点，结合哲学视角分析其方法论差异及历史演进逻辑。
AI.result: 明确符号主义（符号逻辑）与连接主义（神经网络）的核心差异，指出AI发展阶段性特征与哲学思辨的相互影响。
AI.conclusion: AI历史发展提供了当前阶段的最佳解决方案，但其终极答案仍需在哲学与技术的持续互动中探索。

authors_text: Whitney S Brakefield,Nariman Ammar,Arash Shaban-Nejad
title: An Urban Population Health Observatory for Disease Causal Pathway Analysis and Decision Support: Underlying Explainable Artificial Intelligence Model
title_zh: 用于疾病因果路径分析和决策支持的城市人口健康观测站：底层可解释人工智能模型
comment: 15 Pages, 5 figures, and 3 tables
comments: 15 Pages, 5 figures, and 3 tables
abstract: This study sought to (1) expand our existing Urban Population Health Observatory (UPHO) system by incorporating a semantics layer; (2) cohesively employ machine learning and semantic/logical inference to provide measurable evidence and detect pathways leading to undesirable health outcomes; (3) provide clinical use case scenarios and design case studies to identify socioenvironmental determinants of health associated with the prevalence of obesity, and (4) design a dashboard that demonstrates the use of UPHO in the context of obesity surveillance using the provided scenarios. The system design includes a knowledge graph generation component that provides contextual knowledge from relevant domains of interest. This system leverages semantics using concepts, properties, and axioms from existing ontologies. In addition, we used the publicly available US Centers for Disease Control and Prevention 500 Cities data set to perform multivariate analysis. A cohesive approach that employs machine learning and semantic/logical inference reveals pathways leading to diseases. In this study, we present 2 clinical case scenarios and a proof-of-concept prototype design of a dashboard that provides warnings, recommendations, and explanations and demonstrates the use of UPHO in the context of obesity surveillance, treatment, and prevention. While exploring the case scenarios using a support vector regression machine learning model, we found that poverty, lack of physical activity, education, and unemployment were the most important predictive variables that contribute to obesity in Memphis, TN. The application of UPHO could help reduce health disparities and improve urban population health. The expanded UPHO feature incorporates an additional level of interpretable knowledge to enhance physicians, researchers, and health officials' informed decision-making at both patient and community levels.
summary: This study sought to (1) expand our existing Urban Population Health Observatory (UPHO) system by incorporating a semantics layer; (2) cohesively employ machine learning and semantic/logical inference to provide measurable evidence and detect pathways leading to undesirable health outcomes; (3) provide clinical use case scenarios and design case studies to identify socioenvironmental determinants of health associated with the prevalence of obesity, and (4) design a dashboard that demonstrates the use of UPHO in the context of obesity surveillance using the provided scenarios. The system design includes a knowledge graph generation component that provides contextual knowledge from relevant domains of interest. This system leverages semantics using concepts, properties, and axioms from existing ontologies. In addition, we used the publicly available US Centers for Disease Control and Prevention 500 Cities data set to perform multivariate analysis. A cohesive approach that employs machine learning and semantic/logical inference reveals pathways leading to diseases. In this study, we present 2 clinical case scenarios and a proof-of-concept prototype design of a dashboard that provides warnings, recommendations, and explanations and demonstrates the use of UPHO in the context of obesity surveillance, treatment, and prevention. While exploring the case scenarios using a support vector regression machine learning model, we found that poverty, lack of physical activity, education, and unemployment were the most important predictive variables that contribute to obesity in Memphis, TN. The application of UPHO could help reduce health disparities and improve urban population health. The expanded UPHO feature incorporates an additional level of interpretable knowledge to enhance physicians, researchers, and health officials' informed decision-making at both patient and community levels.
abstract_zh: 本研究旨在（1）通过纳入语义层来扩展我们现有的城市人口健康观测站（UPHO）系统； (2) 结合使用机器学习和语义/逻辑推理来提供可衡量的证据并检测导致不良健康结果的途径； (3) 提供临床用例场景并设计案例研究，以确定与肥胖患病率相关的健康的社会环境决定因素，以及 (4) 设计一个仪表板，使用提供的场景演示 UPHO 在肥胖监测背景下的使用。系统设计包括知识图生成组件，该组件提供来自相关感兴趣领域的上下文知识。该系统利用现有本体中的概念、属性和公理来利用语义。此外，我们还使用公开的美国疾病控制与预防中心 500 个城市数据集进行多变量分析。采用机器学习和语义/逻辑推理的综合方法揭示了导致疾病的途径。在这项研究中，我们提出了 2 个临床案例场景和一个仪表板的概念验证原型设计，该仪表板提供警告、建议和解释，并演示了 UPHO 在肥胖监测、治疗和预防背景下的使用。在使用支持向量回归机器学习模型探索案例场景时，我们发现贫困、缺乏体力活动、教育和失业是导致田纳西州孟菲斯市肥胖的最重要的预测变量。 UPHO的应用有助于缩小健康差距，改善城市人口健康。扩展的 UPHO 功能纳入了额外级别的可解释知识，以增强医生、研究人员和卫生官员在患者和社区层面的知情决策。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过扩展城市人口健康观测系统（UPHO），结合语义图层与机器学习方法，分析疾病因果路径并提供决策支持，重点针对肥胖症的预防与干预。
AI.motivation: 现有健康监测系统缺乏对社会环境因素与疾病因果关系的深入分析，需通过可解释的人工智能模型辅助临床决策，减少健康不平等现象。
AI.method: 构建包含知识图谱的UPHO系统，整合公开的CDC数据集，结合支持向量回归（SVM）等机器学习模型与语义推理，识别肥胖相关社会环境因素。
AI.result: 在孟菲斯案例中发现贫困、缺乏体力活动、教育水平和失业率是肥胖的主要预测变量，并设计了可视化仪表盘原型以支持肥胖监测与干预。
AI.conclusion: UPHO系统通过融合语义知识与机器学习，提升了疾病因果路径的可解释性，有助于改善城市人群健康决策与公共卫生管理。

authors_text: Worasait Suwannik
title: Style Transfer of Black and White Silhouette Images using CycleGAN and a Randomly Generated Dataset
title_zh: 使用 CycleGAN 和随机生成的数据集进行黑白剪影图像的风格转换
abstract: CycleGAN can be used to transfer an artistic style to an image. It does not require pairs of source and stylized images to train a model. Taking this advantage, we propose using randomly generated data to train a machine learning model that can transfer traditional art style to a black and white silhouette image. The result is noticeably better than the previous neural style transfer methods. However, there are some areas for improvement, such as removing artifacts and spikes from the transformed image.
summary: CycleGAN can be used to transfer an artistic style to an image. It does not require pairs of source and stylized images to train a model. Taking this advantage, we propose using randomly generated data to train a machine learning model that can transfer traditional art style to a black and white silhouette image. The result is noticeably better than the previous neural style transfer methods. However, there are some areas for improvement, such as removing artifacts and spikes from the transformed image.
abstract_zh: CycleGAN 可用于将艺术风格转移到图像上。它不需要成对的源图像和风格化图像来训练模型。利用这一优势，我们建议使用随机生成的数据来训练机器学习模型，该模型可以将传统艺术风格转移到黑白剪影图像。结果明显优于之前的神经风格迁移方法。然而，还有一些需要改进的地方，例如从变换后的图像中去除伪影和尖峰。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出使用CycleGAN和随机生成的数据集，将传统艺术风格迁移至黑白剪影图像中。
AI.motivation: 传统风格迁移方法需要成对的源图像和风格化图像，而CycleGAN无需配对数据，因此可利用随机生成数据训练模型，克服数据获取难题。
AI.method: 采用CycleGAN框架，结合随机生成的训练数据集，训练模型实现艺术风格到黑白剪影图像的迁移。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在风格迁移效果上优于传统神经风格迁移方法，但存在伪影和尖峰等 artifacts 问题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了无配对数据的风格迁移，未来需优化以减少图像伪影和尖峰。

authors_text: Sachith Seneviratne,Damith Senanayake,Sanka Rasnayaka,Rajith Vidanaarachchi,Jason Thompson
title: DALLE-URBAN: Capturing the urban design expertise of large text to image transformers
title_zh: DALLE-URBAN：捕捉大型文本到图像转换器的城市设计专业知识
comment: Accepted to DICTA 2022, released 11000+ environmental scene images generated by Stable Diffusion and 1000+ images generated by DALLE-2
comments: Accepted to DICTA 2022, released 11000+ environmental scene images generated by Stable Diffusion and 1000+ images generated by DALLE-2
abstract: Automatically converting text descriptions into images using transformer architectures has recently received considerable attention. Such advances have implications for many applied design disciplines across fashion, art, architecture, urban planning, landscape design and the future tools available to such disciplines. However, a detailed analysis capturing the capabilities of such models, specifically with a focus on the built environment, has not been performed to date. In this work, we investigate the capabilities and biases of such text-to-image methods as it applies to the built environment in detail. We use a systematic grammar to generate queries related to the built environment and evaluate resulting generated images. We generate 1020 different images and find that text to image transformers are robust at generating realistic images across different domains for this use-case. Generated imagery can be found at the github: https://github.com/sachith500/DALLEURBAN
summary: Automatically converting text descriptions into images using transformer architectures has recently received considerable attention. Such advances have implications for many applied design disciplines across fashion, art, architecture, urban planning, landscape design and the future tools available to such disciplines. However, a detailed analysis capturing the capabilities of such models, specifically with a focus on the built environment, has not been performed to date. In this work, we investigate the capabilities and biases of such text-to-image methods as it applies to the built environment in detail. We use a systematic grammar to generate queries related to the built environment and evaluate resulting generated images. We generate 1020 different images and find that text to image transformers are robust at generating realistic images across different domains for this use-case. Generated imagery can be found at the github: https://github.com/sachith500/DALLEURBAN
abstract_zh: 使用变压器架构自动将文本描述转换为图像最近受到了相当多的关注。这些进步对时尚、艺术、建筑、城市规划、景观设计等许多应用设计学科以及这些学科可用的未来工具产生了影响。然而，迄今为止尚未对此类模型的功能进行详细的分析，特别是重点关注建筑环境。在这项工作中，我们详细研究了这种文本到图像方法的功能和偏差，因为它适用于建筑环境。我们使用系统语法来生成与建筑环境相关的查询并评估生成的图像。我们生成了 1020 个不同的图像，并发现文本到图像转换器在为此用例跨不同领域生成逼真的图像方面非常强大。生成的图像可以在 github 上找到：https://github.com/sachith500/DALLEURBAN

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大型文本到图像转换器在城市设计领域的应用能力，通过生成和分析1020张图像评估其效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管文本到图像模型在多个领域取得进展，但针对建筑环境（如城市规划）的具体能力分析尚未开展，需验证其在该领域的适用性。
AI.method: 采用系统化语法生成与建筑环境相关的查询指令，利用文本到图像模型生成图像并进行评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，文本到图像转换器能稳健生成跨领域的逼真图像，但在城市设计细节上存在潜在偏差。
AI.conclusion: 当前模型在建筑环境生成中表现良好，但需进一步研究以提升对城市设计专业需求的适配性。

authors_text: Raphaël Millière
title: Adversarial Attacks on Image Generation With Made-Up Words
title_zh: 用虚构的词语对图像生成进行对抗性攻击
abstract: Text-guided image generation models can be prompted to generate images using nonce words adversarially designed to robustly evoke specific visual concepts. Two approaches for such generation are introduced: macaronic prompting, which involves designing cryptic hybrid words by concatenating subword units from different languages; and evocative prompting, which involves designing nonce words whose broad morphological features are similar enough to that of existing words to trigger robust visual associations. The two methods can also be combined to generate images associated with more specific visual concepts. The implications of these techniques for the circumvention of existing approaches to content moderation, and particularly the generation of offensive or harmful images, are discussed.
summary: Text-guided image generation models can be prompted to generate images using nonce words adversarially designed to robustly evoke specific visual concepts. Two approaches for such generation are introduced: macaronic prompting, which involves designing cryptic hybrid words by concatenating subword units from different languages; and evocative prompting, which involves designing nonce words whose broad morphological features are similar enough to that of existing words to trigger robust visual associations. The two methods can also be combined to generate images associated with more specific visual concepts. The implications of these techniques for the circumvention of existing approaches to content moderation, and particularly the generation of offensive or harmful images, are discussed.
abstract_zh: 可以提示文本引导的图像生成模型使用随机数单词生成图像，这些随机数单词被对抗性地设计以稳健地唤起特定的视觉概念。介绍了这种生成的两种方法：马卡罗式提示，涉及通过连接来自不同语言的子词单元来设计神秘的混合词；唤起性提示，涉及设计随机数词，其广泛的形态特征与现有词的形态特征足够相似，以触发强大的视觉关联。这两种方法还可以结合起来生成与更具体的视觉概念相关的图像。讨论了这些技术对规避现有内容审核方法的影响，特别是生成攻击性或有害图像的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过设计虚构词汇对图像生成模型进行对抗攻击，生成特定视觉概念的图像。
AI.motivation: 文本引导的图像生成模型可能被恶意利用生成违规内容，现有内容审核机制难以检测基于虚构词汇的攻击。
AI.method: 提出两种对抗方法：1) 通过拼接多语言子词单元生成隐晦混合词（macaronic prompting）；2) 设计形态类似真实词汇的nonce词（evocative prompting），两种方法可结合使用。
AI.result: 实验验证了两种方法能有效触发图像生成模型输出特定概念图像，揭示了内容审核系统在应对虚构词汇攻击时的脆弱性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了对抗性虚构词汇绕过内容审核的潜在风险，呼吁加强生成模型的安全防护机制。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究如何通过设计虚构词汇对图像生成模型进行对抗攻击，生成特定视觉概念的图像。

result: 实验验证了两种方法能有效触发图像生成模型输出特定概念图像，揭示了内容审核系统在应对虚构词汇攻击时的脆弱性。
conclusion: 该研究展示了对抗性虚构词汇绕过内容审核的潜在风险，呼吁加强生成模型的安全防护机制。
search_text: Adversarial Attacks on Image Generation With Made-Up Words 用虚构的词语对图像生成进行对抗性攻击 Text-guided image generation models can be prompted to generate images using nonce words adversarially designed to robustly evoke specific visual concepts. Two approaches for such generation are introduced: macaronic prompting, which involves designing cryptic hybrid words by concatenating subword units from different languages; and evocative prompting, which involves designing nonce words whose broad morphological features are similar enough to that of existing words to trigger robust visual associations. The two methods can also be combined to generate images associated with more specific visual concepts. The implications of these techniques for the circumvention of existing approaches to content moderation, and particularly the generation of offensive or harmful images, are discussed. 可以提示文本引导的图像生成模型使用随机数单词生成图像，这些随机数单词被对抗性地设计以稳健地唤起特定的视觉概念。介绍了这种生成的两种方法：马卡罗式提示，涉及通过连接来自不同语言的子词单元来设计神秘的混合词；唤起性提示，涉及设计随机数词，其广泛的形态特征与现有词的形态特征足够相似，以触发强大的视觉关联。这两种方法还可以结合起来生成与更具体的视觉概念相关的图像。讨论了这些技术对规避现有内容审核方法的影响，特别是生成攻击性或有害图像的影响。 本文研究如何通过设计虚构词汇对图像生成模型进行对抗攻击，生成特定视觉概念的图像。 Raphaël Millière cs.CV,cs.CL,cs.CR,cs.LG

authors_text: Haoye Tian,Xunzhu Tang,Andrew Habib,Shangwen Wang,Kui Liu,Xin Xia,Jacques Klein,Tegawendé F. Bissyandé
title: Is this Change the Answer to that Problem? Correlating Descriptions of Bug and Code Changes for Evaluating Patch Correctness
title_zh: 这是改变该问题的答案吗？将错误描述与代码更改关联起来以评估补丁的正确性
abstract: In this work, we propose a novel perspective to the problem of patch correctness assessment: a correct patch implements changes that "answer" to a problem posed by buggy behaviour. Concretely, we turn the patch correctness assessment into a Question Answering problem. To tackle this problem, our intuition is that natural language processing can provide the necessary representations and models for assessing the semantic correlation between a bug (question) and a patch (answer). Specifically, we consider as inputs the bug reports as well as the natural language description of the generated patches. Our approach, Quatrain, first considers state of the art commit message generation models to produce the relevant inputs associated to each generated patch. Then we leverage a neural network architecture to learn the semantic correlation between bug reports and commit messages. Experiments on a large dataset of 9135 patches generated for three bug datasets (Defects4j, Bugs.jar and Bears) show that Quatrain can achieve an AUC of 0.886 on predicting patch correctness, and recalling 93% correct patches while filtering out 62% incorrect patches. Our experimental results further demonstrate the influence of inputs quality on prediction performance. We further perform experiments to highlight that the model indeed learns the relationship between bug reports and code change descriptions for the prediction. Finally, we compare against prior work and discuss the benefits of our approach.
summary: In this work, we propose a novel perspective to the problem of patch correctness assessment: a correct patch implements changes that "answer" to a problem posed by buggy behaviour. Concretely, we turn the patch correctness assessment into a Question Answering problem. To tackle this problem, our intuition is that natural language processing can provide the necessary representations and models for assessing the semantic correlation between a bug (question) and a patch (answer). Specifically, we consider as inputs the bug reports as well as the natural language description of the generated patches. Our approach, Quatrain, first considers state of the art commit message generation models to produce the relevant inputs associated to each generated patch. Then we leverage a neural network architecture to learn the semantic correlation between bug reports and commit messages. Experiments on a large dataset of 9135 patches generated for three bug datasets (Defects4j, Bugs.jar and Bears) show that Quatrain can achieve an AUC of 0.886 on predicting patch correctness, and recalling 93% correct patches while filtering out 62% incorrect patches. Our experimental results further demonstrate the influence of inputs quality on prediction performance. We further perform experiments to highlight that the model indeed learns the relationship between bug reports and code change descriptions for the prediction. Finally, we compare against prior work and discuss the benefits of our approach.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们对补丁正确性评估问题提出了一个新的视角：正确的补丁实现了“回答”由错误行为引起的问题的更改。具体来说，我们将补丁正确性评估转化为问答问题。为了解决这个问题，我们的直觉是自然语言处理可以提供必要的表示和模型来评估错误（问题）和补丁（答案）之间的语义相关性。具体来说，我们将错误报告以及生成的补丁的自然语言描述视为输入。我们的方法 Quatrain 首先考虑最先进的提交消息生成模型来生成与每个生成的补丁相关的相关输入。然后，我们利用神经网络架构来学习错误报告和提交消息之间的语义相关性。对三个 bug 数据集（Defects4j、Bugs.jar 和 Bears）生成的 9135 个补丁的大型数据集进行的实验表明，Quatrain 在预测补丁正确性方面可以实现 0.886 的 AUC，并召回 93% 的正确补丁，同时过滤掉 62% 的错误补丁。我们的实验结果进一步证明了输入质量对预测性能的影响。我们进一步进行实验，以强调该模型确实学习了错误报告和预测的代码更改描述之间的关系。最后，我们与之前的工作进行比较并讨论我们方法的好处。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于问答的语义关联方法，评估代码补丁的正确性
AI.motivation: 传统补丁评估方法依赖代码分析，但未充分利用自然语言描述中的语义信息，需通过NLP技术提升准确性
AI.method: 利用先进的提交信息生成模型和神经网络架构，学习错误报告与补丁描述之间的语义关联
AI.result: 在三个数据集上实现0.886 AUC，召回93%正确补丁并过滤62%错误补丁，验证了输入质量对预测性能的影响
AI.conclusion: 模型有效学习了错误报告与代码变更描述的关系，输入质量影响性能，优于现有方法

authors_text: Zhilong Chen,Jinghua Piao,Xiaochong Lan,Hancheng Cao,Chen Gao,Zhicong Lu,Yong Li
title: Practitioners Versus Users: A Value-Sensitive Evaluation of Current Industrial Recommender System Design
title_zh: 从业者与用户：对当前工业推荐系统设计的价值敏感评估
comment: Zhilong Chen and Jinghua Piao contribute equally to this work; Accepted to CSCW 2022
comments: Zhilong Chen and Jinghua Piao contribute equally to this work; Accepted to CSCW 2022
abstract: Recommender systems are playing an increasingly important role in alleviating information overload and supporting users' various needs, e.g., consumption, socialization, and entertainment. However, limited research focuses on how values should be extensively considered in industrial deployments of recommender systems, the ignorance of which can be problematic. To fill this gap, in this paper, we adopt Value Sensitive Design to comprehensively explore how practitioners and users recognize different values of current industrial recommender systems. Based on conceptual and empirical investigations, we focus on five values: recommendation quality, privacy, transparency, fairness, and trustworthiness. We further conduct in-depth qualitative interviews with 20 users and 10 practitioners to delve into their opinions about these values. Our results reveal the existence and sources of tensions between practitioners and users in terms of value interpretation, evaluation, and practice, which provide novel implications for designing more human-centric and value-sensitive recommender systems.
summary: Recommender systems are playing an increasingly important role in alleviating information overload and supporting users' various needs, e.g., consumption, socialization, and entertainment. However, limited research focuses on how values should be extensively considered in industrial deployments of recommender systems, the ignorance of which can be problematic. To fill this gap, in this paper, we adopt Value Sensitive Design to comprehensively explore how practitioners and users recognize different values of current industrial recommender systems. Based on conceptual and empirical investigations, we focus on five values: recommendation quality, privacy, transparency, fairness, and trustworthiness. We further conduct in-depth qualitative interviews with 20 users and 10 practitioners to delve into their opinions about these values. Our results reveal the existence and sources of tensions between practitioners and users in terms of value interpretation, evaluation, and practice, which provide novel implications for designing more human-centric and value-sensitive recommender systems.
abstract_zh: 推荐系统在缓解信息过载和支持用户的各种需求（例如消费、社交和娱乐）方面发挥着越来越重要的作用。然而，有限的研究集中在如何在推荐系统的工业部署中广泛考虑价值，忽视这一点可能会产生问题。为了填补这一空白，本文采用价值敏感设计来全面探讨从业者和用户如何识别当前工业推荐系统的不同价值。基于概念和实证研究，我们关注五​​个价值观：推荐质量、隐私、透明度、公平性和可信度。我们进一步对 20 位用户和 10 位从业者进行深度定性访谈，深入了解他们对这些价值观的看法。我们的结果揭示了从业者和用户之间在价值解释、评估和实践方面的紧张关系的存在和根源，这为设计更加以人为中心和价值敏感的推荐系统提供了新的启示。

AI.tldr: 本文通过价值敏感设计方法，比较从业者与用户对当前工业推荐系统中推荐质量、隐私、透明度、公平性和可信度等价值的认知差异，以指导更以人为本的系统设计。
AI.motivation: 现有工业推荐系统研究缺乏对价值考量的系统性探讨，而忽视价值可能导致设计偏差，需填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 采用价值敏感设计框架，结合概念分析与实证调查，对20名用户和10名从业者进行深度定性访谈，分析其对五项核心价值的评价差异。
AI.result: 发现从业者与用户在价值解释、评估标准及实践优先级上存在显著张力，揭示了利益相关者视角差异对系统设计的影响。
AI.conclusion: 推荐系统设计需融合多方价值视角，通过价值敏感设计弥合从业者与用户认知鸿沟，推动更符合人类需求的系统开发。

authors_text: Margherita Rosnati,Eyal Soreq,Miguel Monteiro,Lucia Li,Neil S. N. Graham,Karl Zimmerman,Carlotta Rossi,Greta Carrara,Guido Bertolini,David J. Sharp,Ben Glocker
title: Automatic lesion analysis for increased efficiency in outcome prediction of traumatic brain injury
title_zh: 自动病变分析可提高创伤性脑损伤结果预测的效率
comment: Accepted at MLCN MICCAI 2022 workshop
comments: Accepted at MLCN MICCAI 2022 workshop
abstract: The accurate prognosis for traumatic brain injury (TBI) patients is difficult yet essential to inform therapy, patient management, and long-term after-care. Patient characteristics such as age, motor and pupil responsiveness, hypoxia and hypotension, and radiological findings on computed tomography (CT), have been identified as important variables for TBI outcome prediction. CT is the acute imaging modality of choice in clinical practice because of its acquisition speed and widespread availability. However, this modality is mainly used for qualitative and semi-quantitative assessment, such as the Marshall scoring system, which is prone to subjectivity and human errors. This work explores the predictive power of imaging biomarkers extracted from routinely-acquired hospital admission CT scans using a state-of-the-art, deep learning TBI lesion segmentation method. We use lesion volumes and corresponding lesion statistics as inputs for an extended TBI outcome prediction model. We compare the predictive power of our proposed features to the Marshall score, independently and when paired with classic TBI biomarkers. We find that automatically extracted quantitative CT features perform similarly or better than the Marshall score in predicting unfavourable TBI outcomes. Leveraging automatic atlas alignment, we also identify frontal extra-axial lesions as important indicators of poor outcome. Our work may contribute to a better understanding of TBI, and provides new insights into how automated neuroimaging analysis can be used to improve prognostication after TBI.

abstract_zh: 创伤性脑损伤 (TBI) 患者的准确预后虽然困难，但对于治疗、患者管理和长期术后护理至关重要。年龄、运动和瞳孔反应性、缺氧和低血压等患者特征以及计算机断层扫描 (CT) 的放射学结果已被确定为 TBI 结果预测的重要变量。 CT is the acute imaging modality of choice in clinical practice because of its acquisition speed and widespread availability.但这种方式主要用于定性和半定量评估，例如马歇尔评分系统，容易出现主观性和人为错误。这项工作探讨了使用最先进的深度学习 TBI 病灶分割方法从常规入院 CT 扫描中提取的成像生物标志物的预测能力。 We use lesion volumes and corresponding lesion statistics as inputs for an extended TBI outcome prediction model. We compare the predictive power of our proposed features to the Marshall score, independently and when paired with classic TBI biomarkers.我们发现，自动提取的定量 CT 特征在预测不利的 TBI 结果方面与 Marshall 评分相似或更好。 Leveraging automatic atlas alignment, we also identify frontal extra-axial lesions as important indicators of poor outcome.我们的工作可能有助于更好地理解 TBI，并为如何使用自动化神经影像分析来改善 TBI 后的预后提供新的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用深度学习自动分析脑部CT扫描中的病变特征，以提高创伤性脑损伤（TBI）预后的预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统TBI预后评估方法（如Marshall评分）依赖人工判断，存在主观性和误差，需更客观的定量分析方法。
AI.method: 采用深度学习分割TBI病变区域，提取病变体积等定量特征，并将其与经典生物标志物结合，对比Marshall评分的预测效果。
AI.result: 自动提取的CT特征在预测不良预后方面表现与Marshall评分相当或更优，且发现额叶硬膜外病变是预后不良的关键指标。
AI.conclusion: 自动化的神经影像分析可提升TBI预后评估的客观性，为临床决策提供新工具。

authors_text: Ahtsham Manzoor,Dietmar Jannach
title: INSPIRED2: An Improved Dataset for Sociable Conversational Recommendation
title_zh: INSPIRED2：用于社交会话推荐的改进数据集
comment: 8 pages
comments: 8 pages
abstract: Conversational recommender systems (CRS) that are able to interact with users in natural language often utilize recommendation dialogs which were previously collected with the help of paired humans, where one plays the role of a seeker and the other as a recommender. These recommendation dialogs include items and entities that indicate the users' preferences. In order to precisely model the seekers' preferences and respond consistently, CRS typically rely on item and entity annotations. A recent example of such a dataset is INSPIRED, which consists of recommendation dialogs for sociable conversational recommendation, where items and entities were annotated using automatic keyword or pattern matching techniques. An analysis of this dataset unfortunately revealed that there is a substantial number of cases where items and entities were either wrongly annotated or annotations were missing at all. This leads to the question to what extent automatic techniques for annotations are effective. Moreover, it is important to study impact of annotation quality on the overall effectiveness of a CRS in terms of the quality of the system's responses. To study these aspects, we manually fixed the annotations in INSPIRED. We then evaluated the performance of several benchmark CRS using both versions of the dataset. Our analyses suggest that the improved version of the dataset, i.e., INSPIRED2, helped increase the performance of several benchmark CRS, emphasizing the importance of data quality both for end-to-end learning and retrieval-based approaches to conversational recommendation. We release our improved dataset (INSPIRED2) publicly at https://github.com/ahtsham58/INSPIRED2.

An analysis of this dataset unfortunately revealed that there is a substantial number of cases where items and entities were either wrongly annotated or annotations were missing at all. This leads to the question to what extent automatic techniques for annotations are effective. Moreover, it is important to study impact of annotation quality on the overall effectiveness of a CRS in terms of the quality of the system's responses. To study these aspects, we manually fixed the annotations in INSPIRED. We then evaluated the performance of several benchmark CRS using both versions of the dataset. Our analyses suggest that the improved version of the dataset, i.e., INSPIRED2, helped increase the performance of several benchmark CRS, emphasizing the importance of data quality both for end-to-end learning and retrieval-based approaches to conversational recommendation. We release our improved dataset (INSPIRED2) publicly at https://github.com/ahtsham58/INSPIRED2.
abstract_zh: 能够以自然语言与用户交互的会话推荐系统（CRS）通常利用先前在配对人类的帮助下收集的推荐对话框，其中一个扮演搜索者的角色，另一个扮演推荐者的角色。这些推荐对话框包括指示用户偏好的项目和实体。为了精确地模拟搜索者的偏好并做出一致的响应，CRS 通常依赖于项目和实体注释。此类数据集的最新示例是 INSPIRED，它由用于社交会话推荐的推荐对话框组成，其中使用自动关键字或模式匹配技术对项目和实体进行注释。不幸的是，对该数据集的分析表明，在很多情况下，项目和实体要么被错误注释，要么注释根本丢失。这就引出了一个问题：自动注释技术在多大程度上有效。此外，在系统响应质量方面研究注释质量对 CRS 整体有效性的影响也很重要。为了研究这些方面，我们手动修复了 INSPIRED 中的注释。然后，我们使用这两个版本的数据集评估了几个基准 CRS 的性能。我们的分析表明，数据集的改进版本（即 INSPIRED2）有助于提高多个基准 CRS 的性能，强调了数据质量对于端到端学习和基于检索的会话推荐方法的重要性。我们在 https://github.com/ahtsham58/INSPIRED2 公开发布了改进的数据集 (INSPIRED2)。

AI.tldr: 改进用于社交对话推荐的数据集并验证其对推荐系统性能的影响
AI.motivation: 现有数据集中的自动注释存在错误和缺失，影响推荐系统性能，需改进数据质量
AI.method: 手动修正数据集注释，使用改进后的数据集与原版对比评估多个基准推荐系统的性能
AI.result: 改进后的数据集（INSPIRED2）提升了多个基准推荐系统的性能
AI.conclusion: 数据质量对推荐系统效果至关重要，改进后的数据集已公开

authors_text: Yi Luo,Jianwei Yu
title: FRA-RIR: Fast Random Approximation of the Image-source Method
title_zh: FRA-RIR：图像源方法的快速随机逼近
abstract: The training of modern speech processing systems often requires a large amount of simulated room impulse response (RIR) data in order to allow the systems to generalize well in real-world, reverberant environments. However, simulating realistic RIR data typically requires accurate physical modeling, and the acceleration of such simulation process typically requires certain computational platforms such as a graphics processing unit (GPU). In this paper, we propose FRA-RIR, a fast random approximation method of the widely-used image-source method (ISM), to efficiently generate realistic RIR data without specific computational devices. FRA-RIR replaces the physical simulation in the standard ISM by a series of random approximations, which significantly speeds up the simulation process and enables its application in on-the-fly data generation pipelines. Experiments show that FRA-RIR can not only be significantly faster than other existing ISM-based RIR simulation tools on standard computational platforms, but also improves the performance of speech denoising systems evaluated on real-world RIR when trained with simulated RIR. A Python implementation of FRA-RIR is available online\footnote{\url{https://github.com/yluo42/FRA-RIR}}.
summary: The training of modern speech processing systems often requires a large amount of simulated room impulse response (RIR) data in order to allow the systems to generalize well in real-world, reverberant environments. However, simulating realistic RIR data typically requires accurate physical modeling, and the acceleration of such simulation process typically requires certain computational platforms such as a graphics processing unit (GPU). In this paper, we propose FRA-RIR, a fast random approximation method of the widely-used image-source method (ISM), to efficiently generate realistic RIR data without specific computational devices. FRA-RIR replaces the physical simulation in the standard ISM by a series of random approximations, which significantly speeds up the simulation process and enables its application in on-the-fly data generation pipelines. Experiments show that FRA-RIR can not only be significantly faster than other existing ISM-based RIR simulation tools on standard computational platforms, but also improves the performance of speech denoising systems evaluated on real-world RIR when trained with simulated RIR. A Python implementation of FRA-RIR is available online\footnote{\url{https://github.com/yluo42/FRA-RIR}}.
abstract_zh: 现代语音处理系统的训练通常需要大量模拟房间脉冲响应 (RIR) 数据，以便使系统能够在现实世界的混响环境中很好地推广。然而，模拟真实的 RIR 数据通常需要精确的物理建模，并且这种模拟过程的加速通常需要某些计算平台，例如图形处理单元 (GPU)。在本文中，我们提出了 FRA-RIR，一种广泛使用的图像源方法 (ISM) 的快速随机逼近方法，无需特定的计算设备即可有效生成真实的 RIR 数据。 FRA-RIR 通过一系列随机近似取代了标准 ISM 中的物理模拟，这显着加快了模拟过程，并使其能够在动态数据生成管道中应用。实验表明，FRA-RIR 不仅可以在标准计算平台上明显快于其他现有的基于 ISM 的 RIR 模拟工具，而且在使用模拟 RIR 进行训练时，还可以提高在真实世界 RIR 上评估的语音去噪系统的性能。 FRA-RIR 的 Python 实现可在线获取\footnote{\url{https://github.com/yluo42/FRA-RIR}}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FRA-RIR的快速随机近似方法，用于高效生成真实的房间脉冲响应（RIR）数据。
AI.motivation: 现代语音处理系统的训练需要大量模拟的房间脉冲响应（RIR）数据，但现有的模拟方法通常需要精确的物理建模和高性能计算设备，限制了其应用。
AI.method: FRA-RIR通过用一系列随机近似代替标准图像源方法（ISM）中的物理模拟，显著加快了模拟过程。
AI.result: 实验表明，FRA-RIR在标准计算平台上比其他基于ISM的RIR模拟工具更快，并且在使用模拟RIR训练的语音降噪系统上表现更好。
AI.conclusion: FRA-RIR提供了一种无需特定计算设备即可高效生成真实RIR数据的方法，适用于实时数据生成流程。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FRA-RIR的快速随机近似方法，用于高效生成真实的房间脉冲响应（RIR）数据。

search_text: FRA-RIR: Fast Random Approximation of the Image-source Method FRA-RIR：图像源方法的快速随机逼近 The training of modern speech processing systems often requires a large amount of simulated room impulse response (RIR) data in order to allow the systems to generalize well in real-world, reverberant environments. However, simulating realistic RIR data typically requires accurate physical modeling, and the acceleration of such simulation process typically requires certain computational platforms such as a graphics processing unit (GPU). In this paper, we propose FRA-RIR, a fast random approximation method of the widely-used image-source method (ISM), to efficiently generate realistic RIR data without specific computational devices. FRA-RIR replaces the physical simulation in the standard ISM by a series of random approximations, which significantly speeds up the simulation process and enables its application in on-the-fly data generation pipelines. Experiments show that FRA-RIR can not only be significantly faster than other existing ISM-based RIR simulation tools on standard computational platforms, but also improves the performance of speech denoising systems evaluated on real-world RIR when trained with simulated RIR. A Python implementation of FRA-RIR is available online\footnote{\url{https://github.com/yluo42/FRA-RIR}}. 现代语音处理系统的训练通常需要大量模拟房间脉冲响应 (RIR) 数据，以便使系统能够在现实世界的混响环境中很好地推广。然而，模拟真实的 RIR 数据通常需要精确的物理建模，并且这种模拟过程的加速通常需要某些计算平台，例如图形处理单元 (GPU)。在本文中，我们提出了 FRA-RIR，一种广泛使用的图像源方法 (ISM) 的快速随机逼近方法，无需特定的计算设备即可有效生成真实的 RIR 数据。 FRA-RIR 通过一系列随机近似取代了标准 ISM 中的物理模拟，这显着加快了模拟过程，并使其能够在动态数据生成管道中应用。实验表明，FRA-RIR 不仅可以在标准计算平台上明显快于其他现有的基于 ISM 的 RIR 模拟工具，而且在使用模拟 RIR 进行训练时，还可以提高在真实世界 RIR 上评估的语音去噪系统的性能。 FRA-RIR 的 Python 实现可在线获取\footnote{\url{https://github.com/yluo42/FRA-RIR}}。 本文提出了一种名为FRA-RIR的快速随机近似方法，用于高效生成真实的房间脉冲响应（RIR）数据。 Yi Luo,Jianwei Yu eess.AS,cs.SD,eess.SP

authors_text: Danlan Huang,Feifei Gao,Xiaoming Tao,Qiyuan Du,Jianhua Lu
title: Towards Semantic Communications: Deep Learning-Based Image Semantic Coding
title_zh: 迈向语义通信：基于深度学习的图像语义编码
abstract: Semantic communications has received growing interest since it can remarkably reduce the amount of data to be transmitted without missing critical information. Most existing works explore the semantic encoding and transmission for text and apply techniques in Natural Language Processing (NLP) to interpret the meaning of the text. In this paper, we conceive the semantic communications for image data that is much more richer in semantics and bandwidth sensitive. We propose an reinforcement learning based adaptive semantic coding (RL-ASC) approach that encodes images beyond pixel level. Firstly, we define the semantic concept of image data that includes the category, spatial arrangement, and visual feature as the representation unit, and propose a convolutional semantic encoder to extract semantic concepts. Secondly, we propose the image reconstruction criterion that evolves from the traditional pixel similarity to semantic similarity and perceptual performance. Thirdly, we design a novel RL-based semantic bit allocation model, whose reward is the increase in rate-semantic-perceptual performance after encoding a certain semantic concept with adaptive quantization level. Thus, the task-related information is preserved and reconstructed properly while less important data is discarded. Finally, we propose the Generative Adversarial Nets (GANs) based semantic decoder that fuses both locally and globally features via an attention module. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed RL-ASC is noise robust and could reconstruct visually pleasant and semantic consistent image, and saves times of bit cost compared to standard codecs and other deep learning-based image codecs.
summary: Semantic communications has received growing interest since it can remarkably reduce the amount of data to be transmitted without missing critical information. Most existing works explore the semantic encoding and transmission for text and apply techniques in Natural Language Processing (NLP) to interpret the meaning of the text. In this paper, we conceive the semantic communications for image data that is much more richer in semantics and bandwidth sensitive. We propose an reinforcement learning based adaptive semantic coding (RL-ASC) approach that encodes images beyond pixel level. Firstly, we define the semantic concept of image data that includes the category, spatial arrangement, and visual feature as the representation unit, and propose a convolutional semantic encoder to extract semantic concepts. Secondly, we propose the image reconstruction criterion that evolves from the traditional pixel similarity to semantic similarity and perceptual performance. Thirdly, we design a novel RL-based semantic bit allocation model, whose reward is the increase in rate-semantic-perceptual performance after encoding a certain semantic concept with adaptive quantization level. Thus, the task-related information is preserved and reconstructed properly while less important data is discarded. Finally, we propose the Generative Adversarial Nets (GANs) based semantic decoder that fuses both locally and globally features via an attention module. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed RL-ASC is noise robust and could reconstruct visually pleasant and semantic consistent image, and saves times of bit cost compared to standard codecs and other deep learning-based image codecs.
abstract_zh: 语义通信受到越来越多的关注，因为它可以显着减少要传输的数据量，而不会丢失关键信息。大多数现有作品探索文本的语义编码和传输，并应用自然语言处理（NLP）技术来解释文本的含义。在本文中，我们设想了图像数据的语义通信，其语义更加丰富且带宽敏感。我们提出了一种基于强化学习的自适应语义编码（RL-ASC）方法，该方法可以对超出像素级别的图像进行编码。首先，我们定义图像数据的语义概念，包括类别、空间排列和视觉特征作为表示单元，并提出一种卷积语义编码器来提取语义概念。其次，我们提出了从传统的像素相似性演变为语义相似性和感知性能的图像重建标准。第三，我们设计了一种新颖的基于强化学习的语义比特分配模型，其奖励是在使用自适应量化级别对某个语义概念进行编码后速率-语义-感知性能的提高。因此，与任务相关的信息被正确保存和重建，而不太重要的数据被丢弃。最后，我们提出了基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的语义解码器，它通过注意模块融合本地和全局特征。实验结果表明，所提出的 RL-ASC 具有噪声鲁棒性，可以重建视觉上令人愉悦且语义一致的图像，并且与标准编解码器和其他基于深度学习的图像编解码器相比节省了比特成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的图像语义编码方法RL-ASC，通过语义概念提取和强化学习优化，实现图像数据的高效压缩与重构。
AI.motivation: 传统图像传输方法依赖像素级编码导致数据冗余，而现有语义通信研究主要针对文本。图像数据语义更丰富且对带宽敏感，需探索更高效的语义编码方案以保留关键信息并减少传输开销。
AI.method: 提出RL-ASC框架：1) 定义图像语义概念（类别、空间布局、视觉特征）并设计卷积语义编码器；2) 基于语义相似性与感知性能构建重构准则；3) 采用强化学习动态分配语义比特，奖励函数关联编码后率-语义-感知性能提升；4) 结合GAN与注意力机制设计语义解码器。
AI.result: 实验表明，RL-ASC在噪声环境下能重构出视觉质量高且语义一致的图像，相比标准编解码器和现有深度学习方法节省比特成本。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过语义级编码与强化学习优化，在保证图像语义完整性的同时显著降低传输开销，为语义通信在图像领域的应用提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Heng Cong,Lingzhi Fu,Rongyu Zhang,Yusheng Zhang,Hao Wang,Jiarong He,Jin Gao
title: Image Quality Assessment with Gradient Siamese Network
title_zh: 使用梯度暹罗网络进行图像质量评估
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures, Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) Workshops
comments: 10 pages, 5 figures, Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) Workshops
abstract: In this work, we introduce Gradient Siamese Network (GSN) for image quality assessment. The proposed method is skilled in capturing the gradient features between distorted images and reference images in full-reference image quality assessment(IQA) task. We utilize Central Differential Convolution to obtain both semantic features and detail difference hidden in image pair. Furthermore, spatial attention guides the network to concentrate on regions related to image detail. For the low-level, mid-level and high-level features extracted by the network, we innovatively design a multi-level fusion method to improve the efficiency of feature utilization. In addition to the common mean square error supervision, we further consider the relative distance among batch samples and successfully apply KL divergence loss to the image quality assessment task. We experimented the proposed algorithm GSN on several publicly available datasets and proved its superior performance. Our network won the second place in NTIRE 2022 Perceptual Image Quality Assessment Challenge track 1 Full-Reference.
summary: In this work, we introduce Gradient Siamese Network (GSN) for image quality assessment. The proposed method is skilled in capturing the gradient features between distorted images and reference images in full-reference image quality assessment(IQA) task. We utilize Central Differential Convolution to obtain both semantic features and detail difference hidden in image pair. Furthermore, spatial attention guides the network to concentrate on regions related to image detail. For the low-level, mid-level and high-level features extracted by the network, we innovatively design a multi-level fusion method to improve the efficiency of feature utilization. In addition to the common mean square error supervision, we further consider the relative distance among batch samples and successfully apply KL divergence loss to the image quality assessment task. We experimented the proposed algorithm GSN on several publicly available datasets and proved its superior performance. Our network won the second place in NTIRE 2022 Perceptual Image Quality Assessment Challenge track 1 Full-Reference.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们引入梯度暹罗网络（GSN）进行图像质量评估。该方法擅长在全参考图像质量评估（IQA）任务中捕获失真图像与参考图像之间的梯度特征。我们利用中央差分卷积来获得隐藏在图像对中的语义特征和细节差异。此外，空间注意力引导网络集中于与图像细节相关的区域。针对网络提取的低层、中层和高层特征，我们创新性地设计了多级融合方法，以提高特征利用效率。除了常见的均方误差监督之外，我们还进一步考虑批次样本之间的相对距离，并成功地将KL散度损失应用于图像质量评估任务。我们在几个公开可用的数据集上对所提出的算法 GSN 进行了实验，并证明了其优越的性能。我们的网络在 NTIRE 2022 感知图像质量评估挑战 track 1 Full-Reference 中获得第二名。

AI.tldr: 提出梯度孪生网络（GSN）用于全参考图像质量评估，通过捕捉失真图像与参考图像间的梯度特征提升评估性能。
AI.motivation: 传统图像质量评估方法在捕捉图像细节差异及高效利用多级特征方面存在不足，需改进以提升评估准确性。
AI.method: 采用中心差分卷积提取语义与细节差异，结合空间注意力机制聚焦细节区域，设计多级特征融合方法，并引入KL散度损失优化模型训练。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集上表现优异，于NTIRE 2022挑战赛全参考赛道中获得第二名。
AI.conclusion: GSN通过多级特征融合与注意力机制有效提升图像质量评估性能，验证了方法的有效性与先进性。

ai_content.tldr: 提出梯度孪生网络（GSN）用于全参考图像质量评估，通过捕捉失真图像与参考图像间的梯度特征提升评估性能。
ai_content.motivation: 传统图像质量评估方法在捕捉图像细节差异及高效利用多级特征方面存在不足，需改进以提升评估准确性。

search_text: Image Quality Assessment with Gradient Siamese Network 使用梯度暹罗网络进行图像质量评估 In this work, we introduce Gradient Siamese Network (GSN) for image quality assessment. The proposed method is skilled in capturing the gradient features between distorted images and reference images in full-reference image quality assessment(IQA) task. We utilize Central Differential Convolution to obtain both semantic features and detail difference hidden in image pair. Furthermore, spatial attention guides the network to concentrate on regions related to image detail. For the low-level, mid-level and high-level features extracted by the network, we innovatively design a multi-level fusion method to improve the efficiency of feature utilization. In addition to the common mean square error supervision, we further consider the relative distance among batch samples and successfully apply KL divergence loss to the image quality assessment task. We experimented the proposed algorithm GSN on several publicly available datasets and proved its superior performance. Our network won the second place in NTIRE 2022 Perceptual Image Quality Assessment Challenge track 1 Full-Reference. 在这项工作中，我们引入梯度暹罗网络（GSN）进行图像质量评估。该方法擅长在全参考图像质量评估（IQA）任务中捕获失真图像与参考图像之间的梯度特征。我们利用中央差分卷积来获得隐藏在图像对中的语义特征和细节差异。此外，空间注意力引导网络集中于与图像细节相关的区域。针对网络提取的低层、中层和高层特征，我们创新性地设计了多级融合方法，以提高特征利用效率。除了常见的均方误差监督之外，我们还进一步考虑批次样本之间的相对距离，并成功地将KL散度损失应用于图像质量评估任务。我们在几个公开可用的数据集上对所提出的算法 GSN 进行了实验，并证明了其优越的性能。我们的网络在 NTIRE 2022 感知图像质量评估挑战 track 1 Full-Reference 中获得第二名。 提出梯度孪生网络（GSN）用于全参考图像质量评估，通过捕捉失真图像与参考图像间的梯度特征提升评估性能。 Heng Cong,Lingzhi Fu,Rongyu Zhang,Yusheng Zhang,Hao Wang,Jiarong He,Jin Gao eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Elsie Lee-Robbins,Eytan Adar
title: Affective Learning Objectives for Communicative Visualizations
title_zh: 交流可视化的情感学习目标
comment: to appear in IEEE Info VIS'2022
comments: to appear in IEEE Info VIS'2022
abstract: When designing communicative visualizations, we often focus on goals that seek to convey patterns, relations, or comparisons (cognitive learning objectives). We pay less attention to affective intents--those that seek to influence or leverage the audience's opinions, attitudes, or values in some way. Affective objectives may range in outcomes from making the viewer care about the subject, strengthening a stance on an opinion, or leading them to take further action. Because such goals are often considered a violation of perceived 'neutrality' or are 'political,' designers may resist or be unable to describe these intents, let alone formalize them as learning objectives. While there are notable exceptions--such as advocacy visualizations or persuasive cartography--we find that visualization designers rarely acknowledge or formalize affective objectives. Through interviews with visualization designers, we expand on prior work on using learning objectives as a framework for describing and assessing communicative intent. Specifically, we extend and revise the framework to include a set of affective learning objectives. This structured taxonomy can help designers identify and declare their goals and compare and assess designs in a more principled way. Additionally, the taxonomy can enable external critique and analysis of visualizations. We illustrate the use of the taxonomy with a critical analysis of an affective visualization.

We pay less attention to affective intents--those that seek to influence or leverage the audience's opinions, attitudes, or values in some way. Affective objectives may range in outcomes from making the viewer care about the subject, strengthening a stance on an opinion, or leading them to take further action. Because such goals are often considered a violation of perceived 'neutrality' or are 'political,' designers may resist or be unable to describe these intents, let alone formalize them as learning objectives. While there are notable exceptions--such as advocacy visualizations or persuasive cartography--we find that visualization designers rarely acknowledge or formalize affective objectives. Through interviews with visualization designers, we expand on prior work on using learning objectives as a framework for describing and assessing communicative intent. Specifically, we extend and revise the framework to include a set of affective learning objectives. This structured taxonomy can help designers identify and declare their goals and compare and assess designs in a more principled way. Additionally, the taxonomy can enable external critique and analysis of visualizations. We illustrate the use of the taxonomy with a critical analysis of an affective visualization.
abstract_zh: 在设计交流可视化时，我们通常关注旨在传达模式、关系或比较的目标（认知学习目标）。我们不太关注情感意图——那些试图以某种方式影响或利用受众的意见、态度或价值观的意图。情感目标的结果可能包括让观众关心主题、强化观点立场或引导他们采取进一步行动。由于此类目标通常被认为违反了感知的“中立性”或具有“政治性”，因此设计者可能会抵制或无法描述这些意图，更不用说将它们正式化为学习目标。虽然有一些值得注意的例外——例如倡导可视化或有说服力的制图——但我们发现可视化设计者很少承认或形式化情感目标。通过与可视化设计师的访谈，我们扩展了之前的工作，即使用学习目标作为描述和评估交流意图的框架。具体来说，我们扩展和修改了框架，以包含一组情感学习目标。这种结构化分类法可以帮助设计人员识别和声明他们的目标，并以更有原则的方式比较和评估设计。此外，分类法可以实现对可视化的外部批评和分析。我们通过对情感可视化的批判性分析来说明分类法的使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于描述和评估传播可视化中情感学习目标的分类框架，以补充传统认知目标的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统可视化设计侧重于认知目标（如传递模式或比较），但情感目标（如影响受众态度或价值观）常被忽视或因被视为非中立而难以形式化。
AI.method: 通过访谈可视化设计师，扩展并修订现有学习目标框架，新增情感学习目标分类，并以批判性分析案例展示其应用。
AI.result: 构建了一个结构化的情感学习目标分类体系，帮助设计师明确目标并支持外部批评与评估。
AI.conclusion: 该分类体系为可视化设计提供了更全面的目标描述工具，促进情感意图的正式化与批判性分析。

authors_text: Heng Cong,Rongyu Zhang,Jiarong He,Jin Gao
title: Multi-Frames Temporal Abnormal Clues Learning Method for Face Anti-Spoofing
title_zh: 人脸反欺骗的多帧时间异常线索学习方法
comment: 6 pages,7 figures,The 34th International Conference on Software Engineering & Knowledge Engineering
comments: 6 pages,7 figures,The 34th International Conference on Software Engineering & Knowledge Engineering
abstract: Face anti-spoofing researches are widely used in face recognition and has received more attention from industry and academics. In this paper, we propose the EulerNet, a new temporal feature fusion network in which the differential filter and residual pyramid are used to extract and amplify abnormal clues from continuous frames, respectively. A lightweight sample labeling method based on face landmarks is designed to label large-scale samples at a lower cost and has better results than other methods such as 3D camera. Finally, we collect 30,000 live and spoofing samples using various mobile ends to create a dataset that replicates various forms of attacks in a real-world setting. Extensive experiments on public OULU-NPU show that our algorithm is superior to the state of art and our solution has already been deployed in real-world systems servicing millions of users.
summary: Face anti-spoofing researches are widely used in face recognition and has received more attention from industry and academics. In this paper, we propose the EulerNet, a new temporal feature fusion network in which the differential filter and residual pyramid are used to extract and amplify abnormal clues from continuous frames, respectively. A lightweight sample labeling method based on face landmarks is designed to label large-scale samples at a lower cost and has better results than other methods such as 3D camera. Finally, we collect 30,000 live and spoofing samples using various mobile ends to create a dataset that replicates various forms of attacks in a real-world setting. Extensive experiments on public OULU-NPU show that our algorithm is superior to the state of art and our solution has already been deployed in real-world systems servicing millions of users.
abstract_zh: 人脸反欺骗研究广泛应用于人脸识别领域，并受到业界和学术界的广泛关注。在本文中，我们提出了 EulerNet，一种新的时间特征融合网络，其中差分滤波器和残差金字塔分别用于从连续帧中提取和放大异常线索。基于人脸特征点的轻量级样本标记方法旨在以较低的成本标记大规模样本，并且比 3D 相机等其他方法具有更好的效果。最后，我们使用各种移动端收集了 30,000 个实时和欺骗样本，以创建一个数据集，在现实环境中复制各种形式的攻击。对公共 OULU-NPU 的大量实验表明，我们的算法优于现有技术，并且我们的解决方案已经部署在为数百万用户提供服务的现实系统中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多帧时间异常线索学习方法EulerNet，用于提升人脸识别防欺骗性能。
AI.motivation: 现有防欺骗方法依赖高成本设备或难以有效提取动态攻击特征，需更高效低成本的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计EulerNet网络结合微分滤波器与残差金字塔提取动态异常特征，并提出基于面部标志的轻量级样本标注方法。
AI.result: 在OULU-NPU数据集上优于现有方法，且已部署于服务数百万用户的实际系统中。
AI.conclusion: 通过时序特征融合与高效标注方法，有效提升防欺骗性能并实现实际应用价值。

authors_text: Jaeseok Byun,Taebaek Hwang,Jianlong Fu,Taesup Moon
title: GRIT-VLP: Grouped Mini-batch Sampling for Efficient Vision and Language Pre-training
title_zh: GRIT-VLP：分组小批量采样以实现高效的视觉和语言预训练
abstract: Most of the currently existing vision and language pre-training (VLP) methods have mainly focused on how to extract and align vision and text features. In contrast to the mainstream VLP methods, we highlight that two routinely applied steps during pre-training have crucial impact on the performance of the pre-trained model: in-batch hard negative sampling for image-text matching (ITM) and assigning the large masking probability for the masked language modeling (MLM). After empirically showing the unexpected effectiveness of above two steps, we systematically devise our GRIT-VLP, which adaptively samples mini-batches for more effective mining of hard negative samples for ITM while maintaining the computational cost for pre-training. Our method consists of three components: 1) GRouped mIni-baTch sampling (GRIT) strategy that collects similar examples in a mini-batch, 2) ITC consistency loss for improving the mining ability, and 3) enlarged masking probability for MLM. Consequently, we show our GRIT-VLP achieves a new state-of-the-art performance on various downstream tasks with much less computational cost. Furthermore, we demonstrate that our model is essentially in par with ALBEF, the previous state-of-the-art, only with one-third of training epochs on the same training data. Code is available at https://github.com/jaeseokbyun/GRIT-VLP.
summary: Most of the currently existing vision and language pre-training (VLP) methods have mainly focused on how to extract and align vision and text features. In contrast to the mainstream VLP methods, we highlight that two routinely applied steps during pre-training have crucial impact on the performance of the pre-trained model: in-batch hard negative sampling for image-text matching (ITM) and assigning the large masking probability for the masked language modeling (MLM). After empirically showing the unexpected effectiveness of above two steps, we systematically devise our GRIT-VLP, which adaptively samples mini-batches for more effective mining of hard negative samples for ITM while maintaining the computational cost for pre-training. Our method consists of three components: 1) GRouped mIni-baTch sampling (GRIT) strategy that collects similar examples in a mini-batch, 2) ITC consistency loss for improving the mining ability, and 3) enlarged masking probability for MLM. Consequently, we show our GRIT-VLP achieves a new state-of-the-art performance on various downstream tasks with much less computational cost. Furthermore, we demonstrate that our model is essentially in par with ALBEF, the previous state-of-the-art, only with one-third of training epochs on the same training data. Code is available at https://github.com/jaeseokbyun/GRIT-VLP.
abstract_zh: 目前大多数现有的视觉和语言预训练（VLP）方法主要集中在如何提取和对齐视觉和文本特征。与主流的 VLP 方法相比，我们强调预训练期间常规应用的两个步骤对预训练模型的性能具有至关重要的影响：图像文本匹配（ITM）的批量硬负采样和为掩码语言建模（MLM）分配大掩码概率。在凭经验证明上述两个步骤的意想不到的有效性之后，我们系统地设计了 GRIT-VLP，它自适应地对小批量进行采样，以便更有效地挖掘 ITM 的硬负样本，同时保持预训练的计算成本。我们的方法由三个组成部分组成：1）分组小批量采样（GRIT）策略，在小批量中收集相似的示例，2）用于提高挖掘能力的 ITC 一致性损失，3）扩大 MLM 的掩蔽概率。因此，我们展示了 GRIT-VLP 在各种下游任务上以更少的计算成本实现了新的最先进的性能。此外，我们证明我们的模型本质上与 ALBEF（之前的最先进模型）相当，只是在相同的训练数据上有三分之一的训练周期。代码可在 https://github.com/jaeseokbyun/GRIT-VLP 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GRIT-VLP方法，通过优化预训练过程中的分组小批量采样策略，提升视觉与语言预训练的效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言预训练方法过度关注特征提取与对齐，忽视了预训练中关键步骤（如硬负样本采样和掩码概率设置）对模型性能的重要影响。
AI.method: GRIT-VLP包含三个核心组件：1) 分组小批量采样（GRIT）策略以收集相似样本；2) ITC一致性损失提升负样本挖掘能力；3) 增大掩码概率以增强语言建模效果。
AI.result: 在多个下游任务中达到新SOTA性能，且计算成本降低；仅用ALBEF三分之一训练轮次即可达到相近效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化预训练流程中的关键步骤，GRIT-VLP在保持计算效率的同时显著提升了视觉-语言模型的性能。

authors_text: Peter De Roovere,Steven Moonen,Nick Michiels,Francis Wyffels
title: Dataset of Industrial Metal Objects
comment: 7 pages, 9 figures
comments: 7 pages, 9 figures
abstract: We present a diverse dataset of industrial metal objects. These objects are symmetric, textureless and highly reflective, leading to challenging conditions not captured in existing datasets. Our dataset contains both real-world and synthetic multi-view RGB images with 6D object pose labels. Real-world data is obtained by recording multi-view images of scenes with varying object shapes, materials, carriers, compositions and lighting conditions. This results in over 30,000 images, accurately labelled using a new public tool. Synthetic data is obtained by carefully simulating real-world conditions and varying them in a controlled and realistic way. This leads to over 500,000 synthetic images. The close correspondence between synthetic and real-world data, and controlled variations, will facilitate sim-to-real research. Our dataset's size and challenging nature will facilitate research on various computer vision tasks involving reflective materials. The dataset and accompanying resources are made available on the project website at https://pderoovere.github.io/dimo.
summary: We present a diverse dataset of industrial metal objects. These objects are symmetric, textureless and highly reflective, leading to challenging conditions not captured in existing datasets. Our dataset contains both real-world and synthetic multi-view RGB images with 6D object pose labels. Real-world data is obtained by recording multi-view images of scenes with varying object shapes, materials, carriers, compositions and lighting conditions. This results in over 30,000 images, accurately labelled using a new public tool. Synthetic data is obtained by carefully simulating real-world conditions and varying them in a controlled and realistic way. This leads to over 500,000 synthetic images. The close correspondence between synthetic and real-world data, and controlled variations, will facilitate sim-to-real research. Our dataset's size and challenging nature will facilitate research on various computer vision tasks involving reflective materials. The dataset and accompanying resources are made available on the project website at https://pderoovere.github.io/dimo.
abstract_zh: 我们提供了工业金属物体的多样化数据集。这些物体是对称的、无纹理的和高反射率的，导致现有数据集中未捕获到的具有挑战性的条件。我们的数据集包含带有 6D 对象姿势标签的真实世界和合成多视图 RGB 图像。真实世界的数据是通过记录具有不同物体形状、材料、载体、构图和照明条件的场景的多视图图像来获得的。这会产生超过 30,000 张图像，并使用新的公共工具进行准确标记。综合数据是通过仔细模拟现实世界条件并以受控和现实的方式改变它们来获得的。这会产生超过 500,000 张合成图像。合成数据和真实数据之间的密切对应以及受控变化将促进模拟到真实的研究。我们的数据集的规模和挑战性性质将促进涉及反射材料的各种计算机视觉任务的研究。数据集和随附资源可在项目网站 https://pderoovere.github.io/dimo 上获取。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一个包含工业金属物体的多样化数据集，解决现有数据集未涵盖的对称、无纹理且高反射物体的挑战性条件。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集缺乏对工业场景中高度反射、无纹理且对称金属物体的充分表征，导致相关计算机视觉任务的研究受限。
AI.method: 通过采集真实场景多视角图像（3万张）与控制变量生成的合成图像（50万张），结合新型标注工具实现6D姿态标签。
AI.result: 构建了包含真实与合成数据的混合数据集，促进反射材料视觉任务研究及仿真到现实（sim-to-real）迁移方法开发。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集通过规模效应与挑战性样本特性，为工业金属物体检测、姿态估计等任务提供新研究基础，资源已公开获取。

authors_text: Alessandro Colombo,Simon Dold,Patrice Kolb,Nils Bernhardt,Patrick Behrens,Jonathan Correa,Stefan Düsterer,Benjamin Erk,Linos Hecht,Andrea Heilrath,Robert Irsig,Norman Iwe,Jakob Jordan,Björn Kruse,Bruno Langbehn,Bastian Manschwetus,Franklin Martinez,Karl-Heinz Meiwes-Broer,Kevin Oldenburg,Christopher Passow,Christian Peltz,Mario Sauppe,Fabian Seel,Rico Mayro P. Tanyag,Rolf Treusch, et al. (7 additional authors not shown)
title: Three-Dimensional Coherent Diffractive Imaging of Isolated Faceted Nanostructures
title_zh: 孤立多面纳米结构的三维相干衍射成像
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures
comments: 10 pages, 6 figures
abstract: The structure and dynamics of isolated nanosamples in free flight can be directly visualized via single-shot coherent diffractive imaging using the intense and short pulses of X-ray free-electron lasers. Wide-angle scattering images even encode three-dimensional morphological information of the samples, but the retrieval of this information remains a challenge. Up to now, effective three-dimensional morphology reconstructions from single shots were only achieved via fitting with highly constrained models, requiring a priori knowledge about possible geometrical shapes. Here we present a much more generic imaging approach. Relying on a model that allows for any sample morphology described by a convex polyhedron, we reconstruct wide-angle diffraction patterns from individual silver nanoparticles. In addition to known structural motives with high symmetries, we retrieve imperfect shapes and agglomerates which were not accessible previously. Our results open new routes towards true 3D structure determination of single nanoparticles and, ultimately, 3D movies of ultrafast nanoscale dynamics.
summary: The structure and dynamics of isolated nanosamples in free flight can be directly visualized via single-shot coherent diffractive imaging using the intense and short pulses of X-ray free-electron lasers. Wide-angle scattering images even encode three-dimensional morphological information of the samples, but the retrieval of this information remains a challenge. Up to now, effective three-dimensional morphology reconstructions from single shots were only achieved via fitting with highly constrained models, requiring a priori knowledge about possible geometrical shapes. Here we present a much more generic imaging approach. Relying on a model that allows for any sample morphology described by a convex polyhedron, we reconstruct wide-angle diffraction patterns from individual silver nanoparticles. In addition to known structural motives with high symmetries, we retrieve imperfect shapes and agglomerates which were not accessible previously. Our results open new routes towards true 3D structure determination of single nanoparticles and, ultimately, 3D movies of ultrafast nanoscale dynamics.
abstract_zh: 使用 X 射线自由电子激光器的强短脉冲，可以通过单次相干衍射成像直接可视化自由飞行中孤立纳米样品的结构和动力学。广角散射图像甚至对样本的三维形态信息进行编码，但这些信息的检索仍然是一个挑战。到目前为止，单次拍摄的有效三维形态重建只能通过高度约束的模型拟合来实现，需要关于可能的几何形状的先验知识。在这里，我们提出了一种更通用的成像方法。依靠允许凸多面体描述的任何样品形态的模型，我们重建了单个银纳米颗粒的广角衍射图案。除了已知的具有高度对称性的结构动机之外，我们还检索了以前无法获得的不完美形状和团聚体。我们的研究结果为单个纳米颗粒的真正 3D 结构测定以及最终的超快纳米级动力学 3D 电影开辟了新途径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于凸多面体模型的三维相干衍射成像方法，用于重建孤立纳米颗粒的三维形态。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖先验几何形状约束，难以处理复杂或非对称纳米结构，需开发更通用的三维重构技术。
AI.method: 利用凸多面体模型描述样品形态，结合宽角散射数据，通过单次曝光实现银纳米颗粒的三维形态重建。
AI.result: 成功重建了高对称性结构及此前无法获取的不规则形状和团聚体，验证了方法的通用性与准确性。

search_text: Three-Dimensional Coherent Diffractive Imaging of Isolated Faceted Nanostructures 孤立多面纳米结构的三维相干衍射成像 The structure and dynamics of isolated nanosamples in free flight can be directly visualized via single-shot coherent diffractive imaging using the intense and short pulses of X-ray free-electron lasers. Wide-angle scattering images even encode three-dimensional morphological information of the samples, but the retrieval of this information remains a challenge. Up to now, effective three-dimensional morphology reconstructions from single shots were only achieved via fitting with highly constrained models, requiring a priori knowledge about possible geometrical shapes. Here we present a much more generic imaging approach. Relying on a model that allows for any sample morphology described by a convex polyhedron, we reconstruct wide-angle diffraction patterns from individual silver nanoparticles. In addition to known structural motives with high symmetries, we retrieve imperfect shapes and agglomerates which were not accessible previously. Our results open new routes towards true 3D structure determination of single nanoparticles and, ultimately, 3D movies of ultrafast nanoscale dynamics. 使用 X 射线自由电子激光器的强短脉冲，可以通过单次相干衍射成像直接可视化自由飞行中孤立纳米样品的结构和动力学。广角散射图像甚至对样本的三维形态信息进行编码，但这些信息的检索仍然是一个挑战。到目前为止，单次拍摄的有效三维形态重建只能通过高度约束的模型拟合来实现，需要关于可能的几何形状的先验知识。在这里，我们提出了一种更通用的成像方法。依靠允许凸多面体描述的任何样品形态的模型，我们重建了单个银纳米颗粒的广角衍射图案。除了已知的具有高度对称性的结构动机之外，我们还检索了以前无法获得的不完美形状和团聚体。我们的研究结果为单个纳米颗粒的真正 3D 结构测定以及最终的超快纳米级动力学 3D 电影开辟了新途径。 本文提出了一种基于凸多面体模型的三维相干衍射成像方法，用于重建孤立纳米颗粒的三维形态。 Alessandro Colombo,Simon Dold,Patrice Kolb,Nils Bernhardt,Patrick Behrens,Jonathan Correa,Stefan Düsterer,Benjamin Erk,Linos Hecht,Andrea Heilrath,Robert Irsig,Norman Iwe,Jakob Jordan,Björn Kruse,Bruno Langbehn,Bastian Manschwetus,Franklin Martinez,Karl-Heinz Meiwes-Broer,Kevin Oldenburg,Christopher Passow,Christian Peltz,Mario Sauppe,Fabian Seel,Rico Mayro P. Tanyag,Rolf Treusch, et al. (7 additional authors not shown) physics.atm-clus,cond-mat.mes-hall,cs.NE,physics.data-an,physics.optics

authors_text: Gwangtak Bae,Byungjun Kim,Seongyong Ahn,Jihong Min,Inwook Shim
title: SLiDE: Self-supervised LiDAR De-snowing through Reconstruction Difficulty
title_zh: SLiDE：自监督激光雷达克服重建困难除雪
comment: ECCV 2022
comments: ECCV 2022
abstract: LiDAR is widely used to capture accurate 3D outdoor scene structures. However, LiDAR produces many undesirable noise points in snowy weather, which hamper analyzing meaningful 3D scene structures. Semantic segmentation with snow labels would be a straightforward solution for removing them, but it requires laborious point-wise annotation. To address this problem, we propose a novel self-supervised learning framework for snow points removal in LiDAR point clouds. Our method exploits the structural characteristic of the noise points: low spatial correlation with their neighbors. Our method consists of two deep neural networks: Point Reconstruction Network (PR-Net) reconstructs each point from its neighbors; Reconstruction Difficulty Network (RD-Net) predicts point-wise difficulty of the reconstruction by PR-Net, which we call reconstruction difficulty. With simple post-processing, our method effectively detects snow points without any label. Our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance among label-free approaches and is comparable to the fully-supervised method. Moreover, we demonstrate that our method can be exploited as a pretext task to improve label-efficiency of supervised training of de-snowing.

However, LiDAR produces many undesirable noise points in snowy weather, which hamper analyzing meaningful 3D scene structures. Semantic segmentation with snow labels would be a straightforward solution for removing them, but it requires laborious point-wise annotation. To address this problem, we propose a novel self-supervised learning framework for snow points removal in LiDAR point clouds. Our method exploits the structural characteristic of the noise points: low spatial correlation with their neighbors. Our method consists of two deep neural networks: Point Reconstruction Network (PR-Net) reconstructs each point from its neighbors; Reconstruction Difficulty Network (RD-Net) predicts point-wise difficulty of the reconstruction by PR-Net, which we call reconstruction difficulty. With simple post-processing, our method effectively detects snow points without any label. Our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance among label-free approaches and is comparable to the fully-supervised method. Moreover, we demonstrate that our method can be exploited as a pretext task to improve label-efficiency of supervised training of de-snowing.
abstract_zh: LiDAR 广泛用于捕捉精确的 3D 室外场景结构。然而，LiDAR 在下雪天气中会产生许多不需要的噪声点，这会妨碍分析有意义的 3D 场景结构。使用雪标签进行语义分割将是删除它们的直接解决方案，但它需要费力的逐点注释。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的自监督学习框架，用于激光雷达点云中的雪点去除。我们的方法利用了噪声点的结构特征：与其邻居的低空间相关性。我们的方法由两个深度神经网络组成：点重建网络（PR-Net）根据其邻居重建每个点；重建难度网络（RD-Net）通过PR-Net预测重建的逐点难度，我们称之为重建难度。通过简单的后处理，我们的方法可以有效地检测没有任何标签的雪点。我们的方法在无标签方法中实现了最先进的性能，并且与完全监督的方法相当。此外，我们证明我们的方法可以用作借口任务来提高除雪监督训练的标签效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需标签的自监督学习框架，用于去除LiDAR点云中的雪点。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖标注数据，但标注成本高，因此需要一种无需标签的自监督方法来去除雪点。
AI.method: 方法包括两个网络：PR-Net通过邻居点重建当前点，RD-Net预测重建难度，从而检测雪点。
AI.result: 在无标签方法中达到最先进水平，并且效果可与全监督方法媲美。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效去除了雪点，并可作为预训练任务提升监督学习的标签效率。

authors_text: Niclas Boehmer,Klaus Heeger,Stanisław Szufa
title: A Map of Diverse Synthetic Stable Roommates Instances
title_zh: 各种合成稳定室友实例的地图
abstract: Focusing on Stable Roommates (SR) instances, we contribute to the toolbox for conducting experiments for stable matching problems. We introduce a polynomial-time computable pseudometric to measure the similarity of SR instances, analyze its properties, and use it to create a map of SR instances. This map visualizes 460 synthetic SR instances (each sampled from one of ten different statistical cultures) as follows: Each instance is a point in the plane, and two points are close on the map if the corresponding SR instances are similar to each other. Subsequently, we conduct several exemplary experiments and depict their results on the map, illustrating the map's usefulness as a non-aggregate visualization tool, the diversity of our generated dataset, and the need to use instances sampled from different statistical cultures. Lastly, to demonstrate that our framework can also be used for other matching problems under preference, we create and analyze a map of Stable Marriage instances.
summary: Focusing on Stable Roommates (SR) instances, we contribute to the toolbox for conducting experiments for stable matching problems. We introduce a polynomial-time computable pseudometric to measure the similarity of SR instances, analyze its properties, and use it to create a map of SR instances. This map visualizes 460 synthetic SR instances (each sampled from one of ten different statistical cultures) as follows: Each instance is a point in the plane, and two points are close on the map if the corresponding SR instances are similar to each other. Subsequently, we conduct several exemplary experiments and depict their results on the map, illustrating the map's usefulness as a non-aggregate visualization tool, the diversity of our generated dataset, and the need to use instances sampled from different statistical cultures. Lastly, to demonstrate that our framework can also be used for other matching problems under preference, we create and analyze a map of Stable Marriage instances.
abstract_zh: 我们专注于稳定室友（SR）实例，为用于稳定匹配问题进行实验的工具箱做出了贡献。我们引入了多项式时间可计算伪度量来测量 SR 实例的相似性，分析其属性，并使用它来创建 SR 实例的映射。该地图可视化了 460 个合成 SR 实例（每个实例都从十种不同的统计文化之一中采样），如下所示：每个实例都是平面上的一个点，如果相应的 SR 实例彼此相似，则两个点在地图上很接近。随后，我们进行了几个示例性实验并在地图上描绘了它们的结果，说明了地图作为非聚合可视化工具的有用性、我们生成的数据集的多样性以及使用从不同统计文化中采样的实例的需要。最后，为了证明我们的框架也可以用于偏好下的其他匹配问题，我们创建并分析了稳定婚姻实例的地图。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于伪度量的可视化方法，用于展示不同统计文化下合成的稳定室友问题实例的相似性分布。
AI.motivation: 现有稳定匹配问题实验缺乏对实例多样性及统计文化差异的系统性可视化分析工具。
AI.method: 设计多项式时间可计算的伪度量，通过降维映射将460个合成SR实例转化为二维平面可视化地图。
AI.result: 生成的实例地图验证了不同统计文化下实例的聚类特征，展示了框架在稳定婚姻问题中的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 该可视化框架有效揭示了实例多样性，强调了跨统计文化采样对实验研究的重要性。

authors_text: Tiago de Freitas Pereira,Dominic Schmidli,Yu Linghu,Xinyi Zhang,Sébastien Marcel,Manuel Günther
title: Eight Years of Face Recognition Research: Reproducibility, Achievements and Open Issues
title_zh: 八年人脸识别研究：可重复性、成就和未解决的问题
abstract: Automatic face recognition is a research area with high popularity. Many different face recognition algorithms have been proposed in the last thirty years of intensive research in the field. With the popularity of deep learning and its capability to solve a huge variety of different problems, face recognition researchers have concentrated effort on creating better models under this paradigm. From the year 2015, state-of-the-art face recognition has been rooted in deep learning models. Despite the availability of large-scale and diverse datasets for evaluating the performance of face recognition algorithms, many of the modern datasets just combine different factors that influence face recognition, such as face pose, occlusion, illumination, facial expression and image quality. When algorithms produce errors on these datasets, it is not clear which of the factors has caused this error and, hence, there is no guidance in which direction more research is required. This work is a followup from our previous works developed in 2014 and eventually published in 2016, showing the impact of various facial aspects on face recognition algorithms. By comparing the current state-of-the-art with the best systems from the past, we demonstrate that faces under strong occlusions, some types of illumination, and strong expressions are problems mastered by deep learning algorithms, whereas recognition with low-resolution images, extreme pose variations, and open-set recognition is still an open problem. To show this, we run a sequence of experiments using six different datasets and five different face recognition algorithms in an open-source and reproducible manner. We provide the source code to run all of our experiments, which is easily extensible so that utilizing your own deep network in our evaluation is just a few minutes away.

abstract_zh: 自动人脸识别是一个热门的研究领域。在过去三十年的该领域的深入研究中，已经提出了许多不同的人脸识别算法。随着深度学习的普及及其解决各种不同问题的能力，人脸识别研究人员集中精力在这种范式下创建更好的模型。从 2015 年开始，最先进的人脸识别已经植根于深度学习模型。尽管可以使用大规模且多样化的数据集来评估人脸识别算法的性能，但许多现代数据集只是结合了影响人脸识别的不同因素，例如人脸姿势、遮挡、照明、面部表情和图像质量。当算法在这些数据集上产生错误时，尚不清楚是哪个因素导致了该错误，因此，没有任何指导需要在哪个方向进行更多研究。这项工作是我们 2014 年开发并最终于 2016 年发布的先前工作的后续工作，展示了面部各个方面对人脸识别算法的影响。通过将当前最先进的系统与过去最好的系统进行比较，我们证明了强遮挡下的人脸、某些类型的照明和强烈的表情是深度学习算法掌握的问题，而低分辨率图像的识别、极端姿势变化和开放集识别仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。为了证明这一点，我们以开源和可重复的方式使用六个不同的数据集和五种不同的人脸识别算法进行了一系列实验。我们提供运行所有实验的源代码，该源代码易于扩展，因此只需几分钟即可在我们的评估中使用您自己的深度网络。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了过去八年中人脸识别研究的可复现性、成就及开放问题，通过对比当前最先进的算法与早期系统，分析了不同面部因素对识别性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习推动了人脸识别的进展，但现有数据集混合了多种影响因素（如姿态、遮挡等），导致难以明确算法错误的具体原因，需系统评估当前技术的局限性。
AI.method: 使用六个不同数据集和五种人脸识别算法进行开放源代码的可复现实验，对比分析深度学习模型在不同面部条件下的表现。
AI.result: 深度学习算法已较好解决强遮挡、部分光照和表情问题，但在低分辨率、极端姿态和开放集识别方面仍存在显著挑战。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习虽提升了人脸识别性能，但特定场景下的技术瓶颈仍需突破，本文提供的开源工具可促进未来研究的可复现性与改进方向。
