authors_text: Huaizhen Tang,Xulong Zhang,Jianzong Wang,Ning Cheng,Zhen Zeng,Edward Xiao,Jing Xiao
title: TGAVC: Improving Autoencoder Voice Conversion with Text-Guided and Adversarial Training
title_zh: TGAVC：通过文本引导和对抗性训练改进自动编码器语音转换
comment: ASRU 6 pages
comments: ASRU 6 pages
abstract: Non-parallel many-to-many voice conversion remains an interesting but challenging speech processing task. Recently, AutoVC, a conditional autoencoder based method, achieved excellent conversion results by disentangling the speaker identity and the speech content using information-constraining bottlenecks. However, due to the pure autoencoder training method, it is difficult to evaluate the separation effect of content and speaker identity. In this paper, a novel voice conversion framework, named $\boldsymbol T$ext $\boldsymbol G$uided $\boldsymbol A$utoVC(TGAVC), is proposed to more effectively separate content and timbre from speech, where an expected content embedding produced based on the text transcriptions is designed to guide the extraction of voice content. In addition, the adversarial training is applied to eliminate the speaker identity information in the estimated content embedding extracted from speech. Under the guidance of the expected content embedding and the adversarial training, the content encoder is trained to extract speaker-independent content embedding from speech. Experiments on AIShell-3 dataset show that the proposed model outperforms AutoVC in terms of naturalness and similarity of converted speech.
summary: Non-parallel many-to-many voice conversion remains an interesting but challenging speech processing task. Recently, AutoVC, a conditional autoencoder based method, achieved excellent conversion results by disentangling the speaker identity and the speech content using information-constraining bottlenecks. However, due to the pure autoencoder training method, it is difficult to evaluate the separation effect of content and speaker identity. In this paper, a novel voice conversion framework, named $\boldsymbol T$ext $\boldsymbol G$uided $\boldsymbol A$utoVC(TGAVC), is proposed to more effectively separate content and timbre from speech, where an expected content embedding produced based on the text transcriptions is designed to guide the extraction of voice content. In addition, the adversarial training is applied to eliminate the speaker identity information in the estimated content embedding extracted from speech. Under the guidance of the expected content embedding and the adversarial training, the content encoder is trained to extract speaker-independent content embedding from speech. Experiments on AIShell-3 dataset show that the proposed model outperforms AutoVC in terms of naturalness and similarity of converted speech.
abstract_zh: 非并行多对多语音转换仍然是一项有趣但具有挑战性的语音处理任务。最近，AutoVC（一种基于条件自动编码器的方法）通过使用信息约束瓶颈解开说话者身份和语音内容，取得了出色的转换结果。然而，由于纯自编码器训练方法，很难评估内容和说话人身份的分离效果。本文提出了一种新颖的语音转换框架，名为$\boldsymbol T$ext $\boldsymbol G$uided $\boldsymbol A$utoVC(TGAVC)，以更有效地将内容和音色与语音分离，其中设计了基于文本转录产生的预期内容嵌入来指导语音内容的提取。此外，还应用对抗性训练来消除从语音中提取的估计内容嵌入中的说话者身份信息。在预期内容嵌入和对抗训练的指导下，内容编码器被训练以从语音中提取与说话人无关的内容嵌入。在 AIShell-3 数据集上的实验表明，该模型在转换语音的自然度和相似度方面优于 AutoVC。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于文本引导和对抗训练的改进自编码器语音转换框架TGAVC，以更有效地分离语音内容和音色。
AI.motivation: 现有AutoVC方法因纯自编码器训练难以评估内容与说话人身份的分离效果，需改进分离机制以提升语音转换质量。
AI.method: 设计基于文本的期望内容嵌入引导语音内容提取，并通过对抗训练消除内容嵌入中的说话人身份信息，实现内容编码器的说话人无关内容嵌入学习。
AI.result: 在AIShell-3数据集上，TGAVC在转换语音的自然度和相似度指标上优于AutoVC。
AI.conclusion: 文本引导与对抗训练结合可有效分离语音内容与音色，提升非平行多对多语音转换效果。

authors_text: Lei Li,Julia Camps,Abhirup Banerjee,Marcel Beetz,Blanca Rodriguez,Vicente Grau
title: Deep Computational Model for the Inference of Ventricular Activation Properties
title_zh: 用于推断心室激活特性的深度计算模型
abstract: Patient-specific cardiac computational models are essential for the efficient realization of precision medicine and in-silico clinical trials using digital twins. Cardiac digital twins can provide non-invasive characterizations of cardiac functions for individual patients, and therefore are promising for the patient-specific diagnosis and therapy stratification. However, current workflows for both the anatomical and functional twinning phases, referring to the inference of model anatomy and parameter from clinical data, are not sufficiently efficient, robust, and accurate. In this work, we propose a deep learning based patient-specific computational model, which can fuse both anatomical and electrophysiological information for the inference of ventricular activation properties, i.e., conduction velocities and root nodes. The activation properties can provide a quantitative assessment of cardiac electrophysiological function for the guidance of interventional procedures. We employ the Eikonal model to generate simulated electrocardiogram (ECG) with ground truth properties to train the inference model, where specific patient information has also been considered. For evaluation, we test the model on the simulated data and obtain generally promising results with fast computational time.
summary: Patient-specific cardiac computational models are essential for the efficient realization of precision medicine and in-silico clinical trials using digital twins. Cardiac digital twins can provide non-invasive characterizations of cardiac functions for individual patients, and therefore are promising for the patient-specific diagnosis and therapy stratification. However, current workflows for both the anatomical and functional twinning phases, referring to the inference of model anatomy and parameter from clinical data, are not sufficiently efficient, robust, and accurate. In this work, we propose a deep learning based patient-specific computational model, which can fuse both anatomical and electrophysiological information for the inference of ventricular activation properties, i.e., conduction velocities and root nodes. The activation properties can provide a quantitative assessment of cardiac electrophysiological function for the guidance of interventional procedures. We employ the Eikonal model to generate simulated electrocardiogram (ECG) with ground truth properties to train the inference model, where specific patient information has also been considered. For evaluation, we test the model on the simulated data and obtain generally promising results with fast computational time.
abstract_zh: 患者特定的心脏计算模型对于使用数字双胞胎有效实现精准医疗和计算机临床试验至关重要。心脏数字孪生可以为个体患者提供心脏功能的非侵入性表征，因此有望用于患者特异性诊断和治疗分层。然而，当前的解剖和功能孪生阶段的工作流程（参考从临床数据推断模型解剖结构和参数）不够高效、稳健和准确。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的特定于患者的计算模型，该模型可以融合解剖学和电生理学信息，以推断心室激活特性，即传导速度和根节点。激活特性可以提供心脏电生理功能的定量评估，以指导介入手术。我们采用 Eikonal 模型生成具有真实属性的模拟心电图 (ECG)，以训练推理模型，其中还考虑了特定的患者信息。为了进行评估，我们在模拟数据上测试模型，并以快速的计算时间获得普遍有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的患者特异性计算模型，用于融合解剖和电生理信息推断心室激活特性。
AI.motivation: 现有心脏数字孪生的工作流程在解剖和功能建模阶段效率、鲁棒性和准确性不足，难以满足精准医疗和虚拟临床试验需求。
AI.method: 采用Eikonal模型生成带真实标签的ECG数据训练深度学习模型，融合患者特定解剖与电生理信息推断传导速度和起搏点。
AI.result: 在模拟数据集上验证模型，取得较优结果且计算速度快，证明方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为个体化心脏电生理功能定量评估提供了高效工具，可辅助介入治疗决策。

search_text: Deep Computational Model for the Inference of Ventricular Activation Properties 用于推断心室激活特性的深度计算模型 Patient-specific cardiac computational models are essential for the efficient realization of precision medicine and in-silico clinical trials using digital twins. Cardiac digital twins can provide non-invasive characterizations of cardiac functions for individual patients, and therefore are promising for the patient-specific diagnosis and therapy stratification. However, current workflows for both the anatomical and functional twinning phases, referring to the inference of model anatomy and parameter from clinical data, are not sufficiently efficient, robust, and accurate. In this work, we propose a deep learning based patient-specific computational model, which can fuse both anatomical and electrophysiological information for the inference of ventricular activation properties, i.e., conduction velocities and root nodes. The activation properties can provide a quantitative assessment of cardiac electrophysiological function for the guidance of interventional procedures. We employ the Eikonal model to generate simulated electrocardiogram (ECG) with ground truth properties to train the inference model, where specific patient information has also been considered. For evaluation, we test the model on the simulated data and obtain generally promising results with fast computational time. 患者特定的心脏计算模型对于使用数字双胞胎有效实现精准医疗和计算机临床试验至关重要。心脏数字孪生可以为个体患者提供心脏功能的非侵入性表征，因此有望用于患者特异性诊断和治疗分层。然而，当前的解剖和功能孪生阶段的工作流程（参考从临床数据推断模型解剖结构和参数）不够高效、稳健和准确。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的特定于患者的计算模型，该模型可以融合解剖学和电生理学信息，以推断心室激活特性，即传导速度和根节点。激活特性可以提供心脏电生理功能的定量评估，以指导介入手术。我们采用 Eikonal 模型生成具有真实属性的模拟心电图 (ECG)，以训练推理模型，其中还考虑了特定的患者信息。为了进行评估，我们在模拟数据上测试模型，并以快速的计算时间获得普遍有希望的结果。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的患者特异性计算模型，用于融合解剖和电生理信息推断心室激活特性。 Lei Li,Julia Camps,Abhirup Banerjee,Marcel Beetz,Blanca Rodriguez,Vicente Grau cs.CV

authors_text: Hannan Lu,Zhi Tian,Lirong Yang,Haibing Ren,Wangmeng Zuo
title: Two-Stream Networks for Object Segmentation in Videos
title_zh: 用于视频中对象分割的双流网络
abstract: Existing matching-based approaches perform video object segmentation (VOS) via retrieving support features from a pixel-level memory, while some pixels may suffer from lack of correspondence in the memory (i.e., unseen), which inevitably limits their segmentation performance. In this paper, we present a Two-Stream Network (TSN). Our TSN includes (i) a pixel stream with a conventional pixel-level memory, to segment the seen pixels based on their pixellevel memory retrieval. (ii) an instance stream for the unseen pixels, where a holistic understanding of the instance is obtained with dynamic segmentation heads conditioned on the features of the target instance. (iii) a pixel division module generating a routing map, with which output embeddings of the two streams are fused together. The compact instance stream effectively improves the segmentation accuracy of the unseen pixels, while fusing two streams with the adaptive routing map leads to an overall performance boost. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed TSN, and we also report state-of-the-art performance of 86.1% on YouTube-VOS 2018 and 87.5% on the DAVIS-2017 validation split.
summary: Existing matching-based approaches perform video object segmentation (VOS) via retrieving support features from a pixel-level memory, while some pixels may suffer from lack of correspondence in the memory (i.e., unseen), which inevitably limits their segmentation performance. In this paper, we present a Two-Stream Network (TSN). Our TSN includes (i) a pixel stream with a conventional pixel-level memory, to segment the seen pixels based on their pixellevel memory retrieval. (ii) an instance stream for the unseen pixels, where a holistic understanding of the instance is obtained with dynamic segmentation heads conditioned on the features of the target instance. (iii) a pixel division module generating a routing map, with which output embeddings of the two streams are fused together. The compact instance stream effectively improves the segmentation accuracy of the unseen pixels, while fusing two streams with the adaptive routing map leads to an overall performance boost. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed TSN, and we also report state-of-the-art performance of 86.1% on YouTube-VOS 2018 and 87.5% on the DAVIS-2017 validation split.
abstract_zh: 现有的基于匹配的方法通过从像素级存储器检索支持特征来执行视频对象分割（VOS），而某些像素可能会由于存储器中缺乏对应性（即看不见）而受到影响，这不可避免地限制了它们的分割性能。在本文中，我们提出了双流网络（TSN）。我们的 TSN 包括 (i) 具有传统像素级存储器的像素流，以根据像素级存储器检索来分割所看到的像素。 (ii) 未见像素的实例流，其中通过以目标实例的特征为条件的动态分割头获得对实例的整体理解。 (iii) 像素划分模块生成路由图，两个流的输出嵌入被融合在一起。紧凑的实例流有效地提高了未见像素的分割精度，同时将两个流与自适应路由图融合可以提高整体性能。通过大量的实验，我们证明了我们提出的 TSN 的有效性，并且我们还报告了 YouTube-VOS 2018 上 86.1% 的最先进性能和 DAVIS-2017 验证分割上 87.5% 的最先进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双流网络（TSN），用于解决视频中未见过像素的实例分割问题，通过结合像素流和实例流提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于匹配的方法在视频对象分割中因未见过像素缺乏记忆对应关系而限制了性能，需改进对未见过像素的处理。
AI.method: 设计双流网络，包含像素流处理已见像素、实例流通过动态分割头理解实例，并利用像素划分模块生成路由图融合两流输出。
AI.result: 在YouTube-VOS 2018和DAVIS-2017数据集上分别达到86.1%和87.5%的分割准确率，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 双流网络通过有效处理未见过像素并融合两流信息，显著提升了视频对象分割的整体性能。

authors_text: Joon Sung Park,Lindsay Popowski,Carrie J. Cai,Meredith Ringel Morris,Percy Liang,Michael S. Bernstein
title: Social Simulacra: Creating Populated Prototypes for Social Computing Systems
title_zh: 社交拟像：为社交计算系统创建填充原型
comment: This work will appear in the 35th Annual ACM Symposium on User Interface Software and Technology (UIST '22)
comments: This work will appear in the 35th Annual ACM Symposium on User Interface Software and Technology (UIST '22)
abstract: Social computing prototypes probe the social behaviors that may arise in an envisioned system design. This prototyping practice is currently limited to recruiting small groups of people. Unfortunately, many challenges do not arise until a system is populated at a larger scale. Can a designer understand how a social system might behave when populated, and make adjustments to the design before the system falls prey to such challenges? We introduce social simulacra, a prototyping technique that generates a breadth of realistic social interactions that may emerge when a social computing system is populated. Social simulacra take as input the designer's description of a community's design -- goal, rules, and member personas -- and produce as output an instance of that design with simulated behavior, including posts, replies, and anti-social behaviors. We demonstrate that social simulacra shift the behaviors that they generate appropriately in response to design changes, and that they enable exploration of "what if?" scenarios where community members or moderators intervene. To power social simulacra, we contribute techniques for prompting a large language model to generate thousands of distinct community members and their social interactions with each other; these techniques are enabled by the observation that large language models' training data already includes a wide variety of positive and negative behavior on social media platforms. In evaluations, we show that participants are often unable to distinguish social simulacra from actual community behavior and that social computing designers successfully refine their social computing designs when using social simulacra.
summary: Social computing prototypes probe the social behaviors that may arise in an envisioned system design. This prototyping practice is currently limited to recruiting small groups of people. Unfortunately, many challenges do not arise until a system is populated at a larger scale. Can a designer understand how a social system might behave when populated, and make adjustments to the design before the system falls prey to such challenges? We introduce social simulacra, a prototyping technique that generates a breadth of realistic social interactions that may emerge when a social computing system is populated. Social simulacra take as input the designer's description of a community's design -- goal, rules, and member personas -- and produce as output an instance of that design with simulated behavior, including posts, replies, and anti-social behaviors. We demonstrate that social simulacra shift the behaviors that they generate appropriately in response to design changes, and that they enable exploration of "what if?" scenarios where community members or moderators intervene. To power social simulacra, we contribute techniques for prompting a large language model to generate thousands of distinct community members and their social interactions with each other; these techniques are enabled by the observation that large language models' training data already includes a wide variety of positive and negative behavior on social media platforms. In evaluations, we show that participants are often unable to distinguish social simulacra from actual community behavior and that social computing designers successfully refine their social computing designs when using social simulacra.
abstract_zh: Social computing prototypes probe the social behaviors that may arise in an envisioned system design. This prototyping practice is currently limited to recruiting small groups of people. Unfortunately, many challenges do not arise until a system is populated at a larger scale.设计师能否理解社会系统在人口增加时的行为方式，并在系统陷入此类挑战之前对设计进行调整？我们引入了社交拟像，这是一种原型技术，可以生成广泛的现实社交互动，这些互动在社交计算系统填充时可能会出现。社交拟像将设计者对社区设计的描述（目标、规则和成员角色）作为输入，并生成具有模拟行为（包括帖子、回复和反社交行为）的设计实例作为输出。我们证明，社交拟像会适当地改变它们响应设计变化而产生的行为，并且它们能够探索“假设”。 scenarios where community members or moderators intervene.为了支持社交拟像，我们贡献了一些技术来促进大型语言模型生成数千个不同的社区成员及其彼此之间的社交互动；这些技术是通过观察大型语言模型的训练数据已经包含社交媒体平台上的各种积极和消极行为而得以实现的。在评估中，我们表明参与者通常无法区分社交拟像和实际社区行为，并且社交计算设计者在使用社交拟像时成功地完善了他们的社交计算设计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Social Simulacra的原型技术，通过模拟大规模社交互动帮助设计师预测并优化社交计算系统的行为。
AI.motivation: 现有社交系统原型测试仅限于小群体，难以发现大规模用户参与时可能出现的问题，需提前预测系统行为以优化设计。
AI.method: 利用大语言模型生成大量虚拟社区成员及其互动行为，基于训练数据中的社交媒体行为模式进行模拟，并支持设计变更的动态调整。
AI.result: 评估显示参与者难以区分模拟行为与真实社区行为，且设计师通过Social Simulacra有效改进了系统设计。
AI.conclusion: Social Simulacra为社交计算系统提供了有效的早期行为预测工具，可帮助设计师在部署前优化系统规则和社区管理策略。

ai_content_json.result: 评估显示参与者难以区分模拟行为与真实社区行为，且设计师通过Social Simulacra有效改进了系统设计。
ai_content_json.conclusion: Social Simulacra为社交计算系统提供了有效的早期行为预测工具，可帮助设计师在部署前优化系统规则和社区管理策略。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Social Simulacra的原型技术，通过模拟大规模社交互动帮助设计师预测并优化社交计算系统的行为。

search_text: Social Simulacra: Creating Populated Prototypes for Social Computing Systems 社交拟像：为社交计算系统创建填充原型 Social computing prototypes probe the social behaviors that may arise in an envisioned system design. This prototyping practice is currently limited to recruiting small groups of people. Unfortunately, many challenges do not arise until a system is populated at a larger scale. Can a designer understand how a social system might behave when populated, and make adjustments to the design before the system falls prey to such challenges? We introduce social simulacra, a prototyping technique that generates a breadth of realistic social interactions that may emerge when a social computing system is populated. Social simulacra take as input the designer's description of a community's design -- goal, rules, and member personas -- and produce as output an instance of that design with simulated behavior, including posts, replies, and anti-social behaviors. We demonstrate that social simulacra shift the behaviors that they generate appropriately in response to design changes, and that they enable exploration of "what if?" scenarios where community members or moderators intervene. To power social simulacra, we contribute techniques for prompting a large language model to generate thousands of distinct community members and their social interactions with each other; these techniques are enabled by the observation that large language models' training data already includes a wide variety of positive and negative behavior on social media platforms. In evaluations, we show that participants are often unable to distinguish social simulacra from actual community behavior and that social computing designers successfully refine their social computing designs when using social simulacra. Social computing prototypes probe the social behaviors that may arise in an envisioned system design. This prototyping practice is currently limited to recruiting small groups of people. Unfortunately, many challenges do not arise until a system is populated at a larger scale.设计师能否理解社会系统在人口增加时的行为方式，并在系统陷入此类挑战之前对设计进行调整？我们引入了社交拟像，这是一种原型技术，可以生成广泛的现实社交互动，这些互动在社交计算系统填充时可能会出现。社交拟像将设计者对社区设计的描述（目标、规则和成员角色）作为输入，并生成具有模拟行为（包括帖子、回复和反社交行为）的设计实例作为输出。我们证明，社交拟像会适当地改变它们响应设计变化而产生的行为，并且它们能够探索“假设”。 scenarios where community members or moderators intervene.为了支持社交拟像，我们贡献了一些技术来促进大型语言模型生成数千个不同的社区成员及其彼此之间的社交互动；这些技术是通过观察大型语言模型的训练数据已经包含社交媒体平台上的各种积极和消极行为而得以实现的。在评估中，我们表明参与者通常无法区分社交拟像和实际社区行为，并且社交计算设计者在使用社交拟像时成功地完善了他们的社交计算设计。 本文提出了一种名为Social Simulacra的原型技术，通过模拟大规模社交互动帮助设计师预测并优化社交计算系统的行为。 Joon Sung Park,Lindsay Popowski,Carrie J. Cai,Meredith Ringel Morris,Percy Liang,Michael S. Bernstein cs.HC

authors_text: Qianying Lin,Wen-Ji Zhou,Yanshi Wang,Qing Da,Qing-Guo Chen,Bing Wang
title: Sparse Attentive Memory Network for Click-through Rate Prediction with Long Sequences
title_zh: 用于长序列点击率预测的稀疏注意力记忆网络
comment: Published as a conference paper at the 31st ACM International Conference on Information and Knowledge Management, CIKM 2022
comments: Published as a conference paper at the 31st ACM International Conference on Information and Knowledge Management, CIKM 2022
abstract: Sequential recommendation predicts users' next behaviors with their historical interactions. Recommending with longer sequences improves recommendation accuracy and increases the degree of personalization. As sequences get longer, existing works have not yet addressed the following two main challenges. Firstly, modeling long-range intra-sequence dependency is difficult with increasing sequence lengths. Secondly, it requires efficient memory and computational speeds. In this paper, we propose a Sparse Attentive Memory (SAM) network for long sequential user behavior modeling. SAM supports efficient training and real-time inference for user behavior sequences with lengths on the scale of thousands. In SAM, we model the target item as the query and the long sequence as the knowledge database, where the former continuously elicits relevant information from the latter. SAM simultaneously models target-sequence dependencies and long-range intra-sequence dependencies with O(L) complexity and O(1) number of sequential updates, which can only be achieved by the self-attention mechanism with O(L^2) complexity. Extensive empirical results demonstrate that our proposed solution is effective not only in long user behavior modeling but also on short sequences modeling. Implemented on sequences of length 1000, SAM is successfully deployed on one of the largest international E-commerce platforms. This inference time is within 30ms, with a substantial 7.30% click-through rate improvement for the online A/B test. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first end-to-end long user sequence modeling framework that models intra-sequence and target-sequence dependencies with the aforementioned degree of efficiency and successfully deployed on a large-scale real-time industrial recommender system.

To the best of our knowledge, it is the first end-to-end long user sequence modeling framework that models intra-sequence and target-sequence dependencies with the aforementioned degree of efficiency and successfully deployed on a large-scale real-time industrial recommender system.
abstract_zh: 顺序推荐通过用户的历史交互来预测用户的下一步行为。使用更长的序列进行推荐可以提高推荐准确性并提高个性化程度。随着序列变得越来越长，现有的工作尚未解决以下两个主要挑战。首先，随着序列长度的增加，对远程序列内依赖性进行建模变得困难。其次，它需要高效的内存和计算速度。在本文中，我们提出了一种稀疏注意力记忆（SAM）网络，用于长顺序用户行为建模。 SAM支持对千级长度的用户行为序列进行高效训练和实时推理。在SAM中，我们将目标项建模为查询，将长序列建模为知识数据库，前者不断地从后者中获取相关信息。 SAM 同时对目标序列依赖关系和远程序列内依赖关系进行建模，复杂度为 O(L)，顺序更新次数为 O(1)，这只能通过复杂度为 O(L^2) 的自注意力机制来实现。大量的实证结果表明，我们提出的解决方案不仅在长用户行为建模中有效，而且在短序列建模中也有效。 SAM 在长度为 1000 的序列上实施，已成功部署在最大的国际电子商务平台之一。推理时间在30ms以内，在线A/B测试点击率大幅提升7.30%。据我们所知，它是第一个端到端的长用户序列建模框架，能够以上述效率对序列内和目标序列依赖关系进行建模，并成功部署在大规模实时工业推荐系统上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种稀疏注意力记忆网络（SAM），用于处理长序列用户行为的点击率预测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理长序列用户行为时面临两大挑战：长距离序列依赖建模困难，以及计算效率不足，难以满足实时性需求。
AI.method: SAM通过将目标物品作为查询，长序列作为知识库，结合稀疏注意力机制和记忆网络，在O(L)复杂度下同时建模目标-序列依赖和长距离序列依赖，且仅需O(1)次序列更新。
AI.result: 在长度为1000的序列上实现30ms内实时推理，部署于国际电商平台后在线A/B测试点击率提升7.30%。
AI.conclusion: SAM是首个实现长序列内依赖与目标依赖高效建模的端到端框架，并成功应用于大规模实时推荐系统。

authors_text: Hai-Li Ye,Da-Han Wang
title: Stain-Adaptive Self-Supervised Learning for Histopathology Image Analysis
title_zh: 用于组织病理学图像分析的染色自适应自监督学习
comment: 16 pages, 8 figures, 7 table, 10 equality
comments: 16 pages, 8 figures, 7 table, 10 equality
abstract: It is commonly recognized that color variations caused by differences in stains is a critical issue for histopathology image analysis. Existing methods adopt color matching, stain separation, stain transfer or the combination of them to alleviate the stain variation problem. In this paper, we propose a novel Stain-Adaptive Self-Supervised Learning(SASSL) method for histopathology image analysis. Our SASSL integrates a domain-adversarial training module into the SSL framework to learn distinctive features that are robust to both various transformations and stain variations. The proposed SASSL is regarded as a general method for domain-invariant feature extraction which can be flexibly combined with arbitrary downstream histopathology image analysis modules (e.g. nuclei/tissue segmentation) by fine-tuning the features for specific downstream tasks. We conducted experiments on publicly available pathological image analysis datasets including the PANDA, BreastPathQ, and CAMELYON16 datasets, achieving the state-of-the-art performance. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method can robustly improve the feature extraction ability of the model, and achieve stable performance improvement in downstream tasks.
summary: It is commonly recognized that color variations caused by differences in stains is a critical issue for histopathology image analysis. Existing methods adopt color matching, stain separation, stain transfer or the combination of them to alleviate the stain variation problem. In this paper, we propose a novel Stain-Adaptive Self-Supervised Learning(SASSL) method for histopathology image analysis. Our SASSL integrates a domain-adversarial training module into the SSL framework to learn distinctive features that are robust to both various transformations and stain variations. The proposed SASSL is regarded as a general method for domain-invariant feature extraction which can be flexibly combined with arbitrary downstream histopathology image analysis modules (e.g. nuclei/tissue segmentation) by fine-tuning the features for specific downstream tasks. We conducted experiments on publicly available pathological image analysis datasets including the PANDA, BreastPathQ, and CAMELYON16 datasets, achieving the state-of-the-art performance. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method can robustly improve the feature extraction ability of the model, and achieve stable performance improvement in downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 人们普遍认为，染色差异引起的颜色变化是组织病理学图像分析的关键问题。现有方法采用配色、污点分离、污点转移或它们的组合来缓解污点变异问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于组织病理学图像分析的新型染色自适应自监督学习（SASSSL）方法。我们的 SASSL 将域对抗训练模块集成到 SSL 框架中，以学习对各种转换和染色变化都具有鲁棒性的独特特征。所提出的 SASSL 被认为是域不变特征提取的通用方法，可以通过微调特定下游任务的特征，灵活地与任意下游组织病理学图像分析模块（例如细胞核/组织分割）结合。我们在公开的病理图像分析数据集（包括 PANDA、BreastPathQ 和 CAMELYON16 数据集）上进行了实验，取得了最先进的性能。实验结果表明，该方法能够鲁棒地提高模型的特征提取能力，并在下游任务中实现稳定的性能提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对组织病理学图像分析的染色自适应自监督学习方法（SASSL），以解决染色差异导致的特征提取问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过颜色匹配等技术缓解染色差异问题，但难以同时应对多种图像变换和染色变化，导致特征鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 将领域对抗训练模块整合到自监督学习框架中，学习对染色变化和图像变换均鲁棒的特征，并可灵活适配下游任务。
AI.result: 在PANDA、BreastPathQ和CAMELYON16数据集上达到最先进性能，显著提升特征提取能力和下游任务稳定性。
AI.conclusion: SASSL作为一种通用的领域不变特征提取方法，能有效适应不同病理图像分析任务，具有广泛的应用潜力。

conclusion: SASSL作为一种通用的领域不变特征提取方法，能有效适应不同病理图像分析任务，具有广泛的应用潜力。
search_text: Stain-Adaptive Self-Supervised Learning for Histopathology Image Analysis 用于组织病理学图像分析的染色自适应自监督学习 It is commonly recognized that color variations caused by differences in stains is a critical issue for histopathology image analysis. Existing methods adopt color matching, stain separation, stain transfer or the combination of them to alleviate the stain variation problem. In this paper, we propose a novel Stain-Adaptive Self-Supervised Learning(SASSL) method for histopathology image analysis. Our SASSL integrates a domain-adversarial training module into the SSL framework to learn distinctive features that are robust to both various transformations and stain variations. The proposed SASSL is regarded as a general method for domain-invariant feature extraction which can be flexibly combined with arbitrary downstream histopathology image analysis modules (e.g. nuclei/tissue segmentation) by fine-tuning the features for specific downstream tasks. We conducted experiments on publicly available pathological image analysis datasets including the PANDA, BreastPathQ, and CAMELYON16 datasets, achieving the state-of-the-art performance. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method can robustly improve the feature extraction ability of the model, and achieve stable performance improvement in downstream tasks. 人们普遍认为，染色差异引起的颜色变化是组织病理学图像分析的关键问题。现有方法采用配色、污点分离、污点转移或它们的组合来缓解污点变异问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于组织病理学图像分析的新型染色自适应自监督学习（SASSSL）方法。我们的 SASSL 将域对抗训练模块集成到 SSL 框架中，以学习对各种转换和染色变化都具有鲁棒性的独特特征。所提出的 SASSL 被认为是域不变特征提取的通用方法，可以通过微调特定下游任务的特征，灵活地与任意下游组织病理学图像分析模块（例如细胞核/组织分割）结合。我们在公开的病理图像分析数据集（包括 PANDA、BreastPathQ 和 CAMELYON16 数据集）上进行了实验，取得了最先进的性能。实验结果表明，该方法能够鲁棒地提高模型的特征提取能力，并在下游任务中实现稳定的性能提升。 本文提出一种针对组织病理学图像分析的染色自适应自监督学习方法（SASSL），以解决染色差异导致的特征提取问题。 Hai-Li Ye,Da-Han Wang eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: David Jozef Hresko,Marek Kurej,Jakub Gazda,Peter Drotar
title: Ensembled Autoencoder Regularization for Multi-Structure Segmentation for Kidney Cancer Treatment
title_zh: 用于肾癌治疗的多结构分割的集成自动编码器正则化
abstract: The kidney cancer is one of the most common cancer types. The treatment frequently include surgical intervention. However, surgery is in this case particularly challenging due to regional anatomical relations. Organ delineation can significantly improve surgical planning and execution. In this contribution, we propose ensemble of two fully convolutional networks for segmentation of kidney, tumor, veins and arteries. While SegResNet architecture achieved better performance on tumor, the nnU-Net provided more precise segmentation for kidneys, arteries and veins. So in our proposed approach we combine these two networks, and further boost the performance by mixup augmentation.
summary: The kidney cancer is one of the most common cancer types. The treatment frequently include surgical intervention. However, surgery is in this case particularly challenging due to regional anatomical relations. Organ delineation can significantly improve surgical planning and execution. In this contribution, we propose ensemble of two fully convolutional networks for segmentation of kidney, tumor, veins and arteries. While SegResNet architecture achieved better performance on tumor, the nnU-Net provided more precise segmentation for kidneys, arteries and veins. So in our proposed approach we combine these two networks, and further boost the performance by mixup augmentation.
abstract_zh: 肾癌是最常见的癌症类型之一。治疗通常包括手术干预。然而，由于区域解剖关系，手术在这种情况下特别具有挑战性。器官勾画可以显着改善手术计划和执行。在这篇文章中，我们提出了两个全卷积网络的集成，用于分割肾脏、肿瘤、静脉和动脉。虽然 SegResNet 架构在肿瘤方面取得了更好的性能，但 nnU-Net 为肾脏、动脉和静脉提供了更精确的分割。因此，在我们提出的方法中，我们结合了这两个网络，并通过混合增强进一步提高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合两种全卷积网络的集成方法，用于肾癌治疗中的多结构分割，以提高手术规划的准确性。
AI.motivation: 肾癌手术因复杂解剖结构而具有挑战性，精确的器官和血管分割对术前规划至关重要，但单一模型难以兼顾不同结构的分割精度。
AI.method: 集成SegResNet（擅长肿瘤分割）与nnU-Net（擅长肾脏/血管分割），通过混合数据增强技术进一步优化分割性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，集成方法在肿瘤、肾脏、血管等多结构分割任务中均优于单一模型，混合增强显著提升整体分割精度。
AI.conclusion: 多模型集成结合数据增强能有效提升医学图像分割质量，为肾癌手术提供更可靠的术前辅助工具。

authors_text: Victor Schetinger,Velitchko Filipov,Ignacio Pérez-Messina,Ethan Smith,Rodrigo Oliveira de Oliveira
title: I Learn to Diffuse, or Data Alchemy 101: a Mnemonic Manifesto
title_zh: 我学习扩散，或数据炼金术 101：助记宣言
comment: Submission to IEEE alt.vis 2022. Short paper containing a 4-page comic, and an immense amount of content in a linked miro board
comments: Submission to IEEE alt.vis 2022. Short paper containing a 4-page comic, and an immense amount of content in a linked miro board
abstract: In this manifesto, we put forward the idea of data alchemy as a narrative device to discuss storytelling and transdisciplinarity in visualization. If data is the prima materia of modern science, how does one perform the Great Work? We use text-to-image diffusion-based generative art to develop the concept, and structure our argument in ten propositions, as if they were ten issues of a comic novel on data alchemy: Ad Disco Diffusionem. To follow the argument, the reader must immerse themselves in our miro board, and navigate a multimedia semiotic topology that includes comics, videos, code demos, and ergotic literature in a true alchemic sense. By accessing this paradigm one might find new sources of inspiration for scientific inquiry in familiar places, or get lost in the creative exploration of the unknown. Our colorful, sometimes poetic, exposition should not distract the reader from the seriousness of the ideas discussed, but ultimately it is about the journey.
summary: In this manifesto, we put forward the idea of data alchemy as a narrative device to discuss storytelling and transdisciplinarity in visualization. If data is the prima materia of modern science, how does one perform the Great Work? We use text-to-image diffusion-based generative art to develop the concept, and structure our argument in ten propositions, as if they were ten issues of a comic novel on data alchemy: Ad Disco Diffusionem. To follow the argument, the reader must immerse themselves in our miro board, and navigate a multimedia semiotic topology that includes comics, videos, code demos, and ergotic literature in a true alchemic sense. By accessing this paradigm one might find new sources of inspiration for scientific inquiry in familiar places, or get lost in the creative exploration of the unknown. Our colorful, sometimes poetic, exposition should not distract the reader from the seriousness of the ideas discussed, but ultimately it is about the journey.
abstract_zh: 在这份宣言中，我们提出了数据炼金术的想法作为一种叙事手段来讨论可视化中的讲故事和跨学科性。如果数据是现代科学的首要材料，那么如何完成这项伟大的工作呢？我们使用基于文本到图像扩散的生成艺术来发展这个概念，并用十个命题构建我们的论点，就好像它们是关于数据炼金术的漫画小说的十期：Ad Disco Diffusionem。为了理解这一论点，读者必须沉浸在我们的 miro 板中，并以真正的炼金术意义浏览多媒体符号学拓扑，其中包括漫画、视频、代码演示和遍历文献。通过访问这一范式，人们可能会在熟悉的地方找到科学探究的新灵感来源，或者迷失在对未知事物的创造性探索中。我们丰富多彩、有时充满诗意的阐述不应该分散读者对所讨论想法的严肃性的注意力，但最终它是关于旅程的。

AI.tldr: 本文通过数据炼金术的概念，结合文本到图像的扩散生成艺术，探讨可视化中的叙事与跨学科性，并以十条命题构建论证框架。
AI.motivation: 旨在通过创造性的方式激发科学探索的新灵感，将艺术与科学结合，突破传统数据可视化的局限。
AI.method: 采用文本到图像的扩散模型生成艺术作品，结合漫画、视频、代码演示和互动文学等多媒体形式构建论证体系。
AI.result: 提出数据炼金术的理论框架，为科学探究提供跨学科视角，并通过沉浸式多媒体体验增强叙事表现力。
AI.conclusion: 强调通过艺术与科学的融合，探索未知领域的重要性，最终成果是构建一种启发性思维的旅程。

authors_text: Di Wang,Qiming Zhang,Yufei Xu,Jing Zhang,Bo Du,Dacheng Tao,Liangpei Zhang
title: Advancing Plain Vision Transformer Towards Remote Sensing Foundation Model
title_zh: 将普通视觉变压器推进遥感基础模型
comment: Accepted by IEEE TGRS. The codes and models are released at https://github.com/ViTAE-Transformer/Remote-Sensing-RVSA
comments: Accepted by IEEE TGRS. The codes and models are released at https://github.com/ViTAE-Transformer/Remote-Sensing-RVSA
abstract: Large-scale vision foundation models have made significant progress in visual tasks on natural images, with vision transformers being the primary choice due to their good scalability and representation ability. However, large-scale models in remote sensing (RS) have not yet been sufficiently explored. In this paper, we resort to plain vision transformers with about 100 million parameters and make the first attempt to propose large vision models tailored to RS tasks and investigate how such large models perform. To handle the large sizes and objects of arbitrary orientations in RS images, we propose a new rotated varied-size window attention to replace the original full attention in transformers, which can significantly reduce the computational cost and memory footprint while learning better object representation by extracting rich context from the generated diverse windows. Experiments on detection tasks show the superiority of our model over all state-of-the-art models, achieving 81.24% mAP on the DOTA-V1.0 dataset. The results of our models on downstream classification and segmentation tasks also show competitive performance compared to existing advanced methods. Further experiments show the advantages of our models in terms of computational complexity and data efficiency in transferring.
summary: Large-scale vision foundation models have made significant progress in visual tasks on natural images, with vision transformers being the primary choice due to their good scalability and representation ability. However, large-scale models in remote sensing (RS) have not yet been sufficiently explored. In this paper, we resort to plain vision transformers with about 100 million parameters and make the first attempt to propose large vision models tailored to RS tasks and investigate how such large models perform. To handle the large sizes and objects of arbitrary orientations in RS images, we propose a new rotated varied-size window attention to replace the original full attention in transformers, which can significantly reduce the computational cost and memory footprint while learning better object representation by extracting rich context from the generated diverse windows. Experiments on detection tasks show the superiority of our model over all state-of-the-art models, achieving 81.24% mAP on the DOTA-V1.0 dataset. The results of our models on downstream classification and segmentation tasks also show competitive performance compared to existing advanced methods. Further experiments show the advantages of our models in terms of computational complexity and data efficiency in transferring.
abstract_zh: 大规模视觉基础模型在自然图像的视觉任务中取得了显着进展，视觉转换器因其良好的可扩展性和表示能力而成为首选。然而，遥感（RS）中的大规模模型尚未得到充分探索。在本文中，我们采用具有约 1 亿个参数的普通视觉 Transformer，并首次尝试提出适合 RS 任务的大型视觉模型，并研究此类大型模型的性能。为了处理RS图像中的大尺寸和任意方向的物体，我们提出了一种新的旋转不同尺寸的窗口注意力来取代变压器中原来的完全注意力，这可以显着减少计算成本和内存占用，同时通过从生成的不同窗口中提取丰富的上下文来学习更好的对象表示。检测任务的实验表明我们的模型优于所有最先进的模型，在 DOTA-V1.0 数据集上实现了 81.24% 的 mAP。与现有的先进方法相比，我们的模型在下游分类和分割任务上的结果也显示出具有竞争力的性能。进一步的实验表明了我们的模型在计算复杂性和数据传输效率方面的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对遥感任务的大型视觉模型，通过改进注意力机制以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉Transformer在自然图像任务中表现优异，但其在遥感图像中的应用尚未充分探索，尤其面临大尺寸和任意方向目标的挑战。
AI.method: 设计旋转可变尺寸窗口注意力机制，替代传统全注意力机制，降低计算成本并提升多尺度目标表示能力。
AI.result: 在DOTA-V1.0数据集上实现81.24% mAP，优于现有方法；分类和分割任务表现竞争力，且计算复杂度和数据效率更优。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型有效解决了遥感图像处理难题，在检测、分类和分割任务中均展现优势，为遥感基础模型研究提供新方向。

search_text: Advancing Plain Vision Transformer Towards Remote Sensing Foundation Model 将普通视觉变压器推进遥感基础模型 Large-scale vision foundation models have made significant progress in visual tasks on natural images, with vision transformers being the primary choice due to their good scalability and representation ability. However, large-scale models in remote sensing (RS) have not yet been sufficiently explored. In this paper, we resort to plain vision transformers with about 100 million parameters and make the first attempt to propose large vision models tailored to RS tasks and investigate how such large models perform. To handle the large sizes and objects of arbitrary orientations in RS images, we propose a new rotated varied-size window attention to replace the original full attention in transformers, which can significantly reduce the computational cost and memory footprint while learning better object representation by extracting rich context from the generated diverse windows. Experiments on detection tasks show the superiority of our model over all state-of-the-art models, achieving 81.24% mAP on the DOTA-V1.0 dataset. The results of our models on downstream classification and segmentation tasks also show competitive performance compared to existing advanced methods. Further experiments show the advantages of our models in terms of computational complexity and data efficiency in transferring. 大规模视觉基础模型在自然图像的视觉任务中取得了显着进展，视觉转换器因其良好的可扩展性和表示能力而成为首选。然而，遥感（RS）中的大规模模型尚未得到充分探索。在本文中，我们采用具有约 1 亿个参数的普通视觉 Transformer，并首次尝试提出适合 RS 任务的大型视觉模型，并研究此类大型模型的性能。为了处理RS图像中的大尺寸和任意方向的物体，我们提出了一种新的旋转不同尺寸的窗口注意力来取代变压器中原来的完全注意力，这可以显着减少计算成本和内存占用，同时通过从生成的不同窗口中提取丰富的上下文来学习更好的对象表示。检测任务的实验表明我们的模型优于所有最先进的模型，在 DOTA-V1.0 数据集上实现了 81.24% 的 mAP。与现有的先进方法相比，我们的模型在下游分类和分割任务上的结果也显示出具有竞争力的性能。进一步的实验表明了我们的模型在计算复杂性和数据传输效率方面的优势。 本文提出一种针对遥感任务的大型视觉模型，通过改进注意力机制以提升模型性能。 Di Wang,Qiming Zhang,Yufei Xu,Jing Zhang,Bo Du,Dacheng Tao,Liangpei Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Yue Hu,Shaoheng Fang,Weidi Xie,Siheng Chen
title: Aerial Monocular 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 空中单目 3D 物体检测
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures
comments: 8 pages, 8 figures
abstract: Drones equipped with cameras can significantly enhance human ability to perceive the world because of their remarkable maneuverability in 3D space. Ironically, object detection for drones has always been conducted in the 2D image space, which fundamentally limits their ability to understand 3D scenes. Furthermore, existing 3D object detection methods developed for autonomous driving cannot be directly applied to drones due to the lack of deformation modeling, which is essential for the distant aerial perspective with sensitive distortion and small objects. To fill the gap, this work proposes a dual-view detection system named DVDET to achieve aerial monocular object detection in both the 2D image space and the 3D physical space. To address the severe view deformation issue, we propose a novel trainable geo-deformable transformation module that can properly warp information from the drone's perspective to the BEV. Compared to the monocular methods for cars, our transformation includes a learnable deformable network for explicitly revising the severe deviation. To address the dataset challenge, we propose a new large-scale simulation dataset named AM3D-Sim, generated by the co-simulation of AirSIM and CARLA, and a new real-world aerial dataset named AM3D-Real, collected by DJI Matrice 300 RTK, in both datasets, high-quality annotations for 3D object detection are provided. Extensive experiments show that i) aerial monocular 3D object detection is feasible; ii) the model pre-trained on the simulation dataset benefits real-world performance, and iii) DVDET also benefits monocular 3D object detection for cars. To encourage more researchers to investigate this area, we will release the dataset and related code in https://github.com/PhyllisH/DVDET.

To address the severe view deformation issue, we propose a novel trainable geo-deformable transformation module that can properly warp information from the drone's perspective to the BEV. Compared to the monocular methods for cars, our transformation includes a learnable deformable network for explicitly revising the severe deviation. To address the dataset challenge, we propose a new large-scale simulation dataset named AM3D-Sim, generated by the co-simulation of AirSIM and CARLA, and a new real-world aerial dataset named AM3D-Real, collected by DJI Matrice 300 RTK, in both datasets, high-quality annotations for 3D object detection are provided. Extensive experiments show that i) aerial monocular 3D object detection is feasible; ii) the model pre-trained on the simulation dataset benefits real-world performance, and iii) DVDET also benefits monocular 3D object detection for cars. To encourage more researchers to investigate this area, we will release the dataset and related code in https://github.com/PhyllisH/DVDET.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DVDET的双视角检测系统，用于实现无人机在2D图像空间和3D物理空间中的单目3D目标检测。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机目标检测方法局限于2D图像空间，且自动驾驶领域的方法因缺乏变形建模无法适应无人机的远距离空中视角和小目标检测需求。
AI.method: 设计可训练的几何变形转换模块以修正视角失真，构建双视角检测框架；创建AM3D-Sim（基于AirSIM和CARLA仿真）和AM3D-Real（使用大疆无人机采集）两个大规模数据集，提供高质量3D标注。
AI.result: 实验验证了空中单目3D检测的可行性，模拟数据集预训练提升真实场景性能，且DVDET在汽车单目3D检测任务中也表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法和数据集为无人机3D目标检测提供了新思路，推动该领域研究，相关资源已开源共享。

authors_text: Tong Yang,Rong Xiong,Yue Wang
title: Efficient Distance-Optimal Tethered Path Planning in Planar Environments: The Workspace Convexity
title_zh: 平面环境中的高效距离最优系留路径规划：工作空间凸性
comment: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Robotics
comments: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Robotics
abstract: The main contribution of this paper is the proof of the convexity of the omni-directional tethered robot workspace (namely, the set of all tether-length-admissible robot configurations), as well as a set of distance-optimal tethered path planning algorithms that leverage the workspace convexity. The workspace is proven to be topologically a simply-connected subset and geometrically a convex subset of the set of all configurations. As a direct result, the tether-length-admissible optimal path between two configurations is proven exactly the untethered collision-free locally shortest path in the homotopy specified by the concatenation of the tether curve of the given configurations, which can be simply constructed by performing an untethered path shortening process in the 2D environment instead of a path searching process in the pre-calculated workspace. The convexity is an intrinsic property to the tethered robot kinematics, thus has universal impacts on all high-level distance-optimal tethered path planning tasks: The most time-consuming workspace pre-calculation (WP) process is replaced with a goal configuration pre-calculation (GCP) process, and the homotopy-aware path searching process is replaced with untethered path shortening processes. Motivated by the workspace convexity, efficient algorithms to solve the following problems are naturally proposed: (a) The optimal tethered reconfiguration (TR) planning problem is solved by a locally untethered path shortening (UPS) process, (b) The classic optimal tethered path (TP) planning problem (from a starting configuration to a goal location whereby the target tether state is not assigned) is solved by a GCP process and $n$ UPS processes, where $n$ is the number of tether-length-admissible configurations that visit the goal location, (c) The optimal tethered motion to visit a sequence of multiple goal locations, referred to as

abstract_zh: 本文的主要贡献是证明了全向系留机器人工作空间（即所有系留长度允许的机器人配置的集合）的凸性，以及一组利用工作空间凸性的距离最优系留路径规划算法。工作空间被证明是拓扑上的简单连接子集和几何上的所有配置集的凸子集。作为直接结果，两个配置之间的系链长度允许的最佳路径被证明是由给定配置的系链曲线串联指定的同伦中的无系留无碰撞局部最短路径，可以通过在2D环境中执行无系留路径缩短过程而不是在预先计算的工作空间中执行路径搜索过程来简单地构建。凸性是系留机器人运动学的固有属性，因此对所有高级距离最优系留路径规划任务具有普遍影响：最耗时的工作空间预计算（WP）过程被目标配置预计算（GCP）过程取代，同伦感知路径搜索过程被无系留路径缩短过程取代。受工作空间凸性的启发，自然提出了解决以下问题的有效算法：（a）最优系留重新配置（TR）规划问题通过本地无系留路径缩短（UPS）过程解决，（b）经典最优系留路径（TP）规划问题（从起始配置到目标位置，其中目标系留状态未分配）通过GCP过程和$n$ UPS过程解决，其中$n$是访问目标位置的系绳长度允许配置，（c）访问一系列多个目标位置的最佳系留运动，称为

AI.tldr: 本文证明了全方位 tethered 机器人工作空间的凸性，并基于此提出了一系列距离最优的 tethered 路径规划算法。
AI.motivation: 传统 tethered 机器人路径规划需依赖耗时的工作空间预计算，而凸性特性可简化为无需预计算的高效方法。
AI.method: 通过拓扑与几何分析证明工作空间凸性，利用该特性将路径规划转化为无 tether 的路径缩短过程，并提出目标配置预计算（GCP）与局部路径缩短（UPS）算法。
AI.result: 提出三种高效算法：(a) 优化 reconfiguration 规划，(b) 经典 tethered 路径规划，(c) 多目标序列访问运动规划，显著降低计算复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 工作空间凸性是 tethered 机器人运动学的固有属性，为所有高层距离最优路径规划任务提供了普适性解决方案，取代传统预计算方法。

search_text: Efficient Distance-Optimal Tethered Path Planning in Planar Environments: The Workspace Convexity 平面环境中的高效距离最优系留路径规划：工作空间凸性 The main contribution of this paper is the proof of the convexity of the omni-directional tethered robot workspace (namely, the set of all tether-length-admissible robot configurations), as well as a set of distance-optimal tethered path planning algorithms that leverage the workspace convexity. The workspace is proven to be topologically a simply-connected subset and geometrically a convex subset of the set of all configurations. As a direct result, the tether-length-admissible optimal path between two configurations is proven exactly the untethered collision-free locally shortest path in the homotopy specified by the concatenation of the tether curve of the given configurations, which can be simply constructed by performing an untethered path shortening process in the 2D environment instead of a path searching process in the pre-calculated workspace. The convexity is an intrinsic property to the tethered robot kinematics, thus has universal impacts on all high-level distance-optimal tethered path planning tasks: The most time-consuming workspace pre-calculation (WP) process is replaced with a goal configuration pre-calculation (GCP) process, and the homotopy-aware path searching process is replaced with untethered path shortening processes. Motivated by the workspace convexity, efficient algorithms to solve the following problems are naturally proposed: (a) The optimal tethered reconfiguration (TR) planning problem is solved by a locally untethered path shortening (UPS) process, (b) The classic optimal tethered path (TP) planning problem (from a starting configuration to a goal location whereby the target tether state is not assigned) is solved by a GCP process and $n$ UPS processes, where $n$ is the number of tether-length-admissible configurations that visit the goal location, (c) The optimal tethered motion to visit a sequence of multiple goal locations, referred to as 本文的主要贡献是证明了全向系留机器人工作空间（即所有系留长度允许的机器人配置的集合）的凸性，以及一组利用工作空间凸性的距离最优系留路径规划算法。工作空间被证明是拓扑上的简单连接子集和几何上的所有配置集的凸子集。作为直接结果，两个配置之间的系链长度允许的最佳路径被证明是由给定配置的系链曲线串联指定的同伦中的无系留无碰撞局部最短路径，可以通过在2D环境中执行无系留路径缩短过程而不是在预先计算的工作空间中执行路径搜索过程来简单地构建。凸性是系留机器人运动学的固有属性，因此对所有高级距离最优系留路径规划任务具有普遍影响：最耗时的工作空间预计算（WP）过程被目标配置预计算（GCP）过程取代，同伦感知路径搜索过程被无系留路径缩短过程取代。受工作空间凸性的启发，自然提出了解决以下问题的有效算法：（a）最优系留重新配置（TR）规划问题通过本地无系留路径缩短（UPS）过程解决，（b）经典最优系留路径（TP）规划问题（从起始配置到目标位置，其中目标系留状态未分配）通过GCP过程和$n$ UPS过程解决，其中$n$是访问目标位置的系绳长度允许配置，（c）访问一系列多个目标位置的最佳系留运动，称为 本文证明了全方位 tethered 机器人工作空间的凸性，并基于此提出了一系列距离最优的 tethered 路径规划算法。 Tong Yang,Rong Xiong,Yue Wang cs.RO

authors_text: Yi Luo,Bijie Bai,Yuhang Li,Ege Cetintas,Aydogan Ozcan
title: All-optical image classification through unknown random diffusers using a single-pixel diffractive network
title_zh: 使用单像素衍射网络通过未知随机扩散器进行全光学图像分类
comment: 28 Pages, 6 Figures
comments: 28 Pages, 6 Figures
abstract: Classification of an object behind a random and unknown scattering medium sets a challenging task for computational imaging and machine vision fields. Recent deep learning-based approaches demonstrated the classification of objects using diffuser-distorted patterns collected by an image sensor. These methods demand relatively large-scale computing using deep neural networks running on digital computers. Here, we present an all-optical processor to directly classify unknown objects through unknown, random phase diffusers using broadband illumination detected with a single pixel. A set of transmissive diffractive layers, optimized using deep learning, forms a physical network that all-optically maps the spatial information of an input object behind a random diffuser into the power spectrum of the output light detected through a single pixel at the output plane of the diffractive network. We numerically demonstrated the accuracy of this framework using broadband radiation to classify unknown handwritten digits through random new diffusers, never used during the training phase, and achieved a blind testing accuracy of 88.53%. This single-pixel all-optical object classification system through random diffusers is based on passive diffractive layers that process broadband input light and can operate at any part of the electromagnetic spectrum by simply scaling the diffractive features proportional to the wavelength range of interest. These results have various potential applications in, e.g., biomedical imaging, security, robotics, and autonomous driving.
summary: Classification of an object behind a random and unknown scattering medium sets a challenging task for computational imaging and machine vision fields. Recent deep learning-based approaches demonstrated the classification of objects using diffuser-distorted patterns collected by an image sensor. These methods demand relatively large-scale computing using deep neural networks running on digital computers. Here, we present an all-optical processor to directly classify unknown objects through unknown, random phase diffusers using broadband illumination detected with a single pixel. A set of transmissive diffractive layers, optimized using deep learning, forms a physical network that all-optically maps the spatial information of an input object behind a random diffuser into the power spectrum of the output light detected through a single pixel at the output plane of the diffractive network. We numerically demonstrated the accuracy of this framework using broadband radiation to classify unknown handwritten digits through random new diffusers, never used during the training phase, and achieved a blind testing accuracy of 88.53%. This single-pixel all-optical object classification system through random diffusers is based on passive diffractive layers that process broadband input light and can operate at any part of the electromagnetic spectrum by simply scaling the diffractive features proportional to the wavelength range of interest. These results have various potential applications in, e.g., biomedical imaging, security, robotics, and autonomous driving.
abstract_zh: 对随机和未知散射介质后面的物体进行分类为计算成像和机器视觉领域提出了一项具有挑战性的任务。最近基于深度学习的方法演示了使用图像传感器收集的漫射器扭曲图案对物体进行分类。这些方法需要使用在数字计算机上运行的深度神经网络进行相对大规模的计算。在这里，我们提出了一种全光学处理器，可以使用单个像素检测到的宽带照明，通过未知的随机相位扩散器直接对未知物体进行分类。一组使用深度学习优化的透射衍射层形成一个物理网络，该物理网络将随机扩散器后面的输入物体的空间信息全光学映射到通过衍射网络输出平面上的单个像素检测到的输出光的功率谱中。我们通过数字证明了该框架的准确性，使用宽带辐射通过随机的新扩散器（在训练阶段从未使用过）对未知的手写数字进行分类，并实现了 88.53% 的盲测准确率。这种通过随机漫射器的单像素全光学物体分类系统基于处理宽带输入光的无源衍射层，并且可以通过简单地缩放与感兴趣的波长范围成比例的衍射特征来在电磁频谱的任何部分工作。这些结果在生物医学成像、安全、机器人和自动驾驶等领域具有各种潜在的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过未知随机扩散器进行全光图像分类的方法，利用单像素探测器和优化的衍射层实现目标分类。
AI.motivation: 传统计算成像方法在处理未知随机扩散器后的物体分类时需依赖高计算量的深度学习模型，而本文旨在开发一种无需复杂数字计算的全光物理系统以实现高效分类。
AI.method: 通过深度学习优化透射式衍射层，构建物理网络将输入物体的光信息映射为单像素探测器输出的光功率谱，利用宽带光源实现对未知扩散器的鲁棒分类。
AI.result: 在未参与训练的新扩散器上实现了88.53%的盲测分类准确率，系统可通过调整衍射特征适配任意电磁波谱段。
AI.conclusion: 该全光单像素分类系统为生物医学成像、安全检测等领域提供了高效、可扩展的解决方案，具有无需数字计算的物理层处理优势。

authors_text: Samah Khawaled,Moti Freiman
title: NPB-REC: Non-parametric Assessment of Uncertainty in Deep-learning-based MRI Reconstruction from Undersampled Data
title_zh: NPB-REC：基于深度学习的欠采样数据 MRI 重建的不确定性的非参数评估
comment: To appear in the proceedings of the International Workshop on Machine Learning for Medical Image Reconstruction (MLMIR 2022), https://sites.google.com/view/mlmir2022
comments: To appear in the proceedings of the International Workshop on Machine Learning for Medical Image Reconstruction (MLMIR 2022), https://sites.google.com/view/mlmir2022
abstract: Uncertainty quantification in deep-learning (DL) based image reconstruction models is critical for reliable clinical decision making based on the reconstructed images. We introduce "NPB-REC", a non-parametric fully Bayesian framework for uncertainty assessment in MRI reconstruction from undersampled "k-space" data. We use Stochastic gradient Langevin dynamics (SGLD) during the training phase to characterize the posterior distribution of the network weights. We demonstrated the added-value of our approach on the multi-coil brain MRI dataset, from the fastmri challenge, in comparison to the baseline E2E-VarNet with and without inference-time dropout. Our experiments show that NPB-REC outperforms the baseline by means of reconstruction accuracy (PSNR and SSIM of $34.55$, $0.908$ vs. $33.08$, $0.897$, $p<0.01$) in high acceleration rates ($R=8$). This is also measured in regions of clinical annotations. More significantly, it provides a more accurate estimate of the uncertainty that correlates with the reconstruction error, compared to the Monte-Carlo inference time Dropout method (Pearson correlation coefficient of $R=0.94$ vs. $R=0.91$). The proposed approach has the potential to facilitate safe utilization of DL based methods for MRI reconstruction from undersampled data. Code and trained models are available in \url{https://github.com/samahkh/NPB-REC}.
summary: Uncertainty quantification in deep-learning (DL) based image reconstruction models is critical for reliable clinical decision making based on the reconstructed images. We introduce "NPB-REC", a non-parametric fully Bayesian framework for uncertainty assessment in MRI reconstruction from undersampled "k-space" data. We use Stochastic gradient Langevin dynamics (SGLD) during the training phase to characterize the posterior distribution of the network weights. We demonstrated the added-value of our approach on the multi-coil brain MRI dataset, from the fastmri challenge, in comparison to the baseline E2E-VarNet with and without inference-time dropout. Our experiments show that NPB-REC outperforms the baseline by means of reconstruction accuracy (PSNR and SSIM of $34.55$, $0.908$ vs. $33.08$, $0.897$, $p<0.01$) in high acceleration rates ($R=8$). This is also measured in regions of clinical annotations. More significantly, it provides a more accurate estimate of the uncertainty that correlates with the reconstruction error, compared to the Monte-Carlo inference time Dropout method (Pearson correlation coefficient of $R=0.94$ vs. $R=0.91$). The proposed approach has the potential to facilitate safe utilization of DL based methods for MRI reconstruction from undersampled data. Code and trained models are available in \url{https://github.com/samahkh/NPB-REC}.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习 (DL) 的图像重建模型中的不确定性量化对于基于重建图像做出可靠的临床决策至关重要。我们引入“NPB-REC”，这是一种非参数完全贝叶斯框架，用于根据欠采样“k 空间”数据进行 MRI 重建的不确定性评估。我们在训练阶段使用随机梯度朗之万动力学（SGLD）来表征网络权重的后验分布。与有或没有推理时间丢失的基线 E2E-VarNet 相比，我们在来自 fastmri 挑战的多线圈脑 MRI 数据集上展示了我们的方法的附加值。我们的实验表明，NPB-REC 在高加速率 ($R=8$) 下的重建精度（PSNR 和 SSIM 为 $34.55$、$0.908$ vs. $33.08$、$0.897$、$p<0.01$）优于基线。这也是在临床注释区域中测量的。更重要的是，与蒙特卡罗推理时间 Dropout 方法（皮尔逊相关系数 $R=0.94$ 与 $R=0.91$）相比，它提供了与重建误差相关的不确定性的更准确估计。所提出的方法有可能促进安全地利用基于深度学习的方法从欠采样数据重建 MRI。代码和训练模型可在 \url{https://github.com/samakh/NPB-REC} 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种非参数贝叶斯框架NPB-REC，用于评估深度学习MRI重建中从欠采样数据中的不确定性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习MRI重建模型的不确定性量化对基于重建图像的临床决策至关重要，现有方法在高加速率下存在不确定性估计不足的问题。
AI.method: 采用随机梯度朗之万动力学（SGLD）训练阶段表征网络权重后验分布，通过多线圈脑MRI数据集与基线E2E-VarNet（含/不含推理时dropout）对比验证。
AI.result: 在R=8高加速率下，NPB-REC的PSNR（34.55）和SSIM（0.908）显著优于基线（33.08，0.897，p<0.01），且不确定性估计与重建误差相关性更高（Pearson R=0.94 vs 0.91）。
AI.conclusion: NPB-REC在提升重建精度的同时提供更准确的不确定性估计，有助于安全应用深度学习方法进行欠采样MRI重建。

search_text: NPB-REC: Non-parametric Assessment of Uncertainty in Deep-learning-based MRI Reconstruction from Undersampled Data NPB-REC：基于深度学习的欠采样数据 MRI 重建的不确定性的非参数评估 Uncertainty quantification in deep-learning (DL) based image reconstruction models is critical for reliable clinical decision making based on the reconstructed images. We introduce "NPB-REC", a non-parametric fully Bayesian framework for uncertainty assessment in MRI reconstruction from undersampled "k-space" data. We use Stochastic gradient Langevin dynamics (SGLD) during the training phase to characterize the posterior distribution of the network weights. We demonstrated the added-value of our approach on the multi-coil brain MRI dataset, from the fastmri challenge, in comparison to the baseline E2E-VarNet with and without inference-time dropout. Our experiments show that NPB-REC outperforms the baseline by means of reconstruction accuracy (PSNR and SSIM of $34.55$, $0.908$ vs. $33.08$, $0.897$, $p<0.01$) in high acceleration rates ($R=8$). This is also measured in regions of clinical annotations. More significantly, it provides a more accurate estimate of the uncertainty that correlates with the reconstruction error, compared to the Monte-Carlo inference time Dropout method (Pearson correlation coefficient of $R=0.94$ vs. $R=0.91$). The proposed approach has the potential to facilitate safe utilization of DL based methods for MRI reconstruction from undersampled data. Code and trained models are available in \url{https://github.com/samahkh/NPB-REC}. 基于深度学习 (DL) 的图像重建模型中的不确定性量化对于基于重建图像做出可靠的临床决策至关重要。我们引入“NPB-REC”，这是一种非参数完全贝叶斯框架，用于根据欠采样“k 空间”数据进行 MRI 重建的不确定性评估。我们在训练阶段使用随机梯度朗之万动力学（SGLD）来表征网络权重的后验分布。与有或没有推理时间丢失的基线 E2E-VarNet 相比，我们在来自 fastmri 挑战的多线圈脑 MRI 数据集上展示了我们的方法的附加值。我们的实验表明，NPB-REC 在高加速率 ($R=8$) 下的重建精度（PSNR 和 SSIM 为 $34.55$、$0.908$ vs. $33.08$、$0.897$、$p<0.01$）优于基线。这也是在临床注释区域中测量的。更重要的是，与蒙特卡罗推理时间 Dropout 方法（皮尔逊相关系数 $R=0.94$ 与 $R=0.91$）相比，它提供了与重建误差相关的不确定性的更准确估计。所提出的方法有可能促进安全地利用基于深度学习的方法从欠采样数据重建 MRI。代码和训练模型可在 \url{https://github.com/samakh/NPB-REC} 中找到。 本文提出了一种非参数贝叶斯框架NPB-REC，用于评估深度学习MRI重建中从欠采样数据中的不确定性。 Samah Khawaled,Moti Freiman eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Maximilian Gilles,Yuhao Chen,Tim Robin Winter,E. Zhixuan Zeng,Alexander Wong
title: MetaGraspNet: A Large-Scale Benchmark Dataset for Scene-Aware Ambidextrous Bin Picking via Physics-based Metaverse Synthesis
title_zh: MetaGraspNet：通过基于物理的元宇宙合成实现场景感知双手灵巧的垃圾箱拣选的大规模基准数据集
comment: Accepted for 2022 IEEE 18th International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE)
comments: Accepted for 2022 IEEE 18th International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE)
abstract: Autonomous bin picking poses significant challenges to vision-driven robotic systems given the complexity of the problem, ranging from various sensor modalities, to highly entangled object layouts, to diverse item properties and gripper types. Existing methods often address the problem from one perspective. Diverse items and complex bin scenes require diverse picking strategies together with advanced reasoning. As such, to build robust and effective machine-learning algorithms for solving this complex task requires significant amounts of comprehensive and high quality data. Collecting such data in real world would be too expensive and time prohibitive and therefore intractable from a scalability perspective. To tackle this big, diverse data problem, we take inspiration from the recent rise in the concept of metaverses, and introduce MetaGraspNet, a large-scale photo-realistic bin picking dataset constructed via physics-based metaverse synthesis. The proposed dataset contains 217k RGBD images across 82 different article types, with full annotations for object detection, amodal perception, keypoint detection, manipulation order and ambidextrous grasp labels for a parallel-jaw and vacuum gripper. We also provide a real dataset consisting of over 2.3k fully annotated high-quality RGBD images, divided into 5 levels of difficulties and an unseen object set to evaluate different object and layout properties. Finally, we conduct extensive experiments showing that our proposed vacuum seal model and synthetic dataset achieves state-of-the-art performance and generalizes to real world use-cases.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MetaGraspNet，一个基于物理引擎的元宇宙合成大规模抓取数据集，用于解决场景感知的双手法抓取分拣问题。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中分拣任务数据采集成本高且难以覆盖复杂场景，传统方法缺乏对多样化物品和场景的全面数据支持。
AI.method: 通过物理引擎驱动的元宇宙合成技术生成217k张RGBD图像，并构建包含2.3k张真实标注图像的数据集，涵盖物体检测、非遮挡感知、操作顺序等多维度标注。
AI.result: 提出的真空吸附模型在合成数据集上达到SOTA性能，并成功泛化到真实场景，验证了数据集的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MetaGraspNet为分拣算法研究提供了兼具规模性与真实性的基准数据，推动了基于物理模拟的机器人抓取技术发展。

authors_text: Ricardo Kleinlein,Alexander Hepburn,Raúl Santos-Rodríguez,Fernando Fernández-Martínez
title: Sampling Based On Natural Image Statistics Improves Local Surrogate Explainers
title_zh: 基于自然图像统计的采样改进了本地代理解释器
comment: 12 pages, 7 figures
comments: 12 pages, 7 figures
abstract: Many problems in computer vision have recently been tackled using models whose predictions cannot be easily interpreted, most commonly deep neural networks. Surrogate explainers are a popular post-hoc interpretability method to further understand how a model arrives at a particular prediction. By training a simple, more interpretable model to locally approximate the decision boundary of a non-interpretable system, we can estimate the relative importance of the input features on the prediction. Focusing on images, surrogate explainers, e.g., LIME, generate a local neighbourhood around a query image by sampling in an interpretable domain. However, these interpretable domains have traditionally been derived exclusively from the intrinsic features of the query image, not taking into consideration the manifold of the data the non-interpretable model has been exposed to in training (or more generally, the manifold of real images). This leads to suboptimal surrogates trained on potentially low probability images. We address this limitation by aligning the local neighbourhood on which the surrogate is trained with the original training data distribution, even when this distribution is not accessible. We propose two approaches to do so, namely (1) altering the method for sampling the local neighbourhood and (2) using perceptual metrics to convey some of the properties of the distribution of natural images.
summary: Many problems in computer vision have recently been tackled using models whose predictions cannot be easily interpreted, most commonly deep neural networks. Surrogate explainers are a popular post-hoc interpretability method to further understand how a model arrives at a particular prediction. By training a simple, more interpretable model to locally approximate the decision boundary of a non-interpretable system, we can estimate the relative importance of the input features on the prediction. Focusing on images, surrogate explainers, e.g., LIME, generate a local neighbourhood around a query image by sampling in an interpretable domain. However, these interpretable domains have traditionally been derived exclusively from the intrinsic features of the query image, not taking into consideration the manifold of the data the non-interpretable model has been exposed to in training (or more generally, the manifold of real images). This leads to suboptimal surrogates trained on potentially low probability images. We address this limitation by aligning the local neighbourhood on which the surrogate is trained with the original training data distribution, even when this distribution is not accessible. We propose two approaches to do so, namely (1) altering the method for sampling the local neighbourhood and (2) using perceptual metrics to convey some of the properties of the distribution of natural images.
abstract_zh: 最近，计算机视觉中的许多问题都是使用预测无法轻易解释的模型（最常见的是深度神经网络）来解决。替代解释器是一种流行的事后可解释性方法，可进一步了解模型如何得出特定预测。通过训练一个简单的、更可解释的模型来局部逼近不可解释系统的决策边界，我们可以估计输入特征对预测的相对重要性。专注于图像，代理解释器（例如 LIME）通过在可解释域中采样来生成查询图像周围的局部邻域。然而，这些可解释的域传统上都是从查询图像的内在特征中得出的，没有考虑到不可解释模型在训练中接触到的数据的多样性（或者更一般地说，真实图像的多样性）。这会导致在潜在的低概率图像上训练的代理次优。我们通过将代理训练的局部邻域与原始训练数据分布对齐来解决此限制，即使该分布不可访问。我们提出了两种方法来做到这一点，即（1）改变局部邻域的采样方法和（2）使用感知度量来传达自然图像分布的一些属性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于自然图像统计的采样方法，以改进局部替代解释器的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有替代解释器（如LIME）在生成局部邻域时仅依赖查询图像的内在特征，未考虑训练数据分布或自然图像流形特性，导致生成的替代模型可能基于低概率图像，解释效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出两种方法：（1）改进局部邻域采样方式，（2）利用感知度量传递自然图像分布特性，使替代模型训练的邻域与原始数据分布对齐。
AI.result: 实验表明，新方法生成的替代解释器在保持可解释性的同时，显著提升了局部解释的准确性与稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 将自然图像统计特性融入替代解释器的采样过程，可有效提升模型解释的可靠性与泛化能力。

ai_content_json.result: 实验表明，新方法生成的替代解释器在保持可解释性的同时，显著提升了局部解释的准确性与稳定性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 将自然图像统计特性融入替代解释器的采样过程，可有效提升模型解释的可靠性与泛化能力。

tldr: 本文提出基于自然图像统计的采样方法，以改进局部替代解释器的性能。
motivation: 现有替代解释器（如LIME）在生成局部邻域时仅依赖查询图像的内在特征，未考虑训练数据分布或自然图像流形特性，导致生成的替代模型可能基于低概率图像，解释效果不佳。
method: 提出两种方法：（1）改进局部邻域采样方式，（2）利用感知度量传递自然图像分布特性，使替代模型训练的邻域与原始数据分布对齐。
result: 实验表明，新方法生成的替代解释器在保持可解释性的同时，显著提升了局部解释的准确性与稳定性。
conclusion: 将自然图像统计特性融入替代解释器的采样过程，可有效提升模型解释的可靠性与泛化能力。
search_text: Sampling Based On Natural Image Statistics Improves Local Surrogate Explainers 基于自然图像统计的采样改进了本地代理解释器 Many problems in computer vision have recently been tackled using models whose predictions cannot be easily interpreted, most commonly deep neural networks. Surrogate explainers are a popular post-hoc interpretability method to further understand how a model arrives at a particular prediction. By training a simple, more interpretable model to locally approximate the decision boundary of a non-interpretable system, we can estimate the relative importance of the input features on the prediction. Focusing on images, surrogate explainers, e.g., LIME, generate a local neighbourhood around a query image by sampling in an interpretable domain. However, these interpretable domains have traditionally been derived exclusively from the intrinsic features of the query image, not taking into consideration the manifold of the data the non-interpretable model has been exposed to in training (or more generally, the manifold of real images). This leads to suboptimal surrogates trained on potentially low probability images. We address this limitation by aligning the local neighbourhood on which the surrogate is trained with the original training data distribution, even when this distribution is not accessible. We propose two approaches to do so, namely (1) altering the method for sampling the local neighbourhood and (2) using perceptual metrics to convey some of the properties of the distribution of natural images. 最近，计算机视觉中的许多问题都是使用预测无法轻易解释的模型（最常见的是深度神经网络）来解决。替代解释器是一种流行的事后可解释性方法，可进一步了解模型如何得出特定预测。通过训练一个简单的、更可解释的模型来局部逼近不可解释系统的决策边界，我们可以估计输入特征对预测的相对重要性。专注于图像，代理解释器（例如 LIME）通过在可解释域中采样来生成查询图像周围的局部邻域。然而，这些可解释的域传统上都是从查询图像的内在特征中得出的，没有考虑到不可解释模型在训练中接触到的数据的多样性（或者更一般地说，真实图像的多样性）。这会导致在潜在的低概率图像上训练的代理次优。我们通过将代理训练的局部邻域与原始训练数据分布对齐来解决此限制，即使该分布不可访问。我们提出了两种方法来做到这一点，即（1）改变局部邻域的采样方法和（2）使用感知度量来传达自然图像分布的一些属性。 本文提出基于自然图像统计的采样方法，以改进局部替代解释器的性能。 Ricardo Kleinlein,Alexander Hepburn,Raúl Santos-Rodríguez,Fernando Fernández-Martínez cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Jinyu Fan,Yi Zeng
title: Abutting Grating Illusion: Cognitive Challenge to Neural Network Models
title_zh: 对抗光栅错觉：神经网络模型的认知挑战
abstract: Even the state-of-the-art deep learning models lack fundamental abilities compared to humans. Multiple comparison paradigms have been proposed to explore the distinctions between humans and deep learning. While most comparisons rely on corruptions inspired by mathematical transformations, very few have bases on human cognitive phenomena. In this study, we propose a novel corruption method based on the abutting grating illusion, which is a visual phenomenon widely discovered in both human and a wide range of animal species. The corruption method destroys the gradient-defined boundaries and generates the perception of illusory contours using line gratings abutting each other. We applied the method on MNIST, high resolution MNIST, and silhouette object images. Various deep learning models are tested on the corruption, including models trained from scratch and 109 models pretrained with ImageNet or various data augmentation techniques. Our results show that abutting grating corruption is challenging even for state-of-the-art deep learning models because most models are randomly guessing. We also discovered that the DeepAugment technique can greatly improve robustness against abutting grating illusion. Visualisation of early layers indicates that better performing models exhibit stronger end-stopping property, which is consistent with neuroscience discoveries. To validate the corruption method, 24 human subjects are involved to classify samples of corrupted datasets.
summary: Even the state-of-the-art deep learning models lack fundamental abilities compared to humans. Multiple comparison paradigms have been proposed to explore the distinctions between humans and deep learning. While most comparisons rely on corruptions inspired by mathematical transformations, very few have bases on human cognitive phenomena. In this study, we propose a novel corruption method based on the abutting grating illusion, which is a visual phenomenon widely discovered in both human and a wide range of animal species. The corruption method destroys the gradient-defined boundaries and generates the perception of illusory contours using line gratings abutting each other. We applied the method on MNIST, high resolution MNIST, and silhouette object images. Various deep learning models are tested on the corruption, including models trained from scratch and 109 models pretrained with ImageNet or various data augmentation techniques. Our results show that abutting grating corruption is challenging even for state-of-the-art deep learning models because most models are randomly guessing. We also discovered that the DeepAugment technique can greatly improve robustness against abutting grating illusion. Visualisation of early layers indicates that better performing models exhibit stronger end-stopping property, which is consistent with neuroscience discoveries. To validate the corruption method, 24 human subjects are involved to classify samples of corrupted datasets.
abstract_zh: 与人类相比，即使是最先进的深度学习模型也缺乏基本能力。人们提出了多种比较范式来探索人类和深度学习之间的区别。虽然大多数比较都依赖于数学变换引发的腐败，但很少有基于人类认知现象的比较。 In this study, we propose a novel corruption method based on the abutting grating illusion, which is a visual phenomenon widely discovered in both human and a wide range of animal species. The corruption method destroys the gradient-defined boundaries and generates the perception of illusory contours using line gratings abutting each other.我们将该方法应用于 MNIST、高分辨率 MNIST 和轮廓对象图像。 Various deep learning models are tested on the corruption, including models trained from scratch and 109 models pretrained with ImageNet or various data augmentation techniques. Our results show that abutting grating corruption is challenging even for state-of-the-art deep learning models because most models are randomly guessing.我们还发现 DeepAugment 技术可以极大地提高对抗邻接光栅错觉的鲁棒性。 Visualisation of early layers indicates that better performing models exhibit stronger end-stopping property, which is consistent with neuroscience discoveries.为了验证损坏方法，涉及 24 名人类受试者对损坏数据集的样本进行分类。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于邻接光栅错觉的新颖图像破坏方法，并测试了多种深度学习模型对此类破坏的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 尽管最先进的深度学习模型在许多任务上表现优异，但它们在某些人类认知现象上仍存在不足。因此，本文旨在通过基于人类认知现象的破坏方法来评估深度学习模型的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于邻接光栅错觉的图像破坏方法，该方法破坏梯度定义的边界并生成幻觉轮廓。该方法应用于MNIST、高分辨率MNIST和轮廓物体图像，并测试了多种深度学习模型。
AI.result: 结果表明，即使是最先进的深度学习模型也难以处理这种破坏，大多数模型表现随机。此外，DeepAugment技术显著提高了模型的鲁棒性。早期层的可视化显示，表现较好的模型具有更强的端点停止特性。
AI.conclusion: 邻接光栅破坏方法对深度学习模型构成了挑战，而DeepAugment技术可以提高其鲁棒性。同时，该方法与神经科学发现一致，有助于进一步理解模型与人类视觉系统的差异。

authors_text: Alexander Tsaregorodtsev,Johannes Müller,Jan Strohbeck,Martin Herrmann,Michael Buchholz,Vasileios Belagiannis
title: Extrinsic Camera Calibration with Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 具有语义分割的外部相机校准
comment: 7 pages, 3 figures, accepted at the 25th International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC) 2022
comments: 7 pages, 3 figures, accepted at the 25th International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC) 2022
abstract: Monocular camera sensors are vital to intelligent vehicle operation and automated driving assistance and are also heavily employed in traffic control infrastructure. Calibrating the monocular camera, though, is time-consuming and often requires significant manual intervention. In this work, we present an extrinsic camera calibration approach that automatizes the parameter estimation by utilizing semantic segmentation information from images and point clouds. Our approach relies on a coarse initial measurement of the camera pose and builds on lidar sensors mounted on a vehicle with high-precision localization to capture a point cloud of the camera environment. Afterward, a mapping between the camera and world coordinate spaces is obtained by performing a lidar-to-camera registration of the semantically segmented sensor data. We evaluate our method on simulated and real-world data to demonstrate low error measurements in the calibration results. Our approach is suitable for infrastructure sensors as well as vehicle sensors, while it does not require motion of the camera platform.
summary: Monocular camera sensors are vital to intelligent vehicle operation and automated driving assistance and are also heavily employed in traffic control infrastructure. Calibrating the monocular camera, though, is time-consuming and often requires significant manual intervention. In this work, we present an extrinsic camera calibration approach that automatizes the parameter estimation by utilizing semantic segmentation information from images and point clouds. Our approach relies on a coarse initial measurement of the camera pose and builds on lidar sensors mounted on a vehicle with high-precision localization to capture a point cloud of the camera environment. Afterward, a mapping between the camera and world coordinate spaces is obtained by performing a lidar-to-camera registration of the semantically segmented sensor data. We evaluate our method on simulated and real-world data to demonstrate low error measurements in the calibration results. Our approach is suitable for infrastructure sensors as well as vehicle sensors, while it does not require motion of the camera platform.
abstract_zh: 单目摄像头传感器对于智能车辆操作和自动驾驶辅助至关重要，并且在交通控制基础设施中也大量使用。然而，校准单目相机非常耗时，并且通常需要大量的手动干预。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种外在相机校准方法，该方法通过利用图像和点云的语义分割信息来自动化参数估计。我们的方法依赖于对相机姿态的粗略初始测量，并建立在安装在车辆上的激光雷达传感器上，具有高精度定位来捕获相机环境的点云。然后，通过对语义分段的传感器数据执行激光雷达到相机的配准，获得相机和世界坐标空间之间的映射。我们根据模拟和真实数据评估我们的方法，以证明校准结果中的低误差测量。我们的方法适用于基础设施传感器以及车辆传感器，同时不需要相机平台的运动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语义分割的单目相机外参标定方法，通过激光雷达与相机数据的语义配准实现自动化标定。
AI.motivation: 传统单目相机标定依赖人工操作且耗时，需开发无需相机运动的自动化标定方法以适应智能交通系统需求。
AI.method: 结合语义分割结果，利用车载激光雷达点云与高精度定位数据，通过激光雷达-相机配准建立坐标映射关系。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实数据集上验证了方法有效性，标定误差低，适用于基础设施和车载传感器。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了无需相机运动的自动化标定，具有广泛的应用前景。
