Our approach is suitable for infrastructure sensors as well as vehicle sensors, while it does not require motion of the camera platform. 单目摄像头传感器对于智能车辆操作和自动驾驶辅助至关重要，并且在交通控制基础设施中也大量使用。然而，校准单目相机非常耗时，并且通常需要大量的手动干预。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种外在相机校准方法，该方法通过利用图像和点云的语义分割信息来自动化参数估计。我们的方法依赖于对相机姿态的粗略初始测量，并建立在安装在车辆上的激光雷达传感器上，具有高精度定位来捕获相机环境的点云。然后，通过对语义分段的传感器数据执行激光雷达到相机的配准，获得相机和世界坐标空间之间的映射。我们根据模拟和真实数据评估我们的方法，以证明校准结果中的低误差测量。我们的方法适用于基础设施传感器以及车辆传感器，同时不需要相机平台的运动。 本文提出一种基于语义分割的单目相机外参标定方法，通过激光雷达与相机数据的语义配准实现自动化标定。 Alexander Tsaregorodtsev,Johannes Müller,Jan Strohbeck,Martin Herrmann,Michael Buchholz,Vasileios Belagiannis cs.CV

authors_text: Tianxing Zhang,Hanzhou Wu,Xiaofeng Lu,Guangling Sun
title: AWEncoder: Adversarial Watermarking Pre-trained Encoders in Contrastive Learning
title_zh: AWEncoder：对比学习中的对抗性水印预训练编码器
comment: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=IdiF7M0AAAAJ&hl=en
comments: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=IdiF7M0AAAAJ&hl=en
abstract: As a self-supervised learning paradigm, contrastive learning has been widely used to pre-train a powerful encoder as an effective feature extractor for various downstream tasks. This process requires numerous unlabeled training data and computational resources, which makes the pre-trained encoder become valuable intellectual property of the owner. However, the lack of a priori knowledge of downstream tasks makes it non-trivial to protect the intellectual property of the pre-trained encoder by applying conventional watermarking methods. To deal with this problem, in this paper, we introduce AWEncoder, an adversarial method for watermarking the pre-trained encoder in contrastive learning. First, as an adversarial perturbation, the watermark is generated by enforcing the training samples to be marked to deviate respective location and surround a randomly selected key image in the embedding space. Then, the watermark is embedded into the pre-trained encoder by further optimizing a joint loss function. As a result, the watermarked encoder not only performs very well for downstream tasks, but also enables us to verify its ownership by analyzing the discrepancy of output provided using the encoder as the backbone under both white-box and black-box conditions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed work enjoys pretty good effectiveness and robustness on different contrastive learning algorithms and downstream tasks, which has verified the superiority and applicability of the proposed work.
summary: As a self-supervised learning paradigm, contrastive learning has been widely used to pre-train a powerful encoder as an effective feature extractor for various downstream tasks. This process requires numerous unlabeled training data and computational resources, which makes the pre-trained encoder become valuable intellectual property of the owner. However, the lack of a priori knowledge of downstream tasks makes it non-trivial to protect the intellectual property of the pre-trained encoder by applying conventional watermarking methods. To deal with this problem, in this paper, we introduce AWEncoder, an adversarial method for watermarking the pre-trained encoder in contrastive learning. First, as an adversarial perturbation, the watermark is generated by enforcing the training samples to be marked to deviate respective location and surround a randomly selected key image in the embedding space. Then, the watermark is embedded into the pre-trained encoder by further optimizing a joint loss function. As a result, the watermarked encoder not only performs very well for downstream tasks, but also enables us to verify its ownership by analyzing the discrepancy of output provided using the encoder as the backbone under both white-box and black-box conditions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed work enjoys pretty good effectiveness and robustness on different contrastive learning algorithms and downstream tasks, which has verified the superiority and applicability of the proposed work.
abstract_zh: 作为一种自监督学习范式，对比学习已被广​​泛用于预训练强大的编码器，作为各种下游任务的有效特征提取器。这个过程需要大量未标记的训练数据和计算资源，这使得预训练的编码器成为所有者的宝贵知识产权。然而，缺乏下游任务的先验知识使得通过应用传统的水印方法来保护预训练编码器的知识产权变得非常困难。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们引入了 AWEncoder，一种在对比学习中对预训练编码器加水印的对抗方法。首先，作为对抗性扰动，通过强制要标记的训练样本偏离各自的位置并围绕嵌入空间中随机选择的关键图像来生成水印。然后，通过进一步优化联合损失函数，将水印嵌入到预训练的编码器中。因此，带水印的编码器不仅在下游任务中表现良好，而且使我们能够通过分析在白盒和黑盒条件下使用编码器作为骨干提供的输出差异来验证其所有权。大量的实验表明，该工作在不同的对比学习算法和下游任务上具有良好的有效性和鲁棒性，验证了该工作的优越性和适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AWEncoder方法，在对比学习中通过对抗性水印保护预训练编码器的知识产权。
AI.motivation: 对比学习预训练的编码器具有高价值，但传统水印方法因缺乏下游任务先验知识难以有效保护其知识产权。
AI.method: 通过对抗扰动生成水印，使样本在嵌入空间偏离并围绕关键图像，再利用联合损失函数将水印嵌入编码器。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在不同对比学习算法和下游任务中具有良好的有效性和鲁棒性，能验证编码器所有权。
AI.conclusion: AWEncoder有效解决了预训练编码器知识产权保护问题，同时保持下游任务性能，具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Shuai Zhang,Liang Zhao,Shoudong Huang,Hua Wang,Qi Luo,Qi Hao
title: SLAM-TKA: Real-time Intra-operative Measurement of Tibial Resection Plane in Conventional Total Knee Arthroplasty
title_zh: SLAM-TKA：传统全膝关节置换术中胫骨切除平面的实时术中测量
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures, The 25th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention, MICCAI 2022
comments: 10 pages, 4 figures, The 25th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention, MICCAI 2022
abstract: Total knee arthroplasty (TKA) is a common orthopaedic surgery to replace a damaged knee joint with artificial implants. The inaccuracy of achieving the planned implant position can result in the risk of implant component aseptic loosening, wear out, and even a joint revision, and those failures most of the time occur on the tibial side in the conventional jig-based TKA (CON-TKA). This study aims to precisely evaluate the accuracy of the proximal tibial resection plane intra-operatively in real-time such that the evaluation processing changes very little on the CON-TKA operative procedure. Two X-ray radiographs captured during the proximal tibial resection phase together with a pre-operative patient-specific tibia 3D mesh model segmented from computed tomography (CT) scans and a trocar pin 3D mesh model are used in the proposed simultaneous localisation and mapping (SLAM) system to estimate the proximal tibial resection plane. Validations using both simulation and in-vivo datasets are performed to demonstrate the robustness and the potential clinical value of the proposed algorithm.
summary: Total knee arthroplasty (TKA) is a common orthopaedic surgery to replace a damaged knee joint with artificial implants. The inaccuracy of achieving the planned implant position can result in the risk of implant component aseptic loosening, wear out, and even a joint revision, and those failures most of the time occur on the tibial side in the conventional jig-based TKA (CON-TKA). This study aims to precisely evaluate the accuracy of the proximal tibial resection plane intra-operatively in real-time such that the evaluation processing changes very little on the CON-TKA operative procedure. Two X-ray radiographs captured during the proximal tibial resection phase together with a pre-operative patient-specific tibia 3D mesh model segmented from computed tomography (CT) scans and a trocar pin 3D mesh model are used in the proposed simultaneous localisation and mapping (SLAM) system to estimate the proximal tibial resection plane. Validations using both simulation and in-vivo datasets are performed to demonstrate the robustness and the potential clinical value of the proposed algorithm.
abstract_zh: Total knee arthroplasty (TKA) is a common orthopaedic surgery to replace a damaged knee joint with artificial implants.实现计划植入位置的不准确可能会导致植入部件无菌松动、磨损，甚至关节翻修的风险，而在传统的基于夹具的全膝关节置换 (CON-TKA) 中，这些故障大多数时候发生在胫骨侧。本研究旨在术中实时精确评估胫骨近端切除平面的准确性，使得CON-TKA手术过程中评估处理变化很小。在提议的同步定位和映射（SLAM）系统中使用在近端胫骨切除阶段捕获的两张 X 射线照片以及从计算机断层扫描（CT）扫描中分割的术前患者特定胫骨 3D 网格模型和套管针 3D 网格模型来估计近端胫骨切除平面。使用模拟和体内数据集进行验证，以证明所提出算法的稳健性和潜在临床价值。

AI.tldr: 开发SLAM-TKA系统，通过术中X光与术前3D模型实时评估传统全膝关节置换术中胫骨切除平面的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统基于夹具的TKA手术中，胫骨侧植入物位置不准确易导致松动、磨损等并发症，需改进术中实时测量方法以提高精度。
AI.method: 结合术中双X光影像、术前CT分割的胫骨3D模型及套管针模型，利用SLAM算法实时估计胫骨切除平面。
AI.result: 通过模拟与临床数据验证，证明该方法具有鲁棒性及潜在临床价值，能有效提升术中测量精度。
AI.conclusion: SLAM-TKA系统可为传统TKA手术提供实时精准的胫骨切除评估，有望降低术后并发症风险并提升手术效果。

authors_text: Xin Liu,Wei Tao,Wei Li,Dazhi Zhan,Jun Wang,Zhisong Pan
title: Provable Acceleration of Nesterov's Accelerated Gradient Method over Heavy Ball Method in Training Over-Parameterized Neural Networks
title_zh: Nesterov 加速梯度法在训练超参数神经网络中相对于重球法的可证明加速
comment: 16 pages, accepted to the 33rd International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence, IJCAI 2024 (Main) Track
comments: 16 pages, accepted to the 33rd International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence, IJCAI 2024 (Main) Track
abstract: Due to its simplicity and efficiency, the first-order gradient method has been extensively employed in training neural networks. Although the optimization problem of the neural network is non-convex, recent research has proved that the first-order method is capable of attaining a global minimum during training over-parameterized neural networks, where the number of parameters is significantly larger than that of training instances. Momentum methods, including the heavy ball (HB) method and Nesterov's accelerated gradient (NAG) method, are the workhorse of first-order gradient methods owning to their accelerated convergence. In practice, NAG often exhibits superior performance than HB. However, current theoretical works fail to distinguish their convergence difference in training neural networks. To fill this gap, we consider the training problem of the two-layer ReLU neural network under over-parameterization and random initialization. Leveraging high-resolution dynamical systems and neural tangent kernel (NTK) theory, our result not only establishes tighter upper bounds of the convergence rate for both HB and NAG, but also provides the first theoretical guarantee for the acceleration of NAG over HB in training neural networks. Finally, we validate our theoretical results on three benchmark datasets.
summary: Due to its simplicity and efficiency, the first-order gradient method has been extensively employed in training neural networks. Although the optimization problem of the neural network is non-convex, recent research has proved that the first-order method is capable of attaining a global minimum during training over-parameterized neural networks, where the number of parameters is significantly larger than that of training instances. Momentum methods, including the heavy ball (HB) method and Nesterov's accelerated gradient (NAG) method, are the workhorse of first-order gradient methods owning to their accelerated convergence. In practice, NAG often exhibits superior performance than HB. However, current theoretical works fail to distinguish their convergence difference in training neural networks. To fill this gap, we consider the training problem of the two-layer ReLU neural network under over-parameterization and random initialization. Leveraging high-resolution dynamical systems and neural tangent kernel (NTK) theory, our result not only establishes tighter upper bounds of the convergence rate for both HB and NAG, but also provides the first theoretical guarantee for the acceleration of NAG over HB in training neural networks. Finally, we validate our theoretical results on three benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 由于其简单和高效，一阶梯度方法已广泛应用于训练神经网络。尽管神经网络的优化问题是非凸的，但最近的研究证明，一阶方法能够在训练参数数量明显大于训练实例数量的过参数化神经网络时达到全局最小值。动量方法，包括重球（HB）方法和涅斯特洛夫加速梯度（NAG）方法，由于其加速收敛而成为一阶梯度方法的主力。在实践中，NAG 常常表现出比 HB 更优越的性能。然而，当前的理论工作未能区分它们在训练神经网络时的收敛差异。为了填补这一空白，我们考虑过参数化和随机初始化下的两层 ReLU 神经网络的训练问题。利用高分辨率动力系统和神经正切核（NTK）理论，我们的结果不仅为 HB 和 NAG 的收敛速度建立了更严格的上限，而且为训练神经网络时 NAG 相对于 HB 的加速提供了第一个理论保证。最后，我们在三个基准数据集上验证了我们的理论结果。

AI.tldr: 本文证明了Nesterov加速梯度法（NAG）在训练过参数化神经网络时相比重球法（HB）具有可证明的加速效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管NAG在实践中表现优于HB，但现有理论无法解释两者在训练神经网络时的收敛差异。
AI.method: 基于高分辨率动力系统和神经切线核（NTK）理论，分析两层ReLU网络在过参数化与随机初始化下的收敛行为。
AI.result: 建立了HB和NAG更紧的收敛率上界，并首次从理论上证明NAG在训练神经网络时的加速优势。
AI.conclusion: 理论结果在三个基准数据集上得到验证，揭示了NAG加速效果的数学本质。

search_text: Provable Acceleration of Nesterov's Accelerated Gradient Method over Heavy Ball Method in Training Over-Parameterized Neural Networks Nesterov 加速梯度法在训练超参数神经网络中相对于重球法的可证明加速 Due to its simplicity and efficiency, the first-order gradient method has been extensively employed in training neural networks. Although the optimization problem of the neural network is non-convex, recent research has proved that the first-order method is capable of attaining a global minimum during training over-parameterized neural networks, where the number of parameters is significantly larger than that of training instances. Momentum methods, including the heavy ball (HB) method and Nesterov's accelerated gradient (NAG) method, are the workhorse of first-order gradient methods owning to their accelerated convergence. In practice, NAG often exhibits superior performance than HB. However, current theoretical works fail to distinguish their convergence difference in training neural networks. To fill this gap, we consider the training problem of the two-layer ReLU neural network under over-parameterization and random initialization. Leveraging high-resolution dynamical systems and neural tangent kernel (NTK) theory, our result not only establishes tighter upper bounds of the convergence rate for both HB and NAG, but also provides the first theoretical guarantee for the acceleration of NAG over HB in training neural networks. Finally, we validate our theoretical results on three benchmark datasets. 由于其简单和高效，一阶梯度方法已广泛应用于训练神经网络。尽管神经网络的优化问题是非凸的，但最近的研究证明，一阶方法能够在训练参数数量明显大于训练实例数量的过参数化神经网络时达到全局最小值。动量方法，包括重球（HB）方法和涅斯特洛夫加速梯度（NAG）方法，由于其加速收敛而成为一阶梯度方法的主力。在实践中，NAG 常常表现出比 HB 更优越的性能。然而，当前的理论工作未能区分它们在训练神经网络时的收敛差异。为了填补这一空白，我们考虑过参数化和随机初始化下的两层 ReLU 神经网络的训练问题。利用高分辨率动力系统和神经正切核（NTK）理论，我们的结果不仅为 HB 和 NAG 的收敛速度建立了更严格的上限，而且为训练神经网络时 NAG 相对于 HB 的加速提供了第一个理论保证。最后，我们在三个基准数据集上验证了我们的理论结果。 本文证明了Nesterov加速梯度法（NAG）在训练过参数化神经网络时相比重球法（HB）具有可证明的加速效果。 Xin Liu,Wei Tao,Wei Li,Dazhi Zhan,Jun Wang,Zhisong Pan cs.LG,cs.AI,math.OC

authors_text: Taisuke Kobayashi,Ryoma Watanuki
title: Sparse Representation Learning with Modified q-VAE towards Minimal Realization of World Model
title_zh: 使用改进的 q-VAE 进行稀疏表示学习以实现世界模型的最小化
comment: 28 pages, 17 figures
comments: 28 pages, 17 figures
abstract: Extraction of low-dimensional latent space from high-dimensional observation data is essential to construct a real-time robot controller with a world model on the extracted latent space. However, there is no established method for tuning the dimension size of the latent space automatically, suffering from finding the necessary and sufficient dimension size, i.e. the minimal realization of the world model. In this study, we analyze and improve Tsallis-based variational autoencoder (q-VAE), and reveal that, under an appropriate configuration, it always facilitates making the latent space sparse. Even if the dimension size of the pre-specified latent space is redundant compared to the minimal realization, this sparsification collapses unnecessary dimensions, allowing for easy removal of them. We experimentally verified the benefits of the sparsification by the proposed method that it can easily find the necessary and sufficient six dimensions for a reaching task with a mobile manipulator that requires a six-dimensional state space. Moreover, by planning with such a minimal-realization world model learned in the extracted dimensions, the proposed method was able to exert a more optimal action sequence in real-time, reducing the reaching accomplishment time by around 20 %. The attached video is uploaded on youtube: https://youtu.be/-QjITrnxaRs
summary: Extraction of low-dimensional latent space from high-dimensional observation data is essential to construct a real-time robot controller with a world model on the extracted latent space. However, there is no established method for tuning the dimension size of the latent space automatically, suffering from finding the necessary and sufficient dimension size, i.e. the minimal realization of the world model. In this study, we analyze and improve Tsallis-based variational autoencoder (q-VAE), and reveal that, under an appropriate configuration, it always facilitates making the latent space sparse. Even if the dimension size of the pre-specified latent space is redundant compared to the minimal realization, this sparsification collapses unnecessary dimensions, allowing for easy removal of them. We experimentally verified the benefits of the sparsification by the proposed method that it can easily find the necessary and sufficient six dimensions for a reaching task with a mobile manipulator that requires a six-dimensional state space. Moreover, by planning with such a minimal-realization world model learned in the extracted dimensions, the proposed method was able to exert a more optimal action sequence in real-time, reducing the reaching accomplishment time by around 20 %. The attached video is uploaded on youtube: https://youtu.be/-QjITrnxaRs
abstract_zh: 从高维观测数据中提取低维潜在空间对于在提取的潜在空间上构建具有世界模型的实时机器人控制器至关重要。然而，目前还没有建立自动调整潜在空间维度大小的方法，苦于寻找必要且充分的维度大小，即世界模型的最小实现。在本研究中，我们分析和改进了基于 Tsallis 的变分自动编码器（q-VAE），并揭示了在适当的配置下，它总是有利于使潜在空间稀疏。即使预先指定的潜在空间的维度大小与最小实现相比是多余的，这种稀疏化也会折叠不必要的维度，从而可以轻松删除它们。我们通过实验验证了所提出的方法稀疏化的好处，即它可以轻松找到需要六维状态空间的移动机械臂的到达任务所需的和充分的六个维度。此外，通过在提取的维度中学习这样的最小实现世界模型进行规划，所提出的方法能够实时发挥更优化的动作序列，将完成时间缩短约 20%。所附视频上传至youtube：https://youtu.be/-QjITrnxaRs

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的q-VAE方法，通过稀疏表示学习实现世界模型的最小化维度构建，用于实时机器人控制。
AI.motivation: 现有方法缺乏自动调整潜在空间维度的机制，难以确定世界模型的必要且充分的最小维度，影响实时控制器性能。
AI.method: 改进Tsallis-based变分自编码器(q-VAE)，利用稀疏化机制自动压缩冗余维度，实现潜在空间的最小化表示。
AI.result: 在移动机械臂抓取任务中，成功提取6维状态空间，使动作序列优化效率提升20%，并验证了稀疏化有效性。
AI.conclusion: 改进的q-VAE方法可有效实现世界模型的最小维度表示，为实时机器人控制提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: Yanbin Liu,Girish Dwivedi,Farid Boussaid,Frank Sanfilippo,Makoto Yamada,Mohammed Bennamoun
title: Inflating 2D Convolution Weights for Efficient Generation of 3D Medical Images
title_zh: 膨胀 2D 卷积权重以高效生成 3D 医学图像
comment: Published at Computer Methods and Programs in Biomedicine (CMPB) 2023
comments: Published at Computer Methods and Programs in Biomedicine (CMPB) 2023
abstract: The generation of three-dimensional (3D) medical images has great application potential since it takes into account the 3D anatomical structure. Two problems prevent effective training of a 3D medical generative model: (1) 3D medical images are expensive to acquire and annotate, resulting in an insufficient number of training images, and (2) a large number of parameters are involved in 3D convolution. Methods: We propose a novel GAN model called 3D Split&Shuffle-GAN. To address the 3D data scarcity issue, we first pre-train a two-dimensional (2D) GAN model using abundant image slices and inflate the 2D convolution weights to improve the initialization of the 3D GAN. Novel 3D network architectures are proposed for both the generator and discriminator of the GAN model to significantly reduce the number of parameters while maintaining the quality of image generation. Several weight inflation strategies and parameter-efficient 3D architectures are investigated. Results: Experiments on both heart (Stanford AIMI Coronary Calcium) and brain (Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative) datasets show that our method leads to improved 3D image generation quality (14.7 improvements on Fréchet inception distance) with significantly fewer parameters (only 48.5% of the baseline method). Conclusions: We built a parameter-efficient 3D medical image generation model. Due to the efficiency and effectiveness, it has the potential to generate high-quality 3D brain and heart images for real use cases.
summary: The generation of three-dimensional (3D) medical images has great application potential since it takes into account the 3D anatomical structure. Two problems prevent effective training of a 3D medical generative model: (1) 3D medical images are expensive to acquire and annotate, resulting in an insufficient number of training images, and (2) a large number of parameters are involved in 3D convolution. Methods: We propose a novel GAN model called 3D Split&Shuffle-GAN. To address the 3D data scarcity issue, we first pre-train a two-dimensional (2D) GAN model using abundant image slices and inflate the 2D convolution weights to improve the initialization of the 3D GAN. Novel 3D network architectures are proposed for both the generator and discriminator of the GAN model to significantly reduce the number of parameters while maintaining the quality of image generation. Several weight inflation strategies and parameter-efficient 3D architectures are investigated. Results: Experiments on both heart (Stanford AIMI Coronary Calcium) and brain (Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative) datasets show that our method leads to improved 3D image generation quality (14.7 improvements on Fréchet inception distance) with significantly fewer parameters (only 48.5% of the baseline method). Conclusions: We built a parameter-efficient 3D medical image generation model. Due to the efficiency and effectiveness, it has the potential to generate high-quality 3D brain and heart images for real use cases.
abstract_zh: 三维（3D）医学图像的生成具有巨大的应用潜力，因为它考虑了3D解剖结构。有两个问题阻碍了 3D 医学生成模型的有效训练：（1）3D 医学图像的获取和注释成本高昂，导致训练图像数量不足；（2）3D 卷积涉及大量参数。方法：我们提出了一种新颖的 GAN 模型，称为 3D Split&Shuffle-GAN。为了解决 3D 数据稀缺问题，我们首先使用丰富的图像切片预训练二维 (2D) GAN 模型，并膨胀 2D 卷积权重以改进 3D GAN 的初始化。为 GAN 模型的生成器和判别器提出了新颖的 3D 网络架构，以显着减少参数数量，同时保持图像生成的质量。研究了几种权重膨胀策略和参数高效的 3D 架构。结果：在心脏（斯坦福 AIMI 冠状动脉钙）和大脑（阿尔茨海默病神经影像计划）数据集上进行的实验表明，我们的方法可以提高 3D 图像生成质量（Fréchet 起始距离提高 14.7 个），并且参数显着减少（仅为基线方法的 48.5%）。结论：我们构建了参数高效的 3D 医学图像生成模型。由于其效率和有效性，它有潜力为真实用例生成高质量的 3D 大脑和心脏图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于2D卷积权重膨胀的高效3D医学图像生成方法，通过减少参数量解决3D数据稀缺和计算成本高的问题。
AI.motivation: 3D医学图像生成面临数据获取成本高、标注困难及3D卷积参数量大的挑战，亟需高效且高质量的生成模型。
AI.method: 设计3D Split&Shuffle-GAN模型，利用预训练2D GAN的权重膨胀初始化3D网络，并提出参数高效的3D生成器和判别器架构。
AI.result: 在心脏和大脑数据集上，生成质量提升14.7（FID指标），参数量仅为基线方法的48.5%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了参数高效的3D医学图像生成，具备实际应用潜力，可生成高质量的心脏和大脑图像。

search_text: Inflating 2D Convolution Weights for Efficient Generation of 3D Medical Images 膨胀 2D 卷积权重以高效生成 3D 医学图像 The generation of three-dimensional (3D) medical images has great application potential since it takes into account the 3D anatomical structure. Two problems prevent effective training of a 3D medical generative model: (1) 3D medical images are expensive to acquire and annotate, resulting in an insufficient number of training images, and (2) a large number of parameters are involved in 3D convolution. Methods: We propose a novel GAN model called 3D Split&Shuffle-GAN. To address the 3D data scarcity issue, we first pre-train a two-dimensional (2D) GAN model using abundant image slices and inflate the 2D convolution weights to improve the initialization of the 3D GAN. Novel 3D network architectures are proposed for both the generator and discriminator of the GAN model to significantly reduce the number of parameters while maintaining the quality of image generation. Several weight inflation strategies and parameter-efficient 3D architectures are investigated. Results: Experiments on both heart (Stanford AIMI Coronary Calcium) and brain (Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative) datasets show that our method leads to improved 3D image generation quality (14.7 improvements on Fréchet inception distance) with significantly fewer parameters (only 48.5% of the baseline method). Conclusions: We built a parameter-efficient 3D medical image generation model. Due to the efficiency and effectiveness, it has the potential to generate high-quality 3D brain and heart images for real use cases. 三维（3D）医学图像的生成具有巨大的应用潜力，因为它考虑了3D解剖结构。有两个问题阻碍了 3D 医学生成模型的有效训练：（1）3D 医学图像的获取和注释成本高昂，导致训练图像数量不足；（2）3D 卷积涉及大量参数。方法：我们提出了一种新颖的 GAN 模型，称为 3D Split&Shuffle-GAN。为了解决 3D 数据稀缺问题，我们首先使用丰富的图像切片预训练二维 (2D) GAN 模型，并膨胀 2D 卷积权重以改进 3D GAN 的初始化。为 GAN 模型的生成器和判别器提出了新颖的 3D 网络架构，以显着减少参数数量，同时保持图像生成的质量。研究了几种权重膨胀策略和参数高效的 3D 架构。结果：在心脏（斯坦福 AIMI 冠状动脉钙）和大脑（阿尔茨海默病神经影像计划）数据集上进行的实验表明，我们的方法可以提高 3D 图像生成质量（Fréchet 起始距离提高 14.7 个），并且参数显着减少（仅为基线方法的 48.5%）。结论：我们构建了参数高效的 3D 医学图像生成模型。由于其效率和有效性，它有潜力为真实用例生成高质量的 3D 大脑和心脏图像。 本文提出了一种基于2D卷积权重膨胀的高效3D医学图像生成方法，通过减少参数量解决3D数据稀缺和计算成本高的问题。 Yanbin Liu,Girish Dwivedi,Farid Boussaid,Frank Sanfilippo,Makoto Yamada,Mohammed Bennamoun eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Asif Khan,Amos Storkey
title: Adversarial robustness of VAEs through the lens of local geometry
title_zh: 通过局部几何视角观察 VAE 的对抗鲁棒性
comment: International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Statistics (AISTATS) 2023
comments: International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Statistics (AISTATS) 2023
abstract: In an unsupervised attack on variational autoencoders (VAEs), an adversary finds a small perturbation in an input sample that significantly changes its latent space encoding, thereby compromising the reconstruction for a fixed decoder. A known reason for such vulnerability is the distortions in the latent space resulting from a mismatch between approximated latent posterior and a prior distribution. Consequently, a slight change in an input sample can move its encoding to a low/zero density region in the latent space resulting in an unconstrained generation. This paper demonstrates that an optimal way for an adversary to attack VAEs is to exploit a directional bias of a stochastic pullback metric tensor induced by the encoder and decoder networks. The pullback metric tensor of an encoder measures the change in infinitesimal latent volume from an input to a latent space. Thus, it can be viewed as a lens to analyse the effect of input perturbations leading to latent space distortions. We propose robustness evaluation scores using the eigenspectrum of a pullback metric tensor. Moreover, we empirically show that the scores correlate with the robustness parameter $β$ of the $β-$VAE. Since increasing $β$ also degrades reconstruction quality, we demonstrate a simple alternative using \textit{mixup} training to fill the empty regions in the latent space, thus improving robustness with improved reconstruction.
summary: In an unsupervised attack on variational autoencoders (VAEs), an adversary finds a small perturbation in an input sample that significantly changes its latent space encoding, thereby compromising the reconstruction for a fixed decoder. A known reason for such vulnerability is the distortions in the latent space resulting from a mismatch between approximated latent posterior and a prior distribution. Consequently, a slight change in an input sample can move its encoding to a low/zero density region in the latent space resulting in an unconstrained generation. This paper demonstrates that an optimal way for an adversary to attack VAEs is to exploit a directional bias of a stochastic pullback metric tensor induced by the encoder and decoder networks. The pullback metric tensor of an encoder measures the change in infinitesimal latent volume from an input to a latent space. Thus, it can be viewed as a lens to analyse the effect of input perturbations leading to latent space distortions. We propose robustness evaluation scores using the eigenspectrum of a pullback metric tensor. Moreover, we empirically show that the scores correlate with the robustness parameter $β$ of the $β-$VAE. Since increasing $β$ also degrades reconstruction quality, we demonstrate a simple alternative using \textit{mixup} training to fill the empty regions in the latent space, thus improving robustness with improved reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 在对变分自动编码器 (VAE) 的无监督攻击中，攻击者发现输入样本中的小扰动会显着改变其潜在空间编码，从而损害固定解码器的重建。这种脆弱性的一个已知原因是由于近似潜在后验分布和先验分布之间的不匹配而导致潜在空间的扭曲。因此，输入样本的轻微变化可以将其编码移动到潜在空间中的低/零密度区域，从而导致不受约束的生成。本文证明，对手攻击 VAE 的最佳方法是利用编码器和解码器网络引起的随机回拉度量张量的方向偏差。编码器的回拉度量张量测量从输入到潜在空间的无穷小的潜在体积的变化。因此，它可以被视为分析导致潜在空间扭曲的输入扰动影响的透镜。我们使用回拉度量张量的特征谱提出鲁棒性评估分数。此外，我们凭经验表明，分数与 $β-$VAE 的鲁棒性参数 $β$ 相关。由于增加 $β$ 也会降低重建质量，因此我们展示了一种简单的替代方案，使用 \textit{mixup} 训练来填充潜在空间中的空白区域，从而通过改进重建来提高鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析变分自编码器（VAEs）的潜在空间几何特性，研究其对抗鲁棒性，并提出基于拉回度量张量特征谱的鲁棒性评估方法及改进策略。
AI.motivation: VAEs在潜在空间中因近似后验与先验分布的不匹配导致对抗攻击脆弱性，传统方法难以有效评估和提升其鲁棒性。
AI.method: 利用编码器和解码器诱导的随机拉回度量张量的方向偏差，通过其特征谱构建鲁棒性评估指标，并采用mixup训练填补潜在空间空洞区域。
AI.result: 实验表明特征谱评分与β-VAE的β参数相关，且mixup训练在提升鲁棒性的同时保持重构质量。
AI.conclusion: 潜在空间几何分析为VAEs对抗鲁棒性评估提供新视角，mixup训练是平衡鲁棒性与重构性能的有效替代方案。

authors_text: Yi Hu,Bo Cai,Yaoxiang Yu
title: CSSAM:Code Search via Attention Matching of Code Semantics and Structures
title_zh: CSSAM：通过代码语义和结构的注意力匹配进行代码搜索
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1909.13516 by other authors
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1909.13516 by other authors
abstract: Despite the continuous efforts in improving both the effectiveness and efficiency of code search, two issues remained unsolved. First, programming languages have inherent strong structural linkages, and feature mining of code as text form would omit the structural information contained inside it. Second, there is a potential semantic relationship between code and query, it is challenging to align code and text across sequences so that vectors are spatially consistent during similarity matching. To tackle both issues, in this paper, a code search model named CSSAM (Code Semantics and Structures Attention Matching) is proposed. By introducing semantic and structural matching mechanisms, CSSAM effectively extracts and fuses multidimensional code features. Specifically, the cross and residual layer was developed to facilitate high-latitude spatial alignment of code and query at the token level. By leveraging the residual interaction, a matching module is designed to preserve more code semantics and descriptive features, that enhances the adhesion between the code and its corresponding query text. Besides, to improve the model's comprehension of the code's inherent structure, a code representation structure named CSRG (Code Semantic Representation Graph) is proposed for jointly representing abstract syntax tree nodes and the data flow of the codes. According to the experimental results on two publicly available datasets containing 540k and 330k code segments, CSSAM significantly outperforms the baselines in terms of achieving the highest SR@1/5/10, MRR, and NDCG@50 on both datasets respectively. Moreover, the ablation study is conducted to quantitatively measure the impact of each key component of CSSAM on the efficiency and effectiveness of code search, which offers the insights into the improvement of advanced code search solutions.
summary: Despite the continuous efforts in improving both the effectiveness and efficiency of code search, two issues remained unsolved. First, programming languages have inherent strong structural linkages, and feature mining of code as text form would omit the structural information contained inside it. Second, there is a potential semantic relationship between code and query, it is challenging to align code and text across sequences so that vectors are spatially consistent during similarity matching. To tackle both issues, in this paper, a code search model named CSSAM (Code Semantics and Structures Attention Matching) is proposed. By introducing semantic and structural matching mechanisms, CSSAM effectively extracts and fuses multidimensional code features. Specifically, the cross and residual layer was developed to facilitate high-latitude spatial alignment of code and query at the token level. By leveraging the residual interaction, a matching module is designed to preserve more code semantics and descriptive features, that enhances the adhesion between the code and its corresponding query text. Besides, to improve the model's comprehension of the code's inherent structure, a code representation structure named CSRG (Code Semantic Representation Graph) is proposed for jointly representing abstract syntax tree nodes and the data flow of the codes. According to the experimental results on two publicly available datasets containing 540k and 330k code segments, CSSAM significantly outperforms the baselines in terms of achieving the highest SR@1/5/10, MRR, and NDCG@50 on both datasets respectively. Moreover, the ablation study is conducted to quantitatively measure the impact of each key component of CSSAM on the efficiency and effectiveness of code search, which offers the insights into the improvement of advanced code search solutions.
abstract_zh: 尽管不断努力提高代码搜索的有效性和效率，但仍有两个问题尚未解决。首先，编程语言具有固有的强大的结构联系，并且以文本形式对代码进行特征挖掘会忽略其中包含的结构信息。其次，代码和查询之间存在潜在的语义关系，跨序列对齐代码和文本以使向量在相似性匹配期间在空间上一致是具有挑战性的。为了解决这两个问题，本文提出了一种名为CSSAM（代码语义和结构注意匹配）的代码搜索模型。 CSSAM通过引入语义和结构匹配机制，有效地提取和融合多维代码特征。具体来说，开发了交叉和残差层，以促进令牌级别的代码和查询的高纬度空间对齐。通过利用残差交互，匹配模块被设计为保留更多的代码语义和描述性特征，从而增强代码与其相应查询文本之间的附着力。此外，为了提高模型对代码内在结构的理解，提出了一种名为CSRG（代码语义表示图）的代码表示结构，用于联合表示抽象语法树节点和代码的数据流。根据在包含 540k 和 330k 代码段的两个公开数据集上的实验结果，CSSAM 在两个数据集上分别实现最高 SR@1/5/10、MRR 和 NDCG@50 方面显着优于基线。此外，还进行了消融研究，以定量测量 CSSAM 的每个关键组件对代码搜索效率和有效性的影响，这为改进高级代码搜索解决方案提供了见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CSSAM模型，通过注意力机制匹配代码语义和结构，解决代码搜索中的结构信息丢失和语义对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 现有代码搜索方法未能有效利用代码的结构信息，且难以实现代码与查询间的语义对齐，导致搜索效果受限。
AI.method: 设计CSSAM模型，融合语义与结构匹配机制，引入交叉残差层实现高纬度对齐，并提出CSRG结构联合表示抽象语法树与数据流。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上，CSSAM在SR@1/5/10、MRR和NDCG@50指标上均显著优于基线模型，消融实验验证了各模块有效性。
AI.conclusion: CSSAM通过结构化表示与多维特征融合有效提升代码搜索性能，为未来代码理解与检索提供新思路。

tldr: 本文提出CSSAM模型，通过注意力机制匹配代码语义和结构，解决代码搜索中的结构信息丢失和语义对齐问题。
motivation: 现有代码搜索方法未能有效利用代码的结构信息，且难以实现代码与查询间的语义对齐，导致搜索效果受限。
method: 设计CSSAM模型，融合语义与结构匹配机制，引入交叉残差层实现高纬度对齐，并提出CSRG结构联合表示抽象语法树与数据流。
result: 在两个公开数据集上，CSSAM在SR@1/5/10、MRR和NDCG@50指标上均显著优于基线模型，消融实验验证了各模块有效性。
conclusion: CSSAM通过结构化表示与多维特征融合有效提升代码搜索性能，为未来代码理解与检索提供新思路。
search_text: CSSAM:Code Search via Attention Matching of Code Semantics and Structures CSSAM：通过代码语义和结构的注意力匹配进行代码搜索 Despite the continuous efforts in improving both the effectiveness and efficiency of code search, two issues remained unsolved. First, programming languages have inherent strong structural linkages, and feature mining of code as text form would omit the structural information contained inside it. Second, there is a potential semantic relationship between code and query, it is challenging to align code and text across sequences so that vectors are spatially consistent during similarity matching. To tackle both issues, in this paper, a code search model named CSSAM (Code Semantics and Structures Attention Matching) is proposed. By introducing semantic and structural matching mechanisms, CSSAM effectively extracts and fuses multidimensional code features. Specifically, the cross and residual layer was developed to facilitate high-latitude spatial alignment of code and query at the token level. By leveraging the residual interaction, a matching module is designed to preserve more code semantics and descriptive features, that enhances the adhesion between the code and its corresponding query text. Besides, to improve the model's comprehension of the code's inherent structure, a code representation structure named CSRG (Code Semantic Representation Graph) is proposed for jointly representing abstract syntax tree nodes and the data flow of the codes. According to the experimental results on two publicly available datasets containing 540k and 330k code segments, CSSAM significantly outperforms the baselines in terms of achieving the highest SR@1/5/10, MRR, and NDCG@50 on both datasets respectively. Moreover, the ablation study is conducted to quantitatively measure the impact of each key component of CSSAM on the efficiency and effectiveness of code search, which offers the insights into the improvement of advanced code search solutions. 尽管不断努力提高代码搜索的有效性和效率，但仍有两个问题尚未解决。首先，编程语言具有固有的强大的结构联系，并且以文本形式对代码进行特征挖掘会忽略其中包含的结构信息。其次，代码和查询之间存在潜在的语义关系，跨序列对齐代码和文本以使向量在相似性匹配期间在空间上一致是具有挑战性的。为了解决这两个问题，本文提出了一种名为CSSAM（代码语义和结构注意匹配）的代码搜索模型。 CSSAM通过引入语义和结构匹配机制，有效地提取和融合多维代码特征。具体来说，开发了交叉和残差层，以促进令牌级别的代码和查询的高纬度空间对齐。通过利用残差交互，匹配模块被设计为保留更多的代码语义和描述性特征，从而增强代码与其相应查询文本之间的附着力。此外，为了提高模型对代码内在结构的理解，提出了一种名为CSRG（代码语义表示图）的代码表示结构，用于联合表示抽象语法树节点和代码的数据流。根据在包含 540k 和 330k 代码段的两个公开数据集上的实验结果，CSSAM 在两个数据集上分别实现最高 SR@1/5/10、MRR 和 NDCG@50 方面显着优于基线。此外，还进行了消融研究，以定量测量 CSSAM 的每个关键组件对代码搜索效率和有效性的影响，这为改进高级代码搜索解决方案提供了见解。 本文提出CSSAM模型，通过注意力机制匹配代码语义和结构，解决代码搜索中的结构信息丢失和语义对齐问题。 Yi Hu,Bo Cai,Yaoxiang Yu cs.SE,cs.AI,cs.IR

authors_text: Wenbo Zhang,Keren Fu,Zhuo Wang,Ge-Peng Ji,Qijun Zhao
title: Depth Quality-Inspired Feature Manipulation for Efficient RGB-D and Video Salient Object Detection
title_zh: 深度质量启发的特征操作可实现高效的 RGB-D 和视频显着目标检测
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2107.01779
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2107.01779
abstract: Recently CNN-based RGB-D salient object detection (SOD) has obtained significant improvement on detection accuracy. However, existing models often fail to perform well in terms of efficiency and accuracy simultaneously. This hinders their potential applications on mobile devices as well as many real-world problems. To bridge the accuracy gap between lightweight and large models for RGB-D SOD, in this paper, an efficient module that can greatly improve the accuracy but adds little computation is proposed. Inspired by the fact that depth quality is a key factor influencing the accuracy, we propose an efficient depth quality-inspired feature manipulation (DQFM) process, which can dynamically filter depth features according to depth quality. The proposed DQFM resorts to the alignment of low-level RGB and depth features, as well as holistic attention of the depth stream to explicitly control and enhance cross-modal fusion. We embed DQFM to obtain an efficient lightweight RGB-D SOD model called DFM-Net, where we in addition design a tailored depth backbone and a two-stage decoder as basic parts. Extensive experimental results on nine RGB-D datasets demonstrate that our DFM-Net outperforms recent efficient models, running at about 20 FPS on CPU with only 8.5Mb model size, and meanwhile being 2.9/2.4 times faster and 6.7/3.1 times smaller than the latest best models A2dele and MobileSal. It also maintains state-of-the-art accuracy when even compared to non-efficient models. Interestingly, further statistics and analyses verify the ability of DQFM in distinguishing depth maps of various qualities without any quality labels. Last but not least, we further apply DFM-Net to deal with video SOD (VSOD), achieving comparable performance against recent efficient models while being 3/2.3 times faster/smaller than the prior best in this field. Our code is available at https://github.com/zwbx/DFM-Net.

Extensive experimental results on nine RGB-D datasets demonstrate that our DFM-Net outperforms recent efficient models, running at about 20 FPS on CPU with only 8.5Mb model size, and meanwhile being 2.9/2.4 times faster and 6.7/3.1 times smaller than the latest best models A2dele and MobileSal. It also maintains state-of-the-art accuracy when even compared to non-efficient models. abstract_zh: 最近，基于CNN的RGB-D显着目标检测（SOD）在检测精度上取得了显着的提高。然而，现有模型往往无法同时在效率和准确性方面表现良好。这阻碍了它们在移动设备上的潜在应用以及许多现实世界的问题。为了弥补 RGB-D SOD 轻量级模型和大型模型之间的精度差距，本文提出了一种可以大大提高精度但几乎不增加计算量的高效模块。受深度质量是影响精度的关键因素这一事实的启发，我们提出了一种有效的深度质量启发的特征操作（DQFM）过程，它可以根据深度质量动态过滤深度特征。所提出的 DQFM 依靠低级 RGB 和深度特征的对齐，以及深度流的整体关注来显式控制和增强跨模态融合。我们嵌入 DQFM 以获得高效的轻量级 RGB-D SOD 模型（称为 DFM-Net），其中我们还设计了定制的深度主干和两级解码器作为基本部分。在 9 个 RGB-D 数据集上的大量实验结果表明，我们的 DFM-Net 优于最新的高效模型，在 CPU 上以约 20 FPS 的速度运行，模型大小仅为 8.5Mb，同时比最新的最佳模型 A2dele 和 MobileSal 快 2.9/2.4 倍，小 6.7/3.1 倍。即使与低效模型相比，它也能保持最先进的准确性。有趣的是，进一步的统计和分析验证了 DQFM 在没有任何质量标签的情况下区分各种质量的深度图的能力。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，我们进一步应用 DFM-Net 来处理视频 SOD (VSOD)，实现了与最新高效模型相当的性能，同时比该领域先前最好的模型快/小 3/2.3 倍。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/zwbx/DFM-Net 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效轻量的RGB-D和视频显著物体检测模型DFM-Net，通过深度质量启发的特征操作提升检测效率和精度。
AI.motivation: 现有RGB-D显著物体检测模型难以同时兼顾效率与精度，限制了其在移动设备和实际场景中的应用。
AI.method: 设计深度质量启发的特征操作模块（DQFM），动态过滤深度特征并增强跨模态融合，结合定制化深度主干网络和双阶段解码器构建DFM-Net。
AI.result: DFM-Net在九个RGB-D数据集上优于最新高效模型，CPU运行速度达20 FPS，模型体积仅8.5MB，且保持与非高效模型相当的精度；在视频SOD任务中也表现优异。
AI.conclusion: DQFM有效提升深度特征利用效率，DFM-Net在保持高精度的同时显著优化模型轻量化，适用于实时应用场景。

authors_text: Juan Zou,Cheng Li,Sen Jia,Ruoyou Wu,Tingrui Pei,Hairong Zheng,Shanshan Wang
title: SelfCoLearn: Self-supervised collaborative learning for accelerating dynamic MR imaging
title_zh: SelfCoLearn：用于加速动态 MR 成像的自我监督协作学习
comment: 22 pages,9 figures
comments: 22 pages,9 figures
abstract: Lately, deep learning has been extensively investigated for accelerating dynamic magnetic resonance (MR) imaging, with encouraging progresses achieved. However, without fully sampled reference data for training, current approaches may have limited abilities in recovering fine details or structures. To address this challenge, this paper proposes a self-supervised collaborative learning framework (SelfCoLearn) for accurate dynamic MR image reconstruction from undersampled k-space data. The proposed framework is equipped with three important components, namely, dual-network collaborative learning, reunderampling data augmentation and a specially designed co-training loss. The framework is flexible to be integrated with both data-driven networks and model-based iterative un-rolled networks. Our method has been evaluated on in-vivo dataset and compared it to four state-of-the-art methods. Results show that our method possesses strong capabilities in capturing essential and inherent representations for direct reconstructions from the undersampled k-space data and thus enables high-quality and fast dynamic MR imaging.
summary: Lately, deep learning has been extensively investigated for accelerating dynamic magnetic resonance (MR) imaging, with encouraging progresses achieved. However, without fully sampled reference data for training, current approaches may have limited abilities in recovering fine details or structures. To address this challenge, this paper proposes a self-supervised collaborative learning framework (SelfCoLearn) for accurate dynamic MR image reconstruction from undersampled k-space data. The proposed framework is equipped with three important components, namely, dual-network collaborative learning, reunderampling data augmentation and a specially designed co-training loss. The framework is flexible to be integrated with both data-driven networks and model-based iterative un-rolled networks. Our method has been evaluated on in-vivo dataset and compared it to four state-of-the-art methods. Results show that our method possesses strong capabilities in capturing essential and inherent representations for direct reconstructions from the undersampled k-space data and thus enables high-quality and fast dynamic MR imaging.
abstract_zh: 最近，深度学习在加速动态磁共振（MR）成像方面得到了广泛的研究，并取得了令人鼓舞的进展。然而，如果没有用于训练的完全采样参考数据，当前的方法在恢复精细细节或结构方面的能力可能有限。为了应对这一挑战，本文提出了一种自监督协作学习框架（SelfCoLearn），用于根据欠采样 k 空间数据进行精确的动态 MR 图像重建。所提出的框架配备了三个重要组成部分，即双网络协作学习、重采样数据增强和专门设计的协同训练损失。该框架可以灵活地与数据驱动网络和基于模型的迭代展开网络集成。我们的方法已经在体内数据集上进行了评估，并将其与四种最先进的方法进行了比较。结果表明，我们的方法具有强大的能力，可以捕获从欠采样 k 空间数据直接重建的基本和固有表示，从而实现高质量和快速的动态 MR 成像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督协作学习框架SelfCoLearn，用于加速动态磁共振成像（MR）的高质量重建。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在缺乏完整采样参考数据时，难以恢复动态MR图像的细节和结构，需改进重建精度与效率。
AI.method: 框架包含三个核心组件：双网络协作学习、重欠采样数据增强和联合训练损失函数，兼容数据驱动网络与模型驱动迭代网络。
AI.result: 在活体数据集上实验表明，该方法在欠采样k空间数据的直接重建中优于四种最先进方法，实现高质量动态MR成像。
AI.conclusion: SelfCoLearn通过自监督协作学习有效捕捉动态MR的内在特征，为加速高质量成像提供了新思路。

ai_content.conclusion: SelfCoLearn通过自监督协作学习有效捕捉动态MR的内在特征，为加速高质量成像提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督协作学习框架SelfCoLearn，用于加速动态磁共振成像（MR）的高质量重建。
motivation: 现有深度学习方法在缺乏完整采样参考数据时，难以恢复动态MR图像的细节和结构，需改进重建精度与效率。
method: 框架包含三个核心组件：双网络协作学习、重欠采样数据增强和联合训练损失函数，兼容数据驱动网络与模型驱动迭代网络。
result: 在活体数据集上实验表明，该方法在欠采样k空间数据的直接重建中优于四种最先进方法，实现高质量动态MR成像。
conclusion: SelfCoLearn通过自监督协作学习有效捕捉动态MR的内在特征，为加速高质量成像提供了新思路。
search_text: SelfCoLearn: Self-supervised collaborative learning for accelerating dynamic MR imaging SelfCoLearn：用于加速动态 MR 成像的自我监督协作学习 Lately, deep learning has been extensively investigated for accelerating dynamic magnetic resonance (MR) imaging, with encouraging progresses achieved. However, without fully sampled reference data for training, current approaches may have limited abilities in recovering fine details or structures. To address this challenge, this paper proposes a self-supervised collaborative learning framework (SelfCoLearn) for accurate dynamic MR image reconstruction from undersampled k-space data. The proposed framework is equipped with three important components, namely, dual-network collaborative learning, reunderampling data augmentation and a specially designed co-training loss. The framework is flexible to be integrated with both data-driven networks and model-based iterative un-rolled networks. Our method has been evaluated on in-vivo dataset and compared it to four state-of-the-art methods. Results show that our method possesses strong capabilities in capturing essential and inherent representations for direct reconstructions from the undersampled k-space data and thus enables high-quality and fast dynamic MR imaging. 最近，深度学习在加速动态磁共振（MR）成像方面得到了广泛的研究，并取得了令人鼓舞的进展。然而，如果没有用于训练的完全采样参考数据，当前的方法在恢复精细细节或结构方面的能力可能有限。为了应对这一挑战，本文提出了一种自监督协作学习框架（SelfCoLearn），用于根据欠采样 k 空间数据进行精确的动态 MR 图像重建。所提出的框架配备了三个重要组成部分，即双网络协作学习、重采样数据增强和专门设计的协同训练损失。该框架可以灵活地与数据驱动网络和基于模型的迭代展开网络集成。我们的方法已经在体内数据集上进行了评估，并将其与四种最先进的方法进行了比较。结果表明，我们的方法具有强大的能力，可以捕获从欠采样 k 空间数据直接重建的基本和固有表示，从而实现高质量和快速的动态 MR 成像。 本文提出了一种自监督协作学习框架SelfCoLearn，用于加速动态磁共振成像（MR）的高质量重建。 Juan Zou,Cheng Li,Sen Jia,Ruoyou Wu,Tingrui Pei,Hairong Zheng,Shanshan Wang eess.IV,cs.AI,cs.CV
